030101.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏔᏅ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᎧᏃᎲᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏦᎪᎯᏳᎭ,
030101.english: Forasmuch as many have taken in hand to set forth in order a declaration of those things which are most surely believed among us,
030101.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-ni-go-di-yu tsu-na-ne-lo-ta-nv gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi ka-no-hv-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya tso-go-hi-yu-ha,

030102.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎪᎩᏪᏎᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᏂᎪᎯᏙᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᎾᎵᏥᏙᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ^
030102.english: Even as they delivered them unto us, which from the beginning were eyewitnesses, and ministers of the word;
030102.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya ni-go-gi-we-se-lv na-s-gi di-da-le-ni-s-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv u-nv-sv u-ni-go-hi-do-lv-hi, a-le ka-no-he-dv u-na-li-tsi-do-nv-hi ge-sv-i^

030103.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᏅ ᏫᎬᏲᏪᎳᏁᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᎩᏰᎢᎸᏍᏗᏱ, ᏂᎯ ᎡᏣᎸᏉᏗ ᏗᎣᏈᎵ, ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏂᏰᏛᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ,
030103.english: It seemed good to me also, having had perfect understanding of all things from the very first, to write unto thee in order, most excellent Theophilus,
030103.phonetic: Na-s-quo a-yv o-si-yu a-gi-ye-lv-nv wi-gv-yo-we-la-ne-di-yi o-s-dv a-gi-ye-i-lv-s-di-yi, ni-hi e-tsa-lv-quo-di Di-o-qui-li, a-gi-s-qua-ni-ye-dv-ye-no ni-ga-dv hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-da-le-ni-s-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv,

030104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎡᏤᏲᏅᎢ.
030104.english: That thou mightest know the certainty of those things, wherein thou hast been instructed.
030104.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsa-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya ge-sv na-s-gi na-hna tsu-da-le-nv-dv e-tse-yo-nv-i.

030105.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏎ ᏧᏗᏱ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎡᎮ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏤᎦᎳᏯ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏆᏯ ᎠᎦᏘᏅᏔᏅ ᎨᎳ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏓᎵᎢᏃ ᎡᎳᏂ ᏧᏪᏥᏛᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎵᏏ ᏚᏙᎡᎢ.
030105.english: There was in the days of Herod, the king of Judaea, a certain priest named Zacharias, of the course of Abia: and his wife was of the daughters of Aaron, and her name was Elisabeth.
030105.phonetic: Na-hi-yu E-lo-dv u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-se Tsu-di-yi, gi-lo i-yu-s-di e-he a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi Tse-ga-la-ya tsu-do-i-dv, na-s-gi E-qua-ya a-ga-ti-nv-ta-nv ge-la ge-se-i, u-da-li-i-no E-la-ni tsu-we-tsi-dv-hi ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ge-se-i, a-le Li-si du-do-e-i.

030106.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏙᏗᎧᏅᎢ, ᏓᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏎ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ, ᎤᏐᏅ ᏂᎨᏥᎳᎾᏎᎲᎾ.
030106.english: And they were both righteous before God, walking in all the commandments and ordinances of the Lord blameless.
030106.phonetic: A-le i-tsu-la du-yu-go-dv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi ge-se U-ne-la-nv-hi do-di-ka-nv-i, da-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-se ni-ga-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-le u-li-ne-tsv i-ya-dv-ne-li-da-s-di ge-sv Yi-ho-wa tsu-tse-li-ga, u-so-nv ni-ge-tsi-la-na-se-hv-na.

030107.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏁᎲᎾ ᎨᏎ ᎤᏁᏥ, ᎵᏏᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏓᎷᎸᎥᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎨᏎᎢ.
030107.english: And they had no child, because that Elisabeth was barren, and they both were now well stricken in years.
030107.phonetic: A-le ne-hv-na ge-se u-ne-tsi, Li-si-ye-no v-tla yi-da-lu-lv-v-s-ge-i, a-le i-tsu-la hna-quo a-ni-ga-yv-li-ge ge-se-i.

030108.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᎤᎮᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᎵᏱᎶᎸ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᎨᎸᎢ,
030108.english: And it came to pass, that while he executed the priest's office before God in the order of his course,
030108.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi a-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he U-he-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i, na-hi-yu u-li-yi-lo-lv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi na-hna ge-lv-i,

030109.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏙᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨ ᎠᏜᏓᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏩᏴᎭ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
030109.english: According to the custom of the priest's office, his lot was to burn incense when he went into the temple of the Lord.
030109.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv a-tsi-lv-a-ne-lo-hi, na-s-gi u-wa-do-di ni-ga-li-s-di-s-ge a-dla ga-wa-sv-gi na-hi-yu wa-yv-ha Yi-ho-wa u-tse-li u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi.

030110.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏙᏱᏗᏢ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᏜᏓᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎬᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ.
030110.english: And the whole multitude of the people were praying without at the time of incense.
030110.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti-no yv-wi do-yi-di-tlv a-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge na-hi-yu a-dla ga-wa-sv-gi gv-do-di-yi u-s-qua-lv-hv.

030111.cherokee: ᏱᎰᏩᏃ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏛᏁᎴ ᎦᏙᎨ ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ ᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎬᏙᏗᏱ ᎪᏢᏒᎢ.
030111.english: And there appeared unto him an angel of the Lord standing on the right side of the altar of incense.
030111.phonetic: Yi-ho-wa-no u-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi gv-ni-ge-sv nu-dv-ne-le ga-do-ge a-ga-ti-si-di-tlv ga-wa-sv-gi gv-do-di-yi go-tlv-sv-i.

030112.english: And when Zacharias saw him, he was troubled, and fear fell upon him.

030113.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏤᎦᎳᏯ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏍᎦᎸᎩ; ᎭᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᏰᏃ ᎡᏣᏛᎦᏁᎸ; ᎠᎴ ᏣᏓᎵᎢ ᎵᏏ ᏓᏣᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎵ ᏤᏥ ᎠᏧᏣ, ᏣᏂᏃ ᏕᎯᏲᎥᎭ.
030113.english: But the angel said unto him, Fear not, Zacharias: for thy prayer is heard; and thy wife Elisabeth shall bear thee a son, and thou shalt call his name John.
030113.phonetic: A-se-no di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Tse-ga-la-ya tle-s-di tsa-s-ga-lv-gi; ha-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-ye-no e-tsa-dv-ga-ne-lv; a-le tsa-da-li-i Li-si da-tsa-na-nu-go-wi-se-li tse-tsi a-tsu-tsa, Tsa-ni-no de-hi-yo-v-ha.

030114.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎭᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏣᏰᎸᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏕᏅ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
030114.english: And thou shalt have joy and gladness; and many shall rejoice at his birth.
030114.phonetic: A-le ha-li-he-li-ge-s-di a-le o-s-dv tsa-ye-lv-se-s-di; a-le u-ni-tsa-ti a-na-li-he-li-ge-s-di u-de-nv i-yu-s-di.

030115.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏙᏗᎧᏅᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏴᏍᏕᏍᏗᏍᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎤᏥ ᎤᎾᏅᎪᏫᏒ ᎤᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ.
030115.english: For he shall be great in the sight of the Lord, and shall drink neither wine nor strong drink; and he shall be filled with the Holy Ghost, even from his mother's womb.
030115.phonetic: A-le a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di Yi-ho-wa do-di-ka-nv-i, v-tla a-le u-di-ta-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di a-le a-da-yv-s-de-s-di-s-gi; a-le u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-se-s-di Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, u-tsi u-na-nv-go-wi-sv u-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv.

030116.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏙᏛᎪᎸᏏ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏙᏛᎦᏔᎲᏍᏔᏂ.
030116.english: And many of the children of Israel shall he turn to the Lord their God.
030116.phonetic: A-le u-ni-tsa-ti I-si-li tsu-we-tsi do-dv-go-lv-si Yi-ho-wa U-na-ne-la-nv-hi i-di-tlv do-dv-ga-ta-hv-s-ta-ni.

030117.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏓᏳᏪᏅᎡᎵ [ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ] ᎢᎳᏯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏙᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏧᎦᏔᎲᏍᏗᏱ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ ᎠᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏫᏚᎦᏔᎲᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᏧᎦᏔᎲᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎥ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏫᏚᎦᏔᎲᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᏧᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏴᏫ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
030117.english: And he shall go before him in the spirit and power of Elias, to turn the hearts of the fathers to the children, and the disobedient to the wisdom of the just; to make ready a people prepared for the Lord.
030117.phonetic: A-le i-gv-yi da-yu-we-nv-e-li [U-gv-wi-yu-hi] I-la-ya na-s-gi-ya ge-se-s-di u-da-nv-do-gi a-le u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv-i, tsu-ga-ta-hv-s-di-yi tsu-ni-na-wi a-ni-ga-yv-li-ge-i di-ni-yo-li i-di-tlv wi-du-ga-ta-hv-s-do-di-yi, a-le nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na tsu-ga-ta-hv-s-di-yi u-na-da-nv-ti a-ni-ga-ta-hna-v i-di-tlv wi-du-ga-ta-hv-s-do-di-yi; tsu-dv-nv-i-s-do-di-yi yv-wi, U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-di-yi.

030118.cherokee: ᏤᎦᎳᏯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏆᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ?  ᎠᏆᏛᏐᏅᎯᏰᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᏓᎵᎢ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.
030118.english: And Zacharias said unto the angel, Whereby shall I know this? for I am an old man, and my wife well stricken in years.
030118.phonetic: Tse-ga-la-ya-no hi-a nu-we-se-le di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi, Ga-do-no a-qua-do-le-ho-hi-s-do-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi hi-a?  A-qua-dv-so-nv-hi-ye-no, a-le a-qua-da-li-i hna-quo a-ga-yv-li-ge-i.

030119.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏴ ᎨᏈᎵ, ᏥᏥᏙᎪ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏨᎩᏅᏒ ᎬᏯᎵᏃᎮᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ.
030119.english: And the angel answering said unto him, I am Gabriel, that stand in the presence of God; and am sent to speak unto thee, and to shew thee these glad tidings.
030119.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; A-yv Ge-qui-li, tsi-tsi-do-go U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i; a-le tsv-gi-nv-sv gv-ya-li-no-he-do-di-yi, a-le gv-na-nu-go-wi-se-di-yi hi-a na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv.

030120.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏨᎨᏫ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏣᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏅᎭ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏂᏦᎯᏳᏅᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏁᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᏆᎸᎲᎭ.
030120.english: And, behold, thou shalt be dumb, and not able to speak, until the day that these things shall be performed, because thou believest not my words, which shall be fulfilled in their season.
030120.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo tsv-ge-wi ge-se-s-di, a-le ge-tsa-ne-i-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-s-di gv-ni na-hi-yu i-ga na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-li-s-ta-nv-ha, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ni-tso-hi-yu-nv-na ge-sv tsi-ne-gv-i, na-s-gi a-se i-yu-li-s-do-di tsi-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-s-qua-lv-hv-ha.

030121.cherokee: ᏴᏫᏃ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏰ ᏤᎦᎳᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎨ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᏩᏯᎥ ᎤᏛᏅᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
030121.english: And the people waited for Zacharias, and marvelled that he tarried so long in the temple.
030121.phonetic: Yv-wi-no gv-wa-ga-ti-ye Tse-ga-la-ya, a-le u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-s-ge go-hi-di-yu wa-ya-v u-dv-nv-di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi.

030122.cherokee: ᏧᏄᎪᏨᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏗᎬᏩᎵᏃᎮᏙᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ; ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏫᏎᎸ ᏩᏯᎥ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ.  ᏓᏁᎶᏓᏁᎮᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏍᏕᏉ ᎤᏩᎨᏫ ᎨᏎᎢ.
030122.english: And when he came out, he could not speak unto them: and they perceived that he had seen a vision in the temple: for he beckoned unto them, and remained speechless.
030122.phonetic: Tsu-nu-go-tsv-no v-tla di-gv-wa-li-no-he-do-di yi-ge-se-i; u-na-do-le-ho-se-no u-ne-la-wi-se-lv wa-ya-v u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi.  Da-ne-lo-da-ne-he-no a-le nv-wa-s-de-quo u-wa-ge-wi ge-se-i.

030123.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏍᏆᏛ ᎠᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎤᏪᏅᏎ ᏧᏪᏅᏒᎢ.
030123.english: And it came to pass, that, as soon as the days of his ministration were accomplished, he departed to his own house.
030123.phonetic: A-le hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi hna-quo u-s-qua-dv a-se-lv-hi ge-sv i-go-hi-dv tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi, u-we-nv-se tsu-we-nv-sv-i.

030124.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎵᏏ ᎤᏁᎵᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏗᏍᎦᎳᏁ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏅᏙ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ,
030124.english: And after those days his wife Elisabeth conceived, and hid herself five months, saying,
030124.phonetic: O-ni-no i-yv-dv u-da-li-i Li-si u-ne-li-tse-i, a-le u-di-s-ga-la-ne hi-s-gi i-ya-nv-do, hi-a nu-we-se-i,

030125.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏆᏛᏁᎸ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏕᎠᏆᎧᎿᎭᏅ, ᎠᎩᎲᎡᏗᏱ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎥᏆᏓᏅᏖᏗᏱ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ.
030125.english: Thus hath the Lord dealt with me in the days wherein he looked on me, to take away my reproach among men.
030125.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi na-qua-dv-ne-lv Yi-ho-wa na-hi-yu i-ga de-a-qua-ka-hna-nv, a-gi-hv-e-di-yi u-de-ho-hi-s-di v-qua-da-nv-te-di-yi yv-wi a-ne-hv-i.

030126.cherokee: ᏑᏓᎵᏁᏃ ᎧᎸᎢ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎨᏈᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏅᏏᏛ ᎤᎷᏤ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ,
030126.english: And in the sixth month the angel Gabriel was sent from God unto a city of Galilee, named Nazareth,
030126.phonetic: Su-da-li-ne-no ka-lv-i di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi Ge-qui-li U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-nv-si-dv u-lu-tse ga-du-hv Ge-li-li Na-se-li-di tsu-do-i-dv,

030127.cherokee: ᎤᎷᏤᎴ ᎠᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏩ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏓᏴᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏛ ᎺᎵ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᎨᏎᎢ.
030127.english: To a virgin espoused to a man whose name was Joseph, of the house of David; and the virgin's name was Mary.
030127.phonetic: U-lu-tse-le a-dv na-s-gi Tso-wa tsu-do-i-dv a-s-ga-ya u-da-yv-s-di, na-s-gi De-wi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ge-se-i; na-s-gi-no a-dv Me-li tsu-do-i-dv ge-se-i.

030128.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᎷᏤᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎬᏲᎵᎦ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏣᎸᏉᏔᏅᎯ, ᏱᎰᏩ ᏫᏗᏣᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏓ; ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏂᎯ ᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛᏗ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ.
030128.english: And the angel came in unto her, and said, Hail, thou that art highly favoured, the Lord is with thee: blessed art thou among women.
030128.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no u-lu-tse-lv hi-a nu-we-se-i; Gv-yo-li-ga ni-hi e-tsa-lv-quo-ta-nv-hi, Yi-ho-wa wi-di-tsa-ka-hna-wa-di-da; a-ni-ge-yv a-ne-hv ni-hi wu-da-go-na-dv-di o-si-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di.

030129.cherokee: ᎤᎪᎲᏃ ᎤᏕᏯᏔᏁᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎵᎸᎢ.
030129.english: And when she saw him, she was troubled at his saying, and cast in her mind what manner of salutation this should be.
030129.phonetic: U-go-hv-no u-de-ya-ta-ne-le na-s-gi nu-we-se-lv-i, a-le u-da-nv-te-le nu-s-dv u-ye-lv-dv hi-a na-s-gi u-yo-li-lv-i.

030130.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎺᎵ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏍᎦᎸᎩ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏣᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏣᏩᏛᎲ.
030130.english: And the angel said unto her, Fear not, Mary: for thou hast found favour with God.
030130.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Me-li tle-s-di tsa-s-ga-lv-gi; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no o-s-dv tsa-ye-lv-di ge-sv tsa-wa-dv-hv.

030131.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏘᏁᎵᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᏘᎾᏄᎪᏫᏏ ᎠᏧᏣ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᏙᏘᏲᎢ.
030131.english: And, behold, thou shalt conceive in thy womb, and bring forth a son, and shalt call his name JESUS.
030131.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo ti-ne-li-tsi, a-le ti-na-nu-go-wi-si a-tsu-tsa, a-le Tsi-sa do-ti-yo-i.

030132.cherokee: ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ; ᏱᎰᏩᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏓᏳᏁᎵ ᎤᏙᏓ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏍᎩᎸᎢ.
030132.english: He shall be great, and shall be called the Son of the Highest: and the Lord God shall give unto him the throne of his father David:
030132.phonetic: A-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di na-s-gi, a-le wa-s-dv Ga-lv-la-di-yu e-hi U-we-tsi a-go-se-he-s-di; Yi-ho-wa-no U-ne-la-nv-hi da-yu-ne-li u-do-da de-wi u-we-s-gi-lv-i.

030133.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏭᏍᏗᏥᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
030133.english: And he shall reign over the house of Jacob for ever; and of his kingdom there shall be no end.
030133.phonetic: A-le wi-na-s-dv-na u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-se-s-di Tse-ga-qui u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv a-ne-hv-i; a-le na-s-gi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv wu-s-di-tsi-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-s-di.

030134.cherokee: ᎺᎵᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ; ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ, ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾᏃ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ?
030134.english: Then said Mary unto the angel, How shall this be, seeing I know not a man?
030134.phonetic: Me-li-no hi-a nu-we-se-le di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi; Ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da na-s-gi yi-ni-ga-li-s-da, ni-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na-no tsi-gi a-s-ga-ya?

030135.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏓᏣᎷᏤᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ ᎡᎯ ᏓᏣᏓᏩᏗᏍᏙᏔᏂ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏨᏓᏣᏕᏁᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ.
030135.english: And the angel answered and said unto her, The Holy Ghost shall come upon thee, and the power of the Highest shall overshadow thee: therefore also that holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
030135.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do da-tsa-lu-tse-li a-le u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv wa-s-dv Ga-lv-la-di-yu e-hi da-tsa-da-wa-di-s-do-ta-ni; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-quo na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu tsv-da-tsa-de-ne-li U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi a-go-se-he-s-di.

030136.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎢᏍᏗᏠᏱ ᎵᏏ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏧᏣ ᎤᏁᎵᏨ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏑᏓᎵᏁ ᎧᎳ ᎬᏩᏁᎵᏨᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎷᎸᎥᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏣᎪᏎᎲᎩ.
030136.english: And, behold, thy cousin Elisabeth, she hath also conceived a son in her old age: and this is the sixth month with her, who was called barren.
030136.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo i-s-di-tlo-yi Li-si na-s-quo a-tsu-tsa u-ne-li-tsv hna-quo a-ga-yv-li-ge ge-sv-i; a-le go-hi tsi-gi hna-quo su-da-li-ne ka-la gv-wa-ne-li-tsv-hi na-s-gi di-lu-lv-v-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na tsa-go-se-hv-gi.

030137.english: For with God nothing shall be impossible.

030138.cherokee: ᎺᎵᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏉ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎠᎨᏴ; ᏱᎰᏩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏣᏪᏒ ᏫᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏏ.  ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᏓᏅᎡᎴᎢ.
030138.english: And Mary said, Behold the handmaid of the Lord; be it unto me according to thy word. And the angel departed from her.
030138.phonetic: Me-li-no hi-a nu-we-se-i; Gv-ni-yu-quo a-quo u-nv-si-da-s-di a-ge-yv; Yi-ho-wa na-s-gi-ya ni-tsa-we-sv wi-na-qua-li-s-da-si.  Di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no u-da-nv-e-le-i.

030139.cherokee: ᎺᎵᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏚᎴᏁᎢ, ᎤᏩᏅᏤ ᎣᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ, ᏧᏗᏱ ᎦᏚᎲ ᏭᎷᏤᎢ;
030139.english: And Mary arose in those days, and went into the hill country with haste, into a city of Juda;
030139.phonetic: Me-li-no na-hi-yu du-le-ne-i, u-wa-nv-tse o-da-li ge-sv wu-lo-se-i, Tsu-di-yi ga-du-hv wu-lu-tse-i;

030140.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏭᏴᎴ ᏤᎦᎳᏯ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎵᎴ ᎵᏏ
030140.english: And entered into the house of Zacharias, and saluted Elisabeth.
030140.phonetic: A-le wu-yv-le Tse-ga-la-ya ga-ne-lv-i, a-le u-yo-li-le Li-si

030141.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎵᏏ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎺᎵ ᎤᏲᎵᎲᎢ, ᎠᏲᎵ ᎦᏁᎵᏒ ᎤᎵᏖᎸᏁᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎵᏏ ᎤᎧᎵᏤ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ,
030141.english: And it came to pass, that, when Elisabeth heard the salutation of Mary, the babe leaped in her womb; and Elisabeth was filled with the Holy Ghost:
030141.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi Li-si u-dv-ga-nv Me-li u-yo-li-hv-i, a-yo-li ga-ne-li-sv u-li-te-lv-ne-i; a-le Li-si u-ka-li-tse Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do,

030142.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎤᏁᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏂᎯ ᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛᏗ ᎡᏣᎸᏉᏗᏳ; ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᏨᏘᎾᏄᎪᏫᏏ.
030142.english: And she spake out with a loud voice, and said, Blessed art thou among women, and blessed is the fruit of thy womb.
030142.phonetic: A-le a-s-da-ya u-ne-tse-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; A-ni-ge-yv a-ne-hv ni-hi wu-da-go-na-dv-di e-tsa-lv-quo-di-yu; a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu na-s-gi ni-hi tsv-ti-na-nu-go-wi-si.

030143.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏥ ᏣᎩᎷᏥᏏ?
030143.english: And whence is this to me, that the mother of my Lord should come to me?
030143.phonetic: Ga-do-no da-ga-li-s-do-da a-yv na-s-gi tsi-na-qua-li-s-da-si, na-s-gi a-qua-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tsi tsa-gi-lu-tsi-si?

030144.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏰᏃ ᎠᏆᏛᎦᏅᏉ ᎯᏁᎬ ᏍᎩᏲᎵᎲᎢ, ᎠᏲᎵ ᏥᏁᎵᏒ ᎤᎵᏖᎸᏅ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᎬᎢ.
030144.english: For, lo, as soon as the voice of thy salutation sounded in mine ears, the babe leaped in my womb for joy.
030144.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-ye-no a-qua-dv-ga-nv-quo hi-ne-gv s-gi-yo-li-hv-i, a-yo-li tsi-ne-li-sv u-li-te-lv-nv a-li-he-li-gv-i.

030145.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏅᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏅᏧᏪᏎᎸ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ.
030145.english: And blessed is she that believed: for there shall be a performance of those things which were told her from the Lord.
030145.phonetic: A-le o-si-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di u-wo-hi-yu-nv-hi; na-s-gi-ye-no nv-tsu-we-se-lv Yi-ho-wa na-s-gi a-se nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni.

030146.cherokee: ᎺᎵᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᎭ ᏱᎰᏩ,
030146.english: And Mary said, My soul doth magnify the Lord,
030146.phonetic: Me-li-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, A-qua-da-nv-do u-tsa-ti ga-lv-quo-di-ha Yi-ho-wa,

030147.english: And my spirit hath rejoiced in God my Saviour.

030148.cherokee: ᏕᎤᎧᎿᎭᏅᏰᏃ ᎤᏲ ᏄᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏰᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᎾᏓᏁᏟᏴᏏᏒ ᏴᏫ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎬᏉᏎᎮᏍᏗ.
030148.english: For he hath regarded the low estate of his handmaiden: for, behold, from henceforth all generations shall call me blessed.
030148.phonetic: De-u-ka-hna-nv-ye-no u-yo nu-dv-hna-de-gv a-ge-yv u-nv-si-da-s-di; gv-ni-yu-quo-ye-no go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv na-na-da-ne-tli-yv-si-sv yv-wi ga-lv-quo-di-yu gv-quo-se-he-s-di.

030149.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏰᏃ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᎾᏆᏛᏁᎸ; ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎤᏙᎥᎢ.
030149.english: For he that is mighty hath done to me great things; and holy is his name.
030149.phonetic: U-li-ni-gi-dv-ye-no tsi-gi na-s-gi u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu na-qua-dv-ne-lv; a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu na-s-gi de-u-do-v-i.

030150.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏕᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎭ ᎬᏩᎾᏰᏍᎩ ᎾᎾᏓᏁᏟᏴᏏᏒᎢ.
030150.english: And his mercy is on them that fear him from generation to generation.
030150.phonetic: A-le u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv de-ga-na-nu-go-wi-se-ha gv-wa-na-ye-s-gi na-na-da-ne-tli-yv-si-sv-i.

030151.cherokee: ᎧᏃᎨᏂ ᎤᏮᏔᏅ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᎾᏢᏉᏗ ᏙᏧᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᏚᏗᎦᎴᏯᏍᏔᏅ.
030151.english: He hath shewed strength with his arm; he hath scattered the proud in the imagination of their hearts.
030151.phonetic: Ka-no-ge-ni u-wv-ta-nv u-na-nu-go-wi-sv u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv-i; u-na-tlv-quo-di do-tsu-na-da-nv-dv du-di-ga-le-ya-s-ta-nv.

030152.cherokee: ᏧᎾᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏚᏪᎧᎲᏒ ᎤᎾᏅᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏚᏌᎳᏓᏅ.
030152.english: He hath put down the mighty from their seats, and exalted them of low degree.
030152.phonetic: Tsu-na-li-ni-gi-dv du-we-ka-hv-sv u-na-nv-di-yi, a-le u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi du-sa-la-da-nv.

030153.cherokee: ᎠᎪᏄ ᏧᏂᏲᏏᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏚᎧᎵᎢᏍᏔᏅ, ᏧᏁᎿᎭᎢᏃ ᎠᏒᎭ ᏙᎤᏁᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᏚᏩᏁᎸᎩ.
030153.english: He hath filled the hungry with good things; and the rich he hath sent empty away.
030153.phonetic: A-go-nu tsu-ni-yo-si-s-gi o-s-dv ge-sv du-ka-li-i-s-ta-nv, tsu-ne-hna-i-no a-sv-ha do-u-ne-nv-s-di-yi ni-du-wa-ne-lv-gi.

030154.english: He hath holpen his servant Israel, in remembrance of his mercy;

030155.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸ ᏗᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎡᏆᎭᎻ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.
030155.english: As he spake to our fathers, to Abraham, and to his seed for ever.
030155.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya ni-du-we-se-lv di-gi-ga-yv-li-ge-i, E-qua-ha-mi, a-le na-s-gi tsu-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv ni-go-hi-lv-i.

030156.cherokee: ᎺᎵᏃ ᏦᎢ ᎢᏯᏅᏙ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎵᏏᏱ ᎤᏕᏁᎢ, ᎩᎳᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏧᏪᏅᏒ ᏫᎤᎶᏎᎢ.
030156.english: And Mary abode with her about three months, and returned to her own house.
030156.phonetic: Me-li-no tso-i i-ya-nv-do i-yv-dv Li-si-yi u-de-ne-i, gi-la-no u-wa-sv tsu-we-nv-sv wi-u-lo-se-i.

030157.cherokee: ᎵᏏᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎡᎴ ᎤᏕᏗᏱ ᎠᏲᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎ ᎠᏧᏣ.
030157.english: Now Elisabeth's full time came that she should be delivered; and she brought forth a son.
030157.phonetic: Li-si-no hna-quo u-s-qua-lv-e-le u-de-di-yi a-yo-li, a-le u-na-nu-go-wi-se a-tsu-tsa.

030158.cherokee: ᎾᎥᏃ ᎢᏳᎾᏓᎳ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏧᏩᎿᎭᎤᎾᏛᎦᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏪᏙᎵᏨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎤᎾᎵᎮᎵᏤᎢ.
030158.english: And her neighbours and her cousins heard how the Lord had shewed great mercy upon her; and they rejoiced with her.
030158.phonetic: Na-v-no i-yu-na-da-la a-le go-hu-s-di tsu-wa-hna u-na-dv-ga-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tsa-ti u-we-do-li-tsv-i, a-le i-tsu-la-ha u-na-li-he-li-tse-i.

030159.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᎵᏁ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏂᎱᏍᏕᏎᎸᎭ ᎠᏲᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏤᎦᎳᏯ ᏚᏃᎡᎢ, ᎤᏙᏓ ᏚᏙᎥ ᏚᏃᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
030159.english: And it came to pass, that on the eighth day they came to circumcise the child; and they called him Zacharias, after the name of his father.
030159.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi tsu-ne-li-ne i-ga u-ni-hu-s-de-se-lv-ha a-yo-li, a-le Tse-ga-la-ya du-no-e-i, u-do-da du-do-v du-no-s-ta-ne-i.

030160.cherokee: ᎤᏥᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎥᏞᏍᏗ; ᏣᏂᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ.
030160.english: And his mother answered and said, Not so; but he shall be called John.
030160.phonetic: U-tsi-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-i; V-tle-s-di; Tsa-ni-s-gi-ni a-go-se-he-s-di.

030161.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏥᏠᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᏱᏚᏙᎥ.
030161.english: And they said unto her, There is none of thy kindred that is called by this name.
030161.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i; V-tla gi-lo i-tsi-tlo-yi ge-sv na-s-gi yi-nu-s-di yi-du-do-v.

030162.cherokee: ᎤᏙᏓᏃ ᏓᎾᏁᎶᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᎾᏛᏛᏁ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏣᎪᏍᏗᏱ.
030162.english: And they made signs to his father, how he would have him called.
030162.phonetic: U-do-da-no da-na-ne-lo-da-ne-hv u-na-dv-dv-ne nu-s-dv u-du-li-s-gv tsa-go-s-di-yi.

030163.cherokee: ᎤᏔᏲᎴᏃ ᏗᎪᏪᎶᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏬᏪᎳᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ; ᏣᏂ ᏚᏙᎥ.  ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎢ.
030163.english: And he asked for a writing table, and wrote, saying, His name is John. And they marvelled all.
030163.phonetic: U-ta-yo-le-no di-go-we-lo-di-yi a-le u-wo-we-la-ne hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i; Tsa-ni du-do-v.  Ni-ga-dv-no u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se-i.

030164.cherokee: ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᎱᎵ ᎤᎵᏍᏚᎢᏎᎢ, ᎦᏃᎪᏃ ᎤᏕᎵᏌᏕᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏬᏂᏎ ᎤᎸᏉᏔᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
030164.english: And his mouth was opened immediately, and his tongue loosed, and he spake, and praised God.
030164.phonetic: Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv a-hu-li u-li-s-du-i-se-i, ga-no-go-no u-de-li-sa-de-se-i, a-le u-wo-ni-se u-lv-quo-ta-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi.

030165.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎬᏩᏚᏫᏛ ᏗᏂᏁᎸ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏂᎾᏰᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᏚᏃᏣᎶᏤ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎣᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏗᏱ.
030165.english: And fear came on all that dwelt round about them: and all these sayings were noised abroad throughout all the hill country of Judaea.
030165.phonetic: Na-hna-no gv-wa-du-wi-dv di-ni-ne-lv ni-ga-dv u-ni-na-ye-se-i; a-le ni-ga-dv na-s-gi hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv du-no-tsa-lo-tse ni-gv-na-dv o-da-li ge-sv Tsu-di-yi.

030166.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏱ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ; ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏲᎵ?  ᏱᎰᏩᏃ ᎤᏍᏕᎸᎯᏙᎮᎢ.
030166.english: And all they that heard them laid them up in their hearts, saying, What manner of child shall this be! And the hand of the Lord was with him.
030166.phonetic: Na-ni-v-no na-s-gi u-na-dv-ga-nv-hi tsu-ni-na-wi-yi u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-ta-ne-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i; Ga-do u-s-de-s-di hi-a a-yo-li?  Yi-ho-wa-no u-s-de-lv-hi-do-he-i.

030167.cherokee: ᎤᏙᏓᏃ ᏤᎦᎳᏯ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏎ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ;
030167.english: And his father Zacharias was filled with the Holy Ghost, and prophesied, saying,
030167.phonetic: U-do-da-no Tse-ga-la-ya u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-se Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, a-le u-do-le-ho-se hi-a nu-we-se-i;

030168.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ; ᏚᏩᏛᎰᎸᏰᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏚᎫᏴᎲ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏴᏫ.
030168.english: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel; for he hath visited and redeemed his people,
030168.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di Yi-ho-wa U-ne-la-nv-hi I-si-li u-na-tse-li-ga; du-wa-dv-ho-lv-ye-no a-le du-gu-yv-hv tsu-tse-li-ga yv-wi.

030169.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸ ᎤᏲᏅ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ, ᏕᏫ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏨ;
030169.english: And hath raised up an horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David;
030169.phonetic: A-le i-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv u-yo-nv i-ga-li-s-de-lv-do-di, De-wi u-nv-si-da-s-di u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv a-ne-hv u-na-nu-go-tsv;

030170.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏪᏒ ᏕᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏕᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ;
030170.english: As he spake by the mouth of his holy prophets, which have been since the world began:
030170.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya nu-we-sv de-gv-di-s-gv tsu-tse-li ge-tsi-lv-quo-di a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi u-na-de-nv-hi tsi-gi di-da-le-ni-s-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv;

030171.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏓᏚᏓᎳᎡᏗᏱ ᎨᎩᏍᎦᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᏂᎨᎬᏅ ᏗᏓᏚᏓᎳᎡᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎨᎩᏂᏆᏘᎯ;
030171.english: That we should be saved from our enemies, and from the hand of all that hate us;
030171.phonetic: Na-s-gi di-da-du-da-la-e-di-yi ge-gi-s-ga-gi, a-le a-s-da-ya ni-ge-gv-nv di-da-du-da-la-e-di-yi ni-ga-di-yu ge-gi-ni-qua-ti-hi;

030172.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏚᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏗᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏧᏪᏙᎵᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ,
030172.english: To perform the mercy promised to our fathers, and to remember his holy covenant;
030172.phonetic: I-yu-dv-ne-di-yi du-du-i-s-da-ne-lv di-gi-ga-yv-li-ge tsu-we-do-li-s-di-yi, a-le u-nv-da-di-s-di-yi u-tse-li ga-lv-quo-di-yu ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i,

030173.english: The oath which he sware to our father Abraham,

030174.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏓᏚᏓᎳᎡᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎨᎩᏍᎦᎩ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᏗᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᎡᏓᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ,
030174.english: That he would grant unto us, that we being delivered out of the hand of our enemies might serve him without fear,
030174.phonetic: Na-s-gi ge-da-du-da-la-e-lv-hi ge-sv ge-gi-s-ga-gi i-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-di-yi ni-di-na-ye-s-gv-na e-da-da-do-li-s-da-ne-di-yi,

030175.cherokee: ᏂᏗᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᎨᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎢᏓᎴᏂᏙᎲᎢ.
030175.english: In holiness and righteousness before him, all the days of our life.
030175.phonetic: Ni-di-s-ga-nv-na a-le du-yu-go-dv i-ge-da-s-di-yi a-ga-ta-hv ni-go-hi-lv i-da-le-ni-do-hv-i.

030176.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏃ ᎯᏲᎵ, ᏩᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎡᏦᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏘᏰᏅᎡᎵ ᏱᎰᏩ, ᎯᏯᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ;
030176.english: And thou, child, shalt be called the prophet of the Highest: for thou shalt go before the face of the Lord to prepare his ways;
030176.phonetic: Ni-hi-no hi-yo-li, wa-s-dv Ga-lv-la-di-yu e-hi u-tse-li a-do-le-ho-s-gi e-tso-se-he-s-di, ni-hi-ye-no i-gv-yi ti-ye-nv-e-li Yi-ho-wa, hi-ya-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-di-yi u-lo-hi-s-di-yi;

030177.cherokee: ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏧᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎨᏥᏁᎲ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ,
030177.english: To give knowledge of salvation unto his people by the remission of their sins,
030177.phonetic: Gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsu-wa-ne-di-yi tsu-tse-li yv-wi na-s-gi u-na-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv-i, ga-ge-tsi-ne-hv u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-i,

030178.cherokee: ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏣᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ ᏗᏰᎵᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏩᏛᎯᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ,
030178.english: Through the tender mercy of our God; whereby the dayspring from on high hath visited us,
030178.phonetic: Yi-ho-wa u-da-do-li-tsa-ti-yu ge-sv I-ga-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi tsi-ni-ga-li-s-do-di-ha i-ga-ga-ti di-ye-li-hi-s-di-s-gi ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi i-gi-wa-dv-hi-lv-hi tsi-gi,

030179.cherokee: ᎢᎦ ᏧᏘᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏓᏩᏗᏍᏙᏛ ᏣᏂᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏖᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎦᏅᏅᎢ.
030179.english: To give light to them that sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace.
030179.phonetic: I-ga tsu-ti-s-da-ne-di-yi u-li-si-gv a-le a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv u-da-wa-di-s-do-dv tsa-ni-na, a-le di-ga-te-nv-s-di-yi nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ga-nv-nv-i.

030180.cherokee: ᎠᏲᎵᏃ ᎠᏛᏍᎨᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎧᏁᏉᎨ ᎤᎵᏂᎪᏍᎬ ᎤᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎾᎨᏉ ᎡᎮᎢ ᎬᏂ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏚᏛᏁᎸ ᎢᏏᎵ.
030180.english: And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, and was in the deserts till the day of his shewing unto Israel.
030180.phonetic: A-yo-li-no a-dv-s-ge-i a-le ka-ne-quo-ge u-li-ni-go-s-gv u-da-nv-dv-i, a-le i-na-ge-quo e-he-i gv-ni gv-ni-ge-sv ni-du-dv-ne-lv I-si-li.

030201.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏏᏌ ᎣᎦᏍᏓ ᎤᏁᏨᎯ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏤ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎨᎦᏎᏍᏗᏱ.
030201.english: And it came to pass in those days, that there went out a decree from Caesar Augustus, that all the world should be taxed.
030201.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi Si-sa O-ga-s-da u-ne-tsv-hi u-na-nu-go-tse ni-gv-na-dv e-lo-hi ge-ga-se-s-di-yi.

030202.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎾᏎᎵᏙᎴ ᎠᏏ ᏌᎵᏂ ᏏᎵᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏂᎨᏎᎢ.
030202.english: (And this taxing was first made when Cyrenius was governor of Syria.)
030202.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a u-na-se-li-do-le a-si Sa-li-ni Si-li-yi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ni-ge-sv-na ni-ge-se-i.

030203.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏁᏅᏎ ᎨᎦᏎᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᏙᏓᏂᏚᎲᎢ.
030203.english: And all went to be taxed, every one into his own city.
030203.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-dv u-ne-nv-se ge-ga-se-s-di-yi a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv do-da-ni-du-hv-i.

030204.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏦᏩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎤᏂᎩᏎᎢ ᎤᏄᎪᏤ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᏭᎷᏤ ᏧᏗᏱ, ᏕᏫ ᏧᏪᏚᎲᎢ, ᎦᏚᏱ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᏕᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ ᎤᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎨᏎᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏕᏫ,
030204.english: And Joseph also went up from Galilee, out of the city of Nazareth, into Judaea, unto the city of David, which is called Bethlehem; (because he was of the house and lineage of David:)
030204.phonetic: A-le Tso-wa na-s-quo Ge-li-li u-ni-gi-se-i u-nu-go-tse Na-se-li-di ga-du-hv-i, wu-lu-tse Tsu-di-yi, De-wi tsu-we-du-hv-i, ga-du-yi tsu-do-i-dv, De-wi-ye-no u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ge-se-i u-ga-yv-li-ge ge-se-i a-le De-wi,

030205.cherokee: ᎨᎦᏎᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏰᎸᏎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎺᎵ ᎤᏓᏴᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏁᎵᏛ ᎨᏎᎢ.
030205.english: To be taxed with Mary his espoused wife, being great with child.
030205.phonetic: Ge-ga-se-s-di-yi u-ye-lv-se u-wa-sv a-le Me-li u-da-yv-s-di, na-s-gi ga-ne-li-dv ge-se-i.

030206.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏏ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᏙᎮᎢ, ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎮ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗᏱ.
030206.english: And so it was, that, while they were there, the days were accomplished that she should be delivered.
030206.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi a-si na-hna a-ne-do-he-i, u-s-qua-lv-he a-yo-li u-na-nu-go-wi-s-di-yi.

030207.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏃ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏧᏣ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏣᏄᎳᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏐᏈᎵ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎤᎸᏁᎢ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏳᏜᏓᏅᏕ ᏧᏂᏒᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
030207.english: And she brought forth her firstborn son, and wrapped him in swaddling clothes, and laid him in a manger; because there was no room for them in the inn.
030207.phonetic: U-na-nu-go-wi-se-no i-gv-yi e-hi u-we-tsi a-tsu-tsa, a-le u-we-tsa-nu-la-ne-i, a-le so-qui-li u-na-li-s-da-yv-di-yi u-lv-ne-i; v-tla-ye-no yu-dla-nv-de tsu-ni-sv-s-di-yi a-da-ne-lv-i.

030208.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎾᎥᎢ ᎠᏫ-ᏗᏂᎦᏘᏯ ᎠᏁᏙᎮ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᏫ ᏓᏂᎦᏘᏰ ᏒᏃᏱ.
030208.english: And there were in the same country shepherds abiding in the field, keeping watch over their flock by night.
030208.phonetic: Na-hna-no na-v-i a-wi--di-ni-ga-ti-ya a-ne-do-he u-dla-nv-dv-i, a-wi da-ni-ga-ti-ye sv-no-yi.

030209.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏚᎸᏌᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏚᎾᏚᏫᏍᏔᏁᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᎴᎢ.
030209.english: And, lo, the angel of the Lord came upon them, and the glory of the Lord shone round about them: and they were sore afraid.
030209.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-no di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi Yi-ho-wa u-tse-li-ga u-ni-lu-tse-le-i, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu du-lv-sa-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga du-na-du-wi-s-ta-ne-i a-le u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-ni-s-ga-le-i.

030210.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏍᎦᎢᎮᏍᏗ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏰᏃ ᎢᏨᏲᎯᏏ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ, ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏛᎪᏗ.
030210.english: And the angel said unto them, Fear not: for, behold, I bring you good tidings of great joy, which shall be to all people.
030210.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; Tle-s-di yi-tsi-s-ga-i-he-s-di, gv-ni-yu-quo-ye-no i-tsv-yo-hi-si o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv u-tsa-ti a-li-he-li-s-di, na-ni-v yv-wi u-na-dv-go-di.

030211.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏰᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎢᏣᏕᏁᎸ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏚᎲᎢ, ᎢᏥᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
030211.english: For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Saviour, which is Christ the Lord.
030211.phonetic: Go-hi-ye-no i-ga i-tsa-de-ne-lv De-wi u-we-du-hv-i, I-tsi-s-de-li-s-gi na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

030212.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏙᎯᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᏓᏰᏥᏩᏛᎯ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎠᏥᏣᏄᎴᏍᏗ, ᏐᏈᎵ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎦᏅᎨᏍᏗ.
030212.english: And this shall be a sign unto you; Ye shall find the babe wrapped in swaddling clothes, lying in a manger.
030212.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi i-tsa-do-hi-ho-hi-s-do-di ge-se-s-di; Da-ye-tsi-wa-dv-hi a-yo-li a-tsi-tsa-nu-le-s-di, so-qui-li u-na-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ga-nv-ge-s-di.

030213.cherokee: ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎬᏩᎵᎪᏁᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏂᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ;
030213.english: And suddenly there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly host praising God, and saying,
030213.phonetic: Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv u-ni-tsa-ti ga-lv-la-di a-ne-hi gv-wa-li-go-ne-le di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi, U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ni-lv-quo-di-s-ge-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i;

030214.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ, ᎡᎶᎯᏃ ᏙᎯᎣ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ.
030214.english: Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men.
030214.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi wa-s-dv ga-lv-la-di-yu, e-lo-hi-no do-hi-o ge-se-s-di, o-s-dv ge-ga-da-nv-te-s-ge-s-di yv-wi.

030215.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏩᎾᏓᏅᎡᎸ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏫᎤᏂᎶᏒ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎴ ᎠᏫ-ᏗᏂᎦᏘᏯ; Ꭷ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎦᏚᏱ ᎢᏕᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏓᏙᎴᎰᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᏂᎬᏂᏏ.
030215.english: And it came to pass, as the angels were gone away from them into heaven, the shepherds said one to another, Let us now go even unto Bethlehem, and see this thing which is come to pass, which the Lord hath made known unto us.
030215.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi gv-wa-na-da-nv-e-lv, ga-lv-la-di wi-u-ni-lo-sv, hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-le a-wi--di-ni-ga-ti-ya; Ka, hna-quo ga-du-yi i-de-na, a-le wi-da-do-le-ho-hi na-s-gi hi-a nu-li-s-ta-nv-i, na-s-gi Yi-ho-wa gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-ni-gv-ni-si.

030216.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏗᏳᏃ ᏭᏂᎷᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᏩᏛᎮ ᎺᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏦᏩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏲᎵ ᏐᏈᎵ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎦᏅᎨᎢ.
030216.english: And they came with haste, and found Mary, and Joseph, and the babe lying in a manger.
030216.phonetic: U-li-s-di-yu-no wu-ni-lu-tse-i, a-le du-ni-wa-dv-he Me-li a-le Tso-wa, a-le a-yo-li so-qui-li u-na-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ga-nv-ge-i.

030217.cherokee: ᎤᏂᎪᎲᏃ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎵᏙᎴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎨᏥᏃᎮᎮᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎠᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
030217.english: And when they had seen it, they made known abroad the saying which was told them concerning this child.
030217.phonetic: U-ni-go-hv-no u-ni-no-he-li-do-le nu-s-dv ge-tsi-no-he-he-lv na-s-gi a-yo-li a-tsi-ne-i-s-di-s-gv-i.

030218.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎬᏩᏂᏃᎮᎮᎸ ᎠᏫ-ᏗᏂᎦᏘᏯ.
030218.english: And all they that heard it wondered at those things which were told them by the shepherds.
030218.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no u-na-dv-ga-nv-hi u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se nu-s-dv gv-wa-ni-no-he-he-lv a-wi--di-ni-ga-ti-ya.

030219.cherokee: ᎺᎵᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎯᎶᎡ ᏧᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
030219.english: But Mary kept all these things, and pondered them in her heart.
030219.phonetic: Me-li-s-gi-ni na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv u-s-qua-ni-go-ta-ne-i, a-le na-s-gi u-da-nv-te-hi-lo-e tsu-da-nv-dv-i.

030220.cherokee: ᎠᏫᏃ-ᏗᏂᎦᏘᏯ ᎢᎤᎾᏨᏎᎢ, ᎠᏂᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᏤᎮ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎪᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎨᏥᏃᏁᎸᎢ.
030220.english: And the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all the things that they had heard and seen, as it was told unto them.
030220.phonetic: A-wi-no--di-ni-ga-ti-ya i-u-na-tsv-se-i, a-ni-lv-quo-di-s-ge a-le a-na-li-he-li-tse-he u-ne-la-nv-hi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge ni-ga-v u-na-dv-ga-nv a-le u-ni-go-hv-i, na-s-gi nu-s-dv ge-tsi-no-ne-lv-i.

030221.cherokee: ᏧᏁᎵᏁᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏎᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏲᎵ, ᏥᏌ ᏚᏃᎡᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏂᏚᏬᎡ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎾᏥᏁᎵᎬᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ.
030221.english: And when eight days were accomplished for the circumcising of the child, his name was called JESUS, which was so named of the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
030221.phonetic: Tsu-ne-li-ne-no i-ga u-s-qua-lv-hv na-s-gi a-hu-s-de-se-di ge-sv a-yo-li, Tsi-Sa du-no-e-i, na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ni-du-wo-e a-si-quo na-tsi-ne-li-gv-na ge-se-i.

030222.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᎦᎸᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎼᏏ ᎤᏬᏪᎳᏅᎯ, ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎤᏂᏃᎴ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏂᎧᏁᏗᏱ;
030222.english: And when the days of her purification according to the law of Moses were accomplished, they brought him to Jerusalem, to present him to the Lord;
030222.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-s-qua-lv-hv u-na-da-nv-ga-lv-di-yi na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di Mo-si u-wo-we-la-nv-hi, Tsi-lu-si-li-mi u-ni-no-le Yi-ho-wa u-ni-ka-ne-di-yi;

030223.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎼᎰᏩ ᏣᏥᎵᎦ; ᎾᏂᎥ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᎾᏕᏅᎯ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏣᏥᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᎪᏎᎮᏍᏗ;
030223.english: (As it is written in the law of the Lord, Every male that openeth the womb shall be called holy to the Lord;)
030223.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv go-we-lv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi Mo-ho-wa tsa-tsi-li-ga; Na-ni-v i-gv-yi u-na-de-nv-hi a-ni-s-ga-ya Yi-ho-wa Tsa-tsi-yo-hi-se-lv-hi ge-go-se-he-s-di;

030224.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ; ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏧᎴᏗᏂᏍᎪᏂᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᏂᏛ ᏬᏱ.
030224.english: And to offer a sacrifice according to that which is said in the law of the Lord, A pair of turtledoves, or two young pigeons.
030224.phonetic: A-le a-tsi-lv--ge-la-s-di u-na-li-s-go-lv-do-di-yi na-s-gi-ya hi-a ni-ga-we-s-gv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di Yi-ho-wa u-tse-li-ga; A-ni-ta-li tsu-le-di-ni-s-go-ni-hi, a-le a-ni-ta-li a-ni-dv wo-yi.

030225.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎡᎮ ᏏᎻᏯᏂ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎩ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎦᏘᏰ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎨᏥᏄᏬᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏔᎵ ᎤᏛᏗᏕᎨᎢ.
030225.english: And, behold, there was a man in Jerusalem, whose name was Simeon; and the same man was just and devout, waiting for the consolation of Israel: and the Holy Ghost was upon him.
030225.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya Tsi-lu-si-li-mi e-he Si-mi-ya-ni tsu-do-i-dv; a-le na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ka-hna-wa-de-gi ge-se-i, a-ga-ti-ye I-si-li ge-tsi-nu-wo-hi-s-do-di-yi; Ga-lv-quo-di-yu-no A-da-nv-do ta-li u-dv-di-de-ge-i.

030226.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎪᎲᎯ ᏱᎩ
030226.english: And it was revealed unto him by the Holy Ghost, that he should not see death, before he had seen the Lord's Christ.
030226.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-lv-hi ge-se Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, na-s-gi a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv u-go-wa-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv gv-ni Yi-ho-wa u-tse-li Ga-lo-ne-dv u-go-hv-hi yi-gi

030227.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎮᎸᎯ ᏭᎷᏤ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ; ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨᏃ ᎤᏂᏴᏔᏂᎸ ᎠᏲᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎬᏅ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ,
030227.english: And he came by the Spirit into the temple: and when the parents brought in the child Jesus, to do for him after the custom of the law,
030227.phonetic: A-le a-da-nv-do u-da-nv-te-he-lv-hi wu-lu-tse u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi; tsu-ga-yv-li-ge-no u-ni-yv-ta-ni-lv a-yo-li Tsi-sa na-s-gi ni-gv-nv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di i-yu-na-dv-ne-di-yi,

030228.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎸᏉᏔᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ;
030228.english: Then took he him up in his arms, and blessed God, and said,
030228.phonetic: Hna-quo na-s-gi u-ne-se-i, a-le u-lv-quo-ta-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi, hi-a nu-we-se-i;

030229.cherokee: ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎯᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏕᎯᏲᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏣᏪᏒ ᏣᏁᏨᎢ;
030229.english: Lord, now lettest thou thy servant depart in peace, according to thy word:
030229.phonetic: Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, hna-quo hi-nv-si-da-s-di nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv de-hi-yo-s-ga, na-s-gi-ya ni-tsa-we-sv tsa-ne-tsv-i;

030230.english: For mine eyes have seen thy salvation,

030231.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏓᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ,
030231.english: Which thou hast prepared before the face of all people;
030231.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsa-da-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-gi na-ni-v yv-wi a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i,

030232.cherokee: ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ ᏧᏂᎸᏌᏓᏕᏗ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏣᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
030232.english: A light to lighten the Gentiles, and the glory of thy people Israel.
030232.phonetic: I-ga--ga-ti tsu-ni-lv-sa-da-de-di Tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv di-tsa-tse-li yv-wi I-si-li u-na-tse-li-ga.

030233.cherokee: ᏦᏩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎤᏥ ᎠᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎨ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ.
030233.english: And Joseph and his mother marvelled at those things which were spoken of him.
030233.phonetic: Tso-wa-no a-le a-yo-li u-tsi a-ni-s-qua-ni-go-s-ge nu-s-dv a-tsi-ne-i-s-di-s-gv na-s-gi.

030234.cherokee: ᎻᎻᏯᏂᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏚᏁᏤᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎺᎵ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎤᏥ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎠᏥᎧᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏧᏂᏅᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᎴᎯᏐᏙᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎤᎾᏡᏙᏗ ᎠᏂᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
030234.english: And Simeon blessed them, and said unto Mary his mother, Behold, this child is set for the fall and rising again of many in Israel; and for a sign which shall be spoken against;
030234.phonetic: Mi-mi-ya-ni-no o-s-dv du-ne-tse-le-i, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-le Me-li a-yo-li u-tsi, Gv-ni-yu-quo hi-a na-s-gi a-yo-li a-tsi-ka-nv na-s-gi I-si-li a-ne-hi u-ni-tsa-ti tsu-ni-nv-i-s-di-yi a-le tsu-na-le-hi-so-do-di-yi; a-le u-ye-lv-dv u-na-tlu-do-di a-ni-wo-ni-s-gv-i.

030235.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏓᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏱ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ: ᎥᎥ, ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏨᏒ ᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᏓᏣᏘᎵ.
030235.english: (Yea, a sword shall pierce through thy own soul also,) that the thoughts of many hearts may be revealed.
030235.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-ni-tsa-ti nu-s-dv da-na-da-nv-te-s-gv tsu-ni-na-wi-yi gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi: V-v, a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv na-s-quo tsv-sv tsa-da-nv-do da-tsa-ti-li.

030236.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎡᏂ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎡᎮᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏆᏄᎡᎵ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎡᏌ ᎠᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᎤᏠᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᏛᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏛᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎾᏨᏛ;
030236.english: And there was one Anna, a prophetess, the daughter of Phanuel, of the tribe of Aser: she was of a great age, and had lived with an husband seven years from her virginity;
030236.phonetic: A-le gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-ge-yv E-ni tsu-do-i-dv a-do-le-ho-s-gi e-he-i, na-s-gi Qua-nu-e-li u-we-tsi ge-se-i, E-sa a-ni-la-s-da-lv u-tlo-yi, na-s-gi u-tsa-ti a-ga-yv-li-ge ge-se-i, a-le ga-li-quo-gi i-tsu-de-ti-yv-dv u-na-ne-la-dv-hi ge-se a-s-ga-ya a-dv-quo ge-sv tsu-na-tsv-dv;

030237.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏬᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᎨᏎ ᏁᎳᏍᎪᎯ ᏅᎩᎦᎵ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏳᏕᏘᏴᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏓᏅᏍᎨ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏉ ᏓᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏎᎢ ᎠᎹᏟ ᎬᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏂᏚᎵᏏᏂᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒᎢ.
030237.english: And she was a widow of about fourscore and four years, which departed not from the temple, but served God with fastings and prayers night and day.
030237.phonetic: A-le u-wo-su-lo-tsv-hi ge-se ne-la-s-go-hi nv-gi-ga-li i-yv-dv i-yu-de-ti-yv-dv, na-s-gi v-tla yi-da-nv-s-ge u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, U-ne-la-nv-hi-quo da-ka-hna-wa-di-se-i a-ma-tli gv-s-gv a-le a-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv ni-du-li-si-ni-sv a-le ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv-i.

030238.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᎯᏳᏉ ᎤᎷᏤ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏤᎴ ᏱᎰᏩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎧᏁᎢᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎠᏂᎦᏖᏃᎯ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
030238.english: And she coming in that instant gave thanks likewise unto the Lord, and spake of him to all them that looked for redemption in Jerusalem.
030238.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na-s-quo na-hi-yu-quo u-lu-tse u-li-he-li-tse-le Yi-ho-wa, a-le na-s-gi de-ka-ne-i-s-da-ne-he na-ni-v-quo Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ne-hi a-ni-ga-te-no-hi a-gu-yv-do-di ge-sv u-na-nu-go-i-s-di-yi.

030239.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏛᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎢᎤᎾᏨᏎ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏭᏂᎶᏎ, ᎤᏅᏒ ᏧᏂᏚᎲ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᏭᏂᎷᏤᎢ.
030239.english: And when they had performed all things according to the law of the Lord, they returned into Galilee, to their own city Nazareth.
030239.phonetic: U-ni-s-qua-dv-no ni-ga-dv i-ya-dv-ne-li-da-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di Yi-ho-wa u-tse-li-ga, i-u-na-tsv-se Ge-li-li wu-ni-lo-se, u-nv-sv tsu-ni-du-hv Na-se-li-di wu-ni-lu-tse-i.

030240.cherokee: ᎠᏲᎵᏃ ᎠᏛᏍᎨᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏛ ᎠᎵᏂᎪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᎢ.
030240.english: And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, filled with wisdom: and the grace of God was upon him.
030240.phonetic: A-yo-li-no a-dv-s-ge-i a-le u-da-nv-dv a-li-ni-go-s-ge-i, u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-se a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv du-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-i.

030241.cherokee: ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨᏃ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏁᎨ ᏂᏓᏕᏘᏴᎯᏒ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᏆᎵᏍᎬ ᎢᏳᎢ.
030241.english: Now his parents went to Jerusalem every year at the feast of the passover.
030241.phonetic: Tsu-ga-yv-li-ge-no Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ne-ge ni-da-de-ti-yv-hi-sv ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi a-s-qua-li-s-gv i-yu-i.

030242.cherokee: ᏔᎳᏚᏃ ᎢᏳᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎨᏎ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎤᏁᏅᎭ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬ ᎢᏳᎢ.
030242.english: And when he was twelve years old, they went up to Jerusalem after the custom of the feast.
030242.phonetic: Ta-la-du-no i-yu-de-ti-yv-dv ge-se Tsi-lu-si-li-mi u-ne-nv-ha na-s-gi-ya i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv i-yu-i.

030243.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏛᏃ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᏚᎵᏒᏍᏛᎢ, ᎥᎤᎾᏨᏏᏗᏒ ᎠᏲᎵ ᏥᏌ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏗᎤᏗᎩᏰᎢ, ᏦᏩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏁᎵᏍᎨᎢ.
030243.english: And when they had fulfilled the days, as they returned, the child Jesus tarried behind in Jerusalem; and Joseph and his mother knew not of it.
030243.phonetic: U-ni-s-qua-dv-no i-go-hi-dv du-li-sv-s-dv-i, v-u-na-tsv-si-di-sv a-yo-li Tsi-sa Tsi-lu-si-li-mi di-u-di-gi-ye-i, Tso-wa-no a-le u-tsi v-tla yi-ne-li-s-ge-i.

030244.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏑᎾᏓᏡᎩ ᎠᎾᎢᏒ ᎨᎳᏗ ᎠᏁᎵᏍᎬ ᏏᎦ ᎡᏅᏍᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏁᏅᏎᎢ; ᎪᎱᏍᏗᏃ ᏧᏅᏅ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᎦᏔᎯ ᎠᏂᏅ ᎤᏂᏲᎴᎢ.
030244.english: But they, supposing him to have been in the company, went a day's journey; and they sought him among their kinsfolk and acquaintance.
030244.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no su-na-da-tlu-gi a-na-i-sv ge-la-di a-ne-li-s-gv si-ga e-nv-s-di i-yv-dv u-ne-nv-se-i; go-hu-s-di-no tsu-nv-nv a-le di-na-da-ga-ta-hi a-ni-nv u-ni-yo-le-i.

030245.english: And when they found him not, they turned back again to Jerusalem, seeking him.

030246.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏂᏩᏛᎮ ᎤᏛᏃᎯ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎤᏬᎴ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᏂᏅ ᏗᎾᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᏓᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏛᏛᎮᎸᎥᏍᎨᎢ.
030246.english: And it came to pass, that after three days they found him in the temple, sitting in the midst of the doctors, both hearing them, and asking them questions.
030246.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi tso-i-ne i-ga u-ni-wa-dv-he u-dv-no-hi di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, u-wo-le a-ye-li a-ni-nv di-na-de-yo-hv-s-gi da-dv-da-s-da-ne-he a-le da-dv-dv-he-lv-v-s-ge-i.

030247.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎬᏩᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎ ᏃᏒ ᎪᎵᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᎲᏍᎬ ᏕᎦᏬᎯ ᎵᏴᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
030247.english: And all that heard him were astonished at his understanding and answers.
030247.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no gv-wa-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se no-sv go-li-gv-i, a-le gv-wa-dv-dv-hv-s-gv de-ga-wo-hi-li-yv-s-da-ne-hv-i.

030248.cherokee: ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨᏃ ᎬᏩᎪᎲ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎢ; ᎤᏥᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ ᎠᏇᏥ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᏅᏍᎩᎾᏛᏂᏏᏉ?  ᏣᏙᏓ ᎢᏍᏛᏲᎲᎩ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎣᎩᎾᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎬᎩ.
030248.english: And when they saw him, they were amazed: and his mother said unto him, Son, why hast thou thus dealt with us? behold, thy father and I have sought thee sorrowing.
030248.phonetic: Tsu-ga-yv-li-ge-no gv-wa-go-hv u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se-i; u-tsi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i A-que-tsi, ga-do-no nv-s-gi-na-dv-ni-si-quo?  Tsa-do-da i-s-dv-yo-hv-gi u-we-li-hi-s-di o-gi-na-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gv-gi.

030249.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏍᎩᏂᏲᎮᎢ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏍᏗᎦᏔᎮ ᎡᏙᏙᏱ ᎠᏎ ᎠᏇᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
030249.english: And he said unto them, How is it that ye sought me? wist ye not that I must be about my Father's business?
030249.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i; Ga-do-no i-s-gi-ni-yo-he-i?  Tla-s-go yi-s-di-ga-ta-he E-do-do-yi a-se a-que-da-s-di ge-sv-i?

030250.english: And they understood not the saying which he spake unto them.

030251.cherokee: ᏚᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᏭᎷᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎤᏁᎶᏕᎢ.  ᎤᏥᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏁ ᎤᎾᏫᏱ.
030251.english: And he went down with them, and came to Nazareth, and was subject unto them: but his mother kept all these sayings in her heart.
030251.phonetic: Du-s-da-wa-dv-se-no, a-le Na-se-li-di wu-lu-tse-i, a-le de-u-ne-lo-de-i.  U-tsi-s-gi-ni hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-dv u-s-qua-ni-go-ta-ne u-na-wi-yi.

030252.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎧᏁᏉᏥᏎ ᎠᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏛᏍᎬᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
030252.english: And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature, and in favour with God and man.
030252.phonetic: A-le Tsi-sa ka-ne-quo-tsi-se a-ga-ta-hna-i-yu ge-sv a-le a-dv-s-gv-i a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le yv-wi gv-wa-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv-i.

030301.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᎦᏚᏏᏁᏃ ᎤᏕᏘᏴᏌᏗᏒ ᏓᏈᎵᏯ ᏏᏌ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏋᏗᏯ ᏆᎴᏗ ᏧᏗᏱ ᏣᎦᏁᎶᏗ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏍᎦᏚᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᎦᏘᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏅᏟᏃ ᏈᎵᎩ ᎢᏚᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏝᎪᏂᏗ ᎠᏥᎦᏘᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎵᏌᏂᏯᏃ ᎠᏈᎵᏂ ᎠᏥᎦᏘᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᎢ;
030301.english: Now in the fifteenth year of the reign of Tiberius Caesar, Pontius Pilate being governor of Judaea, and Herod being tetrarch of Galilee, and his brother Philip tetrarch of Ituraea and of the region of Trachonitis, and Lysanias the tetrarch of Abilene,
030301.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-ga-du-si-ne-no u-de-ti-yv-sa-di-sv Da-qui-li-ya Si-sa u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i, Quv-di-ya Qua-le-di Tsu-di-yi tsa-ga-ne-lo-di ge-se-i, a-le E-lo-dv ge-li-li s-ga-du-gi ge-sv a-tsi-ga-ti-di-s-di ge-se-i, u-nv-tli-no Qui-li-gi I-du-li a-le Tla-go-ni-di a-tsi-ga-ti-di-s-di ge-se-i, Li-sa-ni-ya-no A-qui-li-ni a-tsi-ga-ti-di-s-di ge-se-i;

030302.cherokee: ᎡᎾᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏱᏆ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏬᏂᏒᎯ ᎢᎾᎨ ᎤᎷᏤᎴ ᏣᏂ ᏤᎦᎳᏯ ᎤᏪᏥ.
030302.english: Annas and Caiaphas being the high priests, the word of God came unto John the son of Zacharias in the wilderness.
030302.phonetic: E-na-no a-le Ga-yi-qua nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi ge-se-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-wo-ni-sv-hi i-na-ge u-lu-tse-le Tsa-ni Tse-ga-la-ya u-we-tsi.

030303.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎷᏤ ᎤᏪᏙᎴ ᏦᏓᏂ ᎾᎥᏂᎨ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎨ ᏗᏓᏬᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏁᏟᏴᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏴᏓᏘᏁᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ;
030303.english: And he came into all the country about Jordan, preaching the baptism of repentance for the remission of sins;
030303.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi u-lu-tse u-we-do-le Tso-da-ni na-v-ni-ge ge-sv-i, a-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge ka-no-he-s-ge di-da-wo-s-di ge-sv ga-ne-tli-yv-dv ge-sv o-da-nv-dv-i, na-s-gi ga-yv-da-ti-ne-di-yi o-s-ga-nv-tsv-i;

030304.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ ᎢᏌᏯ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏂᏒᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᎭ; ᎤᏪᎷᎦ ᎩᎶ ᎢᎾᎨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ; ᎡᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏏ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏚᏅᏅ ᏗᏥᏥᏃᎯᏍᏓ.
030304.english: As it is written in the book of the words of Esaias the prophet, saying, The voice of one crying in the wilderness, Prepare ye the way of the Lord, make his paths straight.
030304.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv go-we-lv go-we-li-hi I-sa-ya a-do-le-ho-s-gi u-we-ni-sv-hi, hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-ha; U-we-lu-ga gi-lo i-na-ge-i, hi-a ni-ga-we-ha; E-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-da-si Yi-ho-wa u-lo-hi-s-di-yi, du-nv-nv di-tsi-tsi-no-hi-s-da.

030305.cherokee: ᏚᎨᏓᎵᏴᏅ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏗᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏙᏓᎸᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏌᎯᎸ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎡᎳᏗᎭ ᎢᏗᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏧᏓᏥᏃᏍᏈᏗᏰᏛᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎦᏥᏃᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏲᏃ ᏕᎦᏅᏅ ᎬᎾᏕᏍᎩ ᎢᏗᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
030305.english: Every valley shall be filled, and every mountain and hill shall be brought low; and the crooked shall be made straight, and the rough ways shall be made smooth;
030305.phonetic: Du-ge-da-li-yv-nv ni-ga-di-yu di-ka-li-i-s-di ge-se-s-di, do-da-lv-no a-le du-sa-hi-lv ni-ga-di-yu e-la-di-ha i-di-gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di, tsu-da-tsi-no-s-qui-di-ye-dv-no ge-sv di-ga-tsi-no-hi-s-do-di ge-se-s-di, u-yo-no de-ga-nv-nv gv-na-de-s-gi i-di-gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di.

030306.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏛᎪᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
030306.english: And all flesh shall see the salvation of God.
030306.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no u-que-da-li dv-go-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv-i.

030307.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᎦᏬᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᎸᏐᎸᎯ; Ᏺ ᎢᎾᏛ ᏧᏁᏥ ᏂᎯ!  ᎦᎪ ᎢᏤᏯᏔᏅ ᎡᏣᎵᎡᏗᏱ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
030307.english: Then said he to the multitude that came forth to be baptized of him, O generation of vipers, who hath warned you to flee from the wrath to come?
030307.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le u-ni-tsa-ti na-s-gi di-ge-ga-wo-s-di-yi u-ni-lv-so-lv-hi; Yo i-na-dv tsu-ne-tsi ni-hi!  ga-go i-tse-ya-ta-nv e-tsa-li-e-di-yi u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di u-lu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i?

030308.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎾᏄᎪᏩ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᏕᏥᏁᏟᏴᏒ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎴᏅᎲ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏥᏪᏒ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ; ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎣᎩᏙᏓ ᎠᏴ; ᎢᏨᏲᏎᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏯ ᏱᏕᎬᏓ ᏱᏕᎪᏢᎾ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏧᏪᏥ.
030308.english: Bring forth therefore fruits worthy of repentance, and begin not to say within yourselves, We have Abraham to our father: for I say unto you, That God is able of these stones to raise up children unto Abraham.
030308.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsi-na-nu-go-wa a-do-le-ho-hi-s-do-di de-tsi-ne-tli-yv-sv de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i; a-le tle-s-di i-tsa-le-nv-hv hi-a i-tsi-we-sv de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i; E-qua-ha-mi o-gi-do-da a-yv; i-tsv-yo-se-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi ye-li-quo hi-a nv-ya yi-de-gv-da yi-de-go-tlv-na E-qua-ha-mi tsu-we-tsi.

030309.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎦᎷᏯᏍᏗ ᎠᏅᎯ ᏚᎿᎭᏍᏕᏢ ᏕᏡᎬᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏕᏡᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎾᏓᏛᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᎦᎴᏴᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸᏱ ᏫᏓᏗᏅᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
030309.english: And now also the axe is laid unto the root of the trees: every tree therefore which bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire.
030309.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo ga-yu-la ga-lu-ya-s-di a-nv-hi du-hna-s-de-tlv de-tlu-gv-i; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-ga-di-yu de-tlu-gv o-s-dv na-da-dv-s-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di di-ga-le-yv-s-do-di a-le a-tsi-lv-yi wi-da-di-nv-di ge-se-s-di.

030310.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎦᏙ ᏓᏲᏣᏛᏁᎵ?
030310.english: And the people asked him, saying, What shall we do then?
030310.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti-no gv-wa-dv-dv-ne hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i; Ga-do da-yo-tsa-dv-ne-li?

030311.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎩᎶ ᏔᎵ ᏗᎦᏌᎴᎾ ᏚᎾᎡᏍᏗ, ᏄᎾᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏅᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᎤᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
030311.english: He answereth and saith unto them, He that hath two coats, let him impart to him that hath none; and he that hath meat, let him do likewise.
030311.phonetic: U-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; Gi-lo ta-li di-ga-sa-le-na du-na-e-s-di, nu-na-v-na ge-sv ga-nv-ne-he-s-di; gi-lo-no a-li-s-da-yv-di u-he-s-di, na-s-gi-ya na-dv-ne-he-s-di.

030312.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏃ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᎠᏂᎩᏏᏙᎯ ᎤᏂᎸᏐᎴ ᏗᎨᎦᏬᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᏓᏲᏣᏛᏁᎵ?
030312.english: Then came also publicans to be baptized, and said unto him, Master, what shall we do?
030312.phonetic: Na-s-quo-no a-de-lv--a-ni-gi-si-do-hi u-ni-lv-so-le di-ge-ga-wo-s-di-yi, a-le hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ga-do da-yo-tsa-dv-ne-li?

030313.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᎶᏒᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎡᏥᏁᏤᎸ ᎢᏥᎩᏏᏓᏍᏗᏱ.
030313.english: And he said unto them, Exact no more than that which is appointed you.
030313.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i; Tle-s-di yi-tsi-lo-sv-s-di-s-ge-s-di i-ga-i e-tsi-ne-tse-lv i-tsi-gi-si-da-s-di-yi.

030314.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎬᏩᏛᏛᏁ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᏴ ᎾᏃ ᎦᏙ ᏓᏲᏣᏛᏁᎵ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎬᏍᎦᎢᏍᏓᎩ ᎢᏰᏨᏁᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏱᏣᏓᎳᏫᏎᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᏎᏍᏗ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᎡᎲᎢ.
030314.english: And the soldiers likewise demanded of him, saying, And what shall we do? And he said unto them, Do violence to no man, neither accuse any falsely; and be content with your wages.
030314.phonetic: A-ni-ya-wi-s-gi-no na-s-quo i-gv-wa-dv-dv-ne, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; a-yv na-no ga-do da-yo-tsa-dv-ne-li?  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i; Tle-s-di gi-lo gv-s-ga-i-s-da-gi i-ye-tsv-ne-lv-gi, a-le tle-s-di ga-ye-go-gi yi-tsa-da-la-wi-se-he-s-di; a-le ye-li-quo i-tsi-ye-lv-se-s-di e-tsa-gu-yv-e-hv-i.

030315.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᎠᏂᎦᏖᏃᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛᏉ ᎠᏫ ᏙᏧᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᎬᏩᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨ ᏣᏂ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ;
030315.english: And as the people were in expectation, and all men mused in their hearts of John, whether he were the Christ, or not;
030315.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti-no a-ni-ga-te-no-he-i, a-le ni-ga-dv-quo a-wi do-tsu-na-da-nv-dv gv-wa-da-nv-te-s-ge Tsa-ni, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv, a-le ga-lo-ne-dv ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i;

030316.cherokee: ᏣᏂ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ, ᎠᏴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᎹ ᏕᏨᏯᏬᏍᏗᎭ; ᏓᏯᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏟ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎠᏴ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᎧᏁᏌᏛ ᏧᎳᏑᎶᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏱᏂᎪᎢ ᏗᎩᎧᏁᏴᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ ᏙᏓᏣᏬᏍᏔᏂ;
030316.english: John answered, saying unto them all, I indeed baptize you with water; but one mightier than I cometh, the latchet of whose shoes I am not worthy to unloose: he shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost and with fire:
030316.phonetic: Tsa-ni u-ne-tse hi-a ni-du-we-se-le ni-ga-dv, A-yv u-do-hi-yu-hi a-ma de-tsv-ya-wo-s-di-ha; da-ya-i-s-gi-ni u-tli u-li-ni-gi-di-yu e-s-ga-quo a-yv, na-s-gi da-ka-ne-sa-dv tsu-la-su-lo-gi v-tla ye-li yi-ni-go-i di-gi-ka-ne-yv-di-yi; na-s-gi Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do a-le a-tsi-lv do-da-tsa-wo-s-ta-ni;

030317.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎳᏐᏫᏍᏗ ᎠᏰᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᎦᎳᏐᏫᏏ ᎠᏲᏓᏝᎲᎢ, ᎤᏣᎴᏍᏗᏃ ᏓᎦᏟᏌᏂ ᏛᏂ ᎤᏗᏱ; ᎤᏬᎭᏄᎶᏔᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏛᎪᎲᏍᏔᏂ ᎠᏥᎸᏱ ᏂᎬᏠᏍᎬᎾ.
030317.english: Whose fan is in his hand, and he will throughly purge his floor, and will gather the wheat into his garner; but the chaff he will burn with fire unquenchable.
030317.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-la-so-wi-s-di a-ye-ha, a-le ni-ga-dv da-ga-la-so-wi-si a-yo-da-tla-hv-i, u-tsa-le-s-di-no da-ga-tli-sa-ni dv-ni u-di-yi; u-wo-ha-nu-lo-ta-nv-hi-s-gi-ni dv-go-hv-s-ta-ni a-tsi-lv-yi ni-gv-tlo-s-gv-na.

030318.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏖ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏕᎦᏬᏁᏗᏍᎬ ᏚᎵᏥᏙᏁᎴ ᏴᏫ.
030318.english: And many other things in his exhortation preached he unto the people.
030318.phonetic: A-le u-tsa-te tsu-da-le-nv-dv de-ga-wo-ne-di-s-gv du-li-tsi-do-ne-le yv-wi.

030319.cherokee: ᎡᎶᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏍᎦᏚᎩ ᎠᏥᎦᏘᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏣᏂ ᎤᎬᏍᎪᎸᏁ ᏗᎵᏰᎢᎸᏍᏗᏍᎨ ᎡᎶᏗᏏ ᎤᏅᏟ ᏈᎵᎩ ᎤᏓᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏄᏛᏁᎸ ᎡᎶᏛ,
030319.english: But Herod the tetrarch, being reproved by him for Herodias his brother Philip's wife, and for all the evils which Herod had done,
030319.phonetic: E-lo-dv-s-gi-ni s-ga-du-gi a-tsi-ga-ti-di-s-di ge-sv-i, Tsa-ni u-gv-s-go-lv-ne di-li-ye-i-lv-s-di-s-ge E-lo-di-si u-nv-tli Qui-li-gi u-da-le-i, a-le na-s-quo ni-ga-dv u-tsa-ti-ni nu-dv-ne-lv E-lo-dv,

030320.cherokee: ᎠᏏ ᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏛᏁᎴᎢ, ᏣᏂ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎤᏍᏚᏁᎢ.
030320.english: Added yet this above all, that he shut up John in prison.
030320.phonetic: A-si wu-da-go-na-dv hi-a na-s-gi nu-dv-ne-le-i, Tsa-ni di-da-s-du-di-yi u-s-du-ne-i.

030321.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏕᎨᎦᏬᎥ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎦᏬᎡᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᎵᏍᏚᎢᏎᎢ,
030321.english: Now when all the people were baptized, it came to pass, that Jesus also being baptized, and praying, the heaven was opened,
030321.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, ni-ga-dv yv-wi de-ge-ga-wo-v Tsi-sa na-s-quo a-ga-wo-e-i, a-le u-da-do-li-s-ta-nv ga-lv-la-di u-li-s-du-i-se-i,

030322.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏧᏠᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏯᎸᏤᎢ, ᎠᏰᎸ ᏧᎴ-ᏗᏍᎪᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏎ ᎤᏙᏢᏒᎢ; ᎧᏁᎬᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏧᎶᏎ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏧᏪᏎᎢ; ᎯᎯ ᎬᎨᏳᎢ ᎠᏇᏥ; ᎣᏏᏳ  ᎬᏰᎸᎢ ᏂᎯ.
030322.english: And the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape like a dove upon him, and a voice came from heaven, which said, Thou art my beloved Son; in thee I am well pleased.
030322.phonetic: A-le Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do tsu-tlo-a-se na-s-gi u-we-ya-lv-tse-i, a-ye-lv tsu-le--di-s-go-ni-hi na-s-gi-ya ge-se u-do-tlv-sv-i; ka-ne-gv-no ga-lv-la-di tsu-lo-se hi-a nv-tsu-we-se-i; Hi-hi gv-ge-yu-i A-que-tsi; o-si-yu  gv-ye-lv-i ni-hi.

030323.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏎ ᏦᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎳᏱ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030323.english: And Jesus himself began to be about thirty years of age, being (as was supposed) the son of Joseph, which was the son of Heli,
030323.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hna-quo a-se tso-a-s-go-hi i-yu-de-ti-yv-dv ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tso-wa u-we-tsi u-ni-ye-lv-se-i, na-s-gi Hi-la-yi u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030324.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎹᏓᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎵᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎺᎵᎦᏱ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᎾ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030324.english: Which was the son of Matthat, which was the son of Levi, which was the son of Melchi, which was the son of Janna, which was the son of Joseph,
030324.phonetic: Na-s-gi Ma-da-di u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Li-wi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi me-li-ga-yi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tsa-na u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tso-wa u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030325.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎹᏗᏓᏯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎼᏏ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏁᎠᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏏᎳ, ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030325.english: Which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Amos, which was the son of Naum, which was the son of Esli, which was the son of Nagge,
030325.phonetic: Na-s-gi Ma-di-da-ya u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi E-mo-si u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Ne-a-mi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi E-si-la, u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Na-gi u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030326.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎺᎠᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎹᏗᏓᏯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏏᎻᏯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030326.english: Which was the son of Maath, which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Semei, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Juda,
030326.phonetic: Na-s-gi Me-a-di u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Ma-di-da-ya u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Si-mi-ya u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tso-wa u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tsu-da u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030327.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎠᎾ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎵᏌ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎳᏇᎵ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᎳᏓᏱᎵ  ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏏᎳᏱ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030327.english: Which was the son of Joanna, which was the son of Rhesa, which was the son of Zorobabel, which was the son of Salathiel, which was the son of Neri,
030327.phonetic: Na-s-gi Tso-a-na u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Li-sa u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tsi-la-que-li u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Sa-la-da-yi-li  u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Si-la-yi u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030328.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎺᎵᎦᏱ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏱ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᏌᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎵᎼᏓᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᎵ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030328.english: Which was the son of Melchi, which was the son of Addi, which was the son of Cosam, which was the son of Elmodam, which was the son of Er,
030328.phonetic: Na-s-gi Me-li-ga-yi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi A-da-yi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Go-sa-mi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi E-li-mo-da-mi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi V-li u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030329.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏏ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎵᎡᏌ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎵᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎹᏓᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎵᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030329.english: Which was the son of Jose, which was the son of Eliezer, which was the son of Jorim, which was the son of Matthat, which was the son of Levi,
030329.phonetic: Na-s-gi Tso-si u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi I-li-e-sa u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tso-li-mi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Ma-da-di u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Li-wi u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030330.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏏᎻᏯᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎾᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎳᏱᎩᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030330.english: Which was the son of Simeon, which was the son of Juda, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Jonan, which was the son of Eliakim,
030330.phonetic: Na-s-gi Si-mi-ya-ni u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tsu-da u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tso-wa u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tso-na-ni u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi I-la-yi-gi-mi u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030331.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎻᎵᎠ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎻᎾᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎹᏓᏓ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏁᏓᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030331.english: Which was the son of Melea, which was the son of Menan, which was the son of Mattatha, which was the son of Nathan, which was the son of David,
030331.phonetic: Na-s-gi Mi-li-a u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Mi-na-ni u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Ma-da-da u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Ne-da-ni u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi De-wi u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030332.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏏ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏆᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏉᏏ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᎵᎹ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏐᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030332.english: Which was the son of Jesse, which was the son of Obed, which was the son of Booz, which was the son of Salmon, which was the son of Naasson,
030332.phonetic: Na-s-gi Tsi-si u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi O-qua-di u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Quo-si u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Sa-li-ma u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Na-so-ni u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030333.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎻᏂᏓ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎵᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏏᎳᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏇᎵᏏ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030333.english: Which was the son of Aminadab, which was the son of Aram, which was the son of Esrom, which was the son of Phares, which was the son of Juda,
030333.phonetic: Na-s-gi E-mi-ni-da u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi E-li-mi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi I-si-la-mi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Que-li-si u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tsu-da u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030334.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏏᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎳ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏁᎰ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030334.english: Which was the son of Jacob, which was the son of Isaac, which was the son of Abraham, which was the son of Thara, which was the son of Nachor,
030334.phonetic: Na-s-gi Tse-ga-qui u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi E-si-gi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi E-qua-ha-mi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi De-la u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Ne-ho u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030335.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏎᎳᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎴᎪ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏇᎵᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᏆ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏎᎳ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030335.english: Which was the son of Saruch, which was the son of Ragau, which was the son of Phalec, which was the son of Heber, which was the son of Sala,
030335.phonetic: Na-s-gi Se-la-gi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Le-go u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Que-li-gi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Hi-qua u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Se-la u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030336.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏱᏅ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏆᏣ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏎᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏃᏯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎴᎻᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030336.english: Which was the son of Cainan, which was the son of Arphaxad, which was the son of Sem, which was the son of Noe, which was the son of Lamech,
030336.phonetic: Na-s-gi Ka-yi-nv u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi A-qua-tsa u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Se-mi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi No-ya u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Le-mi-gi u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030337.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎻᏚᏏᎳ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏃᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᎳᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎹᎵᎵᎵ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏱᏅ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ,
030337.english: Which was the son of Mathusala, which was the son of Enoch, which was the son of Jared, which was the son of Maleleel, which was the son of Cainan,
030337.phonetic: Na-s-gi Mi-du-si-la u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi I-no-gi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Tse-la-di u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Ma-li-li-li u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Ka-yi-nv u-we-tsi ge-se-i,

030338.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏃᏏ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏎᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᎢ.
030338.english: Which was the son of Enos, which was the son of Seth, which was the son of Adam, which was the son of God.
030338.phonetic: Na-s-gi I-no-si u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi Se-di u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi A-da-wi u-we-tsi ge-se-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-we-tsi ge-se-i.

030401.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏦᏓᏂ ᏗᎤᏨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᎾᎨ ᏭᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁᎢ,
030401.english: And Jesus being full of the Holy Ghost returned from Jordan, and was led by the Spirit into the wilderness,
030401.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-se Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do Tso-da-ni di-u-tsv-se-i, a-le a-da-nv-do i-na-ge wu-ti-nv-s-ta-ne-i,

030402.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᏧᏒᎯᏛ ᎤᎪᎵᏰᏍᎨ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏳᏎᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏛ ᎩᎳ ᎤᏲᏏᏌᏁᎢ.
030402.english: Being forty days tempted of the devil. And in those days he did eat nothing: and when they were ended, he afterward hungered.
030402.phonetic: A-le nv-ga-s-go-hi tsu-sv-hi-dv u-go-li-ye-s-ge a-s-gi-na.  Na-s-gi-no i-go-hi-dv v-tla go-hu-s-di yu-se-i Na-s-gi-no u-li-s-qua-dv gi-la u-yo-si-sa-ne-i.

030403.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎩᎾᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎯᏁᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏯ ᎦᏚ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
030403.english: And the devil said unto him, If thou be the Son of God, command this stone that it be made bread.
030403.phonetic: A-s-gi-na-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; I-yu-no ni-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi ge-se-s-di, hi-ne-gi hi-a nv-ya ga-du i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

030404.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏤᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ; ᏴᏫ ᎥᏝ ᎦᏚᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏱᎬᎿᎭᏗᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᏂᎦᎥᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ.
030404.english: And Jesus answered him, saying, It is written, That man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word of God.
030404.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tse-le hi-a nu-we-se-i; Hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-la; Yv-wi v-tla ga-du-quo u-wa-sv yi-gv-hna-di-s-de-s-di, ni-ga-v-s-gi-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-tsv-i.

030405.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎩᎾᏃ ᎤᏘᏅᏎ ᎤᎿᎭᎷᏔᏁ ᎢᏅ ᎢᎦᏘ ᎣᏓᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏎᎮᎴ ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏕᎪᏢᏩᏗᏒ ᎡᎶᎯ.
030405.english: And the devil, taking him up into an high mountain, shewed unto him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time.
030405.phonetic: A-s-gi-na-no u-ti-nv-se u-hna-lu-ta-ne i-nv-i-ga-ti o-da-lv-i, a-le du-se-he-le gi-la-quo i-yv-dv i-go-hi-dv ni-ga-v a-ye-li de-go-tlv-wa-di-sv e-lo-hi.

030406.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏕᎬᏲᎯᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᏛᎩᏲᎯᏎᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏥᎥᏏ ᎨᎳ ᏥᏁᎰᎢ.
030406.english: And the devil said unto him, All this power will I give thee, and the glory of them: for that is delivered unto me; and to whomsoever I will I give it.
030406.phonetic: A-le a-s-gi-na hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-dv u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv yi-de-gv-yo-hi-si, a-le na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i; a-yv-ye-no dv-gi-yo-hi-se-lv, a-le gi-lo tsi-v-si ge-la tsi-ne-ho-i.

030407.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏍᏆᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏂᎯ ᏣᏤᎵ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
030407.english: If thou therefore wilt worship me, all shall be thine.
030407.phonetic: na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no yi-s-qua-da-do-li-s-da-ne-lv, ni-ga-di-yu ni-hi tsa-tse-li ge-se-s-di.

030408.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏆᏐᎭᏛ ᎭᎴᏓ ᏎᏓᏂ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ; ᏱᎰᏩ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎯᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ ᏕᎯᏯᏁᎶᏕᏍᏗ.
030408.english: And Jesus answered and said unto him, Get thee behind me, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship the Lord thy God, and him only shalt thou serve.
030408.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tse a-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; A-qua-so-ha-dv ha-le-da Se-da-ni; hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv go-we-la; Yi-ho-wa Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi hi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-he-s-di, a-le na-s-gi u-wa-sv-hi-yu de-hi-ya-ne-lo-de-s-di.

030409.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎤᏘᏃᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏍᎪᎵ ᎤᎩᎸᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏨᏒ ᎭᏓᎶᎥᏓ ᎠᏂ;
030409.english: And he brought him to Jerusalem, and set him on a pinnacle of the temple, and said unto him, If thou be the Son of God, cast thyself down from hence:
030409.phonetic: A-le tsi-lu-si-li-mi u-ti-no-le-i, a-le u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi u-s-go-li u-gi-lv-ta-ne-i, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; I-yu-no ni-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi ge-se-s-di, tsv-sv ha-da-lo-v-da a-ni;

030410.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎪᏪᎳ; ᏧᏤᎵ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏙᏓᎧᏁᏤᎵ ᏗᎨᏣᎧᎾᏩᏗᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏣᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ;
030410.english: For it is written, He shall give his angels charge over thee, to keep thee:
030410.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv i-go-we-la; tsu-tse-li di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi do-da-ka-ne-tse-li di-ge-tsa-ka-na-wa-di-da-s-di-yi ge-tsa-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi;

030411.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏧᏃᏰᏂ ᎨᏣᏌᎳᏙᏗᏕᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏅᏲᎯ ᏣᎾᏍᏆᎶᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
030411.english: And in their hands they shall bear thee up, lest at any time thou dash thy foot against a stone.
030411.phonetic: A-le tsu-no-ye-ni ge-tsa-sa-la-do-di-de-ge-s-di, na-s-gi i-lv-hi-yu nv-yo-hi tsa-na-s-qua-lo-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

030412.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏧᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᎢᎩ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎯᎪᎵᏰᎥᎩ.
030412.english: And Jesus answering said unto him, It is said, Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God.
030412.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no tsu-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Hi-a i-ga-we-dv i-gi; Tle-s-di Yi-ho-wa Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi hi-go-li-ye-v-gi.

030413.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎩᎾᏃ ᎤᏍᏆᏛ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎪᎵᏰᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᏓᏅᎡᎴ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ.
030413.english: And when the devil had ended all the temptation, he departed from him for a season.
030413.phonetic: A-s-gi-na-no u-s-qua-dv ni-ga-dv u-go-li-ye-s-gv-i, u-da-nv-e-le i-lv-s-gi i-go-hi-dv.

030414.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏘᏂᏙᎲ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎢᎤᎷᏤᎢ; ᏕᎦᏃᏣᎸᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᎬᏩᏚᏫᏛ ᏚᏰᎵᏏᏙᎴᎢ.
030414.english: And Jesus returned in the power of the Spirit into Galilee: and there went out a fame of him through all the region round about.
030414.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no A-da-nv-do u-ti-ni-do-hv Ge-li-li i-u-lu-tse-i; de-ga-no-tsa-lv-no na-hna gv-wa-du-wi-dv du-ye-li-si-do-le-i.

030415.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎨ ᏧᏂᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᎬᏩᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᎢ.
030415.english: And he taught in their synagogues, being glorified of all.
030415.phonetic: A-le da-de-yo-hv-s-ge tsu-ni-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, na-ni-v-no gv-wa-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-i.

030416.cherokee: ᎾᏎᎵᏗᏃ ᎤᎷᏤ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎦᏛᎯᏍᏔᏅᎢ; ᎢᏳᏛᏁᏗᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏛᏁᎴ ᏭᏴᎴ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎴᏁ ᏧᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ ᎪᏪᎵ.
030416.english: And he came to Nazareth, where he had been brought up: and, as his custom was, he went into the synagogue on the sabbath day, and stood up for to read.
030416.phonetic: Na-se-li-di-no u-lu-tse na-hna a-ga-dv-hi-s-ta-nv-i; i-yu-dv-ne-di-no ge-sv nu-dv-ne-le wu-yv-le di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga, a-le du-le-ne tsu-go-li-ye-di-yi go-we-li.

030417.cherokee: ᎠᏥᏅᏁᎴᏃ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎢᏌᏯ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏬᏪᎳᏅᎯ.  ᎤᏍᏚᎢᏒᏃ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎤᏩᏛᎮ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ;
030417.english: And there was delivered unto him the book of the prophet Esaias. And when he had opened the book, he found the place where it was written,
030417.phonetic: A-tsi-nv-ne-le-no go-we-li I-sa-ya a-do-le-ho-s-gi u-wo-we-la-nv-hi.  U-s-du-i-sv-no go-we-li u-wa-dv-he hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-lv-i;

030418.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏔᎵ ᎠᏆᏛᏓᏁᎵᏕᎦ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏣᎩᎶᏁᎥ ᎦᏥᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ; ᏗᎩᏅᏒ ᏗᎦᏥᏅᏬᏗᏱ ᎤᏲ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎩ, ᎦᏥᏃᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏴᎩ ᎬᏩᎾᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎨᏫ ᎬᏩᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏥᏯᎪᏗᏱ ᏗᎨᏥᏂᏆᎶᏔᏅᎯ,
030418.english: The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he hath anointed me to preach the gospel to the poor; he hath sent me to heal the brokenhearted, to preach deliverance to the captives, and recovering of sight to the blind, to set at liberty them that are bruised,
030418.phonetic: A-da-nv-do Yi-ho-wa u-tse-li ta-li a-qua-dv-da-ne-li-de-ga nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di tsa-gi-lo-ne-v ga-tsi-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-di-yi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi; di-gi-nv-sv di-ga-tsi-nv-wo-di-yi u-yo u-na-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gi, ga-tsi-no-ne-di-yi a-ni-yv-gi gv-wa-na-du-da-le-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le di-ni-ge-wi gv-wa-ni-go-wa-dv-di ge-sv-i, a-le di-ga-tsi-ya-go-di-yi di-ge-tsi-ni-qua-lo-ta-nv-hi,

030419.english: To preach the acceptable year of the Lord.

030420.cherokee: ᎤᏍᏚᏁᏃ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏫᎤᏅᏁᎴ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏁᎢ.  ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏯᎢ ᎤᏯᏅᏒᎯ ᏕᎬᏩᎧᎿᎭᏁᎢ.
030420.english: And he closed the book, and he gave it again to the minister, and sat down. And the eyes of all them that were in the synagogue were fastened on him.
030420.phonetic: U-s-du-ne-no go-we-li a-le wi-u-nv-ne-le a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le u-we-ne-i.  Ni-ga-dv-no di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-ni-ya-i u-ya-nv-sv-hi de-gv-wa-ka-hna-ne-i.

030421.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏥᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎠᏙᎯᏳᎲᎦ ᎢᏣᏛᎩᏍᎬᎢ.
030421.english: And he began to say unto them, This day is this scripture fulfilled in your ears.
030421.phonetic: A-le u-le-nv-he hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; go-hi i-ga tsi-gi hi-a na-s-gi go-we-lv a-do-hi-yu-hv-ga i-tsa-dv-gi-s-gv-i.

030422.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏃ ᎬᏩᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏃᏒ ᎤᏬᏂᏒᎢ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏱᎩ?
030422.english: And all bare him witness, and wondered at the gracious words which proceeded out of his mouth. And they said, Is not this Joseph's son?
030422.phonetic: Ni-ga-di-yu-no gv-wa-lv-quo-di-s-ge-i a-le a-ni-s-qua-ni-go-s-ge na-s-gi no-sv u-wo-ni-sv-i.  Hi-a-no nu-ni-we-se-i, tla-s-go hi-a na-s-gi Tso-wa u-we-tsi yi-gi?

030423.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏎ ᏓᏍᎩᏁᎢᏍᏓᏁᎵ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ; ᏔᏓᏅᏫᏍᎩ, ᏨᏒ ᎭᏓᏅᏮᎦ; ᏂᎦᎥ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎣᎦᏛᎦᏅ ᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎨᏆᏂ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎿᎭᏛᎦ ᎠᏂ ᏣᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
030423.english: And he said unto them, Ye will surely say unto me this proverb, Physician, heal thyself: whatsoever we have heard done in Capernaum, do also here in thy country.
030423.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i; a-se da-s-gi-ne-i-s-da-ne-li hi-a i-ga-we-s-di tsi-gi; Ta-da-nv-wi-s-gi, tsv-sv ha-da-nv-wv-ga; ni-ga-v nu-s-dv o-ga-dv-ga-nv de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv Ge-qua-ni, na-s-gi na-s-quo hna-dv-ga a-ni tsa-tse-li-go-hi.

030424.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏓᎦᏓᏂᎸᎪ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
030424.english: And he said, Verily I say unto you, No prophet is accepted in his own country.
030424.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, A-do-le-ho-s-gi v-tla yi-da-ga-da-ni-lv-go u-wa-sv u-tse-li-go-hi.

030425.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎤᏂᏣᏖ ᏧᏃᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᎢᏏᎵᏱ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎳᏯ ᏤᎮᎢ, ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏧᎵᏍᏚᎯ ᏦᎢ ᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᏑᏓᎵᏃ ᎢᏯᏅᏙ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᏚᎪᏄᎶᎭ ᏂᎬᎾᏛᎢ.
030425.english: But I tell you of a truth, many widows were in Israel in the days of Elias, when the heaven was shut up three years and six months, when great famine was throughout all the land;
030425.phonetic: A-se-no u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; u-ni-tsa-te tsu-no-su-lo-tsv-hi I-si-li-yi na-hi-yu I-la-ya tse-he-i, ga-lv-lo-i tsu-li-s-du-hi tso-i tsu-de-ti-yv-dv su-da-li-no i-ya-nv-do, na-hi-yu u-tsa-ti tsi-du-go-nu-lo-ha ni-gv-na-dv-i.

030426.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎳᏯ ᏯᏥᏅᏎ ᎩᎶ ᏭᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᏬᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᏌᎴᏓ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏙᏂ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎦᏁᎳ.
030426.english: But unto none of them was Elias sent, save unto Sarepta, a city of Sidon, unto a woman that was a widow.
030426.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla I-la-ya ya-tsi-nv-se gi-lo wu-lu-tse-di-yi, a-ge-yv u-wo-su-lo-tsv-hi u-wa-sv, Sa-le-da na-s-gi Sa-do-ni ga-du-hv ga-ne-la.

030427.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏖ ᎠᏁᎮ ᎠᏓᏰᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏢᎩ ᎢᏏᎵᏱ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎳᏏᏯ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏤᎮᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏯᏥᏅᎦᎸᎡ, ᏁᎹᏂ ᏏᎵᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ.
030427.english: And many lepers were in Israel in the time of Eliseus the prophet; and none of them was cleansed, saving Naaman the Syrian.
030427.phonetic: A-le u-ni-tsa-te a-ne-he a-da-ye-s-gi tsu-ni-tlv-gi I-si-li-yi na-hi-yu I-la-si-ya a-do-le-ho-s-gi tse-he-i; a-se-no v-tla gi-lo ya-tsi-nv-ga-lv-e, Ne-ma-ni Si-li-yi e-hi u-wa-sv.

030428.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏯᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏂᎧᎵᏤ ᎤᏂᏔᎳᏬᏍᎬᎢ.
030428.english: And all they in the synagogue, when they heard these things, were filled with wrath,
030428.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-ni-ya-i na-s-gi hi-a u-na-dv-ga-nv u-ni-ka-li-tse u-ni-ta-la-wo-s-gv-i.

030429.cherokee: ᏚᎾᎴᏁᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏄᎪᏫᏎ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᏩᏝᎥ ᎤᏌᎯᎸ ᏫᎬᏩᏘᏅᏍᏔ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏂᏚᎲ ᎦᎧᎲᎢ, ᏗᎬᏩᎶᎥᏔᏂᏎᎢ
030429.english: And rose up, and thrust him out of the city, and led him unto the brow of the hill whereon their city was built, that they might cast him down headlong.
030429.phonetic: Du-na-le-ne-no a-le gv-wa-nu-go-wi-se ga-du-hv-i, a-le wu-wa-tla-v u-sa-hi-lv wi-gv-wa-ti-nv-s-ta na-hna u-ni-du-hv ga-ka-hv-i, di-gv-wa-lo-v-ta-ni-se-i

030430.english: But he passing through the midst of them went his way,

030431.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎨᏆᏂ ᏭᎷᏤ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎨᏲᎲᏍᎨ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ ᏓᏍᏆᎸᎮᎬᎢ.
030431.english: And came down to Capernaum, a city of Galilee, and taught them on the sabbath days.
030431.phonetic: A-le Ge-qua-ni wu-lu-tse na-s-gi Ge-li-li ga-du-hv-i, a-le de-ge-yo-hv-s-ge u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga da-s-qua-lv-he-gv-i.

030432.english: And they were astonished at his doctrine: for his word was with power.

030433.cherokee: ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱᏃ ᎠᏯᎡ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᏯᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏇ ᎤᏪᎷᏁᎢ,
030433.english: And in the synagogue there was a man, which had a spirit of an unclean devil, and cried out with a loud voice,
030433.phonetic: Di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi-no a-ya-e gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya ga-da-ha a-da-nv-do a-s-gi-na u-ya-i, a-le a-s-da-que u-we-lu-ne-i,

030434.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎣᎦᏁᎳᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᏗᎦᏓᏛᏙᏗ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎮᎯ?  ᏍᎩᏛᏔᏂᏄᏧ?  ᎬᎦᏔᎭ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ-ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏒᎢ
030434.english: Saying, Let us alone; what have we to do with thee, thou Jesus of Nazareth? art thou come to destroy us? I know thee who thou art; the Holy One of God.
030434.phonetic: Hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i, O-ga-ne-la-gi; ga-do di-ga-da-dv-do-di ni-hi Tsi-sa Na-se-li-di he-hi?  S-gi-dv-ta-ni-nu-tsu?  Gv-ga-ta-ha ni-hi na-s-gi ge-sv-i--Ga-lv-quo-di-yu U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga ge-sv-i

030435.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏍᎦᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎡᎳᏪ ᎲᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᏄᎪᎢ ᎠᏍᎩᎾᏃ ᎠᏂᏅ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎤᏍᏢᏂᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᏄᎪᏤ ᎠᏍᎦᏲᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏳᏩᏁᎴᎢ.
030435.english: And Jesus rebuked him, saying, Hold thy peace, and come out of him. And when the devil had thrown him in the midst, he came out of him, and hurt him not.
030435.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-s-ga-tse-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i, E-la-we hv-na, a-le hi-nu-go-i A-s-gi-na-no a-ni-nv a-ye-li u-s-tlv-ni-s-ta-nv u-nu-go-tse a-s-ga-yo-hi, a-le v-tla go-hu-s-di yu-wa-ne-le-i.

030436.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎵᏃᎮᎴ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ?  ᎤᏤᎵᎦᏯᏰᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏕᎬᏗᎭ ᏕᎧᏁᏤ ᎠᏂᎦᏓᎭ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏄᎪᎦ.
030436.english: And they were all amazed, and spake among themselves, saying, What a word is this! for with authority and power he commandeth the unclean spirits, and they come out.
030436.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se-i, a-le u-na-li-no-he-le u-nv-sv ge-sv hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-le-i; Ga-do u-s-di ka-ne-i-s-di hi-a?  U-tse-li-ga-ya-ye-no a-le u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv de-gv-di-ha de-ka-ne-tse a-ni-ga-da-ha di-da-nv-do, a-le a-ni-nu-go-ga.

030437.english: And the fame of him went out into every place of the country round about.

030438.cherokee: ᏚᎴᏅᏃ ᎤᏄᎪᏤ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏌᏩᏂᏃ ᎦᏁᎸ ᏭᏴᎴᎢ.  ᏌᏩᏂᏃ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎤᏥ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏗᎴᎲᏍᎨᎢ; ᎬᏩᏔᏲᏎᎴᏃ ᎤᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ.
030438.english: And he arose out of the synagogue, and entered into Simon's house. And Simon's wife's mother was taken with a great fever; and they besought him for her.
030438.phonetic: Du-le-nv-no u-nu-go-tse di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, sa-wa-ni-no ga-ne-lv wu-yv-le-i.  Sa-wa-ni-no u-da-li-i u-tsi u-tsa-ti u-di-le-hv-s-ge-i; gv-wa-ta-yo-se-le-no u-s-de-lv-di-yi.

030439.cherokee: ᎦᏅᎬᏃ ᎾᎥ ᎤᎴᏁ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᎦᏤ ᎤᏗᎴᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᏙᎣᎴᏃ ᎤᏗᎴᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏗᏛᎮ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏍᏕᎸᎪᏙᎴᎢ.
030439.english: And he stood over her, and rebuked the fever; and it left her: and immediately she arose and ministered unto them.
030439.phonetic: Ga-nv-gv-no na-v u-le-ne, a-le u-s-ga-tse u-di-le-hv-s-gv-i, u-do-o-le-no u-di-le-hv-s-gv-i, gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv u-di-dv-he, a-le du-s-de-lv-go-do-le-i.

030440.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏭᏕᎵᎨ ᏅᏙ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏧᏂᏢᎩ ᏧᏁᎯ ᏕᎬᏩᏘᏃᎮᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏚᏏᏔᏕ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏅᏩᏁᎢ
