030841.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-no u-lu-tse-le a-s-ga-ya Tse-la tsu-do-i-dv nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi; Tsi-sa-no du-la-s-gv u-da-nv-ne-i, a-le u-ta-yo-se-le ga-ne-lv u-yv-s-di-yi;

030842.cherokee: ᏌᏉᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᎡᎮ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎨᏳᏣ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏳᏕᏘᏴᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎨᎢ.  ᎠᎢᏒᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᏓᏡᏩᏍᏗᏕᎨᎢ.
030842.english: For he had one only daughter, about twelve years of age, and she lay a dying. But as he went the people thronged him.
030842.phonetic: Sa-quo-hi-yu-ye-no e-he u-we-tsi a-ge-yu-tsa ta-la-du i-yv-dv i-yu-de-ti-yv-dv, a-le na-s-gi a-yo-hu-s-ge-i.  A-i-sv-no u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi gv-wa-da-tlu-wa-s-di-de-ge-i.

030843.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴᏃ ᎤᏢᎨ ᎩᎬ ᎤᏪᏅᎡᎮ ᏔᎳᏚ ᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᎡᎸᎯ, ᎤᏒᏅᎯ ᎨᏎ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᏓᎫᏴᎡᎲ ᎠᏂᎦᎾᎦᏘ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎬᏩᏅᏬᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ,
030843.english: And a woman having an issue of blood twelve years, which had spent all her living upon physicians, neither could be healed of any,
030843.phonetic: A-ge-yv-no u-tlv-ge gi-gv u-we-nv-e-he ta-la-du tsu-de-ti-yv-dv gv-wa-da-le-nv-e-lv-hi, u-sv-nv-hi ge-se ni-ga-dv u-li-s-de-lv-do-di da-gu-yv-e-hv a-ni-ga-na-ga-ti, a-se-no v-tla gi-lo gv-wa-nv-wo-di yi-ge-se-i,

030844.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏂᏗᏢ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏓᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏓᎷᏯᏛ ᎤᏄᏩᎥ ᎤᏒᏂᎴᎢ; ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎩᎬ ᎤᏪᏅᎡᎲ ᎤᏲᎯᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
030844.english: Came behind him, and touched the border of his garment: and immediately her issue of blood stanched.
030844.phonetic: Na-s-gi o-ni-di-tlv u-lu-hi-s-da-ne-i, a-le ga-da-lu-ya-dv u-nu-wa-v u-sv-ni-le-i; gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv gi-gv u-we-nv-e-hv u-yo-hi-s-ta-ne-i.

030845.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎦᎪ ᎠᏆᏒᏂᎦ?  ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏱᎸ, ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎨᏣᏓᏡᏫᏍᏗᏕᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎨᏣᏁᏄᎳᏍᏗᎭ, ᏥᎪᏃ ᎦᎪ ᎠᏆᏒᏂᎦ ᎢᎭᏗᎭ?
030845.english: And Jesus said, Who touched me? When all denied, Peter and they that were with him said, Master, the multitude throng thee and press thee, and sayest thou, Who touched me?
030845.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-i; Ga-go a-qua-sv-ni-ga?  Ni-ga-dv-no u-na-da-yi-lv, Qui-da a-le na-s-gi a-ne-hi hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, u-ni-tsa-ti ge-tsa-da-tlu-wi-s-di-de-ga a-le ge-tsa-ne-nu-la-s-di-ha, tsi-go-no Ga-go a-qua-sv-ni-ga i-ha-di-ha?

030846.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎠᏆᏒᏂᎦ; ᎦᏙᎴᎰᏍᎦᏰᏃ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᏄᎪᏤᎸᎢ.
030846.english: And Jesus said, Somebody hath touched me: for I perceive that virtue is gone out of me.
030846.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Gi-lo a-qua-sv-ni-ga; ga-do-le-ho-s-ga-ye-no a-qua-da-nv-wo-di ge-sv a-gi-nu-go-tse-lv-i.

030847.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏰᏃ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᏄᏗᏍᎦᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᎷᏤ ᎤᏪᎾᏫᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏱᏢ ᎤᏓᏅᏁᎴᎢ, ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᎤᏃᏁᎴ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎤᏒᏂᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏗᏩᏒᎢ.
030847.english: And when the woman saw that she was not hid, she came trembling, and falling down before him, she declared unto him before all the people for what cause she had touched him and how she was healed immediately.
030847.phonetic: A-ge-ye-no u-do-le-ho-sv nu-di-s-ga-lv-na ge-sv-i, u-lu-tse u-we-na-wi-s-ge-i, a-le i-gv-yi-tlv u-da-nv-ne-le-i, ni-ga-dv-no yv-wi a-ni-ga-ta-hv u-no-ne-le nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv u-sv-ni-lv-i, a-le na-s-gi gi-la-quo i-yv-dv u-di-wa-sv-i.

030848.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏇᏥ, ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎭᏓᏅᏓᏓ; ᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏣᏗᏫᏍᏓ; ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏥᎮᎾ.
030848.english: And he said unto her, Daughter, be of good comfort: thy faith hath made thee whole; go in peace.
030848.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le-i; A-que-tsi, u-ga-li-s-di ha-da-nv-da-da; tso-hi-yu-sv tsa-di-wi-s-da; nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv tsi-he-na.

030849.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎨ ᎩᎶ ᎤᎷᏤ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎦᏁᎸ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏤᏥ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎯᏯᏕᏯᏙᏔᏅ ᏗᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ.
030849.english: While he yet spake, there cometh one from the ruler of the synagogue's house, saying to him, Thy daughter is dead; trouble not the Master.
030849.phonetic: A-si-quo ga-wo-ni-s-ge gi-lo u-lu-tse di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi ga-ne-lv nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi, hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tse-tsi u-yo-hu-sv, tle-s-di hi-ya-de-ya-do-ta-nv Di-de-yo-hv-s-gi.

030850.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏁᏤᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏍᎦᎢᎮᏍᏗ; ᏦᎯᏳᏎᏍᏗᏉ, ᏓᏳᏗᏩᏏᏃ.
030850.english: But when Jesus heard it, he answered him, saying, Fear not: believe only, and she shall be made whole.
030850.phonetic: A-se-no tsi-sa u-dv-ga-nv u-ne-tse-le hi-a nu-we-se-i; Tle-s-di yi-s-ga-i-he-s-di; tso-hi-yu-se-s-di-quo, da-yu-di-wa-si-no.

030851.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏁᎸᏃ ᎤᏴᎸ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏳᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎴ ᎤᏴᏍᏗᏱ, ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏥᎻ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎤᏅᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᏳᏣ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ.
030851.english: And when he came into the house, he suffered no man to go in, save Peter, and James, and John, and the father and the mother of the maiden.
030851.phonetic: A-da-ne-lv-no u-yv-lv, v-tla gi-lo yu-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-le u-yv-s-di-yi, Qui-da a-le Tsi-mi a-le Tsa-ni u-nv-sv, a-le a-ge-yu-tsa u-do-da a-le u-tsi.

030852.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏓᎾᏠᏱᎮ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᎪᏂᎮᎢ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏠᏱᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᏳᏲᎱᏒ, ᎦᎵᎭᏉᏍᎩᏂ.
030852.english: And all wept, and bewailed her: but he said, Weep not; she is not dead, but sleepeth.
030852.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no da-na-tlo-yi-he a-le a-ni-s-go-ni-he-i.  A-se-no hi-a nu-we-se-i; Tle-s-di di-tsa-tlo-yi-lv-gi; v-tla yu-yo-hu-sv, ga-li-ha-quo-s-gi-ni.

030853.english: And they laughed him to scorn, knowing that she was dead.

030854.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏚᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏬᏯᏁᏒ ᎤᏯᏅᎮ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎯᎨᏳᏣ, ᎭᏗᏛ.
030854.english: And he put them all out, and took her by the hand, and called, saying, Maid, arise.
030854.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no du-nu-go-wi-sv a-le u-wo-ya-ne-sv u-ya-nv-he hi-a nu-we-se-i; Hi-ge-yu-tsa, ha-di-dv.

030855.cherokee: ᎤᏓᏅᏙᏃ ᎤᎷᏥᏌᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏗᏛᎮᎢ; ᎤᏁᏤᏃ ᎤᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᎤᏂᏁᏗᏱ.
030855.english: And her spirit came again, and she arose straightway: and he commanded to give her meat.
030855.phonetic: U-da-nv-do-no u-lu-tsi-sa-ne-le-i, a-le gi-la-quo i-yv-dv u-di-dv-he-i; u-ne-tse-no u-li-s-da-yv-di u-ni-ne-di-yi.

030856.cherokee: ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏚᏁᏤᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏂᏃᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ.
030856.english: And her parents were astonished: but he charged them that they should tell no man what was done.
030856.phonetic: Tsu-ga-yv-li-ge-no u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se-i; a-se-no du-ne-tse-le gi-lo u-ni-no-ne-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na na-s-gi nu-li-s-ta-nv-i.

030901.cherokee: ᏫᏚᏯᎲᏃ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᏚᏁᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᎬᏩᏃᎯᏳᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᏢᎬ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏬᏗᏱ.
030901.english: Then he called his twelve disciples together, and gave them power and authority over all devils, and to cure diseases.
030901.phonetic: Wi-du-ya-hv-no ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, du-ne-le na-ni-v a-ni-s-gi-na gv-wa-no-hi-yu-di-yi, a-le du-ni-tlv-gv tsu-na-da-nv-wo-di-yi.

030902.cherokee: ᏚᏅᏎᏃ ᎤᎾᎵᏥᏙᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏢᎩ ᏧᏂᏅᏬᏗᏱ
030902.english: And he sent them to preach the kingdom of God, and to heal the sick.
030902.phonetic: Du-nv-se-no u-na-li-tsi-do-nv-s-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, a-le tsu-ni-tlv-gi tsu-ni-nv-wo-di-yi

030903.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏁᎳᏅᎩ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎢᏣᎢᏒᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᏙᎳᏅᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎦᎶᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏚ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏔᎵ ᏗᏣᏄᏬ ᏱᏗᏥᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
030903.english: And he said unto them, Take nothing for your journey, neither staves, nor scrip, neither bread, neither money; neither have two coats apiece.
030903.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Tle-s-di go-hu-s-di i-tsa-da-ne-la-nv-gi i-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di i-tsa-i-sv-i, tle-s-di di-do-la-nv-s-di, a-le de-ga-lo-di, a-le ga-du, a-le a-de-lv; a-le i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha tle-s-di ta-li di-tsa-nu-wo yi-di-tsi-ne-he-s-di.

030904.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏢᏃ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎢᏥᏴᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᎭᏉ ᎢᏥᏁᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᏣᏂᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
030904.english: And whatsoever house ye enter into, there abide, and thence depart.
030904.phonetic: I-lv-hi-tlv-no a-da-ne-lv i-tsi-yv-hi-he-s-di na-ha-quo i-tsi-ne-s-di, a-le na-hna i-tsa-ni-gi-s-ge-s-di.

030905.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᏂᏗᏣᏓᏂᎸᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᎿᎭᎦᏚᎲ ᎢᏥᏄᎪᎨᏍᏗ, ᏗᏣᎳᏏᏕᏂ ᎪᏍᏚ ᏚᏅᎦᎸ ᏕᏥᏅᎪᎥᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏡᏗᏍᎩ.
030905.english: And whosoever will not receive you, when ye go out of that city, shake off the very dust from your feet for a testimony against them.
030905.phonetic: Gi-lo-no ni-di-tsa-da-ni-lv-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di, na-hna ga-du-hv i-tsi-nu-go-ge-s-di, di-tsa-la-si-de-ni go-s-du du-nv-ga-lv de-tsi-nv-go-v-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi ka-no-he-s-gi ge-se-s-di u-na-tlu-di-s-gi.

030906.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏂᎩᏒᏃ ᏕᎦᏚᏩᏗᏒ ᎤᏁᏙᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏓᏅᏫᏍᎨ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᏁᏙᎲᎢ.
030906.english: And they departed, and went through the towns, preaching the gospel, and healing every where.
030906.phonetic: U-na-ni-gi-sv-no de-ga-du-wa-di-sv u-ne-do-le a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, a-le da-na-da-nv-wi-s-ge ni-ga-v a-ne-do-hv-i.

030907.cherokee: ᎡᎶᏛᏃ ᏅᎩ ᎢᎦᏚᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏍᎦᏚᎩ ᎠᏥᎦᏘᏗᏍᏗ ᎤᏛᎦᏁ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏕᎤᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᏯᏔᏁᎴᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎩᎶ ᏣᏂ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏕᎤᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
030907.english: Now Herod the tetrarch heard of all that was done by him: and he was perplexed, because that it was said of some, that John was risen from the dead;
030907.phonetic: E-lo-dv-no nv-gi i-ga-du-gi ge-sv s-ga-du-gi a-tsi-ga-ti-di-s-di u-dv-ga-ne ni-ga-dv de-u-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i; a-le u-de-ya-ta-ne-le-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge gi-lo Tsa-ni u-yo-hu-sv de-u-le-hi-sa-nv a-na-di-s-gv-i;

030908.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᎳᏯ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᎩ ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎬᎢ; ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏣᏁᎮ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
030908.english: And of some, that Elias had appeared; and of others, that one of the old prophets was risen again.
030908.phonetic: Gi-lo-no I-la-ya ga-na-nu-go-gi a-na-di-s-gv-i; i-ga-dv-no gi-lo i-yu-s-di i-lv-hi-yu tsa-ne-he a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi du-le-hi-sa-nv a-na-di-s-gv-i.

030909.cherokee: ᎡᎶᏛᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏣᏂ ᏥᏍᎫᏕᏒᎩ; ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎪ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᏥᏥᏯᏛᎩᎭ?  ᎤᏟᏂᎬᏁᎴᏃ ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ.
030909.english: And Herod said, John have I beheaded: but who is this, of whom I hear such things? And he desired to see him.
030909.phonetic: E-lo-dv-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Tsa-ni tsi-s-gu-de-sv-gi; hi-a-s-gi-ni ga-go, na-s-gi hi-a tsi-nu-s-di tsi-tsi-ya-dv-gi-ha?  U-tli-ni-gv-ne-le-no u-go-wa-dv-di-yi.

030910.cherokee: ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛᏃ ᎢᎤᏂᎷᏨ, ᎬᏩᏃᏁᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎢ.  ᏚᏘᏅᏎᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎾᎨ ᏭᎶᏎ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎾᎥ ᏇᏣᏰᏗ ᏣᏃᏎᎰᎢ.
030910.english: And the apostles, when they were returned, told him all that they had done. And he took them, and went aside privately into a desert place belonging to the city called Bethsaida.
030910.phonetic: Ge-tsi-nv-si-dv-no i-u-ni-lu-tsv, gv-wa-no-ne-le ni-ga-dv nu-na-dv-ne-lv-i.  Du-ti-nv-se-no a-le u-nv-sv ge-sv i-na-ge wu-lo-se ga-du-hv na-v Que-tsa-ye-di tsa-no-se-ho-i.

030911.cherokee: ᏴᏫᏃ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏚᏓᏂᎸᏤᎢ, ᏚᏁᎢᏍᏓᏁᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏅᏩᏁ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏗᎨᏥᏅᏬᏗᏱ.
030911.english: And the people, when they knew it, followed him: and he received them, and spake unto them of the kingdom of God, and healed them that had need of healing.
030911.phonetic: Yv-wi-no u-na-do-le-ho-sv gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-se-i; a-le du-da-ni-lv-tse-i, du-ne-i-s-da-ne-le U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, a-le du-nv-wa-ne u-du-lv-di i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-hi di-ge-tsi-nv-wo-di-yi.

030912.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎦᎶᏐᎲᏍᎨᎢ ᎬᏩᎷᏎᎴ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏤᎴᎢ, ᏘᏰᎵᎯᏍᏓ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏩᏁᎾ ᏙᏗᎦᏚᎲ ᎠᎴ ᏙᏗᎦᎶᎨᏒ ᎠᏂ ᎬᏩᏚᏫᏛ ᏫᏚᏂᏒᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᏭᏂᏩᏛᏗᏱ; ᎠᏂᏰᏃ ᎢᎾᎨᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏕᏙᎭ.
030912.english: And when the day began to wear away, then came the twelve, and said unto him, Send the multitude away, that they may go into the towns and country round about, and lodge, and get victuals: for we are here in a desert place.
030912.phonetic: I-ga-no hna-quo ga-lo-so-hv-s-ge-i gv-wa-lu-se-le ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv a-le hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-tse-le-i, Ti-ye-li-hi-s-da u-ni-tsa-ti, na-s-gi wa-ne-na do-di-ga-du-hv a-le do-di-ga-lo-ge-sv a-ni gv-wa-du-wi-dv wi-du-ni-sv-s-di-yi, a-le u-na-li-s-da-yv-di wu-ni-wa-dv-di-yi; a-ni-ye-no i-na-ge-quo ge-sv i-de-do-ha.

030913.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏂᎯ ᏗᏤᎳᏍᏓ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᏍᎩᏉ ᎦᏚ ᏙᏥᏰᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏣᏗ ᏔᎵᏉᎢ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏲᎩᏩᏎᏅ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ.
030913.english: But he said unto them, Give ye them to eat. And they said, We have no more but five loaves and two fishes; except we should go and buy meat for all this people.
030913.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; Ni-hi di-tse-la-s-da.  Hi-a-no nu-ni-we-se-i, Hi-s-gi-quo ga-du do-tsi-ye-ha a-le a-tsa-di ta-li-quo-i; i-yu-s-gi-ni-no-nv yo-gi-wa-se-nv ni-ga-dv hi-a na-s-gi yv-wi u-na-li-s-da-yv-di.

030914.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎾᏂᎡ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᏩᎾᏅᎥᎦ ᎯᏍᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᎫᏂᏨᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
030914.english: For they were about five thousand men. And he said to his disciples, Make them sit down by fifties in a company.
030914.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-ye-no i-ya-ga-yv-li i-yv-dv na-ni-e a-ni-s-ga-ya.  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, Wa-na-nv-v-ga hi-s-ga-s-go-hi i-gu-ni-tsv-dv ge-se-s-di.

030915.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎾᏅᏗᏱ ᏂᏚᏅᎴᎢ.
030915.english: And they did so, and made them all sit down.
030915.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-na-dv-ne-le-i, a-le ni-ga-dv u-na-nv-di-yi ni-du-nv-le-i.

030916.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᏃ ᎦᏚ ᏚᎩᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵ ᎠᏣᏗ ᏚᏁᏎᎢ; ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏃ ᏫᏚᎧᎿᎭᏅ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᎭᎷᏰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏁᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏧᏂᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ.
030916.english: Then he took the five loaves and the two fishes, and looking up to heaven, he blessed them, and brake, and gave to the disciples to set before the multitude.
030916.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-no ga-du du-gi-se-i, a-le ta-li a-tsa-di du-ne-se-i; ga-lv-la-di-no wi-du-ka-hna-nv u-li-he-li-tse-i, a-le u-gv-ha-lu-ye-i, a-le du-ne-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi tsu-ni-ne-di-yi u-ni-tsa-ti.

030917.cherokee: ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏁᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏚᏃᎸᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏄᏖᏎ ᎤᎵᎬᎭᎷᏴᎯ ᎤᎾᏘᏰᎸᎯ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᎧᎵᎢ ᏔᎷᏣ.
030917.english: And they did eat, and were all filled: and there was taken up of fragments that remained to them twelve baskets.
030917.phonetic: U-na-li-s-da-yv-ne-no, a-le ni-ga-dv du-no-lv-se-i; a-le u-nu-te-se u-li-gv-ha-lu-yv-hi u-na-ti-ye-lv-hi ta-la-du i-ya-ka-li-i ta-lu-tsa.

030918.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎠᏁᎮᎢ; ᏚᏛᏛᏁᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᎪ ᎬᏉᏎᎰ ᏴᏫ?
030918.english: And it came to pass, as he was alone praying, his disciples were with him: and he asked them, saying, Whom say the people that I am?
030918.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i na-s-gi u-wa-sv ge-sv a-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi a-ne-he-i; du-dv-dv-ne-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ga-go gv-quo-se-ho yv-wi?

030919.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏣᏂ ᏗᏓᏬᏍᎩ; ᎢᎦᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎳᏯ; ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏃ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎤᎾᏕᏅᎯ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅ [ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎪᎢ.]
030919.english: They answering said, John the Baptist; but some say, Elias; and others say, that one of the old prophets is risen again.
030919.phonetic: U-ni-ne-tsv-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Tsa-ni di-da-wo-s-gi; i-ga-dv-s-gi-ni I-la-ya; a-ni-so-i-no, gi-lo i-yu-s-di i-lv-hi-yu u-na-de-nv-hi a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi du-le-hi-sa-nv [a-na-di-s-go-i.]

030920.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏂᎯᎾᏃ ᎦᎪ ᏍᎩᏲᏎᎭ?  ᏈᏓ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
030920.english: He said unto them, But whom say ye that I am? Peter answering said, The Christ of God.
030920.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ni-hi-na-no ga-go s-gi-yo-se-ha?  Qui-da u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ga-lo-ne-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.

030921.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏃ ᏚᏅᏍᏓᏕᎴ ᏚᏁᏤᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏂᏃᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ,
030921.english: And he straitly charged them, and commanded them to tell no man that thing;
030921.phonetic: U-li-ni-gi-dv-no du-nv-s-da-de-le du-ne-tse-le gi-lo u-ni-no-ne-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na na-s-gi,

030922.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏎ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏧᎩᎵᏳᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎬᏩᏲᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎢᎦ ᏣᎦᎴᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
030922.english: Saying, The Son of man must suffer many things, and be rejected of the elders and chief priests and scribes, and be slain, and be raised the third day.
030922.phonetic: Hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i, yv-wi U-we-tsi a-se u-tsa-ti tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsu-gi-li-yu-tse-di ge-se-s-di, a-le di-gv-wa-yo-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di di-ni-la-wi-gi a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi, a-le a-tsi-i-s-di ge-se-s-di, a-le tso-i-ne i-ga tsa-ga-le-do-di ge-se-s-di.

030923.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏓᏓᏱᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏱᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏧᏓᎿᎭᏩᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᎨᏍᏗ.
030923.english: And he said to them all, If any man will come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross daily, and follow me.
030923.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le ni-ga-dv, i-yu-no gi-lo u-du-li-s-ge-s-di a-gi-s-da-wa-dv-s-di-yi u-wa-sv a-da-da-yi-he-s-di, a-le a-yi-s-ge-s-di ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv u-tse-li tsu-da-hna-wa-dv, a-le a-gi-s-da-wa-de-ge-s-di.

030924.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎬᏅᎢ ᎤᏲᎱᏎᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏅ ᎤᏲᎱᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
030924.english: For whosoever will save his life shall lose it: but whosoever will lose his life for my sake, the same shall save it.
030924.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no u-du-li-s-ge-s-di u-s-de-lv-di-yi gv-nv-i u-yo-hu-se-di ge-se-s-di; gi-lo-s-gi-ni gv-nv u-yo-hu-se-he-s-di a-yv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi u-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di.

030925.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏰᏃ ᏳᏁᏉᏥ ᏴᏫ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎬ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏱᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎤᏩᏒᏃ ᏳᏲᎱᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏯᎦᏓᎢᏅ.
030925.english: For what is a man advantaged, if he gain the whole world, and lose himself, or be cast away?
030925.phonetic: Ga-do-ye-no yu-ne-quo-tsi yv-wi i-yu-no ni-gv e-lo-hi u-tse-li yi-nu-li-s-ta-nv, u-wa-sv-no yu-yo-hu-sv a-le ya-ga-da-i-nv.

030926.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎠᏆᏕᎰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏁᏨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ ᎤᏄᏬᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
030926.english: For whosoever shall be ashamed of me and of my words, of him shall the Son of man be ashamed, when he shall come in his own glory, and in his Father's, and of the holy angels.
030926.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no a-qua-de-ho-s-ge-s-di a-yv a-le a-gi-ne-tsv-i, na-s-gi yv-wi U-we-tsi u-de-ho-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di na-hi-yu ga-lu-tsv-ha u-nu-wo-s-de-s-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv u-wa-sv u-tse-li-ga, a-le U-do-da u-tse-li-ga, a-le ge-tsi-lv-quo-di di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi u-na-tse-li-ga.

030927.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎭ, ᎩᎶ ᎠᏂ ᏓᏂᏙᎦ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏛᎾᏙᎴᎰᏏ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂᎪᎲᎭ.
030927.english: But I tell you of a truth, there be some standing here, which shall not taste of death, till they see the kingdom of God.
030927.phonetic: A-se-no u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsv-no-ne-ha, gi-lo a-ni da-ni-do-ga v-tla yv-dv-na-do-le-ho-si a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv gv-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv a-ni-go-hv-ha.

030928.cherokee: ᏧᏁᎳᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏫᏄᏒᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏐᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏥᎻ ᏚᏘᏅᏎ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎿᎭᎷᏎ ᎣᏓᎸ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏅᏎᎢ.
030928.english: And it came to pass about an eight days after these sayings, he took Peter and John and James, and went up into a mountain to pray.
030928.phonetic: Tsu-ne-la-no i-yv-dv wi-nu-sv-lv na-s-gi hi-a nu-we-so-i, hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi Qui-da a-le Tsa-ni a-le Tsi-mi du-ti-nv-se a-le u-hna-lu-se o-da-lv u-da-do-li-s-ta-nv-se-i.

030929.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᎨᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᎧᏛ ᎤᏓᏁᏟᏴᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏄᏩᎥ ᎤᏁᎩᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏥᏍᏓᎷᎩᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
030929.english: And as he prayed, the fashion of his countenance was altered, and his raiment was white and glistering.
030929.phonetic: A-da-do-li-s-di-ge-no nu-s-dv u-ka-dv u-da-ne-tli-yv-se-i, a-le du-nu-wa-v u-ne-gi-yu a-le gv-wa-tsi-s-da-lu-gi-s-gi nu-li-s-ta-ne-i.

030930.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎬᏩᎵᏃᎮᏔᏁ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎼᏏ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎳᏯᎨᏎᎢ,
030930.english: And, behold, there talked with him two men, which were Moses and Elias:
030930.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo gv-wa-li-no-he-ta-ne a-ni-ta-li a-ni-s-ga-ya, na-s-gi Mo-si a-le I-la-ya-ge-se-i,

030931.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏄᏬᏍᏕ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎴᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁᎢᏍᏔᏁ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏕᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ.
030931.english: Who appeared in glory, and spake of his decease which he should accomplish at Jerusalem.
030931.phonetic: Na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv u-na-nu-wo-s-de gv-ni-ge-sv nu-na-dv-ne-le-i; a-le u-ni-ne-i-s-ta-ne u-li-s-qua-de-di-yi ge-sv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi.

030932.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏓᏂᎸᏍᎨᎢ; ᎤᏂᏰᏨᏃ ᎤᏂᎪᎮ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᏙᎬ ᏗᏂᏙᎩ.
030932.english: But Peter and they that were with him were heavy with sleep: and when they were awake, they saw his glory, and the two men that stood with him.
030932.phonetic: Qui-da-s-gi-ni a-le na-s-gi na a-ne-hi u-tsa-ti da-ni-lv-s-ge-i; u-ni-ye-tsv-no u-ni-go-he u-tse-li ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi a-ni-ta-li a-ni-s-ga-ya ga-do-gv di-ni-do-gi.

030933.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎬᏩᏓᏅᎡᎮᎢ, ᏈᏓ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᏥᏌ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᏂ ᏥᏕᏙᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢ ᏫᏙᏥᎵᏦᏛᎦ; ᏌᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏣᏤᎵᎦ, ᏌᏉᏃ ᎼᏏ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᏌᏉᏃ ᎢᎳᏯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᏯᎦᏔᎮ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎢ.
030933.english: And it came to pass, as they departed from him, Peter said unto Jesus, Master, it is good for us to be here: and let us make three tabernacles; one for thee, and one for Moses, and one for Elias: not knowing what he said.
030933.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi hna-quo gv-wa-da-nv-e-he-i, Qui-da hi-a nu-we-se-le Tsi-sa, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, o-si-yu a-ni tsi-de-do-ha; a-le tso-i wi-do-tsi-li-tso-dv-ga; sa-quo ni-hi tsa-tse-li-ga, sa-quo-no Mo-si u-tse-li-ga, sa-quo-no I-la-ya u-tse-li-ga, v-tla ya-ga-ta-he ni-ga-we-s-gv-i.

030934.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ ᎤᎶᎩᎳᏕᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏄᏢᏔᏁᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᎴ ᎤᏂᏄᏴᎸ ᎤᎶᎩᎸᎢ.
030934.english: While he thus spake, there came a cloud, and overshadowed them: and they feared as they entered into the cloud.
030934.phonetic: A-si-quo na-s-gi ni-ga-we-s-ge-i u-lo-gi-la-de-i a-le u-nu-tlv-ta-ne-i; a-le u-ni-s-ga-le u-ni-nu-yv-lv u-lo-gi-lv-i.

030935.cherokee: ᎤᎶᎩᎸᏃ ᏧᎶᏎ ᎧᏁᎬ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᎠᏇᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏣᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
030935.english: And there came a voice out of the cloud, saying, This is my beloved Son: hear him.
030935.phonetic: U-lo-gi-lv-no tsu-lo-se ka-ne-gv hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i, Hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ge-yu-i A-que-tsi, na-s-gi e-tsa-dv-da-s-da-ne-he-s-di.

030936.cherokee: ᎧᏁᎬ ᎤᎶᏐᏅ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎠᏥᏩᏛᎮ ᏥᏌ.  ᎡᎳᏪᏱᏉᏃ ᎤᏅᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏳᏂᏃᏁᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏂᎪᎲᎢ.
030936.english: And when the voice was past, Jesus was found alone. And they kept it close, and told no man in those days any of those things which they had seen.
030936.phonetic: Ka-ne-gv u-lo-so-nv u-wa-sv-quo a-tsi-wa-dv-he Tsi-sa.  E-la-we-yi-quo-no u-nv-se-i, a-le v-tla gi-lo yu-ni-no-ne-le na-hi-yu ge-sv nu-s-dv u-ni-go-hv-i.

030937.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎩᏨᏛ ᏧᏂᎦᏐᎠᏒ ᎣᏓᎸᎢ, ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ ᏕᎬᏩᏠᏎᎢ.
030937.english: And it came to pass, that on the next day, when they were come down from the hill, much people met him.
030937.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne na-s-gi u-gi-tsv-dv tsu-ni-ga-so-a-sv o-da-lv-i, u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi de-gv-wa-tlo-se-i.

030938.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏪᎷᏁᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎬᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᏘᏯᎦᏃᏗᏱ ᎠᏇᏥ; ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏇᏥ ᎾᏍᎩ;
030938.english: And, behold, a man of the company cried out, saying, Master, I beseech thee, look upon my son: for he is mine only child.
030938.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo a-s-ga-ya na-hna u-na-da-tlu-gv u-we-lu-ne-i hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, gv-s-di-ye-di-ha ti-ya-ga-no-di-yi a-que-tsi; u-wa-sv-hi-yu-ye-no a-que-tsi na-s-gi;

030939.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏂᏱᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎨᎷᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎸᏕᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏓᎭᏬᎢᎰᎢ, ᎤᏂᏆᎶᏛᏃ ᎦᏂᎳ ᎤᏓᏅᎡᎰᎢ.
030939.english: And, lo, a spirit taketh him, and he suddenly crieth out; and it teareth him that he foameth again, and bruising him hardly departeth from him.
030939.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo, a-da-nv-do u-ni-yi-s-go-i, a-le gi-la-quo i-yv-dv ge-lu-hv-s-go-i, a-le u-lv-de-s-di-s-go-i a-le da-ha-wo-i-ho-i, u-ni-qua-lo-dv-no ga-ni-la u-da-nv-e-ho-i.

030940.english: And I besought thy disciples to cast him out; and they could not.

030941.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; Ᏺ, ᏂᏦᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎦᏔᎲᏛ ᎪᎯ ᏥᏤᎭ!  ᎢᎳᎪ ᏂᎪᎯᎴᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᎢᏨᏰᎵᏎᎮᏍᏗ?  ᎡᎯᏯᏘᏄᎦ ᏤᏥ.
030941.english: And Jesus answering said, O faithless and perverse generation, how long shall I be with you, and suffer you? Bring thy son hither.
030941.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Yo, ni-tso-hi-yu-sv-na a-le i-tsa-ga-ta-hv-dv go-hi tsi-tse-ha!  i-la-go ni-go-hi-le-s-di i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-he-s-di, a-le u-na-ne-la-gi i-tsv-ye-li-se-he-s-di?  E-hi-ya-ti-nu-ga tse-tsi.

030942.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᏣᎢᏎᎢ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᏍᏢᏂᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎸᏕᏍᏔᏁᎢ.  ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏍᎦᏤ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏩᏁ ᎠᏲᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᎤᏪᎧᏁᎴ ᎤᏙᏓ.
030942.english: And as he was yet a coming, the devil threw him down, and tare him. And Jesus rebuked the unclean spirit, and healed the child, and delivered him again to his father.
030942.phonetic: A-si-quo-no tsa-i-se-i a-s-gi-na u-s-tlv-ni-s-ta-ne-i, a-le u-lv-de-s-ta-ne-i.  Tsi-sa-no u-s-ga-tse ga-da-ha a-da-nv-do a-le u-nv-wa-ne a-yo-li, a-le ta-li-ne i-u-we-ka-ne-le u-do-da.

030943.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.  ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏒ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏥᏌ ᏄᏛᏁᎸᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ;
030943.english: And they were all amazed at the mighty power of God. But while they wondered every one at all things which Jesus did, he said unto his disciples,
030943.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se u-tsa-ti u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi.  Ni-ga-dv-no u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-sv ni-ga-v tsi-sa nu-dv-ne-lv-i, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi;

030944.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᏥᏪᎭ ᏩᏴᎭ ᏗᏥᎴᏂ; ᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎨᏥᏲᎯᏎᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
030944.english: Let these sayings sink down into your ears: for the Son of man shall be delivered into the hands of men.
030944.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ni-tsi-we-ha wa-yv-ha di-tsi-le-ni; yv-wi-ye-no U-we-tsi yv-wi di-ge-tsi-yo-hi-se-di ge-se-s-di.

030945.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏃᎵᏤ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᎬᏍᎦᎳᏁᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏂᎪᎲᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎢᎮ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏪᏒᎢ.
030945.english: But they understood not this saying, and it was hid from them, that they perceived it not: and they feared to ask him of that saying.
030945.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla yu-no-li-tse na-s-gi ni-du-we-se-lv-i, a-le ge-gv-s-ga-la-ne-le-i, na-s-gi nu-ni-go-hv-na ge-se-i; a-le a-ni-s-ga-i-he gv-wa-dv-dv-di-yi na-s-gi nu-we-sv-i.

030946.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎴ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏟ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
030946.english: Then there arose a reasoning among them, which of them should be greatest.
030946.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-ni-no-he-le u-nv-sv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi na u-na-da-tlu-gv u-tli a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i.

030947.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏓᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏙᏧᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᏲᎵ ᏭᏯᏅᎮ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏬᎸ ᎾᎥ ᎤᏪᎧᏁᎢ,
030947.english: And Jesus, perceiving the thought of their heart, took a child, and set him by him,
030947.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-do-le-ho-sv nu-s-dv da-na-da-nv-te-s-gv do-tsu-na-da-nv-dv-i, a-yo-li wu-ya-nv-he a-le u-wo-lv na-v u-we-ka-ne-i,

030948.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᏓᏓᏂᎸᎨᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏓᏂᎸᎨᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏓᏂᎸᎨᏍᏗ, ᏓᏓᏂᎸᎨᏍᏗ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᏂᎯ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏂᏣᏛᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
030948.english: And said unto them, Whosoever shall receive this child in my name receiveth me: and whosoever shall receive me receiveth him that sent me: for he that is least among you all, the same shall be great.
030948.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Gi-lo da-da-ni-lv-ge-s-di hi-a a-yo-li a-yv da-qua-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di, a-yv da-qua-da-ni-lv-ge-s-di; gi-lo-no a-yv da-qua-da-ni-lv-ge-s-di, da-da-ni-lv-ge-s-di nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv, na-s-gi-ye-no u-s-di-ka-ni ni-hi ni-ga-dv ni-tsa-dv-nv-i, na-s-gi a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di.

030949.cherokee: ᏣᏂᏃ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎣᏥᎪᎥᎩ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᏕᎦᏄᎪᏫᏍᎬᎩ ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎩ; ᎣᏥᏅᏍᏓᏕᎸᎩᏃ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᏂᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
030949.english: And John answered and said, Master, we saw one casting out devils in thy name; and we forbad him, because he followeth not with us.
030949.phonetic: Tsa-ni-no u-ne-tse hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, o-tsi-go-v-gi a-si-yv-wi a-ni-s-gi-na de-ga-nu-go-wi-s-gv-gi de-tsa-do-v gv-di-s-gv-gi; o-tsi-nv-s-da-de-lv-gi-no nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi ni-gi-s-da-wa-de-gv-na ge-sv-i.

030950.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏅᏍᏓᏕᎸᎩ; ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏡᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎵᎪᏁᎯ.
030950.english: And Jesus said unto him, Forbid him not: for he that is not against us is for us.
030950.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi, Tle-s-di e-tsi-nv-s-da-de-lv-gi; gi-lo-ye-no ni-ga-tlu-di-s-gv-na yi-gi na-s-gi i-ga-li-go-ne-hi.

030951.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏍᏆᎵᏍᎨ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏣᎦᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎤᏓᏅᏖ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏭᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
030951.english: And it came to pass, when the time was come that he should be received up, he stedfastly set his face to go to Jerusalem,
030951.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne hna-quo a-s-qua-li-s-ge ga-lv-la-di tsa-ga-da-ni-lv-i-s-di-yi, u-li-ni-gi-di-yu u-da-nv-te Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wu-lo-hi-s-di-yi.

030952.cherokee: ᏚᏅᏎᏃ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎠᏁᎩ; ᎤᏁᏅᏎᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᏌᎺᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎤᏂᏚᎲ ᏭᏂᏴᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
030952.english: And sent messengers before his face: and they went, and entered into a village of the Samaritans, to make ready for him.
030952.phonetic: Du-nv-se-no i-gv-yi a-ne-gi; u-ne-nv-se-no, a-le Sa-me-li a-ne-hi u-ni-du-hv wu-ni-yv-le-i, na-s-gi gv-wa-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-di-yi.

030953.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏃ ᏱᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᏤᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏥᏩᎦᏙ ᏅᏩᏍᏕᎢ.
030953.english: And they did not receive him, because his face was as though he would go to Jerusalem.
030953.phonetic: V-tla-no yi-di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-tse-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge Tsi-lu-si-li-mi tsi-wa-ga-do nv-wa-s-de-i.

030954.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᏥᎻ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎪᎲ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎣᏏᏉᏍᎪ ᏱᏰᎸᎾ ᏲᎩᏂᏁᏨ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎪᎲᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᎳᏯ ᏄᏛᏁᎸᎢ?
030954.english: And when his disciples James and John saw this, they said, Lord, wilt thou that we command fire to come down from heaven, and consume them, even as Elias did?
030954.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no Tsi-mi a-le Tsa-ni na-s-gi u-ni-go-hv, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, o-si-quo-s-go yi-ye-lv-na yo-gi-ni-ne-tsv a-tsi-lv ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-hi-s-di-yi a-le u-na-go-hv-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi-ya I-la-ya nu-dv-ne-lv-i?

030955.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᎦᏔᎲᏒ ᏚᎬᏍᎪᎸᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏍᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏍᏗᎲᎢ.
030955.english: But he turned, and rebuked them, and said, Ye know not what manner of spirit ye are of.
030955.phonetic: A-se-no u-ga-ta-hv-sv du-gv-s-go-lv-ne hi-a nu-we-se-i, V-tla yi-s-di-ga-ta-ha nu-s-dv a-da-nv-do i-s-di-hv-i.

030956.cherokee: ᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏧᎷᏥᎸ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏅᏅ ᏱᏚᏛᏔᏂᎸ, ᏚᏍᏕᎸᎯᎸᏉᏍᎩᏂ.  ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᏗᎦᏚᎲ ᏭᏂᎶᏎᎢ.
030956.english: For the Son of man is not come to destroy men's lives, but to save them. And they went to another village.
030956.phonetic: Yv-wi-ye-no U-we-tsi tsu-lu-tsi-lv v-tla yv-wi da-nv-nv yi-du-dv-ta-ni-lv, du-s-de-lv-hi-lv-quo-s-gi-ni.  Nv-wa-da-le-no di-ga-du-hv wu-ni-lo-se-i.

030957.cherokee: ᎠᎾᎢᏒᏃ ᏅᏃᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏓᎬᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎵ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎮᏙᎲᎢ.
030957.english: And it came to pass, that, as they went in the way, a certain man said unto him, Lord, I will follow thee whithersoever thou goest.
030957.phonetic: A-na-i-sv-no nv-no-hi hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, gi-lo i-yu-s-di hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, da-gv-s-da-wa-di-do-li ni-ga-v he-do-hv-i.

030958.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏧᎳ ᏚᏂᏔᎴᏐᎢ, ᏥᏍᏆᏃ ᎦᎳᏅᏛ Ꭰ-ᏂᏃᎯᎵᏙᎯ ᏚᎾᏁᏍᏓᏝᎰᎢ; ᏴᏫᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᎤᏠᏗᏱ ᏱᎩ.
030958.english: And Jesus said unto him, Foxes have holes, and birds of the air have nests; but the Son of man hath not where to lay his head.
030958.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsu-la du-ni-ta-le-so-i, tsi-s-qua-no ga-la-nv-dv a--ni-no-hi-li-do-hi du-na-ne-s-da-tla-ho-i; yv-wi-s-gi-ni U-we-tsi v-tla i-lv-hi-tlv a-s-go-li u-tlo-di-yi yi-gi.

030959.cherokee: ᎤᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏚᎦ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏍᏆᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏏ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎠᏇᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏫᏥᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎡᏙᏓ.
030959.english: And he said unto another, Follow me. But he said, Lord, suffer me first to go and bury my father.
030959.phonetic: U-wa-da-le-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, S-gi-s-da-wa-du-ga.  A-se-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, s-qua-li-s-go-lv-da-si i-gv-yi a-que-nv-s-di-yi wi-tsi-ni-so-di-yi e-do-da.

030960.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏓᏂᏂᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏲᎱᎯᏎᎸᎯ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎮᎾ ᏩᎵᏥᏙᎲᎦ ᏫᏃᎲᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
030960.english: Jesus said unto him, Let the dead bury their dead: but go thou and preach the kingdom of God.
030960.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi da-ni-ni-si-s-ge-s-di di-gv-wa-ni-yo-hu-hi-se-lv-hi; ni-hi-s-gi-ni he-na wa-li-tsi-do-hv-ga wi-no-hv-li U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

030961.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏓᎬᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎵ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎨᎾ ᏫᎦᏥᏲᎵᎦ ᏅᏛᏂᏂ ᏗᏇᏅᏒᎢ.
030961.english: And another also said, Lord, I will follow thee; but let me first go bid them farewell, which are at home at my house.
030961.phonetic: Nv-wa-da-le-no na-s-quo hi-a nu-we-se-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, da-gv-s-da-wa-di-do-li; a-se-no i-gv-yi ge-na wi-ga-tsi-yo-li-ga nv-dv-ni-ni di-que-nv-sv-i.

030962.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶᎢ, ᏧᏏᏔᏛᎯ ᎦᏓᎷᎪᏗ ᏱᎠᎦᏔᎲᏃ, ᏰᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏫᎬᏩᏴᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ.
030962.english: And Jesus said unto him, No man, having put his hand to the plough, and looking back, is fit for the kingdom of God.
030962.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, V-tla gi-lo-i, tsu-si-ta-dv-hi ga-da-lu-go-di yi-a-ga-ta-hv-no, ye-li U-ne-la-nv-hi U-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv wi-gv-wa-yv-s-di yi-gi.

031001.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎦᎵᏆᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏚᏑᏰᏎᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏅᏎ ᏔᎵ ᏧᎾᎵᎪᏅᏛ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏄᏁᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏕᎦᏚᏩᏗᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ, ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏩᏒ ᏭᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031001.english: After these things the Lord appointed other seventy also, and sent them two and two before his face into every city and place, whither he himself would come.
031001.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv, U-gv-wi-yu-hi nv-wa-na-da-le ga-li-qua-s-go-hi i-ya-ni-dv na-s-quo du-su-ye-se-i a-le du-nv-se ta-li tsu-na-li-go-nv-dv i-gv-yi nu-ne-nv-s-di-yi ni-ga-dv de-ga-du-wa-di-sv a-le ni-gv-na-dv, na-hna u-wa-sv wu-lu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

031002.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᎦᏛᎾᏨᎯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎤᏣᏔ, ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏂᎦᏲᎵᏳ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎡᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏏ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎦᏛᎾᏨᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᏂᏙᏓᏳᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎤᎦᏛᎾᏤᎸᎢ.
031002.english: Therefore said he unto them, The harvest truly is great, but the labourers are few: pray ye therefore the Lord of the harvest, that he would send forth labourers into his harvest.
031002.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, U-ga-dv-na-tsv-hi u-do-hi-yu-hi u-tsa-ta, tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi-s-gi-ni a-ni-ga-yo-li-yu; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di e-tsa-da-do-li-s-da-si U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-ga-dv-na-tsv-hi u-tse-li-ga, ni-do-da-yu-nv-s-di-yi tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi na-hna u-ga-dv-na-tse-lv-i.

031003.cherokee: ᎢᏤᎾ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎢᏨᏅᎵ ᎤᏂᏃᏕᎾ ᎠᏂᎩᎾ ᏩᏲᎯ ᏥᏩᏂᎶᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
031003.english: Go your ways: behold, I send you forth as lambs among wolves.
031003.phonetic: I-tse-na; gv-ni-yu-quo i-tsv-nv-li u-ni-no-de-na a-ni-gi-na wa-yo-hi tsi-wa-ni-lo-s-go na-s-gi-ya-i.

031004.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏅᏒᎩ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏗᎦᎶᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎦᎶᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎳᏑᎶ; ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎡᏥᏲᎵᎸᎩ ᎢᏣᎢᏒᎢ.
031004.english: Carry neither purse, nor scrip, nor shoes: and salute no man by the way.
031004.phonetic: Tle-s-di di-tsi-nv-sv-gi a-de-lv di-ga-lo-di, a-le de-ga-lo-di, a-le di-la-su-lo; a-le tle-s-di gi-lo e-tsi-yo-li-lv-gi i-tsa-i-sv-i.

031005.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏢᏃ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎢᏥᏴᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᎢᎬᏱ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎡᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏂ ᎠᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎢᏣᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
031005.english: And into whatsoever house ye enter, first say, Peace be to this house.
031005.phonetic: I-lv-hi-tlv-no a-da-ne-lv i-tsi-yv-hi-he-s-di, i-gv-yi, Nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv e-he-s-di a-ni a-da-ne-lv-i, i-tsa-di-s-ge-s-di.

031006.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᎮᏍᏗ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᏁᎲᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏒᏉ ᎢᏥᎷᏥᏌᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031006.english: And if the son of peace be there, your peace shall rest upon it: if not, it shall turn to you again.
031006.phonetic: I-yu-no nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv u-we-tsi na-hna e-he-s-di, nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tsa-tse-li-ga u-lu-tse-di ge-se-s-di; i-yu-no na-hna ne-hv-na i-ge-se-s-di i-tsv-sv-quo i-tsi-lu-tsi-sa-ne-di ge-se-s-di.

031007.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎢᏥᏁᏍᏗ, ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎡᏥᏁᎲᎢ; ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯᏰᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᎠᎫᏴᎡᏗᏱ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.  ᏞᏍᏗ ᏓᏓᏁᎳᏗᏒ ᏱᏤᏙᎵᏙᎮᏍᏗ
031007.english: And in the same house remain, eating and drinking such things as they give: for the labourer is worthy of his hire. Go not from house to house.
031007.phonetic: A-le na-hna-quo a-da-ne-lv i-tsi-ne-s-di, i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-s-ge-s-di a-le i-tsa-di-ta-s-ge-s-di nu-s-dv e-tsi-ne-hv-i; tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi-ye-no du-yu-go-di a-gu-yv-e-di-yi du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i.  Tle-s-di da-da-ne-la-di-sv yi-tse-do-li-do-he-s-di

031008.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎢᏥᎷᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎨᏣᏓᏂᎸᎨᏍᏗ, ᏄᏍᏛ ᎨᏤᎳᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
031008.english: And into whatsoever city ye enter, and they receive you, eat such things as are set before you:
031008.phonetic: A-le i-lv-hi-tlv ga-du-hv i-tsi-lu-ge-s-di, a-le de-ge-tsa-da-ni-lv-ge-s-di, nu-s-dv ge-tse-la-s-di-s-gv i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-s-ge-s-di.

031009.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᏅᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᏂᏢᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏕᏥᏪᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎸ.
031009.english: And heal the sick that are therein, and say unto them, The kingdom of God is come nigh unto you.
031009.phonetic: A-le de-tsi-nv-wi-s-ge-s-di tsu-ni-tlv-gi na-hna a-ne-hv-i, a-le hi-a ni-de-tsi-we-se-he-s-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv na-v-ni-yu i-tsi-lu-tse-lv.

031010.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏢᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎢᏥᏴᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᏂᏗᎨᏣᏓᏂᎸᎬᎾᏃ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᏄᎪᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᎦᎳᏅᏛ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᏫᏥᎶᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ,
031010.english: But into whatsoever city ye enter, and they receive you not, go your ways out into the streets of the same, and say,
031010.phonetic: I-lv-hi-tlv-s-gi-ni ga-du-hv i-tsi-yv-hi-he-s-di, ni-di-ge-tsa-da-ni-lv-gv-na-no i-ge-se-s-di, i-tsi-nu-go-ge-s-di de-ga-la-nv-dv na-hna-ni wi-tsi-lo-s-ge-s-di, hi-a ni-tsi-we-s-ge-s-di,

031011.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᏍᏚᏉ ᎢᏥᏚᎲ ᎦᎳᎨᏴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᎩᏯᎸᎬᎢ ᎣᏥᏅᎪᎥᏗ ᎢᏨᎢᏰᎭ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎸᎢ.
031011.english: Even the very dust of your city, which cleaveth on us, we do wipe off against you: notwithstanding be ye sure of this, that the kingdom of God is come nigh unto you.
031011.phonetic: Na-s-quo go-s-du-quo i-tsi-du-hv ga-la-ge-yv-i, na-s-gi o-gi-ya-lv-gv-i o-tsi-nv-go-v-di i-tsv-i-ye-ha; a-se-no hi-a nu-s-de-s-di i-tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv na-v-ni-yu i-tsi-lu-tse-lv-i.

031012.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏂᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏐᏓᎻ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ.
031012.english: But I say unto you, that it shall be more tolerable in that day for Sodom, than for that city.
031012.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, e-s-ga-quo i-ga-i u-ni-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-se-s-di So-da-mi na-hi-yu i-ga ge-se-s-di u-tli-hi-yu na-s-gi ga-du-hv-i.

031013.cherokee: ᎤᏲᏂᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎪᎴᏏᏂ!  ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏂᎯ ᏇᏣᏱᏗ!  ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏱᏙᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎴ ᏔᏯ ᎠᎴ ᏌᏙᏂ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᎲ ᏕᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎪᎯᎩ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏁᏟᏴᏛ ᏱᎨᏎ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᏧᏏᏕᎾ ᏱᏚᎾᏄᏩᎡ ᎠᎴ ᎪᏍᏚᎯ ᏳᎾᏅᏁᎢ.
031013.english: Woe unto thee, Chorazin! woe unto thee, Bethsaida! for if the mighty works had been done in Tyre and Sidon, which have been done in you, they had a great while ago repented, sitting in sackcloth and ashes.
031013.phonetic: U-yo-ni-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di ni-hi Go-le-si-ni!  u-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di ni-hi Que-tsa-yi-di!  i-yu-ye-no u-s-qua-ni-go-di yi-do-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-le Ta-ya a-le Sa-do-ni ni-hi i-tse-hv de-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i, go-hi-gi di-gv-wa-ni-ne-tli-yv-dv yi-ge-se du-na-da-nv-dv-i, tsu-si-de-na yi-du-na-nu-wa-e a-le go-s-du-hi yu-na-nv-ne-i.

031014.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎡᏃ ᎤᏟ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏔᏯ ᎠᎴ ᏌᏙᏂ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏂᎯ.
031014.english: But it shall be more tolerable for Tyre and Sidon at the judgment, than for you.
031014.phonetic: A-s-e-no u-tli o-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di Ta-ya a-le Sa-do-ni u-li-s-qua-lv-di i-ga ge-se-s-di e-s-ga-quo ni-hi.

031015.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏆᏂ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏤᏣᏌᎳᏓ, ᏨᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏮᏓᏰᏣᎶᎥᏔᏂ.
031015.english: And thou, Capernaum, which art exalted to heaven, shalt be thrust down to hell.
031015.phonetic: A-le ni-hi Ge-qua-ni ga-lv-la-di i-yv-dv tse-tsa-sa-la-da, tsv-s-gi-no i-yv-dv wv-da-ye-tsa-lo-v-ta-ni.

031016.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᏥᏂᏆᏘᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏂᏆᏘᎮᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏂᏆᏘᎮᏍᏗ ᎦᏂᏆᏘᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ.
031016.english: He that heareth you heareth me; and he that despiseth you despiseth me; and he that despiseth me despiseth him that sent me.
031016.phonetic: Gi-lo ni-hi i-tsa-dv-da-s-da-ne-he-s-di a-yv a-qua-dv-da-s-da-ne-he-s-di; gi-lo-no i-tsi-ni-qua-ti-he-s-di, a-yv a-gi-ni-qua-ti-he-s-di; gi-lo-no a-yv a-gi-ni-qua-ti-he-s-di ga-ni-qua-ti-he-s-di nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv.

031017.cherokee: ᎦᎵᏆᏍᎪᎯᏃ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏂᎷᏤ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᏚᏁᏓᏅᏖᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎪᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ ᏂᎯ ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ.
031017.english: And the seventy returned again with joy, saying, Lord, even the devils are subject unto us through thy name.
031017.phonetic: Ga-li-qua-s-go-hi-no i-ya-ni-dv ta-li-ne u-ni-lu-tse u-li-he-li-s-di du-ne-da-nv-te-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-ni-s-gi-na na-s-quo i-go-go-hi-yu-hv-s-ga ni-hi de-tsa-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha.

031018.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏎᏓᏂ ᏥᎪᎥᎩ ᎠᎾᎦᎵᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏨᏗᎦᏙᎠᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏓᏳᏙᎠᏒᎩ.
031018.english: And he said unto them, I beheld Satan as lightning fall from heaven.
031018.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Se-da-ni tsi-go-v-gi a-na-ga-li-s-gi ga-lv-la-di tsv-di-ga-do-a-s-go na-s-gi-ya da-yu-do-a-sv-gi.

031019.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏏ ᏗᏣᎳᏍᏓᎡᏗᏱ ᎢᎾᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏙᎬ ᏗᎾᏓᏨᏯᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᎵᏁᎯᏕᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎦᏍᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏰᎵ ᎤᏲ ᎢᎨᏨᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031019.english: Behold, I give unto you power to tread on serpents and scorpions, and over all the power of the enemy: and nothing shall by any means hurt you.
031019.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo i-tsv-ya-li-s-go-lv-da-si di-tsa-la-s-da-e-di-yi i-na-dv a-le di-ni-do-gv di-na-da-tsv-ya-s-di-s-gi, a-le i-tsa-da-li-ne-hi-de-di-yi ni-ga-v u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv a-ga-s-gi; v-tla a-le go-hu-s-di ye-li u-yo i-ge-tsv-ne-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

031020.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᎨᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ; ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏦᏒ ᏫᏗᎪᏪᎸᎢ.
031020.english: Notwithstanding in this rejoice not, that the spirits are subject unto you; but rather rejoice, because your names are written in heaven.
031020.phonetic: A-se-s-gi-ni-no-nv hi-a na-s-gi v-tla-s-di yi-tsa-li-he-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi di-da-nv-do ge-tso-hi-yu-sv-i; i-tsa-li-he-li-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di de-tsa-do-v ga-lv-la-di tso-sv wi-di-go-we-lv-i.

031021.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏤ ᎤᏓᏅᏙᎩᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎬᏯᎵᎡᎵᏤᎭ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏕᎲᏍᎦᎳᏁᎸ ᎠᏂᏏᎾᏌᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏁᏯᏔᎯ, ᏗᏂᏲᎵᏃ ᏥᏕᎯᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸ; ᎥᎥ, ᎡᏙᏓ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏣᏰᎸᏅᎯ.
031021.english: In that hour Jesus rejoiced in spirit, and said, I thank thee, O Father, Lord of heaven and earth, that thou hast hid these things from the wise and prudent, and hast revealed them unto babes: even so, Father; for so it seemed good in thy sight.
031021.phonetic: Na-hi-yu Tsi-sa u-li-he-li-tse u-da-nv-do-gi-hi, hi-a nu-we-se-i, gv-ya-li-e-li-tse-ha E-do-da Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi ga-lv-la-di a-le e-lo-hi, na-s-gi hi-a tsi-de-hv-s-ga-la-ne-lv a-ni-si-na-sa-ni a-le a-ne-ya-ta-hi, di-ni-yo-li-no tsi-de-hi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv; v-v, E-do-da; na-s-gi-ye-no o-si-yu tsa-ye-lv-nv-hi.

031022.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏓᎩᏲᎯᏎᎸ ᎡᏙᏓ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏯᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᏩᏒ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏏ ᎡᎳ ᎤᏪᏥ.
031022.english: All things are delivered to me of my Father: and no man knoweth who the Son is, but the Father; and who the Father is, but the Son, and he to whom the Son will reveal him.
031022.phonetic: Ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di da-gi-yo-hi-se-lv E-do-da; v-tla a-le gi-lo ya-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi ge-sv U-we-tsi, a-ga-yv-li-ge u-wa-sv; a-le na-s-gi a-ga-yv-li-ge ge-sv U-we-tsi u-wa-sv, a-le gi-lo tsi-na-nu-go-wi-si e-la U-we-tsi.

031023.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏭᎦᏔᎲᏍᏔᏅ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏔᏅᎯ ᏗᎦᏙᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏥᎪᏩᏘᎭ;
031023.english: And he turned him unto his disciples, and said privately, Blessed are the eyes which see the things that ye see:
031023.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no i-di-tlv wu-ga-ta-hv-s-ta-nv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le U-nv-sv ge-sv-i, di-ga-lv-quo-ta-nv-hi di-ga-do-li na-s-gi tsi-da-go-wa-ti-ha ni-hi tsi-tsi-go-wa-ti-ha;

031024.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏎᏰᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏛᎩ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎾᏚᎸᎲᎩ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏥᎪᏩᏘ ᎤᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏂᎪᎮᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏛᎪᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏣᏛᎩᎭ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎾᏛᎦᏁᎢ
031024.english: For I tell you, that many prophets and kings have desired to see those things which ye see, and have not seen them; and to hear those things which ye hear, and have not heard them.
031024.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-se-ye-no u-ni-tsa-dv-gi A-na-do-le-ho-s-gi a-le u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi u-na-du-lv-hv-gi ni-hi tsi-tsi-go-wa-ti u-ni-go-wa-dv-di-yi, a-se-no v-tla yu-ni-go-he-i; a-le u-na-dv-go-di-yi na-s-gi ni-hi tsi-tsa-dv-gi-ha, a-se-no v-tla yu-na-dv-ga-ne-i

031025.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᎪᏏᏏᏍᎩ ᏚᎴᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎪᎵᏰᏍᎬ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᏯᏆᏛᏁᎸ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ?
031025.english: And, behold, a certain lawyer stood up, and tempted him, saying, Master, what shall I do to inherit eternal life?
031025.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-no, gi-lo i-yu-s-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-go-si-si-s-gi du-le-ne-i, a-le u-go-li-ye-s-gv hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ga-do ya-qua-dv-ne-lv a-qua-tse-li yi-ni-ga-li-s-da gv-ni-dv a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na?

031026.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏥᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ?  ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏙ ᎯᎪᎵᏰᏍᎪᎢ?
031026.english: He said unto him, What is written in the law? how readest thou?
031026.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-tsi-we-se-le-i, Ga-do gv-nv go-we-la di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi?  Ga-do u-s-do hi-go-li-ye-s-go-i?

031027.cherokee: ᏧᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎲᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏣᎾᏫ ᏣᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏣᏓᏅᏙᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏣᎵᏂᎬᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏣᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᎥᏃ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏓᎳ ᏨᏒ ᏂᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ.
031027.english: And he answering said, Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy strength, and with all thy mind; and thy neighbour as thyself.
031027.phonetic: Tsu-ne-tsv-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Hi-ge-yu-se-s-di Yi-ho-wa Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi, hv-di-s-ge-s-di ni-ga-v tsa-na-wi tsa-lv-i, a-le ni-ga-v tsa-da-nv-do-gi, a-le ni-ga-v tsa-li-ni-gv-gv-i, a-le ni-ga-v tsa-da-nv-te-di ge-sv-i; na-v-no i-di-s-da-da-la tsv-sv ni-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv na-s-gi-ya ni-ge-yu-se-s-di.

031028.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏰᎵᏉ ᏂᏫ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎿᎭᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎲᏁᏍᏗᏃ.
031028.english: And he said unto him, Thou hast answered right: this do, and thou shalt live.
031028.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le-i, ye-li-quo ni-wi; na-s-gi hi-a hna-dv-ne-he-s-di, hv-ne-s-di-no.

031029.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎤᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᏥᏌ, ᎦᎪᏃ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏦᎩᎾᏓᎳ?
031029.english: But he, willing to justify himself, said unto Jesus, And who is my neighbour?
031029.phonetic: A-se-no u-du-li-s-gv u-du-da-le-s-di-yi hi-a nu-we-se-le Tsi-sa, Ga-go-no na-v i-tso-gi-na-da-la?

031030.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏧᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎤᏂᎩᏎ ᏤᎵᎪ ᎤᏪᏅᏎᎢ, ᏗᎾᏓᎾᏌᎲᏍᎩᏃ ᏚᎾᏓᏩᏛᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎬᏩᏄᏪᏎ ᏚᏄᏩᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᎵᎥᏂᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏎ ᎬᏩᏕᏤ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ.
031030.english: And Jesus answering said, A certain man went down from Jerusalem to Jericho, and fell among thieves, which stripped him of his raiment, and wounded him, and departed, leaving him half dead.
031030.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no tsu-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Gi-lo i-yu-s-di Tsi-lu-si-li-mi u-ni-gi-se Tse-li-go u-we-nv-se-i, di-na-da-na-sa-hv-s-gi-no du-na-da-wa-dv-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi de-gv-wa-nu-we-se du-nu-wa-v-i, a-le gv-wa-li-v-ni-le-i, a-le u-na-da-nv-se gv-wa-de-tse a-ye-li i-yv-dv u-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-se-i.

031031.cherokee: ᎠᏰᎵᏃ ᏄᏮᏔᏁ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᏂᎦᏅᏅ ᏗᎤᎶᏎᎢ; ᎤᎪᎲᏃ ᎠᏂᏗᏢᏉ ᏄᎶᏎᎢ.
031031.english: And by chance there came down a certain priest that way: and when he saw him, he passed by on the other side.
031031.phonetic: A-ye-li-no nu-wv-ta-ne gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi na-hna ni-ga-nv-nv di-u-lo-se-i; u-go-hv-no a-ni-di-tlv-quo nu-lo-se-i.

031032.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎵᏫ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᏙᎲ, ᎤᎷᏤ ᎤᎦᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏗᏢᏉ ᏄᎶᏎᎢ.
031032.english: And likewise a Levite, when he was at the place, came and looked on him, and passed by on the other side.
031032.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo A-li-wi na-hna e-do-hv, u-lu-tse u-ga-ta-ne-i, a-le a-ni-di-tlv-quo nu-lo-se-i.

031033.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎠᎢᏒᎢ, ᎤᎷᏤ ᎦᏅᎢ; ᎤᎪᎲᏃ ᎤᏪᏙᎵᏤᎢ;
031033.english: But a certain Samaritan, as he journeyed, came where he was: and when he saw him, he had compassion on him,
031033.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni i-yu-s-di Sa-me-li-yi e-hi a-i-sv-i, u-lu-tse ga-nv-i; u-go-hv-no u-we-do-li-tse-i;

031034.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏭᎷᏤ ᎠᎴ ᏚᎸᎡᎴ ᏓᏥᏐᏅᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎢ ᎩᎦᎨᏃ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᏓᏍᏚᏞᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᎩᎸᏙᏗ ᎤᎩᎸᏔᏁᎢ, ᏧᏂᏒᏍᏗᏱᏃ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏘᏃᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏁᎢ.
031034.english: And went to him, and bound up his wounds, pouring in oil and wine, and set him on his own beast, and brought him to an inn, and took care of him.
031034.phonetic: A-le wu-lu-tse a-le du-lv-e-le da-tsi-so-nv-nv-i, a-le go-i gi-ga-ge-no--a-di-ta-s-di da-s-du-tle-he-i, a-le u-wa-sv u-gi-lv-do-di u-gi-lv-ta-ne-i, tsu-ni-sv-s-di-yi-no a-da-ne-lv u-ti-no-le-i, a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-ta-ne-i.

031035.cherokee: ᎤᎩᏨᏛᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏂᎩᏒ, ᏔᎵ ᎠᏂᎩᏏ ᏧᎾᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏑᎴᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏁᎴ ᎦᏁᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᏍᏆᏂᎪᏕᏍᏗ, ᎢᎦᎢᏃ ᏫᎦᎶᏒᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏣᎫᏴᎯᏙᎸᎢ, ᎢᏥᎷᏨᎭ ᎢᎬᏯᎫᏴᎡᎸᎭ.
031035.english: And on the morrow when he departed, he took out two pence, and gave them to the host, and said unto him, Take care of him; and whatsoever thou spendest more, when I come again, I will repay thee.
031035.phonetic: U-gi-tsv-dv-no hna-quo u-ni-gi-sv, ta-li a-ni-gi-si tsu-na-gv-wa-lo-di su-le-se-i, a-le du-ne-le ga-ne-la, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Hi-s-qua-ni-go-de-s-di, i-ga-i-no wi-ga-lo-sv-s-di-s-gv tsa-gu-yv-hi-do-lv-i, i-tsi-lu-tsv-ha i-gv-ya-gu-yv-e-lv-ha.

031036.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎢ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒ, ᏂᎯ ᎭᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ, ᎦᎪ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏧᎾᏓᎳ ᏅᏩᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎾᏓᎾᏌᎲᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᎾᏓᏩᏛᏔᏁᎢ?
031036.english: Which now of these three, thinkest thou, was neighbour unto him that fell among the thieves?
031036.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi tso-i i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv, ni-hi ha-da-nv-te-s-gv, ga-go na-v i-tsu-na-da-la nv-wa-s-di na-s-gi di-na-da-na-sa-hv-s-gi tsi-du-na-da-wa-dv-ta-ne-i?

031037.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏪᏙᎵᏨᎯ.  ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎮᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏫᎾᏛᎦ.
031037.english: And he said, He that shewed mercy on him. Then said Jesus unto him, Go, and do thou likewise.
031037.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, Na-s-gi na u-we-do-li-tsv-hi.  Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, He-na, a-le ni-hi na-s-gi-ya wi-na-dv-ga.

031038.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎠᎾᎢᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎤᎷᏤᎢ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎹᏗ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᏚᏓᏂᎸᏤ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ.
031038.english: Now it came to pass, as they went, that he entered into a certain village: and a certain woman named Martha received him into her house.
031038.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne a-na-i-sv-i, na-s-gi i-lv-hi-tlv ga-du-hv u-lu-tse-i; gi-lo-no i-yu-s-di a-ge-yv Ma-di tsu-do-i-dv du-da-ni-lv-tse ga-ne-lv-i.

031039.cherokee: ᎤᎸᏃ ᎡᎮ ᎺᎵ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏬᎴ ᏥᏌ ᏚᎳᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏛᏓᏍᏕ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
031039.english: And she had a sister called Mary, which also sat at Jesus' feet, and heard his word.
031039.phonetic: U-lv-no e-he Me-li tsu-do-i-dv, na-s-gi na-s-quo u-wo-le Tsi-sa du-la-s-gv-i, a-le u-dv-da-s-de ga-wo-ni-s-gv-i.

031040.cherokee: ᎹᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎷᏤᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏰᎵᎭ ᎥᎩᎸ ᏣᏋᏕᏨ ᏣᎩᎯᏯᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ?  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏘᏁᏥ ᏓᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ.
031040.english: But Martha was cumbered about much serving, and came to him, and said, Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone? bid her therefore that she help me.
031040.phonetic: Ma-di-s-gi-ni u-we-li-hi-s-di-s-ge u-tsa-ti du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, a-le u-lu-tse-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, tla-s-go go-hu-s-di ye-li-ha v-gi-lv tsa-quv-de-tsv tsa-gi-hi-ya-s-da-ne-lv a-quv-sv-quo go-hu-s-di i-tsv-ya-dv-ne-di-yi?  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ti-ne-tsi da-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi.

031041.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎹᏗ, ᎹᏗ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏛ ᏤᎵᎯᏍᏗᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏕᏯᏙᏗᎭ;
031041.english: And Jesus answered and said unto her, Martha, Martha, thou art careful and troubled about many things:
031041.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ma-di, Ma-di, u-tsa-ti tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-dv tse-li-hi-s-di-ha a-le tsa-de-ya-do-di-ha;

031042.cherokee: ᏑᏓᎴᎩᏉ ᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎺᎵ ᎤᏑᏰᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏌᏂ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏰᏥᎩᎡᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ.
031042.english: But one thing is needful: and Mary hath chosen that good part, which shall not be taken away from her.
031042.phonetic: Su-da-le-gi-quo s-gi-ni u-du-lv-di; a-le Me-li u-su-ye-sv na-s-gi o-sa-ni ge-sv-i, na-s-gi ga-ye-tsi-gi-e-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi.

031101.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ, ᎤᏑᎵᎪᏨ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏍᎩᏰᏲᎲᎦ ᎣᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏂ ᏥᏄᏛᏁᎴ ᏥᏚᏪᏲᏁ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ.
031101.english: And it came to pass, that, as he was praying in a certain place, when he ceased, one of his disciples said unto him, Lord, teach us to pray, as John also taught his disciples.
031101.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi a-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv i-lv-hi-tlv, u-su-li-go-tsv, a-si-yv-wi u-s-da-wa-di-do-hi hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, s-gi-ye-yo-hv-ga o-ga-da-do-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi Tsa-ni tsi-nu-dv-ne-le tsi-du-we-yo-ne gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi.

031102.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎣᎩᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎮᎯ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏙᎥᎢ; ᏨᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏫᎦᎾᏄᎪᎢ; ᎭᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ.
031102.english: And he said unto them, When ye pray, say, Our Father which art in heaven, Hallowed be thy name. Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done, as in heaven, so in earth.
031102.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di hi-a ni-tsi-we-s-ge-s-di, O-gi-do-da ga-lv-la-di he-hi, Ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di de-tsa-do-v-i; Tsv-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv wi-ga-na-nu-go-i; Ha-da-nv-te-s-gv wi-ni-ga-li-s-da e-lo-hi na-s-gi-ya ga-lv-la-di tsi-ni-ga-li-s-di-ha.

031103.english: Give us day by day our daily bread.

031104.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᏍᎩᎥᏏᏉ ᎣᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ; ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎦᏲᏥᏁᎰ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏦᏥᏚᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ ᏫᏗᏍᎩᏯᏘᏅᏍᏔᏅᎩ; ᏍᎩᏳᏓᎴᏍᎨᏍᏗᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031104.english: And forgive us our sins; for we also forgive every one that is indebted to us. And lead us not into temptation; but deliver us from evil.
031104.phonetic: A-le di-ge-s-gi-v-si-quo o-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i; a-yv-ye-no na-s-quo di-ga-yo-tsi-ne-ho ni-ga-dv tso-tsi-du-gi; a-le tle-s-di u-da-go-li-ye-di-yi wi-di-s-gi-ya-ti-nv-s-ta-nv-gi; s-gi-yu-da-le-s-ge-s-di-quo-s-gi-ni u-yo ge-sv-i.

031105.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᎤᎵᎢ ᏰᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏃᏱ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏱᏭᎷᏤᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏄᏪᏎᎸ, ᎩᎾᎵᎢ, ᏦᎢ ᎦᏚ ᏗᏍᏆᏙᎳᏍᏓ;
031105.english: And he said unto them, Which of you shall have a friend, and shall go unto him at midnight, and say unto him, Friend, lend me three loaves;
031105.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ga-go hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv u-li-i ye-ha, a-le e-no-yi a-ye-li yi-wu-lu-tse-lv, a-le hi-a yi-nu-we-se-lv, Gi-na-li-i, tso-i ga-du di-s-qua-do-la-s-da;

031106.cherokee: ᎣᎩᎾᎵᎢᏰᏃ ᎠᎢᏒ ᎠᎩᎷᏥ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏯᎩᎭ ᏥᏰᎳᏍᏙᏗ;
031106.english: For a friend of mine in his journey is come to me, and I have nothing to set before him?
031106.phonetic: O-gi-na-li-i-ye-no a-i-sv a-gi-lu-tsi, v-tla a-le go-hu-s-di ya-gi-ha tsi-ye-la-s-do-di;

031107.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏗᏯᎥ ᏴᏓᎧᏁᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏅᏓᎦᏫ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏍᏆᏕᏯᏙᏔᏅᎩ; ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎠᏍᏚᎭ, ᏗᏂᏲᎵᏃ ᏗᏇᏥ ᎣᏥᏂᏝᎠ, ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏴᎦᎦᏗᏛ ᏱᏙᎦᎬᎥᏏ.
031107.english: And he from within shall answer and say, Trouble me not: the door is now shut, and my children are with me in bed; I cannot rise and give thee.
031107.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no di-ya-v yv-da-ka-ne-gi hi-a yi-nv-da-ga-wi, Tle-s-di s-qua-de-ya-do-ta-nv-gi; ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi ga-yu-la a-s-du-ha, di-ni-yo-li-no di-que-tsi o-tsi-ni-tla-a, v-tla ye-li yv-ga-ga-di-dv yi-do-ga-gv-v-si.

031108.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ ᎬᏩᏗᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎬᏩᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᎾᎵᎢᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎾᏑᎵᎪᎬᎾᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏯᏗᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏱᏕᎠᎲᏏ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᏚᎵᏍᎬᎢ.
031108.english: I say unto you, Though he will not rise and give him, because he is his friend, yet because of his importunity he will rise and give him as many as he needeth.
031108.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-se-ha gv-wa-di-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na a-le di-gv-wa-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi, u-na-li-i-quo ge-sv i-yu-s-di, na-su-li-go-gv-na-s-gi-ni ge-sv i-yu-s-di ya-di-dv a-le yi-de-a-hv-si ni-ga-v du-du-li-s-gv-i.

031109.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎭ, ᎠᏎ ᏓᏰᏥᏁᎵ; ᎢᏥᏲᎦ, ᎠᏎ ᏓᏥᏩᏛᎯ; ᎢᏨᏂᎦ, ᎠᏎ ᏓᏰᏥᏍᏚᎢᎡᎵ;
031109.english: And I say unto you, Ask, and it shall be given you; seek, and ye shall find; knock, and it shall be opened unto you.
031109.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, I-tsi-ta-yo-ha, a-se da-ye-tsi-ne-li; i-tsi-yo-ga, a-se da-tsi-wa-dv-hi; i-tsv-ni-ga, a-se da-ye-tsi-s-du-i-e-li;

031110.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏉᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏣᏂᏔᏲᎯᎰ ᎨᏥᏁᎰᎢ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᏧᏲᎰ ᎠᏩᏘᏍᎪᎢ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᏥᏫᎬᏂᎰ ᎠᏥᏍᏚᎢᎡᎰᎢ.
031110.english: For every one that asketh receiveth; and he that seeketh findeth; and to him that knocketh it shall be opened.
031110.phonetic: Na-ni-v-quo-ye-no gi-lo tsa-ni-ta-yo-hi-ho ge-tsi-ne-ho-i; gi-lo-no tsu-yo-ho a-wa-ti-s-go-i; gi-lo-no tsi-wi-gv-ni-ho a-tsi-s-du-i-e-ho-i.

031111.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᎢᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᏚ ᏳᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᏥᏌ ᏅᏯᏉ ᏯᎲᏏ?  ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏣᏗ ᏳᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᏥᎪ ᎠᏣᏗ ᎤᏅᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎾᏛᏉ ᏱᎦᏅᎥᏏ?
031111.english: If a son shall ask bread of any of you that is a father, will he give him a stone? or if he ask a fish, will he for a fish give him a serpent?
031111.phonetic: I-yu a-le gi-lo hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv i-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge ge-sv u-we-tsi ga-du yu-ta-yo-se-ha, tsi-sa nv-ya-quo ya-hv-si?  I-yu a-le a-tsa-di yu-ta-yo-se-ha, tsi-go a-tsa-di u-nv-ne-di ge-sv i-na-dv-quo yi-ga-nv-v-si?

031112.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏳᏔᏲᏎᎸ, ᏥᎪ ᎦᏙᎬ-ᎠᏓᏨᏯᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᎦᏅᎥᏏ.
031112.english: Or if he shall ask an egg, will he offer him a scorpion?
031112.phonetic: I-yu a-le u-we-tsi yu-ta-yo-se-lv, tsi-go ga-do-gv--a-da-tsv-ya-s-di-s-gi yi-ga-nv-v-si.

031113.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᏲᎢ, ᏱᏥᏏᎾᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᏗᏤᏥ, ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᏄᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᏧᏁᏗᏱ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏩᏔᏲᏎᎯ!
031113.english: If ye then, being evil, know how to give good gifts unto your children: how much more shall your heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to them that ask him?
031113.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no ni-hi i-tsi-yo-i, yi-tsi-si-na-hi o-s-dv ge-sv di-tsi-ne-di-yi di-tse-tsi, u-tli-hi-yu nu-dv-nv-i-s-di I-tsi-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi tsu-ne-di-yi Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do gv-wa-ta-yo-se-hi!

031114.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎩᎾᏃ ᎦᏄᎪᏫᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏩᎨᏫ ᎨᏎᎢ.  ᎯᎠ Ꮓ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᏄᎪᏨ ᎤᏩᎨᏫ ᎤᏬᏂᏎᎢ; ᏴᏫᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎢ.
031114.english: And he was casting out a devil, and it was dumb. And it came to pass, when the devil was gone out, the dumb spake; and the people wondered.
031114.phonetic: A-s-gi-na-no ga-nu-go-wi-s-ge-i, a-le u-wa-ge-wi ge-se-i.  Hi-a no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi a-s-gi-na u-nu-go-tsv u-wa-ge-wi u-wo-ni-se-i; yv-wi-no u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se-i.

031115.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᏕᎦᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ ᎤᏍᏕᎵᎭ ᏇᎵᏥᏆ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
031115.english: But some of them said, He casteth out devils through Beelzebub the chief of the devils.
031115.phonetic: I-ga-dv-s-gi-ni hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, A-ni-s-gi-na de-ga-nu-go-wi-s-ga u-s-de-li-ha Que-li-tsi-qua u-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ni-s-gi-na u-na-tse-li-ga.

031116.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏃ ᎬᏩᎪᎵᏰᏍᎬ, ᎬᏩᏔᏲᏎᎴ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗᏱ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ.
031116.english: And others, tempting him, sought of him a sign from heaven.
031116.phonetic: A-ni-so-i-no gv-wa-go-li-ye-s-gv, gv-wa-ta-yo-se-le tsu-na-nu-go-wi-se-di-yi u-ye-lv-dv ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi.

031117.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᎦᏔᎮ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏓᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏕᎪᏢᏒᎢ ᏔᎵ ᏥᎾᏓᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏣᏓᏡᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᏲᎪᏉ; ᎠᎴ ᏏᏓᏁᎸ ᏔᎵ ᏥᏄᏓᎣ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏣᏓᏡᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏲᎪᎢ.
031117.english: But he, knowing their thoughts, said unto them, Every kingdom divided against itself is brought to desolation; and a house divided against a house falleth.
031117.phonetic: A-se-no a-ga-ta-he nu-s-dv da-na-da-nv-te-s-gv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ni-ga-v a-ye-li de-go-tlv-sv-i ta-li tsi-na-da-di-s-go u-wa-sv tsa-da-tlu-di-s-go-i, a-yo-go-quo; a-le si-da-ne-lv ta-li tsi-nu-da-o u-wa-sv tsa-da-tlu-di-s-go a-yo-go-i.

031118.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᏎᏓᏂ ᏔᎵ ᏱᏄᏓᎠ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏯᏓᏡᏗᎭ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏱᏂᎬᏩᏍᏗᏉ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ?  ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏇᎵᏥᏆ ᎤᏍᏕᎵᎭ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᏥᏕᎦᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ ᏥᏍᎩᏲᏎᎭ.
031118.english: If Satan also be divided against himself, how shall his kingdom stand? because ye say that I cast out devils through Beelzebub.
031118.phonetic: I-yu a-le Se-da-ni ta-li yi-nu-da-a u-wa-sv ya-da-tlu-di-ha, ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da yi-ni-gv-wa-s-di-quo u-tse-li-go-hi?  Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha Que-li-tsi-qua u-s-de-li-ha a-ni-s-gi-na tsi-de-ga-nu-go-wi-s-ga tsi-s-gi-yo-se-ha.

031119.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏇᎵᏥᏆ ᏯᎩᏍᏕᎵᎭ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᏕᏥᏄᎪᏫᏍᎬᎢ, ᎦᎪ ᎤᏂᏍᏕᎵᎭ ᏗᏤᏥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏂᏄᎪᏫᏍᎬᎢ?  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏧᎪᏓᏁᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031119.english: And if I by Beelzebub cast out devils, by whom do your sons cast them out? therefore shall they be your judges.
031119.phonetic: I-yu-no Que-li-tsi-qua ya-gi-s-de-li-ha a-ni-s-gi-na de-tsi-nu-go-wi-s-gv-i, ga-go u-ni-s-de-li-ha di-tse-tsi na-s-gi da-ni-nu-go-wi-s-gv-i?  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-gi di-ge-tsu-go-da-ne-hi ge-se-s-di.

031120.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᏕᏥᏄᎪᏫᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᏰᏌᏛ ᏱᎬᏗᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏳᏜᏓᏏᏛᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎸᎢ.
031120.english: But if I with the finger of God cast out devils, no doubt the kingdom of God is come upon you.
031120.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni a-yv a-ni-s-gi-na de-tsi-nu-go-wi-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-ye-sa-dv yi-gv-di-ha, v-tla yu-dla-si-dv-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv i-tsi-lu-tse-lv-i.

031121.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗ ᎬᏰᎯ ᏯᎦᏘᏯ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᎿᎭᎥᎢ.
031121.english: When a strong man armed keepeth his palace, his goods are in peace:
031121.phonetic: I-yu-no u-li-ni-gi-dv a-s-ga-ya u-li-s-ga-s-do-di gv-ye-hi ya-ga-ti-ya ga-ne-lv-i nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv nu-s-dv u-hna-v-i.

031122.cherokee: ᎤᏟᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏳᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏳᏃᎵᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏳᏎᎪᎩᏒ, ᎤᎩᎡᎰ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏔᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏯᏙᎯᎰ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏓᏬᏅᎲᎢ.
031122.english: But when a stronger than he shall come upon him, and overcome him, he taketh from him all his armour wherein he trusted, and divideth his spoils.
031122.phonetic: U-tli-s-gi-ni i-yu-li-ni-gi-dv yu-no-li-lv a-le yu-se-go-gi-sv, u-gi-e-ho ni-ga-dv u-li-s-ga-s-do-di u-li-s-ga-s-do-ta-nv-i, a-le a-ya-do-hi-ho tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-da-wo-nv-hv-i.

031123.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎾᏆᎵᎪᏁᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎠᏆᏡᏗᏍᎪᏉ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᏃᏍᏗᏟᏏᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎠᏗᎦᎴᏯᏍᎪᏉ.
031123.english: He that is not with me is against me: and he that gathereth not with me scattereth.
031123.phonetic: Gi-lo na-qua-li-go-ne-hv-na tsi-ge-so a-qua-tlu-di-s-go-quo; gi-lo-no no-s-di-tli-si-s-gv-na tsi-ge-so a-di-ga-le-ya-s-go-quo.

031124.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏄᎪᎩ, ᎡᏙᎰ ᎤᎧᏲᏛᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏲᎰ ᎠᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎤᏠᎩᏃ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎪᎢ, ᏛᎦᏨᏏ ᏗᏇᏅᏒ ᏗᎩᏄᎪᏨ ᏮᏛᏥᎶᏏ.
031124.english: When the unclean spirit is gone out of a man, he walketh through dry places, seeking rest; and finding none, he saith, I will return unto my house whence I came out.
031124.phonetic: I-yu-no ga-da-ha a-da-nv-do yv-wi u-nu-go-gi, e-do-ho u-ka-yo-dv-hi ge-sv-i, u-yo-ho a-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di-yi; u-tlo-gi-no, hi-a ni-ga-we-s-go-i, Dv-ga-tsv-si di-que-nv-sv di-gi-nu-go-tsv wv-dv-tsi-lo-si.

031125.cherokee: ᏫᎦᎷᎩᏃ ᎠᏩᏘᏍᎪ ᎬᏃᏌᎲᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎪᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ.
031125.english: And when he cometh, he findeth it swept and garnished.
031125.phonetic: Wi-ga-lu-gi-no a-wa-ti-s-go gv-no-sa-hv-hi a-le go-du-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-so-i.

031126.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎡᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏓᏯᏂᏍᎪ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏳᏂᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏂᏴᎯᎰ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎠᎾᏁᎳᏗᏍᎪᎢ; ᎣᏂᏱᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ Ꮎ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏟ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎨᏐᎢ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ.
031126.english: Then goeth he, and taketh to him seven other spirits more wicked than himself; and they enter in, and dwell there: and the last state of that man is worse than the first.
031126.phonetic: Hna-quo-no e-go-i, a-le wi-da-ya-ni-s-go ga-li-quo-gi di-da-nv-do nv-wa-na-da-le u-tli i-yu-ni-ne-gu-tsi-dv e-s-ga-quo u-wa-sv; na-s-gi-no a-ni-yv-hi-ho a-le na-hna a-na-ne-la-di-s-go-i; o-ni-yi-no nu-s-dv na a-s-ga-ya u-tli u-yo-i-yu ge-so-i e-s-ga-quo i-gv-yi-yi.

031127.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎨᎳ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏌᎳᏓᏁ ᎧᏁᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏂᎯ ᏣᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏍᏛᏅᎯ.
031127.english: And it came to pass, as he spake these things, a certain woman of the company lifted up her voice, and said unto him, Blessed is the womb that bare thee, and the paps which thou hast sucked.
031127.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, a-si-quo na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i, gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-ge-yv ge-la u-na-da-tlu-gv u-sa-la-da-ne ka-ne-gv a-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; O-si-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di ni-hi tsa-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi a-le na-s-gi tsa-s-dv-nv-hi.

031128.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎥᎥ, ᎤᏟᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎩ.
031128.english: But he said, Yea rather, blessed are they that hear the word of God, and keep it.
031128.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, V-v, u-tli-hi-yu-s-gi-ni o-s-dv i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di a-na-dv-gi-s-gi ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga a-le na-s-gi a-ni-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gi.

031129.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎦᏁᏄᎵ ᎤᎾᏓᏟᏌᏅ, ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎤᏂᏲ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ; ᎤᏂᏲᎭ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎨᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ, ᏦᎾ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎤᏩᏒ.
031129.english: And when the people were gathered thick together, he began to say, This is an evil generation: they seek a sign; and there shall no sign be given it, but the sign of Jonas the prophet.
031129.phonetic: Hna-quo-no yv-wi ga-ne-nu-li u-na-da-tli-sa-nv, u-le-nv-he hi-a nu-we-se-i; U-ni-yo go-hi tsa-ne-ha; u-ni-yo-ha u-ye-lv-dv-i; a-se-no v-tla ge-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-se-di yi-ge-se-s-di u-ye-lv-dv-i, Tso-na a-do-le-ho-s-gi u-tse-li u-ye-lv-dv u-wa-sv.

031130.cherokee: ᏦᎾᏰᏃ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᏥᏂᎨᎬᏁᎴ ᏂᏂᏫ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᏅᏓᎨᎬᏁᎵ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ.
031130.english: For as Jonas was a sign unto the Ninevites, so shall also the Son of man be to this generation.
031130.phonetic: Tso-na-ye-no u-ye-lv-dv tsi-ni-ge-gv-ne-le Ni-ni-wi a-ne-hi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo yv-wi U-we-tsi u-ye-lv-dv nv-da-ge-gv-ne-li go-hi tsa-ne-ha.

031131.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏧᎦᎾᏮ ᏤᎮᎢ ᏙᏛᎾᎴᏂ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏚᎪᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᏙᏓᎬᏁᎵ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎦᏙᎯ ᏧᏅᏎ ᎤᏛᎦᏂᎴ ᏐᎵᎹᏅ ᎠᎦᏔᎾᎥᎢ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎠᏂ ᎡᏙᎭ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏐᎵᎹᏅ.
031131.english: The queen of the south shall rise up in the judgment with the men of this generation, and condemn them: for she came from the utmost parts of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and, behold, a greater than Solomon is here.
031131.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ge-yv tsu-ga-na-wv tse-he-i do-dv-na-le-ni go-hi tsa-ne-ha di-gu-go-do-di-yi ge-se-s-di, a-le tsu-na-du-go-da-ne-di-yi ni-do-da-gv-ne-li; na-s-gi-ye-no wa-s-dv i-yv-dv ga-do-hi tsu-nv-se u-dv-ga-ni-le So-li-ma-nv a-ga-ta-na-v-i; gv-ni-yu-quo-no a-ni e-do-ha u-tli i-ya-tsi-lv-quo-di e-s-ga-quo So-li-ma-nv.

031132.cherokee: ᏴᏫ ᏂᏂᏫ ᏣᏁᎮ ᏙᏛᎾᎴᏂ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏱ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏚᎪᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏅᏛᏅᏁᎵ; ᏚᏂᏁᏟᏴᏎᏰᏃ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᏦᎾ ᏚᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎠᏂ ᎡᏙᎭ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏦᎾ.
031132.english: The men of Nineve shall rise up in the judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: for they repented at the preaching of Jonas; and, behold, a greater than Jonas is here.
031132.phonetic: Yv-wi Ni-ni-wi tsa-ne-he do-dv-na-le-ni go-hi tsa-ne-ha di-gu-go-di-yi ge-se-s-di, a-le tsu-na-du-go-da-ne-di-yi nv-dv-nv-ne-li; du-ni-ne-tli-yv-se-ye-no du-na-da-nv-dv Tso-na du-li-tsi-do-ne-lv; gv-ni-yu-quo-no a-ni e-do-ha u-tli i-ya-tsi-lv-quo-di e-s-ga-quo Tso-na.

031133.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏨᏍᏛᎦ ᎠᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᏕᎵᏒ ᏱᎦᎧᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏟᎶᏍᏗ ᏱᎫᏢᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎦᎪᏗᏱᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎪᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏛᏂᏴᎯᎯ ᎤᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏛᎢ.
031133.english: No man, when he hath lighted a candle, putteth it in a secret place, neither under a bushel, but on a candlestick, that they which come in may see the light.
031133.phonetic: V-tla a-le gi-lo a-tsv-s-dv-ga a-tsv-s-do-di u-de-li-sv yi-ga-ka-hv-s-go-i, v-tla a-le a-tli-lo-s-di yi-gu-tlv-di-s-go-i, ga-go-di-yi-s-gi-ni ga-go-di-s-go-i, na-s-gi nv-dv-ni-yv-hi-hi u-ni-go-wa-dv-di-yi i-ga ga-dv-i.

031134.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏔ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎢᎦ ᎠᏘᏍᏓᏁᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎯᎦᏙᎵ, ᏂᎬ ᎯᏰᎸ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎧᎵᏬᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏘ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎦᏙᎵ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎬ ᎯᏰᎸ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎧᎵᏬᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ.
031134.english: The light of the body is the eye: therefore when thine eye is single, thy whole body also is full of light; but when thine eye is evil, thy body also is full of darkness.
031134.phonetic: A-ga-ta a-ye-lv i-ga a-ti-s-da-ne-hi; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, i-yu-no go-hu-s-di nu-s-dv-na ge-se-s-di hi-ga-do-li, ni-gv hi-ye-lv na-s-quo ka-li-wo-hi ge-se-s-di i-ga ga-ti; i-yu-s-gi-ni hi-ga-do-li u-yo ge-se-s-di ni-gv hi-ye-lv na-s-quo ka-li-wo-hi ge-se-s-di u-li-si-gi.

031135.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎮᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏘ ᎭᏫᏂ ᏤᎲ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031135.english: Take heed therefore that the light which is in thee be not darkness.
031135.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di he-ya-ta-he-s-di na-s-gi i-ga ga-ti ha-wi-ni tse-hv tle-s-di u-li-si-gi yi-ge-se-s-di.

031136.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎬ ᎯᏰᎸ ᎧᎵᏬᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏘ, ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᏄᏓᏓᎸᎾ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ, ᏂᎬ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏘ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏪᎵᎩᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ ᏥᏣᏘᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ.
031136.english: If thy whole body therefore be full of light, having no part dark, the whole shall be full of light, as when the bright shining of a candle doth give thee light.
031136.phonetic: I-yu-no ni-gv hi-ye-lv ka-li-wo-hi ge-se-s-di i-ga ga-ti, i-lv-hi-tlv nu-da-da-lv-na u-li-si-gi, ni-gv u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-se-s-di i-ga ga-ti, na-s-gi-ya a-tsv-s-do-di o-s-dv a-da-we-li-gi-s-gv i-ga tsi-tsa-ti-s-da-ne-ho-i.

031137.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎨ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᏔᏲᏎᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏓᏴᎾᏁᏗᏱ; ᎤᏴᎴᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎩᏳᏍᏓᏅᏁᎢ.
031137.english: And as he spake, a certain Pharisee besought him to dine with him: and he went in, and sat down to meat.
031137.phonetic: A-si-quo-no ga-wo-ni-s-ge gi-lo i-yu-s-di A-qua-li-si u-ta-yo-se-le u-li-s-da-yv-na-ne-di-yi; u-yv-le-no, a-le u-li-gi-yu-s-da-nv-ne-i.

031138.cherokee: ᎠᏆᎵᏏᏃ ᎤᎪᎲ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎ ᏂᏚᏬᏑᎴᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏᏉ ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏴᏅᎾ.
031138.english: And when the Pharisee saw it, he marvelled that he had not first washed before dinner.
031138.phonetic: A-qua-li-si-no u-go-hv u-s-qua-ni-go-se ni-du-wo-su-le-v-na ge-sv a-si-quo nu-li-s-da-yv-nv-na.

031139.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ ᎦᏚᎢᏗᏢ ᏕᏥᏅᎦᎵᏍᎪᎢ; ᎭᏫᏂᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏐ ᎠᏎᏉ ᎠᏓᎩᎡᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎦᎾᎢ.
031139.english: And the Lord said unto him, Now do ye Pharisees make clean the outside of the cup and the platter; but your inward part is full of ravening and wickedness.
031139.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ni-hi I-tsi-qua-li-si u-li-s-qui-di a-le a-te-li-do ga-du-i-di-tlv de-tsi-nv-ga-li-s-go-i; ha-wi-ni-s-gi-ni ge-sv i-tsi-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-so a-se-quo a-da-gi-e-di ge-sv a-le a-s-ga-na-i.

031140.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏁᎫ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏚᎢᏗᏢ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᎡᎯ ᏳᏬᏢᏁᎢ?
031140.english: Ye fools, did not he that made that which is without make that which is within also?
031140.phonetic: I-tsi-ne-gu, tla-s-go na-s-gi ga-du-i-di-tlv e-hi u-wo-tlv-nv-hi na-s-quo ha-wi-ni-di-tlv e-hi yu-wo-tlv-ne-i?

031141.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏎᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏣᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏥᎲᎢ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᎦᎸᎡᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031141.english: But rather give alms of such things as ye have; and, behold, all things are clean unto you.
031141.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-se-s-di-s-gi-ni i-tsa-da-ne-he-s-di nu-s-dv i-tsi-hv-i; gv-ni-yu-quo-no ni-ga-di-yu i-tsa-da-nv-ga-lv-e-lv-hi ge-se-s-di.

031142.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ!  ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁᏰᏃ ᎪᏣᎴᏛ ᎢᏣᎫᏱᏍᎪ ᏒᏟ ᎠᏟ ᎷᏫ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏰᎿᎭᎥᎢ, ᎢᏥᏃᎯᏯᏍᎪᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᏱᏂᏣᏛᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏐᎢ ᏂᏥᏃᎯᏴᎾᏉ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
031142.english: But woe unto you, Pharisees! for ye tithe mint and rue and all manner of herbs, and pass over judgment and the love of God: these ought ye to have done, and not to leave the other undone.
031142.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni I-tsi-qua-li-si u-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di!  A-s-go-hi-ne-ye-no go-tsa-le-dv i-tsa-gu-yi-s-go sv-tli a-tli lu-wi a-le ni-ga-v U-ye-hna-v-i, i-tsi-no-hi-ya-s-go-no du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni yi-ni-tsa-dv-ne-le-i, a-le so-i ni-tsi-no-hi-yv-na-quo yi-ge-se-i.

031143.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ!  ᏕᏥᎸᏉᏙᏰᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏕᎦᏍᎩᎸ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᏲᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᎦᏃᏙᏗᏱ.
031143.english: Woe unto you, Pharisees! for ye love the uppermost seats in the synagogues, and greetings in the markets.
031143.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di I-tsi-qua-li-si!  de-tsi-lv-quo-do-ye-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sv de-ga-s-gi-lv di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le e-tsi-yo-li-s-di-yi di-ga-no-do-di-yi.

031144.cherokee: ᎣᏲᎢᏳᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏦᏪᎵᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏆᎵᏏ, ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᏓᏓᏂᏌᎲ ᏕᏣᏤᎸ ᏄᏪᎵᏍᏛᎾ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎦᏚᎢ ᎠᏂᎶᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎪᎢ.
031144.english: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye are as graves which appear not, and the men that walk over them are not aware of them.
031144.phonetic: O-yo-i-yu-i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di di-tso-we-li-s-gi, a-le I-tsi-qua-li-si, i-tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  ni-hi-ye-no da-da-ni-sa-hv de-tsa-tse-lv nu-we-li-s-dv-na tsi-ge-so-i, a-le yv-wi ga-du-i a-ni-lo-s-gi v-tla yi-na-do-le-ho-s-go-i.

031145.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᎪᏏᏏᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏪᎭ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᏍᎩᏐᏢᏗᎭ.
031145.english: Then answered one of the lawyers, and said unto him, Master, thus saying thou reproachest us also.
031145.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-si-yv-wi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-go-si-si-s-gi u-ne-tse hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, na-s-gi hi-a tsi-ni-we-ha a-yv na-s-quo ge-s-gi-so-tlv-di-ha.

031146.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᏦᏏᏏᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ!  ᏕᏥᏐᏈᎸᏍᎪᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎵᏒᏍᏗ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᏗᎵᏒᏍᏗᏱ, ᎢᏨᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎨᏥᏃᏟᏍᏓ ᏗᎵᏒᏍᏗ ᏴᎨᏨᏓ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏥᏰᏌᏛᎢ.
031146.english: And he said, Woe unto you also, ye lawyers! for ye lade men with burdens grievous to be borne, and ye yourselves touch not the burdens with one of your fingers.
031146.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i; Ni-hi na-s-quo di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-tso-si-si-s-gi u-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di!  de-tsi-so-qui-lv-s-go-ye-no yv-wi di-li-sv-s-di u-de-ya-do-di di-li-sv-s-di-yi, i-tsv-sv-s-gi-ni v-tla yv-ge-tsi-no-tli-s-da di-li-sv-s-di yv-ge-tsv-da sa-quo i-tsi-ye-sa-dv-i.

031147.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ!  ᏕᏦᏢᎯᏏᏍᎪᏰᏃ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏕᎨᏥᏂᏌᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᏙᏓ ᏕᎤᏂᎸᎩ.
031147.english: Woe unto you! for ye build the sepulchres of the prophets, and your fathers killed them.
031147.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di!  de-tso-tlv-hi-si-s-go-ye-no a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi de-ge-tsi-ni-sa-hv-i, a-le di-tsi-do-da de-u-ni-lv-gi.

031148.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏁᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏗᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏚᏂᎸᎩ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᏕᏦᏢᎯᏏᎭ ᏕᎨᏥᏂᏎᎲᎢ.
031148.english: Truly ye bear witness that ye allow the deeds of your fathers: for they indeed killed them, and ye build their sepulchres.
031148.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-ne-ha na-s-gi o-si-yu i-tsi-ye-lv-sv nu-s-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv di-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge-i; na-s-gi-ye-no u-do-hi-yu-hi du-ni-lv-gi, ni-hi-no de-tso-tlv-hi-si-ha de-ge-tsi-ni-se-hv-i.

031149.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎾᎥᎢ, ᏓᎦᏥᏅᏏ ᏫᎬᏩᏂᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᎦᏛ ᏙᏛᏂᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏙᏛᏂᎨᎯᏙᎵ,
031149.english: Therefore also said the wisdom of God, I will send them prophets and apostles, and some of them they shall slay and persecute:
031149.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-quo hi-a nu-we-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-na-v-i, Da-ga-tsi-nv-si wi-gv-wa-ni-lu-tse-di-yi a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, a-le ge-tsi-nv-si-dv, na-s-gi-no i-ga-dv do-dv-ni-li a-le do-dv-ni-ge-hi-do-li,

031150.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ ᎠᏨᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᏙᏢᏅ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎨᏥᏔᏲᏎᏗᏱ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ;
031150.english: That the blood of all the prophets, which was shed from the foundation of the world, may be required of this generation;
031150.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-ga-dv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi u-ni-gi-gv a-tsv-nv-hi ge-sv e-lo-hi tsu-do-tlv-nv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv ge-tsi-ta-yo-se-di-yi go-hi tsa-ne-ha;

031151.cherokee: ᎡᏈᎵ ᎤᎩᎬ ᏅᏛᎴᏅᏛ, ᏤᎩᎳᏯ ᎤᎩᎬ ᏩᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎵᏍᏆᏕᎴ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏛᏅᏃ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎨᏥᏔᏲᏎᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ.
031151.english: From the blood of Abel unto the blood of Zacharias, which perished between the altar and the temple: verily I say unto you, It shall be required of this generation.
031151.phonetic: E-qui-li u-gi-gv nv-dv-le-nv-dv, Tse-gi-la-ya u-gi-gv wa-s-di, na-s-gi tsu-li-s-qua-de-le a-ye-li a-tsi-lv--ge-la-s-di-yi u-dv-nv-no--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi; u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsv-yo-se-ha, ge-tsi-ta-yo-se-di ge-se-s-di go-hi tsa-ne-ha.

031152.cherokee: ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏂᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᏦᏏᏏᏍᎩ!  ᎢᏥᏴᏫᏛᎲᏰᏃ ᎠᏍᏚᎢᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎢᏨᏒ ᏱᏥᏴᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏂᏴᎯᎯ ᏕᏥᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᎸ.
031152.english: Woe unto you, lawyers! for ye have taken away the key of knowledge: ye entered not in yourselves, and them that were entering in ye hindered.
031152.phonetic: U-yo-i-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di ni-hi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-tso-si-si-s-gi!  i-tsi-yv-wi-dv-hv-ye-no a-s-du-i-s-di a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; v-tla-ye-no i-tsv-sv yi-tsi-yv-lv, a-le na-s-gi na a-ni-yv-hi-hi de-tsi-yo-s-do-da-ne-lv.

031153.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏕᎦᏪᏎᎮᎢ, ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎬᏩᏅᏫᏍᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏂᎳᏕᎮ ᎤᎪᏗᏗ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏃᎮᏗᏱ;
031153.english: And as he said these things unto them, the scribes and the Pharisees began to urge him vehemently, and to provoke him to speak of many things:
031153.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-de-ga-we-se-he-i, di-no-we-li-s-gi a-le A-ni-qua-li-si u-li-ni-gi-dv gv-wa-nv-wi-s-di-s-ge-i, a-le gv-wa-ni-la-de-he u-go-di-di tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-no-he-di-yi;

031154.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏯᏫᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏲᎮ ᎤᏂᏩᏛᎡᏗᏱ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᎬᏩᎳᏫᏎᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031154.english: Laying wait for him, and seeking to catch something out of his mouth, that they might accuse him.
031154.phonetic: Gv-wa-ya-wi-s-ge-i, a-le u-ni-yo-he u-ni-wa-dv-e-di-yi go-hu-s-di ga-gv-wa-la-wi-se-di ge-sv-i.

031201.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏉᏃ ᏕᎠᏂᎳᏫᎡ ᎤᏂᏧᏈᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏕᎠᎾᏓᎳᏍᏛᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎬᏴ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎪᏙᏗ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ.
031201.english: In the mean time, when there were gathered together an innumerable multitude of people, insomuch that they trode one upon another, he began to say unto his disciples first of all, Beware ye of the leaven of the Pharisees, which is hypocrisy.
031201.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-quo-no de-a-ni-la-wi-e u-ni-tsu-qui-s-di yv-wi, na-s-gi i-yu-s-di de-a-na-da-la-s-dv-di-s-ge-i, na-s-gi u-le-nv-he hi-a i-gv-yv ni-du-we-se-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, I-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di a-go-do-di A-ni-qua-li-si u-na-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi a-tlo-na-s-di tsi-gi.

031202.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᎬᏍᎦᎳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031202.english: For there is nothing covered, that shall not be revealed; neither hid, that shall not be known.
031202.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no go-hu-s-di yi-gv-s-ga-la na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, v-tla a-le go-hu-s-di u-de-li-dv yi-gi na-s-gi a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

031203.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᎢᏥᏁᏨ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏛ ᎠᏛᎪᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎢᏣᏙᏅᎸᎢ ᏕᎧᏅᏑᎸ, ᎦᏌᎾᎵ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031203.english: Therefore whatsoever ye have spoken in darkness shall be heard in the light; and that which ye have spoken in the ear in closets shall be proclaimed upon the housetops.
031203.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-ga-v go-hu-s-di u-li-si-gv i-tsi-ne-tsv i-ga ga-dv a-dv-go-di ge-se-s-di; na-s-gi-no na i-tsa-do-nv-lv-i de-ka-nv-su-lv, ga-sa-na-li gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di.

031204.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ ᏂᎯ ᎢᎦᎵᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᏍᎦᎢᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎠᏂᎯᎯ, ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎪᎱᏏᏗ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏫᎬᏩᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ.
031204.english: And I say unto you my friends, Be not afraid of them that kill the body, and after that have no more that they can do.
031204.phonetic: A-le i-tsv-yo-se-ha ni-hi i-ga-li-i, Tle-s-di yi-di-tsi-s-ga-i-he-s-di a-ye-lv a-ni-hi-hi, hna-quo-no go-hu-si-di u-tli i-yv-dv wi-gv-wa-na-dv-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi.

031205.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏓᏨᏰᏯᏔᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᎾᏰᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎡᏥᎾᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏳᏓᎸ, ᏰᎵᏉ ᏨᏍᎩᏃ ᏫᎬᏩᏓᏓᎢᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᎥ, ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ ᎡᏥᎾᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ.
031205.english: But I will forewarn you whom ye shall fear: Fear him, which after he hath killed hath power to cast into hell; yea, I say unto you, Fear him.
031205.phonetic: A-se-no da-tsv-ye-ya-ta-ni na-s-gi e-tsi-na-ye-s-di ge-sv-i; E-tsi-na-ye-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi na yu-da-lv, ye-li-quo tsv-s-gi-no wi-gv-wa-da-da-i-nv-di ge-sv-i; v-v, i-tsv-yo-se-ha E-tsi-na-ye-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi.

031206.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᎯᏍᎩ ᏥᏍᏆᏯ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏯᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᏱᏓᎾᎵᎬᏩᎸᏍᎪᎢ?  ᎥᏝᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎬᎨᏫᏒᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
031206.english: Are not five sparrows sold for two farthings, and not one of them is forgotten before God?
031206.phonetic: Tla-s-go hi-s-gi tsi-s-qua-ya ta-li i-ya-da-nv-te-di yi-da-na-li-gv-wa-lv-s-go-i?  V-tla-no sa-quo na-s-gi a-gv-ge-wi-sv-hi yi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i.

031207.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᏍᏗᏰᎬ ᎢᏥᏍᎪᎵ ᏂᎦ-ᏗᏳ ᏗᏎᎸᎯ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏍᎦᎢᎮᏍᏗ; ᏂᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏗᏣᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏥᏍᏆᏯ.
031207.english: But even the very hairs of your head are all numbered. Fear not therefore: ye are of more value than many sparrows.
031207.phonetic: Na-s-quo-s-gi-ni i-tsi-s-di-ye-gv i-tsi-s-go-li ni-ga--di-yu di-se-lv-hi.  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di yi-tsi-s-ga-i-he-s-di; ni-hi u-tli i-ga-i di-tsa-gv-wa-lo-di e-s-ga-quo u-ni-tsa-ti tsi-s-qua-ya.

031208.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎩᎶ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᏋᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏓᏳᏩᏁᎵ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ.
031208.english: Also I say unto you, Whosoever shall confess me before men, him shall the Son of man also confess before the angels of God:
031208.phonetic: Na-s-quo i-tsv-yo-se-ha, Gi-lo gv-ni-ge-sv na-quv-ne-he-s-di yv-wi a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i, na-s-gi yv-wi U-we-tsi gv-ni-ge-sv na-s-quo nv-da-yu-wa-ne-li a-ni-ga-ta-hv di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga.

031209.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏆᏓᏱᎮᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎠᎦᏓᏱᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ.
031209.english: But he that denieth me before men shall be denied before the angels of God.
031209.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni a-qua-da-yi-he-s-di yv-wi a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i, a-ga-da-yi-s-di ge-se-s-di a-ni-ga-ta-hv di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga.

031210.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎠᏡᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎦᏰᏥᏙᎵᏍᏗᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᏐᏢᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎦᏰᏥᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031210.english: And whosoever shall speak a word against the Son of man, it shall be forgiven him: but unto him that blasphemeth against the Holy Ghost it shall not be forgiven.
031210.phonetic: A-le gi-lo ga-wo-ni-s-gv a-tlu-di-s-ge-s-di yv-wi U-we-tsi, ga-ye-tsi-do-li-s-di-quo ge-se-s-di; gi-lo-s-gi-ni Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do a-so-tlv-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di v-tla ga-ye-tsi-do-li-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

031211.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏕᏣᏘᏃᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯᏱ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏤᎵᎯᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏓᏁᏤᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏪᏍᏗᏱ;
031211.english: And when they bring you unto the synagogues, and unto magistrates, and powers, take ye no thought how or what thing ye shall answer, or what ye shall say:
031211.phonetic: A-le di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi de-tsa-ti-no-hi-he-s-di, a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi-yi, a-le u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi-yi, tle-s-di yi-tse-li-hi-s-ge-s-di nu-s-dv a-le i-yu-s-di ge-sv i-tsa-da-ne-tse-di-yi, a-le i-tsi-we-s-di-yi;

031212.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏓᏤᏲᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏪᏍᏗᏱ.
031212.english: For the Holy Ghost shall teach you in the same hour what ye ought to say.
031212.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-di-yu-ye-no A-da-nv-do da-tse-yo-ni na-hi-yu ge-sv i-tsi-we-s-di-yi.

031213.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎯᏁᏥ ᏦᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏲᎩᏂᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏘᏴᎯ.
031213.english: And one of the company said unto him, Master, speak to my brother, that he divide the inheritance with me.
031213.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no na-s-gi u-na-da-tlu-gv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, hi-ne-tsi tso-s-da-da-nv-tli ta-li i-yo-gi-ni-di-s-di-yi tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-ti-yv-hi.
