031214.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᏍᎦᏯ, ᎦᎪ ᏗᏍᏛᏳᎪᏓᏁᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏍᏛᏯᏙᎮᎯ ᎾᏋᏁᎸ?
031214.english: And he said unto him, Man, who made me a judge or a divider over you?
031214.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le-i, Hi-s-ga-ya, ga-go di-s-dv-yu-go-da-ne-hi a-le i-s-dv-ya-do-he-hi na-quv-ne-lv?

031215.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᏤᏯᏙᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᎬᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᎬᏅ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎿᎭᎥ ᏳᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ.
031215.english: And he said unto them, Take heed, and beware of covetousness: for a man's life consisteth not in the abundance of the things which he possesseth.
031215.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, I-tse-ya-do-tse-he-s-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-gv-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; yv-wi-ye-no gv-nv v-tla u-tsa-ti u-hna-v yu-li-s-de-lv-do-di.

031216.cherokee: ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏓᏁᎴᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᎶᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏛᏒᏁᎴᎢ;
031216.english: And he spake a parable unto them, saying, The ground of a certain rich man brought forth plentifully:
031216.phonetic: Du-tli-lo-s-da-ne-le-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Gi-lo i-yu-s-di u-we-hna-i a-s-ga-ya u-lo-ge-sv u-tsa-ti u-dv-sv-ne-le-i;

031217.cherokee: ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎴᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏧᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏓᎦᏛᏁᎵ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏳᏜᏓᏅᏛ ᎠᎩᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏛᎯᏎᎸᎯ.
031217.english: And he thought within himself, saying, What shall I do, because I have no room where to bestow my fruits?
031217.phonetic: U-da-nv-te-le-no u-wa-sv tsu-da-nv-dv-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ga-do da-ga-dv-ne-li, v-tla-ye-no ye-li yu-dla-nv-dv a-gi-di-yi a-qua-dv-hi-se-lv-hi.

031218.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎦᏛᏁᎵ; ᏙᏓᏥᏲᏍᏔᏂ ᎠᎩᏅᏗᏱ ᏓᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᏧᏛᏂᏗᏃ ᏓᏓᎦᏁᏍᎨᎯ; ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᏓᏥᏂ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏆᏛᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎾᎥᎢ.
031218.english: And he said, This will I do: I will pull down my barns, and build greater; and there will I bestow all my fruits and my goods.
031218.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i; Hi-a nv-da-ga-dv-ne-li; do-da-tsi-yo-s-ta-ni a-gi-nv-di-yi da-da-ne-lv-i, tsu-dv-ni-di-no da-da-ga-ne-s-ge-hi; na-hna-no da-tsi-ni ni-ga-dv a-qua-dv-hi-se-lv-hi a-le a-gi-na-v-i.

031219.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏅᏓᏥᏪᏎᎵ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ; ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙᎩ, ᎤᏣᏔ ᏣᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏗ ᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ; ᎭᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏓ, ᎭᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎭᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎭᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ.
031219.english: And I will say to my soul, Soul, thou hast much goods laid up for many years; take thine ease, eat, drink, and be merry.
031219.phonetic: Hi-a-no nv-da-tsi-we-se-li a-qua-da-nv-do; A-qua-da-nv-do-gi, u-tsa-ta tsa-s-qua-ni-go-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-tsa-ti i-tsu-de-ti-yv-di tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di; ha-tsa-we-so-lv-s-da, ha-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-s-di, ha-di-ta-s-ge-s-di, ha-li-he-li-ge-s-di.

031220.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏘᏣᏓᏅᏛᎾ, ᎪᎯᏉ ᎤᏒᎢ ᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᏓᏰᏣᏯᏅᏒᎵ; ᎦᎪᏃ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏣᏓᏁᎳᏅ.
031220.english: But God said unto him, Thou fool, this night thy soul shall be required of thee: then whose shall those things be, which thou hast provided?
031220.phonetic: A-se-no U-ne-la-nv-hi hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ti-tsa-da-nv-dv-na, go-hi-quo u-sv-i tsa-da-nv-do da-ye-tsa-ya-nv-sv-li; ga-go-no u-tse-li ge-se-s-di na-s-gi tsi-tsa-da-ne-la-nv.

031221.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏣᏓᏓᏟᏌᏁᎰ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱᏃ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏄᏪᎿᎭᎥᎾ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ.
031221.english: So is he that layeth up treasure for himself, and is not rich toward God.
031221.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di gi-lo tsa-da-da-tli-sa-ne-ho tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-wa-sv u-tse-li-ga, U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi-no i-di-tlv nu-we-hna-v-na tsi-ge-so-i.

031222.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏤᎵᎯᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᏨᏅᎢ, ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᏰᎸᎢ, ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏄᏬᏍᏗᏱ.
031222.english: And he said unto his disciples, Therefore I say unto you, Take no thought for your life, what ye shall eat; neither for the body, what ye shall put on.
031222.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Tle-s-di yi-tse-li-hi-s-ge-s-di de-tsv-nv-i, i-yu-s-di i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-yi; a-le di-tsi-ye-lv-i, i-yu-s-di di-tsa-nu-wo-s-di-yi.

031223.cherokee: ᎠᎬᏅ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏗᏄᏬ.
031223.english: The life is more than meat, and the body is more than raiment.
031223.phonetic: A-gv-nv u-tli-hi-yu e-s-ga-quo a-li-s-da-yv-di, a-le a-ye-lv u-tli-hi-yu e-s-ga-quo di-nu-wo.

031224.cherokee: ᎪᎳᏅ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛᎵ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏯᏂᏫᏍᎪᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏯᏂᏍᎫᏕᏍᎪᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏓᎾᏅᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏅᏗᏱ ᏱᏓᏓᏁᎸ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎨᎶᎰᎢ.  ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏟ ᏁᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏥᏍᏆ.
031224.english: Consider the ravens: for they neither sow nor reap; which neither have storehouse nor barn; and God feedeth them: how much more are ye better than the fowls?
031224.phonetic: Go-la-nv di-tsa-da-nv-dv-li; v-tla-ye-no ya-ni-wi-s-go-i, v-tla a-le ya-ni-s-gu-de-s-go-i; v-tla a-le tsu-na-da-na-nv-di-yi a-le u-ni-nv-di-yi yi-da-da-ne-lv; a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi de-ge-lo-ho-i.  Ni-ga-v u-tli ne-tsi-lv-quo-di ni-hi e-s-ga-quo tsi-s-qua.

031225.cherokee: ᎦᎪᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᎬᏉ ᏖᎵ ᏱᎦᏅᎯᏓ ᎬᏅᎢ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏯᎩᏳᏍᏈᏛ.
031225.english: And which of you with taking thought can add to his stature one cubit?
031225.phonetic: Ga-go-no hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv u-we-li-hi-s-gv-quo te-li yi-ga-nv-hi-da gv-nv-i sa-quo i-ya-gi-yu-s-qui-dv.

031226.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎨᏣᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏏ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏫᏤᎵᎯᏍᎪᎢ?
031226.english: If ye then be not able to do that thing which is least, why take ye thought for the rest?
031226.phonetic: I-yu-no na-s-gi u-s-di-ka-ni ge-sv ye-li i-ge-tsa-dv-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi, ga-do-no a-si nv-wa-da-le wi-tse-li-hi-s-go-i?

031227.cherokee: ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛᎵ ᏧᏥᎸᎯ ᏓᏛᏍᎬᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᏱᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏯᏂᏍᏙᎰᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᏐᎵᎹᏅ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏬᏚᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏕ ᏚᏄᏩᎥᎢ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ.
031227.english: Consider the lilies how they grow: they toil not, they spin not; and yet I say unto you, that Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these.
031227.phonetic: Di-tsa-da-nv-dv-li tsu-tsi-lv-hi da-dv-s-gv-i; V-tla yi-du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i, v-tla a-le ya-ni-s-do-ho-i; a-se-no hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, na-s-quo So-li-ma-nv ni-ga-v u-wo-du-hi-yu ge-sv v-tla na-s-gi yi-nu-s-de du-nu-wa-v-i hi-a na-s-gi sa-quo nu-s-dv-i.

031228.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᏱᎦᏄᏬᎭ ᎧᏁᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏤᎭ, ᎤᎩᏨᏅᏃ ᏗᎦᏚᏗᏱ ᏬᎾᏗᏅᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏟᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏙᏓᏥᏄᏬᎢ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎯ!
031228.english: If then God so clothe the grass, which is to day in the field, and to morrow is cast into the oven; how much more will he clothe you, O ye of little faith?
031228.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi yi-ni-gv-ne-ha yi-ga-nu-wo-ha ka-ne-s-ga, na-s-gi go-hi i-ga tlo-ge-si tse-ha, u-gi-tsv-nv-no di-ga-du-di-yi wo-na-di-nv-di tsi-gi, u-tli-hi-yu-s-gi-ni ni-hi ni-do-da-tsi-nu-wo-i u-s-di i-tso-hi-yu-hi!

031229.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᏱᏥᏲᎮᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏗᏔᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏧᏢᏫᏛ ᏱᏂᏚᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
031229.english: And seek not ye what ye shall eat, or what ye shall drink, neither be ye of doubtful mind.
031229.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di ni-hi yi-tsi-yo-he-s-di i-yu-s-di i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-yi, a-le i-yu-s-di i-tsa-di-ta-s-di-yi, a-le tle-s-di tsu-tlv-wi-dv yi-ni-du-s-de-s-di de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i.

031230.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒ ᎤᏂᏲᎰᎢ; ᎢᏥᏙᏓᏃ ᎠᎦᏔᎰ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏥᏂᎬᎬᎢ.
031230.english: For all these things do the nations of the world seek after: and your Father knoweth that ye have need of these things.
031230.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no ni-ga-dv hi-a tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi e-lo-hi da-ne-wa-di-sv u-ni-yo-ho-i; I-tsi-do-da-no a-ga-ta-ho na-s-gi hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv i-tsi-ni-gv-gv-i.

031231.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏲᎮᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎡᏣᏠᏯᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031231.english: But rather seek ye the kingdom of God; and all these things shall be added unto you.
031231.phonetic: I-tsi-yo-he-s-di-s-gi-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i; na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv e-tsa-tlo-ya-s-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di.

031232.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏍᎦᎢᎮᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎦᏲᎵ ᎠᏫ; ᎢᏥᏙᏓᏰᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᎭ ᎢᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031232.english: Fear not, little flock; for it is your Father's good pleasure to give you the kingdom.
031232.phonetic: Tle-s-di yi-tsi-s-ga-i-he-s-di i-tsi-ga-yo-li a-wi; I-tsi-do-da-ye-no o-si-yu u-ye-lv-ha i-tsi-ne-di-yi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

031233.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎾᏕᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎿᎭᎥᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᏁᎸᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎢᏣᏓᏁᎴᏍᏗ ᏕᎦᎶᏗ ᏂᏚᏪᏔᎬᎾ, ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏫᏥᏟᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏗᏒᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᎿ ᎭᏫᎬᏩᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎦᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏍᎪᏯ ᏫᎬᏩᏲᏍᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
031233.english: Sell that ye have, and give alms; provide yourselves bags which wax not old, a treasure in the heavens that faileth not, where no thief approacheth, neither moth corrupteth.
031233.phonetic: I-tsi-na-de-ge-s-di i-tsi-hna-v-i a-le i-tsa-da-ne-lv-v-s-ge-s-di; i-tsa-da-ne-le-s-di de-ga-lo-di ni-du-we-ta-gv-na, tsu-gv-wa-lo-di ga-lv-la-di wi-tsi-tli-si-s-ge-s-di a-di-sv-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na, na-hna wi-gv-wa-lu-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ga-no-s-gi-s-gi, a-le tsi-s-go-ya wi-gv-wa-yo-s-do-di ni-ge-sv-na.

031234.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏰᏃ ᏫᏥᎲ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ, ᎾᎿᎭᎾᏍᏉ ᏫᏓᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ.
031234.english: For where your treasure is, there will your heart be also.
031234.phonetic: Na-hna-ye-no wi-tsi-hv tsu-gv-wa-lo-di, na-hna na-s-quo wi-da-he-s-di di-tsi-na-wi.

031235.english: Let your loins be girded about, and your lights burning;

031236.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏒᏃ ᏕᏣᏤᎴᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏂᎦᏘᏲ ᎤᏂᏅᏏᏙᎯ, ᎢᏳᏉ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏕᎨᎦᏨᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏭᏪᏙᎸᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏳᎷᏨ ᎠᎴ ᏳᏩᏂᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏫᎬᏩᏍᏚᎢᎡᏗᏱ.
031236.english: And ye yourselves like unto men that wait for their lord, when he will return from the wedding; that when he cometh and knocketh, they may open unto him immediately.
031236.phonetic: I-tsv-sv-no de-tsa-tse-le-s-di a-ni-s-ga-ya na-s-gi tsa-ni-ga-ti-yo u-ni-nv-si-do-hi, i-yu-quo u-lu-hi-s-di-yi de-ge-ga-tsv-s-di-s-gv wu-we-do-lv-hi; na-s-gi-no yu-lu-tsv a-le yu-wa-ni-lv, na-s-gi gi-la-quo i-yv-dv wi-gv-wa-s-du-i-e-di-yi.

031237.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎤᏂᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ ᏓᏩᏛᎲᎭ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎬᎢ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏣᏲᏎᎭ ᏛᏓᏠᎵ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᎧᏁᏤᎵ ᎤᎾᏂᏢᏗᏱ [ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ,] ᎠᎴ ᏓᎦᎷᏥ ᏙᏛᏍᏕᎸᎯ.
031237.english: Blessed are those servants, whom the lord when he cometh shall find watching: verily I say unto you, that he shall gird himself, and make them to sit down to meat, and will come forth and serve them.
031237.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di, u-ni-nv-si-do-hi ga-lu-tsv-ha da-wa-dv-hv-ha a-ni-ya-wi-s-gv-i; u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsa-yo-se-ha dv-da-tlo-li u-wa-sv, a-le do-da-ka-ne-tse-li u-na-ni-tlv-di-yi [u-na-li-s-da-yv-di-yi,] a-le da-ga-lu-tsi do-dv-s-de-lv-hi.

031238.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎠᏯᏫᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᏳᎷᏨ, ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎠᏯᏫᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᏳᎷᏨ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏚᏩᏛᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ.
031238.english: And if he shall come in the second watch, or come in the third watch, and find them so, blessed are those servants.
031238.phonetic: I-yu-no ta-li-ne a-ya-wi-s-di-yi ge-sv yu-lu-tsv, a-le tso-i-ne a-ya-wi-s-di-yi ge-sv yu-lu-tsv, a-le yi-du-wa-dv-hv na-s-gi na-na-dv-ne-hv-i, o-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di.

031239.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳ ᎦᏁᎳ ᏯᎦᏔᎮ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎠᎵᏰᎢᎵᏒ ᏗᎦᎷᏥᏒ ᎦᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ, ᏳᏯᏫᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏩᎩᏴᏏ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏱᎬᏪᎵᏎᎢ.
031239.english: And this know, that if the goodman of the house had known what hour the thief would come, he would have watched, and not have suffered his house to be broken through.
031239.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi i-tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di, na-s-gi i-yu ga-ne-la ya-ga-ta-he i-yu-tli-lo-dv a-li-ye-i-li-sv di-ga-lu-tsi-sv ga-no-s-gi-s-gi, yu-ya-wi-se-i, a-le v-tla wa-gi-yv-si a-da-ne-lv yi-gv-we-li-se-i.

031240.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏕᏍᏗ; ᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏓᎦᎷᏥ ᎢᏳᏉ ᎠᎵᏰᎢᎵᏒ ᏂᏤᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031240.english: Be ye therefore ready also: for the Son of man cometh at an hour when ye think not.
031240.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-hi na-s-quo i-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-de-s-di; yv-wi-ye-no U-we-tsi da-ga-lu-tsi i-yu-quo a-li-ye-i-li-sv ni-tse-li-s-gv-na ge-sv-i.

031241.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᏴᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏍᎩᏯᏟᎶᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᏂᎦᏛᏉᎨ?
031241.english: Then Peter said unto him, Lord, speakest thou this parable unto us, or even to all?
031241.phonetic: Qui-da-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-yv-s-go hi-a na-s-gi de-s-gi-ya-tli-lo-s-da-ne-ha, ni-ga-dv-quo-ge?

031242.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᎪᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏔᎾᎢ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᏥᎦᏘᏗᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᏩᏁᎵ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᏂᏓᏍᏆᎸᎯᏒᎢ?
031242.english: And the Lord said, Who then is that faithful and wise steward, whom his lord shall make ruler over his household, to give them their portion of meat in due season?
031242.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ga-go-no na-s-gi na o-s-dv a-le a-ga-ta-na-i a-da-ne-lv a-tsi-ga-ti-di-s-di, na-s-gi u-nv-si-do-hi nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi nv-da-yu-wa-ne-li ga-ne-lv-i, na-s-gi tsu-ne-di-yi u-na-li-s-da-yv-di ni-da-s-qua-lv-hi-sv-i?

031243.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ ᎤᏩᏛᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ.
031243.english: Blessed is that servant, whom his lord when he cometh shall find so doing.
031243.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi na a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di, na-s-gi u-nv-si-do-hi ga-lu-tsv-ha u-wa-dv-hv na-s-gi na-dv-ne-hv-i.

031244.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᏩᏁᎵ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᎿᎭᎥᎢ.
031244.english: Of a truth I say unto you, that he will make him ruler over all that he hath.
031244.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsv-yo-se-ha, na-s-gi u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi nv-da-yu-wa-ne-li ni-ga-v u-hna-v-i.

031245.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏒ ᎤᎾᏫᏱ, ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎪᎯᏗᎭ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᎴᏅᎲᎭ ᏙᎦᎵᎥᏂᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏴᏍᏕᏍᎨᏍᏗ;
031245.english: But and if that servant say in his heart, My lord delayeth his coming; and shall begin to beat the menservants and maidens, and to eat and drink, and to be drunken;
031245.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni na-s-gi na a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di hi-a ni-ga-we-sv u-na-wi-yi, A-gi-nv-si-do-hi go-hi-di-ha u-lu-hi-s-di-yi; a-le a-le-nv-hv-ha do-ga-li-v-ni-he-s-di a-ni-s-ga-ya a-le a-ni-ge-yv ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-s-di a-le a-di-ta-s-ge-s-di, a-le u-yv-s-de-s-ge-s-di;

031246.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᏓᎦᎷᏥ ᎢᏳᏉ ᎢᎦ ᎾᏓᎦᏖᏃᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳᏉ ᎠᎵᏰᎢᎵᏒ ᏁᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᏳᎦᎵᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏮᏓᏳᏎᎮᎵ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᏗᏁᎲᎢ.
031246.english: The lord of that servant will come in a day when he looketh not for him, and at an hour when he is not aware, and will cut him in sunder, and will appoint him his portion with the unbelievers.
031246.phonetic: Na-s-gi na a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di u-nv-si-do-hi da-ga-lu-tsi i-yu-quo i-ga na-da-ga-te-no-hv-na ge-sv-i, a-le i-yu-quo a-li-ye-i-li-sv ne-li-s-gv-na ge-sv-i, a-le do-da-yu-ga-li-si, a-le wv-da-yu-se-he-li nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na di-ne-hv-i.

031247.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏔᎯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏄᏛᏁᎸᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏯᎬᏂᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031247.english: And that servant, which knew his lord's will, and prepared not himself, neither did according to his will, shall be beaten with many stripes.
031247.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di a-ga-ta-hi nu-s-dv u-du-li-s-gv u-nv-si-do-hi, a-le nu-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-na i-ge-se-s-di, a-le na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv u-du-li-s-gv nu-dv-ne-lv-na i-ge-se-s-di, u-tsa-ti i-ya-gv-ni-s-di ge-se-s-di.

031248.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎦᏰᏥᎵᎥᏂᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏲᎵᏉ ᎢᏯᎬᏂᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.  ᏱᎶᏃ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏥᏁᎸᎯ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏥᏔᏲᏎᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏗᎬᏩᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎬᏩᏔᏲᏎᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031248.english: But he that knew not, and did commit things worthy of stripes, shall be beaten with few stripes. For unto whomsoever much is given, of him shall be much required: and to whom men have committed much, of him they will ask the more.
031248.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ni na-ga-ta-hv-na ge-sv a-le ye-li-quo ga-ye-tsi-li-v-ni-s-di i-yu-dv-ne-lv-hi ge-se-s-di na-s-gi ga-yo-li-quo i-ya-gv-ni-s-di ge-se-s-di.  Yi-lo-no u-tsa-ti a-tsi-ne-lv-hi, u-tsa-ti a-tsi-ta-yo-se-di ge-se-s-di; a-le gi-lo u-tsa-ti di-gv-wa-yo-hi-se-lv-hi yv-wi, na-s-gi u-tli i-ga-i gv-wa-ta-yo-se-di ge-se-s-di.

031249.cherokee: ᎠᎩᎷᏥᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏋᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎦᏙᎯ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᏯᏆᏚᎳ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏳᏥᏍᏝ?
031249.english: I am come to send fire on the earth; and what will I if it be already kindled?
031249.phonetic: A-gi-lu-tsi-lv na-s-gi i-ya-quv-ni-so-di-yi a-tsi-lv ga-do-hi u-lu-hi-s-di-yi; a-le ga-do ya-qua-du-la i-yu-no ga-yu-la yu-tsi-s-tla?

031250.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᎩᎭ ᎠᏓᏬᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏆᏬᏍᏙᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏔ ᎬᏂ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏛᎭ!
031250.english: But I have a baptism to be baptized with; and how am I straitened till it be accomplished!
031250.phonetic: A-se-no a-gi-ha a-da-wo-s-di ge-sv v-qua-wo-s-do-di; a-le ni-ga-v u-we-li-hi-s-di a-qua-da-nv-ta gv-ni a-li-s-qua-dv-ha!

031251.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏚᏁᎵᎸ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏍᎩᏰᎵᏎᎭ?  ᎥᏝ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ; ᏔᎵᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏳᎾᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ;
031251.english: Suppose ye that I am come to give peace on earth? I tell you, Nay; but rather division:
031251.phonetic: Tsi-sa nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv du-ne-li-lv e-lo-hi s-gi-ye-li-se-ha?  V-tla i-tsv-yo-se-ha; ta-li-quo-s-gi-ni i-yu-na-da-di-s-di-yi;

031252.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏏᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎾᏓᎡᏍᏗ, ᏦᎢ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎤᎾᎵᎪᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏚᎾᏡᏕᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎤᎾᎵᎪᏎᏍᏗ ᏦᎢ ᏚᎾᏡᏕᏍᏗ.
031252.english: For from henceforth there shall be five in one house divided, three against two, and two against three.
031252.phonetic: Go-hi-ye-no i-yu-da-le-nv-dv si-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv hi-s-gi i-ya-ni-dv ta-li nu-na-da-e-s-di, tso-i i-ya-ni-dv u-na-li-go-se-s-di a-ni-ta-li du-na-tlu-de-s-di, a-le a-ni-ta-li u-na-li-go-se-s-di tso-i du-na-tlu-de-s-di.

031253.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎾᏓᎡᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎦᏅᎩᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎾᏓᎡᏍᏗ ᎤᏙᏓ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎾᏓᎡᏍᏗ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏅᎩ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎾᏓᎡᏍᏗ ᎤᏥ; ᎤᏦᎯᏃ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎾᏓᎡᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏦᎯᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏦᎯᏯ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎾᏓᎡᏍᏗ ᎤᏦᎯ.
031253.english: The father shall be divided against the son, and the son against the father; the mother against the daughter, and the daughter against the mother; the mother in law against her daughter in law, and the daughter in law against her mother in law.
031253.phonetic: A-ga-yv-li-ge-i ta-li nu-na-da-e-s-di a-s-ga-ya u-we-tsi, a-ga-nv-gi-no a-s-ga-ya ta-li nu-na-da-e-s-di u-do-da; a-le a-ge-yv ta-li nu-na-da-e-s-di a-ge-yv u-we-tsi, a-le a-ga-nv-gi a-ge-yv ta-li nu-na-da-e-s-di u-tsi; u-tso-hi-no ta-li nu-na-da-e-s-di u-da-tso-hi-ya, a-le u-da-tso-hi-ya ta-li nu-na-da-e-s-di u-tso-hi.

031254.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏴᏫ, ᎤᎶᎩᎸ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏛ ᏅᏙ ᏭᏕᎵᎬ ᏓᎦᎶᎯ, ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᎹ ᏛᏰᎢᎵ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ.
031254.english: And he said also to the people, When ye see a cloud rise out of the west, straightway ye say, There cometh a shower; and so it is.
031254.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo hi-a ni-du-we-se-le yv-wi, U-lo-gi-lv i-tsi-go-wa-dv nv-do wu-de-li-gv da-ga-lo-hi, gi-la-quo i-yv-dv hi-a ni-tsi-we-s-go-i, a-ma dv-ye-i-li; na-s-gi-no ni-ga-li-s-di-s-go-i.

031255.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏙᎴᎰᎯ ᏧᎦᎾᏮ ᏗᎦᏃᎸᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᏗᎴᎩᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ.
031255.english: And when ye see the south wind blow, ye say, There will be heat; and it cometh to pass.
031255.phonetic: A-le i-tsa-do-le-ho-hi tsu-ga-na-wv di-ga-no-lv-di-s-gv-i, hi-a ni-tsi-we-s-go-i, U-di-le-gi-yu ge-se-s-di; a-le na-s-gi ni-ga-li-s-di-s-go-i.

031256.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᏰᎵᏉ ᎢᏣᏙᎴᎰᏍᎪ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏂᏣᏙᎴᎰᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ?
031256.english: Ye hypocrites, ye can discern the face of the sky and of the earth; but how is it that ye do not discern this time?
031256.phonetic: I-tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  ye-li-quo i-tsa-do-le-ho-s-go nu-s-dv ga-lv-la-di, a-le e-lo-hi; ga-do-no di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ni-tsa-do-le-ho-s-gv-na tsi-gi go-hi ge-sv-i?

031257.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎨᏧᎪᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ?
031257.english: Yea, and why even of yourselves judge ye not what is right?
031257.phonetic: A-le ga-do-no i-tsv-sv ge-sv di-ge-tsu-go-do-di ni-ge-sv-na i-gi du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i?

031258.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏣᏱᎵᏙᎯ ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏍᎩᏱ ᏍᏓᎢᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᏫᏍᏓᎢᏒᎢ, ᎭᏟᏂᎬᏁᎸᎭ ᎯᏯᏚᎵᎳᎡᏗᏱ; ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏍᎩᏱ ᎾᏏ ᏫᏱᏣᏘᏃᎦ, ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏍᎩᏃ ᏗᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩᏱ ᏫᏱᏕᏣᏲᎯ, ᏗᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩᏃ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᏫᏱᏣᏴᏓ.
031258.english: When thou goest with thine adversary to the magistrate, as thou art in the way, give diligence that thou mayest be delivered from him; lest he hale thee to the judge, and the judge deliver thee to the officer, and the officer cast thee into prison.
031258.phonetic: I-yu-no tsa-yi-li-do-hi di-gu-go-di-s-gi-yi s-da-i-se-s-di, a-si-quo wi-s-da-i-sv-i, ha-tli-ni-gv-ne-lv-ha hi-ya-du-li-la-e-di-yi; di-gu-go-di-s-gi-yi na-si wi-yi-tsa-ti-no-ga, di-gu-go-di-s-gi-no di-da-ni-yi-s-gi-yi wi-yi-de-tsa-yo-hi, di-da-ni-yi-s-gi-no di-da-s-du-di-yi wi-yi-tsa-yv-da.

031259.cherokee: ᎬᏲᏎᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᎿᎭᏴᏛᎦᎯᏄᎪᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᏣᎫᏴᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎠᎩᏄᏛᏗ ᎢᏯᏓᏅᏖᏗ.
031259.english: I tell thee, thou shalt not depart thence, till thou hast paid the very last mite.
031259.phonetic: Gv-yo-se-ha, v-tla na-hna yv-dv-ga-hi-nu-go-i, gv-ni tsa-gu-yv-he-s-di u-li-s-qua-lv-di a-gi-nu-dv-di i-ya-da-nv-te-di.

031301.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏁᏙᎮ ᎩᎶ ᎬᏩᏃᏁᎸᎯ ᎬᏩᏁᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ ᏇᎴᏗ ᏚᏑᏰᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎲᎢ.
031301.english: There were present at that season some that told him of the Galilaeans, whose blood Pilate had mingled with their sacrifices.
031301.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-ne-do-he gi-lo gv-wa-no-ne-lv-hi gv-wa-ne-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi Ge-li-li a-ne-hi, na-s-gi u-ni-gi-gv Que-le-di du-su-ye-da-ne-lv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hv-i.

031302.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏚᏁᏤᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏧᏂᎪᎾᏛᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ?
031302.english: And Jesus answering said unto them, Suppose ye that these Galilaeans were sinners above all the Galilaeans, because they suffered such things?
031302.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no du-ne-tse-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, I-tsa-da-nv-te-s-gv-s-go hi-a na-s-gi Ge-li-li a-ne-hi tsu-ni-go-na-dv-ta-nv-hi ge-se a-ni-s-ga-na-hi-yu ge-sv ni-ga-dv Ge-li-li a-ne-hi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha na-s-gi tsi-nu-na-li-s-da-ne-le-i?

031303.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏗᏥᏁᏟᏴᏒᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏓᏣᏗᏒᏂ.
031303.english: I tell you, Nay: but, except ye repent, ye shall all likewise perish.
031303.phonetic: V-tla i-tsv-yo-se-ha; ni-hi-s-gi-ni ni-di-tsi-ne-tli-yv-sv-na i-ge-se-s-di de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, ni-ga-dv na-s-gi-ya da-tsa-di-sv-ni.

031304.cherokee: ᎠᎴ Ꮎ ᏁᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏌᎶᎻ ᎢᏅ ᎢᎦᏘ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏧᎾᏐᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏚᏂᎴᎢ, ᏥᎪ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏧᏂᎪᎾᏛᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏁᎯ?
031304.english: Or those eighteen, upon whom the tower in Siloam fell, and slew them, think ye that they were sinners above all men that dwelt in Jerusalem?
031304.phonetic: A-le na ne-la-du i-ya-ni-dv Sa-lo-mi i-nv-i-ga-ti a-da-ne-lv tsu-na-so-ne-i, a-le tsi-du-ni-le-i, tsi-go i-tsa-da-nv-te-s-gv tsu-ni-go-na-dv-ta-nv-hi ge-se a-ni-s-ga-na-hi-yu ge-sv ni-ga-dv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ne-hi?

031305.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏗᏥᏁᏟᏴᏒᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏓᏩᏗᏒᏂ.
031305.english: I tell you, Nay: but, except ye repent, ye shall all likewise perish.
031305.phonetic: V-tla i-tsv-yo-se-ha; ni-hi-s-gi-ni ni-di-tsi-ne-tli-yv-sv-na i-ge-se-s-di de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, ni-ga-dv na-s-gi-ya da-wa-di-sv-ni.

031306.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏪᏎ ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ; ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎡᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬ ᎤᏫᏎ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏚᏫᏒᎢ; ᎤᎷᏤᏃ ᎤᏲᎴ ᎤᏓᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏩᏛᎮᎢ.
031306.english: He spake also this parable; A certain man had a fig tree planted in his vineyard; and he came and sought fruit thereon, and found none.
031306.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-quo nu-we-se du-tli-lo-s-da-ne-le-i; Gi-lo i-yu-s-di, e-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di tlu-gv u-wi-se te-lv-la-di du-wi-sv-i; u-lu-tse-no u-yo-le u-da-ta-nv-hi, a-le v-tla yu-wa-dv-he-i.

031307.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏚᏫᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᏦᎢ ᎾᏕᏘᏴ ᏥᎷᎬᎩ ᎠᎩᏲᎲᎩ ᎤᏓᏔᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏩᏘᎭ; ᎯᎴᏴᏍᏓ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎤᎨᏗ ᎦᏙᎯ?
031307.english: Then said he unto the dresser of his vineyard, Behold, these three years I come seeking fruit on this fig tree, and find none: cut it down; why cumbereth it the ground?
031307.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nu-we-se-le o-s-dv i-yu-wa-hna-de-gi te-lv-la-di du-wi-sv-i, Gv-ni-yu-quo, hna-quo tso-i na-de-ti-yv tsi-lu-gv-gi a-gi-yo-hv-gi u-da-ta-nv-hi hi-a na-s-gi e-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di tlu-gv-i, a-le v-tla yi-tsi-wa-ti-ha; hi-le-yv-s-da; ga-do-no i-u-ge-di ga-do-hi?

031308.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎮᎳ ᎪᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᏕᏘᏴᏌᏗ, ᎬᏂ ᎦᏍᎪᏏᏙᎸᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎦᏓ ᏥᏅᎭ.
031308.english: And he answering said unto him, Lord, let it alone this year also, till I shall dig about it, and dung it:
031308.phonetic: U-ne-tsv-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, u-ne-la-gi he-la go-hi na-s-quo tsu-de-ti-yv-sa-di, gv-ni ga-s-go-si-do-lv-ha, a-le o-s-dv ga-da tsi-nv-ha.

031309.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎢᎠᏓᏔᏅᎭ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏄᏔᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎩᎳ ᎣᏂ ᎯᎴᏴᏍᏔᏅᎭ.
031309.english: And if it bear fruit, well: and if not, then after that thou shalt cut it down.
031309.phonetic: I-yu-no i-a-da-ta-nv-ha, u-ne-la-gi-quo ge-se-s-di; i-yu-no nu-ta-nv-na yi-gi, gi-la o-ni hi-le-yv-s-ta-nv-ha.

031310.english: And he was teaching in one of the synagogues on the sabbath.

031311.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᏙᎮ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎥᏳᎩ ᎪᏢᏍᎩ ᎤᏯᎢ ᏁᎳᏚ ᎢᏳᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏗᏌᏕᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏛ ᎤᎵᏥᏃᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏎᎢ.
031311.english: And, behold, there was a woman which had a spirit of infirmity eighteen years, and was bowed together, and could in no wise lift up herself.
031311.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-no na-hna e-do-he a-ge-yv a-da-nv-do v-yu-gi go-tlv-s-gi u-ya-i ne-la-du i-yu-de-ti-yv-dv i-gv-wa-li-s-ta-nv-hi ge-se-i, a-le u-di-sa-de-i, a-le gv-wa-tli-s-dv u-li-tsi-no-hi-s-do-di-yi ge-se-i.

031312.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎪᎲ ᏭᏯᏅᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᎨᏴ, ᏣᏢᎬ ᎡᏧᏓᎳᎩ.
031312.english: And when Jesus saw her, he called her to him, and said unto her, Woman, thou art loosed from thine infirmity.
031312.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-go-hv wu-ya-nv-he-i, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Hi-ge-yv, tsa-tlv-gv e-tsu-da-la-gi.

031313.cherokee: ᏚᏏᏔᏕᏃ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎦᏥᏃᏍᏛ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎸᏉᏔᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
031313.english: And he laid his hands on her: and immediately she was made straight, and glorified God.
031313.phonetic: Du-si-ta-de-no; a-le gi-la-quo i-yv-dv ga-tsi-no-s-dv nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, a-le u-lv-quo-ta-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi.

031314.cherokee: ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎤᎿᎭᎸᎯ ᎤᏁᏤᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏓᏅᏩᏅ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ; ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏴᏫ, ᏑᏓᎵ ᎢᎦ ᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏴᏫ; ᎾᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᎷᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᏅᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗᏃ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ.
031314.english: And the ruler of the synagogue answered with indignation, because that Jesus had healed on the sabbath day, and said unto the people, There are six days in which men ought to work: in them therefore come and be healed, and not on the sabbath day.
031314.phonetic: Di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi u-hna-lv-hi u-ne-tse-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge Tsi-sa u-da-nv-wa-nv u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga; a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le yv-wi, Su-da-li i-ga du-yu-go-di tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi yv-wi; na-hi-yu-s-gi-ni i-tsi-lu-ge-s-di a-le de-tsi-nv-wi-s-ge-s-di, tle-s-di-no u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga.

031315.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏁᏤᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏣᏠᎾᏍᏗ!  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᏰᏤᎵᏌᏕᏍᎪ ᏗᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᏩᎦ ᎠᎴ ᏐᏈᎵᏗᎦᎵᎠᏅᎯᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏰᏣᏘᏁᎪ ᎠᎹ ᏰᏣᏗᏔᏍᏔᏁᎪᎢ?
031315.english: The Lord then answered him, and said, Thou hypocrite, doth not each one of you on the sabbath loose his ox or his ass from the stall, and lead him away to watering?
031315.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no hna-quo u-ne-tse-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsa-tlo-na-s-di!  tla-s-go ni-hi i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv ye-tse-li-sa-de-s-go di-ge-la-s-di-yi i-tsa-tse-li wa-ga a-le so-qui-li-di-ga-li-a-nv-hi-dv, a-le ye-tsa-ti-ne-go a-ma ye-tsa-di-ta-s-ta-ne-go-i?

031316.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏎᏓᏂ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎬᏂᏳ ᏁᎳᏚ ᏧᏕᏗᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᎸᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏚᏳᎪᏕ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎠᎦᎸᏒᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᎸᏍᏛᎢ?
031316.english: And ought not this woman, being a daughter of Abraham, whom Satan hath bound, lo, these eighteen years, be loosed from this bond on the sabbath day?
031316.phonetic: Hi-a-no a-ge-yv E-qua-ha-mi u-we-tsi tsi-gi, na-s-gi Se-da-ni hna-quo gv-ni-yu ne-la-du tsu-de-di-yv-dv gv-wa-lv-lv-hi tsi-gi, tla-s-go yi-du-yu-go-de u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv a-ga-lv-sv-di-yi hi-a na-s-gi u-da-lv-s-dv-i?

031317.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᎬᏩᎦᏗᎴᎩ ᎤᎾᏕᎰᏎᎢ; ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎨ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎤᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
031317.english: And when he had said these things, all his adversaries were ashamed: and all the people rejoiced for all the glorious things that were done by him.
031317.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-we-sv, ni-ga-dv di-gv-wa-ga-di-le-gi u-na-de-ho-se-i; ni-ga-dv-no yv-wi a-na-li-he-li-ge nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge ni-ga-dv ga-lv-quo-di-yu na-s-gi de-u-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

031318.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏓᏤᎸ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᏙᏓᎦᏟᎶᏍᏔᏂ?
031318.english: Then said he, Unto what is the kingdom of God like? and whereunto shall I resemble it?
031318.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ga-do da-tse-lv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i?  A-le ga-do do-da-ga-tli-lo-s-ta-ni?

031319.cherokee: ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎤᎦᏔ ᏓᏤᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏧᎩᏎ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏫᏒᏗᏱ ᏥᏭᏗᏅᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏛᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏉᎯᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᏡᎬᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏥᏍᏆ ᎦᎸᎶ ᎠᏂᏃᎯᎵᏙᎯ ᏚᏩᏂᎦᎸ ᎤᎾᎭᏓᏕᎢ.
031319.english: It is like a grain of mustard seed, which a man took, and cast into his garden; and it grew, and waxed a great tree; and the fowls of the air lodged in the branches of it.
031319.phonetic: A-tsi-lv--u-ga-ta da-tse-lv, na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya tsu-gi-se a-le u-wi-sv-di-yi tsi-wu-di-nv-se-i; a-le u-dv-se-i, a-le e-quo-hi-yu nu-li-s-ta-ne tlu-gv-i; a-le tsi-s-qua ga-lv-lo a-ni-no-hi-li-do-hi du-wa-ni-ga-lv u-na-ha-da-de-i.

031320.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏙᏓᎦᏟᎶᏍᏔᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ?
031320.english: And again he said, Whereunto shall I liken the kingdom of God?
031320.phonetic: A-le-wo hi-a nu-we-se-i, ga-do do-da-ga-tli-lo-s-ta-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i?

031321.cherokee: ᎠᎪᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏧᎩᏎ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏑᏴᏁ ᏦᎢ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎢᏒ ᎦᎸᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏬᏘᏐᏅ.
031321.english: It is like leaven, which a woman took and hid in three measures of meal, till the whole was leavened.
031321.phonetic: A-go-do-di na-s-gi-ya-i, na-s-gi a-ge-yv tsu-gi-se a-le tsu-su-yv-ne tso-i i-yu-tli-lo-dv i-sv ga-lv-i, gv-ni ni-ga-dv u-wo-ti-so-nv.

031322.cherokee: ᎤᎦᏛᎴᏏᏙᎴᏃ ᎤᏪᏙᎴ ᏧᏛᎾ ᏕᎦᏚᎲ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏍᏗ ᏕᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏩᎦᏖᎢ.
031322.english: And he went through the cities and villages, teaching, and journeying toward Jerusalem.
031322.phonetic: U-ga-dv-le-si-do-le-no u-we-do-le tsu-dv-na de-ga-du-hv a-le tsu-s-di de-ga-du-hv-i, da-de-yo-hv-s-ge-i, a-le Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wa-ga-te-i.

031323.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᏂᎦᏲᎵᏉᏍᎪ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ,
031323.english: Then said one unto him, Lord, are there few that be saved? And he said unto them,
031323.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-ni-ga-yo-li-quo-s-go ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di?  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i,

031324.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏟᏂᎬᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏯᏙᎵ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏰᏃ, ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᏓᏳᏂᏲᎵ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏫᎬᏩᏂᏴᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031324.english: Strive to enter in at the strait gate: for many, I say unto you, will seek to enter in, and shall not be able.
031324.phonetic: I-tsa-tli-ni-gv-ne-he-s-di i-tsi-yv-s-di-yi a-ya-do-li ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi; u-ni-tsa-ti-ye-no, i-tsv-yo-se-ha, da-yu-ni-yo-li u-ni-yv-s-di-yi, a-le v-tla ye-li wi-gv-wa-ni-yv-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

031325.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᏁᎳ ᏓᎴᏅᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏚᏅᎭ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᎢᏣᎴᏅᎲ ᏙᏱᏗᏢ ᎢᏥᏙᎾᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏂᎮᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏤᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎡᏍᎩᏍᏚᎢᏏ; ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏗᏥᏪᏎᎸᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏗᏣᏓᎴᏅᎢ;
031325.english: When once the master of the house is risen up, and hath shut to the door, and ye begin to stand without, and to knock at the door, saying, Lord, Lord, open unto us; and he shall answer and say unto you, I know you not whence ye are:
031325.phonetic: I-yu-no hna-quo A-s-ga-ya ga-ne-la da-le-nv-ha a-le a-s-du-nv-ha ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi, ni-hi-no i-tsa-le-nv-hv do-yi-di-tlv i-tsi-do-na-v-i, a-le i-tsv-ni-he-s-di ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi hi-a ni-tse-we-s-ge-s-di, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, e-s-gi-s-du-i-si; a-le di-ka-ne-tsv hi-a nv-di-tsi-we-se-lv-ha, v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha di-tsa-da-le-nv-i;

031326.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᏓᏣᎴᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᏥᏪᏏ, ᎣᎦᎵᏍᏓᏴᏅᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎣᎦᏗᏔᎲᎩ ᎯᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᏕᏲᏅᎩ ᎣᎩᏚᎲ ᎡᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᏕᎦᎳᏅᏛᎢ.
031326.english: Then shall ye begin to say, We have eaten and drunk in thy presence, and thou hast taught in our streets.
031326.phonetic: Hna-quo da-tsa-le-nv-hi hi-a nv-da-tsi-we-si, O-ga-li-s-da-yv-nv-gi a-le o-ga-di-ta-hv-gi hi-ga-ta-hv-i, a-le de-tsa-de-yo-nv-gi o-gi-du-hv e-da-s-di-yi de-ga-la-nv-dv-i.

031327.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎦᏪᏏ, ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏗᏣᏓᎴᏅᎢ; ᏍᎩᏯᏓᏅᏏ, ᏂᏥᎥ ᎤᏲ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ.
031327.english: But he shall say, I tell you, I know you not whence ye are; depart from me, all ye workers of iniquity.
031327.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a nv-da-ga-we-si, i-tsv-yo-se-ha, v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha di-tsa-da-le-nv-i; s-gi-ya-da-nv-si, ni-tsi-v u-yo di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi.

031328.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏓᏂᏴᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᎸᏓᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏓᏂᏄᏙᎬᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏕᏥᎪᎲᎭ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏏᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎠᏂᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᎢᏨᏒᏃ ᎡᏥᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031328.english: There shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth, when ye shall see Abraham, and Isaac, and Jacob, and all the prophets, in the kingdom of God, and you yourselves thrust out.
031328.phonetic: Na-hna da-ni-yv-ge-s-di a-le da-ni-lv-da-gi-s-ge-s-di da-ni-nu-do-gv-i, na-hi-yu de-tsi-go-hv-ha E-qua-ha-mi a-le E-si-gi a-le Tse-ga-qui a-le ni-ga-dv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv na-hna a-ni-ya-e-s-di, i-tsv-sv-no e-tsi-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ge-se-s-di.

031329.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎸᎬᏃ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏗᏂᎶᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᏕᎵᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏴᏢᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎦᎾᏮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏅᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031329.english: And they shall come from the east, and from the west, and from the north, and from the south, and shall sit down in the kingdom of God.
031329.phonetic: Di-ka-lv-gv-no i-di-tlv di-ni-lo-s-ge-s-di, a-le wu-de-li-gv-i, a-le tsu-yv-tlv-i, a-le tsu-ga-na-wv-i, a-le a-na-nv-v-s-ge-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi na-hna u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

031330.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏁᎭ ᎣᏂ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏁᎭ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏂ ᎨᏎᏏᏗ.
031330.english: And, behold, there are last which shall be first, and there are first which shall be last.
031330.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo a-ne-ha o-ni tsi-gi, na-s-gi i-gv-yi ge-se-s-di, a-le a-ne-ha i-gv-yi tsi-gi, na-s-gi o-ni ge-se-si-di.

031331.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏉᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᏂᎷᏤ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᏄᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎭᏓᏅᎾ ᎠᏂ; ᎡᎶᏛ ᎾᏏ ᎤᏚᎵ ᏣᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
031331.english: The same day there came certain of the Pharisees, saying unto him, Get thee out, and depart hence: for Herod will kill thee.
031331.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-quo-no i-ga gi-lo i-yu-na-s-di a-ni-qua-li-si u-ni-lu-tse hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, Hi-nu-go-i, a-le ha-da-nv-na a-ni; E-lo-dv na-si u-du-li tsa-hi-s-di-yi.

031332.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᏤᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏫᏁᏥᏪᏏ Ꮎ ᎫᎳ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᏕᏥᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎦᏓᏅᏫᎭ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎩᏨᏅᎢ, ᏦᎢᏁᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏛᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031332.english: And he said unto them, Go ye, and tell that fox, Behold, I cast out devils, and I do cures to day and to morrow, and the third day I shall be perfected.
031332.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, I-tse-na, a-le hi-a wi-ne-tsi-we-si na gu-la, Gv-ni-yu-quo a-ni-s-gi-na de-tsi-nu-go-wi-s-ga, a-le de-ga-da-nv-wi-ha go-hi i-ga a-le u-gi-tsv-nv-i, tso-i-ne-no i-ga a-gi-s-qua-dv-hi ge-se-s-di.

031333.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏇᏓᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎩᏨᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎩᏨᏛ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎦᏰᏥᎢᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎤᏩᏒ.
031333.english: Nevertheless I must walk to day, and to morrow, and the day following: for it cannot be that a prophet perish out of Jerusalem.
031333.phonetic: A-se-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-que-da-s-di ni-ga-li-s-di-ha go-hi i-ga, a-le u-gi-tsv-nv-i, a-le u-gi-tsv-dv; v-tla-ye-no a-do-le-ho-s-gi ye-li i-lv-hi-tlv ga-ye-tsi-i-s-di yi-gi, Tsi-lu-si-li-mi u-wa-sv.

031334.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ!  ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ!  ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏘᎯᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏯ ᏛᏂᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏣᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᎨᏥᏅᏒᎯ; ᏯᏃᎩᏳ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎦᏥᏯᏟᏐᏗᏱ ᏗᏤᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏣᏔᎦ ᏥᏕᎦᏟᏏᏍᎪ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᏂᏛ ᎠᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏗᎧᏃᎨᏂ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᎢ!
031334.english: O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, which killest the prophets, and stonest them that are sent unto thee; how often would I have gathered thy children together, as a hen doth gather her brood under her wings, and ye would not!
031334.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi!  Tsi-lu-si-li-mi!  a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi ti-hi-hi, a-le nv-ya dv-ni-s-di-s-gi ge-tsa-lu-tse-di-yi ge-tsi-nv-sv-hi; ya-no-gi-yu a-qua-du-li-s-gv ga-tsi-ya-tli-so-di-yi di-tse-tsi, na-s-gi-ya tsa-ta-ga tsi-de-ga-tli-si-s-go tsu-we-tsi a-ni-dv a-wi-ni-di-tlv di-ka-no-ge-ni, a-se-no v-tla yi-tsa-du-li-s-ge-i!

031335.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎢᏥᏁᎸ ᏅᏔ ᏁᏨᏁᎸ; ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᎨᏍᎩᎪᏩᏛ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎬᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏥᏪᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᏆᎸᎲᎭ, ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏕᏅᏙᎥ ᏥᎦᎷᎯᏍᏗᎭ.
031335.english: Behold, your house is left unto you desolate: and verily I say unto you, Ye shall not see me, until the time come when ye shall say, Blessed is he that cometh in the name of the Lord.
031335.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo i-tsi-ne-lv nv-ta ne-tsv-ne-lv; a-le hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, V-tla yv-ge-s-gi-go-wa-dv go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv gv-ni hi-a i-tsi-we-s-di-yi a-s-qua-lv-hv-ha, A-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu na-s-gi na Yi-ho-wa de-nv-do-v tsi-ga-lu-hi-s-di-ha.

031401.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏴᎸ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏣᎦᏁᎶᏗ ᎠᏆᎵᏏ ᎦᏁᎸ ᎤᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎦᏌᏯᏍᏕᎢ.
031401.english: And it came to pass, as he went into the house of one of the chief Pharisees to eat bread on the sabbath day, that they watched him.
031401.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi u-yv-lv gi-lo i-yu-s-di tsa-ga-ne-lo-di A-qua-li-si ga-ne-lv u-li-s-da-yv-di-yi u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga, na-s-gi gv-wa-ga-sa-ya-s-de-i.

031402.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᏄᏛᏁ ᎤᏢᎩ ᎠᎹ ᎤᏓᏁᏁᎯ.
031402.english: And, behold, there was a certain man before him which had the dropsy.
031402.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-no gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya i-gv-yi-di-tlv nu-dv-ne u-tlv-gi a-ma u-da-ne-ne-hi.

031403.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᏃᏏᏏᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ; ᏚᏳᎪᏗᏍᎪ ᏗᏓᏅᏬᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ?
031403.english: And Jesus answering spake unto the lawyers and Pharisees, saying, Is it lawful to heal on the sabbath day?
031403.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tse hi-a ni-du-we-se-le di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-no-si-si-s-gi a-le A-ni-qua-li-si; Du-yu-go-di-s-go di-da-nv-wo-di-yi u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga?

031404.cherokee: ᎡᎳᏪᏱᏃ ᎤᏅᏁᎢ.  ᎤᏂᏴᎲᏃ ᎤᏅᏩᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏲᏎᎢ;
031404.english: And they held their peace. And he took him, and healed him, and let him go;
031404.phonetic: E-la-we-yi-no u-nv-ne-i.  U-ni-yv-hv-no u-nv-wa-ne-i, a-le du-yo-se-i;

031405.cherokee: ᏚᏁᏤᎴᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᏐᏈᎵ-ᏗᎦᎵᎠᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏩᎦ ᏳᎸᏤᎸ ᎠᏔᎴᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏱᏮᎦᎳᎩ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ?
031405.english: And answered them, saying, Which of you shall have an ass or an ox fallen into a pit, and will not straightway pull him out on the sabbath day?
031405.phonetic: Du-ne-tse-le-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ga-go hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv so-qui-li--di-ga-li-a-nv-hi-dv a-le wa-ga yu-lv-tse-lv a-ta-le-sv v-tla gi-la-quo i-yv-dv yi-wv-ga-la-gi u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga?

031406.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏬᎯᎵᏴᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ.
031406.english: And they could not answer him again to these things.
031406.phonetic: V-tla-no ye-li nv-da-gv-wa-wo-hi-li-yv-s-da-ne-di yi-ge-se na-s-gi hi-a.

031407.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏔᏁᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏫᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ, ᏚᎪᎲ ᏓᎾᏑᏰᏍᎬ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏗᏂᏢᏗᏱ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ,
031407.english: And he put forth a parable to those which were bidden, when he marked how they chose out the chief rooms; saying unto them,
031407.phonetic: A-le du-tli-lo-s-ta-ne-le na-s-gi na wi-ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv, du-go-hv da-na-su-ye-s-gv nu-gv-wi-yu-sv di-ni-tlv-di-yi, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i,

031408.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏕᎨᎦᏨᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏤᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏣᏯᏅᎲᎭ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏗᏂᏢᏗᏱ ᏣᏂᏏᏅᎩ; ᎤᏟᏰᏃ ᎢᏯᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏩᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᏱᏂᎦᎩ;
031408.english: When thou art bidden of any man to a wedding, sit not down in the highest room; lest a more honourable man than thou be bidden of him;
031408.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo de-ge-ga-tsv-s-di-s-gv tse-nv-s-di-yi tsa-ya-nv-hv-ha, tle-s-di nu-gv-wi-yu-sv di-ni-tlv-di-yi tsa-ni-si-nv-gi; u-tli-ye-no i-ya-tsi-lv-quo-di e-s-ga-quo ni-hi wa-tsi-ya-nv-dv yi-ni-ga-gi;

031409.cherokee: ᏫᏍᏗᏯᏅᏛᏃ ᏱᎦᎷᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᏣᏪᏏ, ᎯᏯᏜᏓᏅᏓᏗᏏ ᎯᎠ; ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏣᏕᎰᏒᎯ ᏯᎴᏅ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏂᏢᏗᏱ ᏫᏱᎶᎯ.
031409.english: And he that bade thee and him come and say to thee, Give this man place; and thou begin with shame to take the lowest room.
031409.phonetic: Wi-s-di-ya-nv-dv-no yi-ga-lu-gi hi-a yi-ni-tsa-we-si, Hi-ya-dla-nv-da-di-si hi-a; hna-quo-no tsa-de-ho-sv-hi ya-le-nv e-la-di ge-sv di-ni-tlv-di-yi wi-yi-lo-hi.

031410.cherokee: ᎡᏣᏯᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ, ᎮᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂᏏᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏂᏢᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏫᏣᏯᏅᏛ ᎦᎷᎨᏍᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᎢᏳᏣᏪᏎᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎩᎾᎵᎢ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏢᏍᏙᏗ ᏫᎶᎯ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᎡᏣᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏥᏂᏜᏓᎢ [ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ.]
031410.english: But when thou art bidden, go and sit down in the lowest room; that when he that bade thee cometh, he may say unto thee, Friend, go up higher: then shalt thou have worship in the presence of them that sit at meat with thee.
031410.phonetic: E-tsa-ya-ni-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni, he-ge-s-di a-le tsa-ni-si-hv-s-ge-s-di e-la-di ge-sv di-ni-tlv-di-yi; na-s-gi-no wi-tsa-ya-nv-dv ga-lu-ge-s-di, hi-a i-yu-tsa-we-se-di yi-gi, Gi-na-li-i, ga-lv-la-di-tlv-s-do-di wi-lo-hi; hna-quo e-tsa-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di a-ni-ga-ta-hv i-tsu-la-ha i-tsi-ni-dla-i [di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi.]

031411.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏓᏌᎳᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎾᏓᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏌᎳᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031411.english: For whosoever exalteth himself shall be abased; and he that humbleth himself shall be exalted.
031411.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no u-wa-sv a-da-sa-la-di-s-ge-s-di e-la-di i-ya-gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di; gi-lo-no u-wa-sv e-la-di na-da-dv-ne-he-s-di na-s-gi a-tsi-sa-la-do-di ge-se-s-di.

031412.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᏭᏯᏅᏛ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏕᎭᏕᎳᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎡᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏒ ᎡᎯ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏫᏘᏯᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᎵᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏗᏨᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏁᎾᎢ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏣᏓᎳ; ᎾᏍᏉᏰᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏱᏮᎨᏣᏯᏅ ᎠᎴ ᏴᎨᏣᎫᏴᏏ.
031412.english: Then said he also to him that bade him, When thou makest a dinner or a supper, call not thy friends, nor thy brethren, neither thy kinsmen, nor thy rich neighbours; lest they also bid thee again, and a recompence be made thee.
031412.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-quo nu-we-se-le wu-ya-nv-dv, I-yu-no de-ha-de-la-s-di-s-ge-s-di i-ga e-hi a-le u-sv e-hi, tle-s-di yi-wi-ti-ya-ni-s-ge-s-di di-tsa-li-i, a-le i-tsa-li-nv-tli, a-le go-hu-s-di di-tsv-nv, a-le tsu-ne-na-i na-v i-tsa-da-la; na-s-quo-ye-no ni-hi yi-wv-ge-tsa-ya-nv a-le yv-ge-tsa-gu-yv-si.

031413.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏕᎭᏕᎳᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏫᏘᏯᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏛ ᏗᏂᏰᎸ ᎤᏂᏲᎱᏎᎸᎯ, ᏗᏂᏲᏅᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎨᏫ;
031413.english: But when thou makest a feast, call the poor, the maimed, the lame, the blind:
031413.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni de-ha-de-la-s-di-s-ge-s-di, wi-ti-ya-ni-s-ge-s-di u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi, go-hu-s-di u-s-dv di-ni-ye-lv u-ni-yo-hu-se-lv-hi, di-ni-yo-nv-li, a-le di-ni-ge-wi;

031414.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳᏃ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏴᎦᎨᏣᎫᏴᏏ; ᎡᏣᎫᏴᎡᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏓᎾᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ.
031414.english: And thou shalt be blessed; for they cannot recompense thee: for thou shalt be recompensed at the resurrection of the just.
031414.phonetic: O-si-yu-no i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di; v-tla-ye-no yv-ga-ge-tsa-gu-yv-si; e-tsa-gu-yv-e-di-ye-no ge-se-s-di da-na-le-hi-sa-nv u-na-da-nv-ti.

031415.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎿᎭᎬᏩᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓᏅᎭ.
031415.english: And when one of them that sat at meat with him heard these things, he said unto him, Blessed is he that shall eat bread in the kingdom of God.
031415.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha u-na-li-s-da-yv-nv-hi na-s-gi u-dv-ga-nv, hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, O-si-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi na U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv na-hna gv-wa-li-s-da-yv-di ni-ga-li-s-da-nv-ha.

031416.cherokee: ᎠᎴ [ᏥᏌ] ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏚᏕᎳᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎮᎢ;
031416.english: Then said he unto him, A certain man made a great supper, and bade many:
031416.phonetic: A-le [Tsi-sa] hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya u-tsa-ti du-de-la-s-ta-ne-i, a-le u-ni-tsa-ti wi-du-ya-nv-he-i;

031417.cherokee: ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ ᎤᏅᏎ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏫᏂᏚᏪᏎᏗᏱ ᏫᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ; ᎡᏤᎾ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ.
031417.english: And sent his servant at supper time to say to them that were bidden, Come; for all things are now ready.
031417.phonetic: A-li-s-da-yv-di-yi-no ge-sv u-s-qua-lv-hv-u-nv-se u-nv-si-da-s-di hi-a wi-ni-du-we-se-di-yi wi-ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv; E-tse-na, ni-ga-di-yu-ye-no hna-quo a-dv-nv-i-s-di.

031418.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏠᏱ ᏧᎾᏢᏫᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎮ ᎤᏂᏲᎴᎢ.  ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏠᎨᏏ ᎠᎩᏩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎ ᎠᏇᏅᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᎦᏔᏅᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ; ᎬᏔᏲᏎ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏍᏇᎵᏎᏗᏱ.
031418.english: And they all with one consent began to make excuse. The first said unto him, I have bought a piece of ground, and I must needs go and see it: I pray thee have me excused.
031418.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no u-tlo-yi tsu-na-tlv-wi-s-do-di u-na-le-nv-he u-ni-yo-le-i.  I-gv-yi-yi hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, tlo-ge-si a-gi-wa-sv, a-le a-se a-que-nv-s-di a-le a-qua-ga-ta-nv-s-di ni-ga-li-s-di-ha; gv-ta-yo-se u-ne-la-gi s-que-li-se-di-yi.

031419.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᎩᎳᎾᎳ ᏩᎦ ᏓᎩᏩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎦᏁᎶᏔᏂ; ᎬᏔᏲᏎ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏍᏇᎵᏎᏗᏱ.
031419.english: And another said, I have bought five yoke of oxen, and I go to prove them: I pray thee have me excused.
031419.phonetic: Nv-wa-da-le-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, hi-s-gi i-yu-na-gi-la-na-la wa-ga da-gi-wa-sv, a-le de-ga-ne-lo-ta-ni; gv-ta-yo-se u-ne-la-gi s-que-li-se-di-yi.

031420.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎠᏆᏕᏒᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏫᎬᎩᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ.
031420.english: And another said, I have married a wife, and therefore I cannot come.
031420.phonetic: Nv-wa-da-le-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, a-qua-de-sv-nv, na-s-gi-no i-yu-s-di v-tla ye-li wi-gv-gi-lu-hi-s-di yi-gi.

031421.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎢᎤᎷᏨ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎴ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸᎢ.  ᎦᏁᎳᏃ ᎤᎾᎸᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎮᎾ ᏄᎳ ᏫᏴᎲ ᎡᎾᎢᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏍᏗ ᏕᎦᎳᏅᏛᎢ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎭᏘᏃᎸᎭ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏛ ᏗᏂᏰᎸ ᎤᏂᏲᎱᏎᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏲᎤᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎨᏫ.
031421.english: So that servant came, and shewed his lord these things. Then the master of the house being angry said to his servant, Go out quickly into the streets and lanes of the city, and bring in hither the poor, and the maimed, and the halt, and the blind.
031421.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di i-u-lu-tsv u-na-nu-go-wi-se-le u-nv-si-do-hi na-s-gi hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv-i.  Ga-ne-la-no u-na-lv-hi-yu ge-sv hi-a nu-we-se-le u-nv-si-da-s-di, He-na nu-la wi-yv-hv e-na-i-da-s-di-yi a-le tsu-s-di de-ga-la-nv-dv-i ga-du-hv-i, a-le de-ha-ti-no-lv-ha u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi, a-le go-hu-s-di u-s-dv di-ni-ye-lv u-ni-yo-hu-se-lv-hi, a-le di-ni-yo-u-li, a-le di-ni-ge-wi.

031422.cherokee: ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏍᎩᏅᏏᏙᎯ, ᏂᏣᏪᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎦᏛᎦ, ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏛ.
031422.english: And the servant said, Lord, it is done as thou hast commanded, and yet there is room.
031422.phonetic: A-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, s-gi-nv-si-do-hi, ni-tsa-we-sv na-s-gi-ya ni-ga-dv-ga, a-si-quo-no u-dla-nv-dv.

031423.cherokee: ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎯᏄᎪᎢ ᏕᎦᏅᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏐᏴᎢ ᏫᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎩᏴᏁᎸᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᏁᎸᎢ.
031423.english: And the lord said unto the servant, Go out into the highways and hedges, and compel them to come in, that my house may be filled.
031423.phonetic: U-nv-si-do-hi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le u-nv-si-da-s-di, Hi-nu-go-i de-ga-nv-hna-wa-di-sv a-le da-so-yv-i wi-lo-hi, a-le a-se u-ni-yv-s-di-yi ni-gi-yv-ne-lv-ha na-s-gi u-ka-li-i-s-di-yi tsi-ne-lv-i.

031424.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏫᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏛᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏔᏂ ᏓᏆᏕᎳᏍᏔᏅᎢ.
031424.english: For I say unto you, That none of those men which were bidden shall taste of my supper.
031424.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-tsv-we-se-ha, v-tla gi-lo na-s-gi na wi-ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv ge-sv yv-dv-na-li-s-da-yv-ta-ni da-qua-de-la-s-ta-nv-i.

031425.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎᎢ; ᎤᎦᏔᎲᏒᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ,
031425.english: And there went great multitudes with him: and he turned, and said unto them,
031425.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti-no yv-wi gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-se-i; u-ga-ta-hv-sv-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i,

031426.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᎷᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᏗᎦᏂᏆᏘᎲᎾᏃ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏙ, ᎥᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏅᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎠᎩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏱᏅᎦᎵᏍᏓ.
031426.english: If any man come to me, and hate not his father, and mother, and wife, and children, and brethren, and sisters, yea, and his own life also, he cannot be my disciple.
031426.phonetic: Gi-lo a-yv a-gi-lu-tse-he-s-di ni-di-ga-ni-qua-ti-hv-na-no i-ge-se-s-di u-do-da, a-le u-tsi, a-le u-da-li-i, a-le tsu-we-tsi, a-le a-na-li-nv-tli, a-le tsu-do, v-v, a-le u-wa-sv na-s-quo gv-nv-i, v-tla ye-li a-gi-s-da-wa-di-do-hi yi-nv-ga-li-s-da.

031427.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏧᏓᎿᎭᏩᏛ ᎾᏱᏍᎬᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎠᎩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏱᏅᎦᎵᏍᏓ.
031427.english: And whosoever doth not bear his cross, and come after me, cannot be my disciple.
031427.phonetic: A-le gi-lo u-tse-li tsu-da-hna-wa-dv na-yi-s-gv-na a-le na-gi-s-da-wa-de-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di, v-tla ye-li a-gi-s-da-wa-di-do-hi yi-nv-ga-li-s-da.

031428.cherokee: ᎦᎪᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ, ᏯᏓᏅᏖ ᎢᏅ ᎢᎦᏘ ᎤᏁᏍᎨᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏱᎦᎲᏍᎪ ᏯᏎᎯᎰ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏧᎬᏩᏔᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏩᏍᏆᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᎲᎢ.
031428.english: For which of you, intending to build a tower, sitteth not down first, and counteth the cost, whether he have sufficient to finish it?
031428.phonetic: Ga-go-ye-no hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv, ya-da-nv-te i-nv i-ga-ti u-ne-s-ge-di-yi, v-tla i-gv-yi yi-ga-hv-s-go ya-se-hi-ho i-ga-i tsu-gv-wa-ta-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, u-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi ye-li gv-wa-s-qua-di-s-do-di i-ga-i u-hv-i.

031429.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎦᎫᏍᏛᏗ ᏧᏛᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏘᏍᎩ ᏯᎾᎴᏅ ᏱᎬᏩᏕᎰᏛ,
031429.english: Lest haply, after he hath laid the foundation, and is not able to finish it, all that behold it begin to mock him,
031429.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no ga-gu-s-dv-di tsu-dv-hi yi-gi, a-le gv-wa-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi, ni-ga-dv a-ni-go-wa-ti-s-gi ya-na-le-nv yi-gv-wa-de-ho-dv,

031430.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏱᎾᏂᏫ, ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᎴᏅᎲᎩ ᎠᏁᏍᎨᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏩᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
031430.english: Saying, This man began to build, and was not able to finish.
031430.phonetic: Hi-a yi-na-ni-wi, hi-a a-s-ga-ya u-le-nv-hv-gi a-ne-s-ge-s-gv-i, a-le v-tla ye-li gv-wa-s-qua-di-s-di yi-ge-se-i.

031431.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏓᎿᎭᏩ ᏱᏅᏛᏅᏁᎵ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏱᎦᎲᏍᎪ ᎠᎴ ᏯᏓᏅᏖᏍᎪ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏓᏘᏁᎲ ᏗᎬᏩᎾᏟᏴᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎦᏘᎴᎩ ᏔᎳᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏓᏘᏁᎲᎢ.
031431.english: Or what king, going to make war against another king, sitteth not down first, and consulteth whether he be able with ten thousand to meet him that cometh against him with twenty thousand?
031431.phonetic: A-le ga-go i-yu-s-di u-gv-wi-yu-hi, da-hna-wa yi-nv-dv-nv-ne-li nv-wa-da-le u-gv-wi-yu-hi, v-tla i-gv-yi yi-ga-hv-s-go a-le ya-da-nv-te-s-go ye-li-quo a-s-go-hi i-ya-ga-yv-li da-ti-ne-hv di-gv-wa-na-tli-yv-di ge-sv tsu-ga-ti-le-gi ta-la-s-go-hi i-ya-ga-yv-li da-ti-ne-hv-i.

031432.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏏ ᏐᎢ ᎢᏅᎯᏳ ᏨᏣᎢᏐᎢ, ᏕᎦᏅᏍᎪ ᏧᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᏔᏲᎯᎰ ᏙᎯᏱ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ.
031432.english: Or else, while the other is yet a great way off, he sendeth an ambassage, and desireth conditions of peace.
031432.phonetic: I-yu-no ye-li ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi, a-si so-i i-nv-hi-yu tsv-tsa-i-so-i, de-ga-nv-s-go tsu-nv-si-dv a-ta-yo-hi-ho do-hi-yi i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi.

031433.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏂᏚᏲᏐᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎠᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᏱᏅᎦᎵᏍᏓ.
031433.english: So likewise, whosoever he be of you that forsaketh not all that he hath, he cannot be my disciple.
031433.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-hi, i-yu-no gi-lo ni-du-yo-so-hv-s-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di ni-ga-dv u-tse-li ge-sv-i, v-tla ye-li a-gi-s-da-wa-de-gi yi-nv-ga-li-s-da.

031434.cherokee: ~ᎠᎹ ᎣᏏᏳ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ~ᎠᎹ ᏳᏥᏍᎪᎸ, ᎦᏙ ᏘᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ~ᎠᎹ ᏯᏙᏢᎾ.
031434.english: Salt is good: but if the salt have lost his savour, wherewith shall it be seasoned?
031434.phonetic: ~A-ma o-si-yu; i-yu-s-gi-ni ~a-ma yu-tsi-s-go-lv, ga-do ti-ga-li-s-do-da ~a-ma ya-do-tlv-na.

031435.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏠᎨᏏ ᎦᎳᎨᏯᏛᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎦᏓ ᎦᏡᎬ ᎬᏗ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ; ᏭᎾᏕᎪᏉ.  ᎩᎶ ᏕᎦᎵᎷᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏛᎪᏗᏱ ᏩᏛᎬᎦ.
031435.english: It is neither fit for the land, nor yet for the dunghill; but men cast it out. He that hath ears to hear, let him hear.
031435.phonetic: V-tla hna-quo tlo-ge-si ga-la-ge-ya-dv-di a-le o-s-dv ga-da ga-tlu-gv gv-di yi-ge-so-i; wu-na-de-go-quo.  Gi-lo de-ga-li-lu-ge-s-di u-dv-go-di-yi wa-dv-gv-ga.

031501.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᎥ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏕᎸ ᎠᏂᎩᏏᏙᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᎬᏩᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
031501.english: Then drew near unto him all the publicans and sinners for to hear him.
031501.phonetic: Hna-quo-no na-v gv-wa-lu-tse-le ni-ga-dv a-de-lv a-ni-gi-si-do-hi a-le a-ni-s-ga-na gv-wa-dv-da-s-da-ne-di-yi.

031502.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏄᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏐᏅᏤᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏓᏓᏂᎸᎪ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎪᎢ.
031502.english: And the Pharisees and scribes murmured, saying, This man receiveth sinners, and eateth with them.
031502.phonetic: A-ni-qua-li-si-no a-le di-nu-we-li-s-gi u-ni-so-nv-tse-le hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, hi-a a-s-ga-ya da-da-ni-lv-go a-ni-s-ga-na-i, a-le i-tsu-la-ha a-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-go-i.

031503.english: And he spake this parable unto them, saying,

031504.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᏱᏚᎾᏝᎠ ᎤᏂᏃᏕᎾ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏌᏉ ᏳᏲᎱᏎᎸ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏗᎬᏕᎪ ᎢᎾᎨ ᎠᏁᏙᎲ ᏐᎣᏁᎳᏍᎪᎯ ᏐᎣᏁᎳᎦᎵ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏳᏲᎴᎪ ᎤᏲᎱᏎᎸᎯ, ᎬᏂ ᎠᏩᏛ?
031504.english: What man of you, having an hundred sheep, if he lose one of them, doth not leave the ninety and nine in the wilderness, and go after that which is lost, until he find it?
031504.phonetic: Ga-go hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv, a-s-go-hi-tsu-qui yi-du-na-tla-a u-ni-no-de-na, i-yu-no sa-quo yu-yo-hu-se-lv, v-tla yi-di-gv-de-go i-na-ge a-ne-do-hv so-o-ne-la-s-go-hi so-o-ne-la-ga-li i-ya-ni-dv, a-le yu-yo-le-go u-yo-hu-se-lv-hi, gv-ni a-wa-dv?

031505.english: And when he hath found it, he layeth it on his shoulders, rejoicing.

031506.cherokee: ᎥᎦᎷᎩᏃ ᎤᏪᏅᏒ ᏫᏓᏯᏂᏍᎪ ᏧᎵᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏳᎾᏓᎳ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏕᎦᏪᏎᎰᎢ, ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏓᎵᎮᎵᎩ; ᎢᏥᏩᏛᎲᏰᏃ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ ᏣᎩᏲᎱᏎᎲᎩ.
031506.english: And when he cometh home, he calleth together his friends and neighbours, saying unto them, Rejoice with me; for I have found my sheep which was lost.
031506.phonetic: V-ga-lu-gi-no u-we-nv-sv wi-da-ya-ni-s-go tsu-li-i a-le na-v i-yu-na-da-la, hi-a ni-de-ga-we-se-ho-i, I-tsu-la-ha i-da-li-he-li-gi; i-tsi-wa-dv-hv-ye-no u-no-de-na tsa-gi-yo-hu-se-hv-gi.

031507.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎾᎾᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏦᏒ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎦᏁᏟᏴᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏐᎣᏁᎳᏍᎪᎯ ᏐᎣᏁᎳᎦᎵ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᏧᏂᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎲᎾ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
031507.english: I say unto you, that likewise joy shall be in heaven over one sinner that repenteth, more than over ninety and nine just persons, which need no repentance.
031507.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-se-ha, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni u-tli-hi-yu na-na-li-he-li-ge-s-di ga-lv-la-di tso-sv sa-quo a-s-ga-na ga-ne-tli-yv-s-ge-s-di u-da-nv-dv-i, e-s-ga-quo i-yv-dv so-o-ne-la-s-go-hi so-o-ne-la-ga-li i-ya-ni-dv u-na-da-nv-ti a-ni-s-ga-ya tsu-ni-ne-tli-yv-s-di nu-na-li-s-da-ne-hv-na du-na-da-nv-dv-i.

031508.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᏱᏚᎭ ᎠᎩᏏ ᏧᎾᎬᏩᎶᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏌᏉ ᏳᏲᎱᏎᎸ, ᎥᏝ ᏯᏨᏍᏛᏍᎪ ᎠᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏱᎬᏃᏌᏍᎪ ᎦᎵᏦᏕ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏗ ᏳᏲᎰ ᎬᏂ ᎠᏩᏛ?
031508.english: Either what woman having ten pieces of silver, if she lose one piece, doth not light a candle, and sweep the house, and seek diligently till she find it?
031508.phonetic: A-le ga-go i-yu-s-di a-ge-yv a-s-go-hi yi-du-ha a-gi-si tsu-na-gv-wa-lo-di, i-yu-no sa-quo yu-yo-hu-se-lv, v-tla ya-tsv-s-dv-s-go a-tsv-s-do-di a-le yi-gv-no-sa-s-go ga-li-tso-de, a-le u-li-si-na-hi-s-di yu-yo-ho gv-ni a-wa-dv?

031509.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏩᏛ ᏫᏓᏯᏂᏍᎪ ᏧᎵᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏳᎾᏓᎳ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎪᎢ, ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏓᎵᎮᎵᎩ; ᎠᎩᏩᏛᎲᏰᏃ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏣᎩᏲᎱᏎᎲᎩ.
031509.english: And when she hath found it, she calleth her friends and her neighbours together, saying, Rejoice with me; for I have found the piece which I had lost.
031509.phonetic: I-yu-no a-wa-dv wi-da-ya-ni-s-go tsu-li-i a-le na-v i-yu-na-da-la, hi-a ni-ga-we-s-go-i, I-tsu-la-ha i-da-li-he-li-gi; a-gi-wa-dv-hv-ye-no a-de-lv tsa-gi-yo-hu-se-hv-gi.

031510.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎪ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎦᏁᏟᏴᎾ ᎤᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
031510.english: Likewise, I say unto you, there is joy in the presence of the angels of God over one sinner that repenteth.
031510.phonetic: Na-s-quo-s-gi-ni i-tsv-yo-se-ha a-na-li-he-li-go di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga sa-quo a-s-ga-na ga-ne-tli-yv-na u-da-nv-dv-i.

031511.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏁᎮᎢ.
031511.english: And he said, A certain man had two sons:
031511.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, Gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya a-ni-ta-li tsu-we-tsi a-ni-s-ga-ya a-ne-he-i.

031512.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏃ ᎡᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎤᏙᏓ, ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏣᎲᎢ ᏍᎩᎲᏏ.  ᏔᎵᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏕᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᎲᎢ.
031512.english: And the younger of them said to his father, Father, give me the portion of goods that falleth to me. And he divided unto them his living.
031512.phonetic: O-ni-no e-hi hi-a nu-we-se-le u-do-da, E-do-da, a-qua-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv tsu-gv-wa-lo-di tsa-hv-i s-gi-hv-si.  Ta-li-no ni-du-we-de-le ni-ga-v tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-hv-i.

031513.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏉᏃ ᏫᏄᏒᎸ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎣᏂ ᎡᎯ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏪᏟᏌᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎩᏎ ᎢᏅ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᏄᏁᎸᎾ ᎡᎲᎢ ᏭᏤᏫᏙᎴ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᎲᎢ.
031513.english: And not many days after the younger son gathered all together, and took his journey into a far country, and there wasted his substance with riotous living.
031513.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-quo-no wi-nu-sv-lv u-we-tsi o-ni e-hi ni-ga-dv u-we-tli-sa-ne-i, a-le u-ni-gi-se i-nv wu-lo-se-i, na-hna-no nu-ne-lv-na e-hv-i wu-tse-wi-do-le tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-hv-i.

031514.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏤᏬᏅ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏚᎪᏄᎶᏎ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ, ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎤᏚᎸᎲᏁᎢ.
031514.english: And when he had spent all, there arose a mighty famine in that land; and he began to be in want.
031514.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-dv u-tse-wo-nv u-tsa-ti du-go-nu-lo-se na-hna-ni, hna-quo-no u-le-nv-he u-du-lv-hv-ne-i.

031515.cherokee: ᎤᏪᏅᏎᏃ ᎤᎵᎪᏁᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᎯ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ; ᏙᏧᎶᎨᏒᏃ ᏏᏆ ᏗᎨᎶᎸ ᎤᏅᏎᎢ.
031515.english: And he went and joined himself to a citizen of that country; and he sent him into his fields to feed swine.
031515.phonetic: U-we-nv-se-no u-li-go-ne-le na-hna e-hi a-s-ga-ya; do-tsu-lo-ge-sv-no si-qua di-ge-lo-lv u-nv-se-i.

031516.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨ ᏧᏪᏰᏍᏗᏱ ᎧᎵᏎᏥ ᎤᎾᏓᏛᏅᎯ ᏏᏆ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏚᏅᏁᎮᎢ.
031516.english: And he would fain have filled his belly with the husks that the swine did eat: and no man gave unto him.
031516.phonetic: A-le u-du-li-s-ge tsu-we-ye-s-di-yi ka-li-se-tsi u-na-da-dv-nv-hi si-qua u-na-li-s-da-yv-di, a-se-no v-tla gi-lo yi-du-nv-ne-he-i.

031517.cherokee: ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏌᏅᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏄᏂᏣᏔ ᎨᎦᎫᏴᎡᎯ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᎭ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ, ᎠᏴᏃ ᎠᎪᏄᏉ ᎠᎩᎯᎭ!
031517.english: And when he came to himself, he said, How many hired servants of my father's have bread enough and to spare, and I perish with hunger!
031517.phonetic: U-da-nv-ti-sa-nv-no hi-a nu-we-se-i; Nu-ni-tsa-ta ge-ga-gu-yv-e-hi ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di e-do-da tsu-tse-li-ga u-lo-sv-s-ta-nv-hi u-ni-ha u-na-li-s-da-yv-di, a-yv-no a-go-nu-quo a-gi-hi-ha!

031518.cherokee: ᏙᏓᎦᎴᏂ, ᎡᏙᏓ ᏮᏓᏥᎷᏤᎵ, ᎯᎠ ᏫᏅᏓᏥᏪᏎᎵ; ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏥᏍᎦᏅᏤᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎯᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
031518.english: I will arise and go to my father, and will say unto him, Father, I have sinned against heaven, and before thee,
031518.phonetic: Do-da-ga-le-ni, e-do-da wv-da-tsi-lu-tse-li, hi-a wi-nv-da-tsi-we-se-li; E-do-da, Ga-lv-la-di tsi-s-ga-nv-tse-lv, a-le ni-hi hi-ga-ta-hv-i.

031519.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏰᎵ ᎠᏇᏥ ᎨᏍᏉᏎᏗ ᏱᎩ; ᏘᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗᏉ ᏔᎫᏴᎡᎯ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏍᏋᎦ.
031519.english: And am no more worthy to be called thy son: make me as one of thy hired servants.
031519.phonetic: A-le v-tla hna-quo ye-li a-que-tsi ge-s-quo-se-di yi-gi; ti-nv-si-da-s-di-quo ta-gu-yv-e-hi nu-na-s-dv na-s-gi-ya ni-s-quv-ga.

031520.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏚᎴᏁ ᎤᏙᏓ ᏭᎷᏤᎴᎢ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏏ ᎢᏅᎯᏳ ᏣᎢᏎᎢ ᎤᏙᏓ ᏭᎪᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏙᎵᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏍᏆᎸᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎵᎨᏂ ᎤᏪᏯᎸᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏔᏪᏙᏁᎢ.
031520.english: And he arose, and came to his father. But when he was yet a great way off, his father saw him, and had compassion, and ran, and fell on his neck, and kissed him.
031520.phonetic: A-le du-le-ne u-do-da wu-lu-tse-le-i.  A-se-no a-si i-nv-hi-yu tsa-i-se-i u-do-da wu-go-he-i, a-le u-we-do-li-tse-i, a-le du-s-qua-lv-ta-ne-i, a-le a-gi-li-ge-ni u-we-ya-lv-tse-i, a-le u-ta-we-do-ne-i.

031521.cherokee: ᎤᏪᏥᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏥᏍᎦᏅᏤᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎯᎦᏔᎲᎢ; ᎠᎴ Ꮭ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏇᏥ ᎨᏍᏉᏎᏗ ᏱᎩ.
031521.english: And the son said unto him, Father, I have sinned against heaven, and in thy sight, and am no more worthy to be called thy son.
031521.phonetic: U-we-tsi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; E-do-da, Ga-lv-la-di tsi-s-ga-nv-tse-lv, a-le ni-hi hi-ga-ta-hv-i; a-le tla hna-quo a-que-tsi ge-s-quo-se-di yi-gi.

031522.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ; ᎣᏌᏂ ᎠᏄᏬ ᏫᏥᎾᎩ, ᎡᏥᏄᏬᏣ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᏰᏑᏍᏙᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏤᏣᎳᏑᎸᎦ.
031522.english: But the father said to his servants, Bring forth the best robe, and put it on him; and put a ring on his hand, and shoes on his feet:
031522.phonetic: A-se-no u-do-da hi-a ni-du-we-se-le tsu-nv-si-da-s-di; O-sa-ni a-nu-wo wi-tsi-na-gi, e-tsi-nu-wo-tsa, a-le e-tsi-ye-su-s-do-ga, a-le tse-tsa-la-su-lv-ga.

031523.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎵᏦᏔᏅᎯ ᏩᎦ ᎠᎩᎾ ᏫᏥᏯᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᎷᎦ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᏓᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᎦ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏓᏓ.
031523.english: And bring hither the fatted calf, and kill it; and let us eat, and be merry:
031523.phonetic: A-le ga-li-tso-ta-nv-hi wa-ga a-gi-na wi-tsi-ya-nv, a-le e-tsi-lu-ga; a-le i-da-li-s-da-yv-hv-ga, o-s-dv i-da-da-nv-da-da.

031524.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎠᏇᏥ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎢᎡᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏓᏠᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎢᎠᏥᏩᏛᎲᏃ; ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎮᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏓᏕᎢ.
031524.english: For this my son was dead, and is alive again; he was lost, and is found. And they began to be merry.
031524.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no a-que-tsi u-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-sv-gi, ta-li-ne-no i-e-ha, a-le e-da-tlo-tsv-hi ge-sv-gi, i-a-tsi-wa-dv-hv-no; u-na-le-nv-he-no o-s-dv u-na-da-nv-da-de-i.

031525.cherokee: ᎤᏓᏂᎵᎨᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏪᏙᎮᎢ; ᏗᎤᏪᏅᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎾᎥ ᎤᎷᏨ, ᏓᏂᏃᎩᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᎩᏍᎬ ᎤᏛᎦᏁᎢ
031525.english: Now his elder son was in the field: and as he came and drew nigh to the house, he heard musick and dancing.
031525.phonetic: U-da-ni-li-ge-no u-we-tsi tlo-ge-si we-do-he-i; di-u-we-nv-no a-le a-da-ne-lv na-v u-lu-tsv, da-ni-no-gi-s-gv a-le a-na-li-s-gi-s-gv u-dv-ga-ne-i

031526.cherokee: ᏭᏯᏅᎮᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏛᏛᏁ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ.
031526.english: And he called one of the servants, and asked what these things meant.
031526.phonetic: Wu-ya-nv-he-no a-si-yv-wi a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le u-dv-dv-ne u-ye-lv-dv na-s-gi na-na-dv-ne-hv-i.

031527.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎡᏣᏅᏟ ᎤᎷᏨ, ᏣᏙᏓᏃ ᎦᎵᏦᏔᏅᎯ ᏩᎦ ᎠᎩᎾ ᎤᎸ, ᏙᎯᏱ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏥᎸ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
031527.english: And he said unto him, Thy brother is come; and thy father hath killed the fatted calf, because he hath received him safe and sound.
031527.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; E-tsa-nv-tli u-lu-tsv, tsa-do-da-no ga-li-tso-ta-nv-hi wa-ga a-gi-na u-lv, do-hi-yi u-na-nu-go-tsi-lv i-yu-s-di.

031528.cherokee: ᎤᏔᎳᏬᏎᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏄᏴᎸᎾᏉ ᎨᏎᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏙᏓ ᏧᏄᎪᏤ ᎤᏍᏗᏰᏔᏁᎢ.
031528.english: And he was angry, and would not go in: therefore came his father out, and intreated him.
031528.phonetic: U-ta-la-wo-se-no, a-le wi-nu-yv-lv-na-quo ge-se-i; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-do-da tsu-nu-go-tse u-s-di-ye-ta-ne-i.

031529.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎤᏙᏓ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎤᏣᏔ ᎾᏕᏘᏴ ᎬᏍᏕᎸᎯᏓ, ᎠᎴᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎾᏉᎯᏳᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ ᏣᏁᏨᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎠᏫ-ᎠᎩᎾ ᎠᏎᏄᎸᎯ ᏱᏍᎩᎧᏁᎶᎢ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᏗᏆᎵᎢ.
031529.english: And he answering said to his father, Lo, these many years do I serve thee, neither transgressed I at any time thy commandment: and yet thou never gavest me a kid, that I might make merry with my friends:
031529.phonetic: U-ne-tsv-no hi-a nu-we-se-le u-do-da; Gv-ni-yu-quo u-tsa-ta na-de-ti-yv gv-s-de-lv-hi-da, a-le-v-tla i-lv-hi-yu na-quo-hi-yu-nv-na yi-gi tsa-ne-tsv-i, a-se-no v-tla i-lv-hi-yu a-wi--a-gi-na a-se-nu-lv-hi yi-s-gi-ka-ne-lo-i, o-s-dv o-ga-da-nv-da-di-s-do-di di-qua-li-i.

031530.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᏤᏥ ᎤᎷᏦᏅᎯᏉ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏒᏁᎸᎯ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᏂᎨᏴᎯ ᎤᏂᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎤᏪᎳᏗᏙᎸᎢ, ᎢᎯᎡᎸ ᎦᎵᏦᏔᏅᎯ ᏩᎦ ᎠᎩᎾ.
031530.english: But as soon as this thy son was come, which hath devoured thy living with harlots, thou hast killed for him the fatted calf.
031530.phonetic: Hi-a-s-gi-ni tse-tsi u-lu-tso-nv-hi-quo, na-s-gi tsa-sv-ne-lv-hi tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-ni-ge-yv-hi u-ni-ne-gu-tsi-dv u-we-la-di-do-lv-i, i-hi-e-lv ga-li-tso-ta-nv-hi wa-ga a-gi-na.

031531.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏇᏥ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸᏉ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏂᏁᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏤᎵᏉ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎩᎾᎥᎢ.
031531.english: And he said unto him, Son, thou art ever with me, and all that I have is thine.
031531.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le-i; A-que-tsi, ni-go-hi-lv-quo i-tsu-la-ha i-ni-ne-lv, a-le tsa-tse-li-quo ni-ga-v a-gi-na-v-i.

031532.cherokee: ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᎦᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏱ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎡᏣᏅᏟ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎢᎡᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏓᏠᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᎠᏥᏩᏛᎲᏃ.
031532.english: It was meet that we should make merry, and be glad: for this thy brother was dead, and is alive again; and was lost, and is found.
031532.phonetic: Du-yu-go-dv-gi o-s-dv i-ga-da-nv-da-di-s-di-yi, a-le i-gi-li-he-li-s-di-yi; hi-a-ye-no e-tsa-nv-tli u-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-sv-gi, ta-li-ne-no i-e-ha, a-le e-da-tlo-tsv-hi ge-sv-i, i-a-tsi-wa-dv-hv-no.

031601.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎡᎮ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᎧᎮ ᎤᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏕᎩ ᎤᎿᎭᎥᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᎳᏫᏎᎲ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏓᏤᏪᎸ ᎠᏥᏃᏁᎴᎢ.
031601.english: And he said also unto his disciples, There was a certain rich man, which had a steward; and the same was accused unto him that he had wasted his goods.
031601.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo hi-a ni-du-we-se-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, Gi-lo i-yu-s-di e-he u-we-hna-i a-s-ga-ya na-s-gi u-we-ka-he u-ga-sa-ya-s-di-de-gi u-hna-v-i; a-le na-s-gi a-tsi-la-wi-se-hv tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-da-tse-we-lv a-tsi-no-ne-le-i.

031602.cherokee: ᏭᏯᏅᎮᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᏥᎬᏯᏛᎩᎭ?  ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᎦ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏕᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎪᎯᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏕᎩ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031602.english: And he called him, and said unto him, How is it that I hear this of thee? give an account of thy stewardship; for thou mayest be no longer steward.
031602.phonetic: Wu-ya-nv-he-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ga-do di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha tsi-nu-s-di tsi-gv-ya-dv-gi-ha?  Gv-ni-ge-sv nv-ga nu-s-dv de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-di-de-gi ge-sv-i; go-hi-ye-no i-yu-da-le-nv-dv v-tla hna-quo tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-di-de-gi yi-ge-se-s-di.

031603.cherokee: ᎤᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏕᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏧᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏓᎦᏛᏁᎵ, ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏙᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᎩᎡᎭ ᎠᏆᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏕᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᏝᏃ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏆᏍᎪᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ; ᎠᏆᏚᎳᏗᏓᏍᏗᏱᏃ ᎢᎦᏕᎣᏍᎦ.
031603.english: Then the steward said within himself, What shall I do? for my lord taketh away from me the stewardship: I cannot dig; to beg I am ashamed.
031603.phonetic: U-ga-sa-ya-s-di-de-gi-no hi-a nu-we-se u-wa-sv tsu-da-nv-dv-i, Ga-do da-ga-dv-ne-li, a-gi-nv-si-do-hi-ye-no a-gi-gi-e-ha a-qua-ga-sa-ya-s-di-de-gi ge-sv-i?  Tla-no ye-li gv-qua-s-go-s-di yi-gi; a-qua-du-la-di-da-s-di-yi-no i-ga-de-o-s-ga.

031604.cherokee: ᏕᎫᎪᏓ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᎩᏌᏕᏒ ᎠᏆᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏕᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎦᎬᏆᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏓᏂᏁᎸᎢ.
031604.english: I am resolved what to do, that, when I am put out of the stewardship, they may receive me into their houses.
031604.phonetic: De-gu-go-da i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di-yi, na-s-gi v-gi-sa-de-sv a-qua-ga-sa-ya-s-di-de-gi ge-sv di-ga-gv-qua-da-ni-lv-i-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi da-ni-ne-lv-i.

031605.cherokee: ᎰᏩᏃ ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎮ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᏧᏚᎩ, ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᎳᎪ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏣᏚᎦ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏙᎯ.
031605.english: So he called every one of his lord's debtors unto him, and said unto the first, How much owest thou unto my lord?
031605.phonetic: Ho-wa-no wi-du-ya-nv-he ni-ga-dv u-nv-si-do-hi tsu-du-gi, i-gv-yi-yi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, I-la-go i-ga-i tsa-du-ga a-gi-nv-si-do-hi.

031606.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎪᎢ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎾᎩ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎡᏣᏚᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎳ ᎯᎲᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᏍᎩᏍᎪᎯ ᎰᏪᎸᎦ.
031606.english: And he said, An hundred measures of oil. And he said unto him, Take thy bill, and sit down quickly, and write fifty.
031606.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, A-s-go-hi-tsu-qui i-yu-tli-lo-dv go-i.  Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, hi-na-gi go-we-li e-tsa-du-gv-i, a-le nu-la hi-hv-ga, a-le hi-s-gi-s-go-hi ho-we-lv-ga.

031607.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏂᎯᎾ ᎢᎳᎪ ᎡᏣᏚᎦ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎤᏣᎴᏍᏗ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᎾᎩ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎡᏣᏚᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏁᎳᏍᎪᎯ ᎰᏪᎸᎦ.
031607.english: Then said he to another, And how much owest thou? And he said, An hundred measures of wheat. And he said unto him, Take thy bill, and write fourscore.
031607.phonetic: Nv-wa-da-le-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, ni-hi-na i-la-go e-tsa-du-ga?  Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, a-s-go-hi-tsu-qui i-yu-tli-lo-dv u-tsa-le-s-di.  Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le-i, Hi-na-gi go-we-li e-tsa-du-gv-i, a-le ne-la-s-go-hi ho-we-lv-ga.

031608.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏜᏓᎢᏃ ᎤᎸᏉᏔᏁ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎢᏯᏛᎾᎯ ᎤᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏕᎩ, ᎤᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏍᎨ ᎤᏏᎾᏌᏅᏨᎢ; ᎡᎶᎯᏰᏃ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᎤᏟ ᎾᏂᏏᎾᏌᏅ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ ᏧᏪᏥ.
031608.english: And the lord commended the unjust steward, because he had done wisely: for the children of this world are in their generation wiser than the children of light.
031608.phonetic: U-na-dla-i-no u-lv-quo-ta-ne ni-du-yu-go-dv-na i-ya-dv-na-hi u-ga-sa-ya-s-di-de-gi, u-di-ga-li-s-do-s-ge u-si-na-sa-nv-tsv-i; e-lo-hi-ye-no tsu-we-tsi u-nv-sv a-ne-hv-i, u-tli na-ni-si-na-sa-nv e-s-ga-quo i-ga-ga-ti tsu-we-tsi.

031609.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎢᏣᎵᎢᏓ ᎤᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏍᎦ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏩᏕᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎨᏣᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031609.english: And I say unto you, Make to yourselves friends of the mammon of unrighteousness; that, when ye fail, they may receive you into everlasting habitations.
031609.phonetic: A-le i-tsv-yo-se-ha, i-tsa-li-i-da u-da-li-da-s-di ge-nv-i-s-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi e-s-ga ni-tsa-li-s-da-ne-lv u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na wa-de-di-yi ge-sv ga-ge-tsa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di ge-se-s-di.

031610.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎦᏲᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎾᏛᏁᎰ ᎤᎪᏗᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾᏃ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎾᏛᏁᎰ ᎤᎪᏗᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031610.english: He that is faithful in that which is least is faithful also in much: and he that is unjust in the least is unjust also in much.
031610.phonetic: Gi-lo du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi ga-yo-li ge-sv-i, na-s-quo du-yu-go-dv na-dv-ne-ho u-go-di-di ge-sv-i; ni-du-yu-go-dv-na-no i-ya-dv-ne-hi u-s-di ge-sv, na-s-quo ni-du-yu-go-dv-na na-dv-ne-ho u-go-di-di ge-sv-i.

031611.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎦᎪ ᏱᏥᎦᏘᏗᏍᏓ ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
031611.english: If therefore ye have not been faithful in the unrighteous mammon, who will commit to your trust the true riches?
031611.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no du-yu-go-dv ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv-na i-ge-se-s-di u-da-li-da-s-di ge-nv-i-s-di ge-sv go-hu-s-di i-tsv-di-s-gv-i, ga-go yi-tsi-ga-ti-di-s-da nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na ge-nv-i-s-di ge-sv-i?

031612.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸᎾ ᏱᎩ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎪ ᏓᏥᏁᎵ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ?
031612.english: And if ye have not been faithful in that which is another man's, who shall give you that which is your own?
031612.phonetic: I-yu-no du-yu-go-dv ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv-na yi-gi nv-wa-da-le u-tse-li-ga ge-sv-i, ga-go da-tsi-ne-li i-tsv-sv i-tsa-tse-li ge-sv-i?

031613.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏰᎵ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎬᏩᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏙᎬᏛᏂᏏ; ᏱᎠᏍᎦᎦᏰᏃ ᏌᏉ ᏱᎤᎨᏳᎭᏃ ᏐᎢ; ᏱᏙᎤᏂᏴᏆᎴ ᏌᏉ ᏱᎦᏂᏆᏘᎭᏃ ᏐᎢ.  ᏝᏍᎩᏂ ᏰᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎹᎹᏂ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏙᎨᏣᏛᏂᏏ.
031613.english: No servant can serve two masters: for either he will hate the one, and love the other; or else he will hold to the one, and despise the other. Ye cannot serve God and mammon.
031613.phonetic: V-tla gi-lo a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di ye-li a-ni-ta-li gv-wa-nv-si-do-hi go-hu-s-di yi-do-gv-dv-ni-si; yi-a-s-ga-ga-ye-no sa-quo yi-u-ge-yu-ha-no so-i; yi-do-u-ni-yv-qua-le sa-quo yi-ga-ni-qua-ti-ha-no so-i.  Tla-s-gi-ni ye-li U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le ma-ma-ni go-hu-s-di yi-do-ge-tsa-dv-ni-si.

031614.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏕᎸ ᎤᏂᎬᎥᏍᎩ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏁᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏕᎰᏔᏁᎢ.
031614.english: And the Pharisees also, who were covetous, heard all these things: and they derided him.
031614.phonetic: A-ni-qua-li-si-no na-s-quo, na-s-gi a-de-lv u-ni-gv-v-s-gi tsi-ge-se-i, na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv u-na-dv-ga-ne-i; a-le gv-wa-de-ho-ta-ne-i.

031615.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎧᏂ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᎯ ᏅᏩᏍᏙᎢ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏓᎦᏔᎭ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏧᏂᏰᎸᏐ ᏴᏫ, ᎤᏂᏆᏘᏍᏗᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏓᎧᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
031615.english: And he said unto them, Ye are they which justify yourselves before men; but God knoweth your hearts: for that which is highly esteemed among men is abomination in the sight of God.
031615.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ni-hi ka-ni du-yu-go-dv i-tsa-dv-ne-hi nv-wa-s-do-i yv-wi a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni da-ga-ta-ha di-tsi-na-wi; na-s-gi-ye-no ga-lv-quo-di-yu tsu-ni-ye-lv-so yv-wi, u-ni-qua-ti-s-di-yu U-ne-la-nv-hi da-ka-ni-s-gv-i.

031616.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏕᏤᎲᎩ ᏣᏂ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏥᎸ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ; ᎾᎯᏳ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᎭ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎾᏁᎷᎩ ᎠᏂᏴᎯᎭ.
031616.english: The law and the prophets were until John: since that time the kingdom of God is preached, and every man presseth into it.
031616.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi de-tse-hv-gi Tsa-ni u-na-nu-go-tsi-lv i-ya-s-di; na-hi-yu nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv a-ni-no-he-ha a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ga, a-le na-ni-v yv-wi a-na-ne-lu-gi a-ni-yv-hi-ha.

031617.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏟ ᎠᎯᏗᏳ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏂᎶᏐᎲᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
031617.english: And it is easier for heaven and earth to pass, than one tittle of the law to fail.
031617.phonetic: A-le u-tli a-hi-di-yu ga-lv-lo-i a-le e-lo-hi u-ni-lo-so-hv-s-di-yi, a-no sa-quo u-s-di-ka-ni di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di e-s-ga i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

031618.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎢᎠᏓᎡᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎠᏓᏰᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏓᏲᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᎦᏓᎢᏅᏛ ᎠᏓᏰᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏲᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
031618.english: Whosoever putteth away his wife, and marrieth another, committeth adultery: and whosoever marrieth her that is put away from her husband committeth adultery.
031618.phonetic: Gi-lo u-da-li-i i-a-da-e-ge-s-di, a-le nv-wa-da-le a-da-ye-ge-s-di, a-da-yo-ne-he-s-di; gi-lo-no a-ga-da-i-nv-dv a-da-ye-ge-s-di a-da-yo-ne-he-s-di.

031619.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢ ᎡᎮᎢ, ᎩᎦᎨ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏏᏙᎵ ᏙᎴᏛ ᏗᏄᏬ ᏓᏄᏬᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏓᏙᏓᏈᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏓᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᎢ.
031619.english: There was a certain rich man, which was clothed in purple and fine linen, and fared sumptuously every day:
031619.phonetic: Gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya u-we-hna-i e-he-i, gi-ga-ge a-le u-si-do-li do-le-dv di-nu-wo da-nu-wo-s-ge-i, a-le ni-da-do-da-qui-sv o-s-dv da-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-i.

031620.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᎮ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎳᏏᎳ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏂᏏᏁ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏧᏥᏓᎳ ᎨᏎᎢ,
031620.english: And there was a certain beggar named Lazarus, which was laid at his gate, full of sores,
031620.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo e-he gi-lo i-yu-s-di u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi La-si-la tsu-do-i-dv, na-s-gi a-tsi-ni-si-ne u-we-hna-i u-tse-li ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi, tsu-tsi-da-la ge-se-i,

031621.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨ ᎠᎨᎳᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏅᎪᎣᏒᎯ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢ ᎤᏪᏍᎩᎸᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎩᎵ ᎤᏂᎷᏤ ᏚᏂᎦᎾᏕ ᏚᏥᏓᎸᎢ.
031621.english: And desiring to be fed with the crumbs which fell from the rich man's table: moreover the dogs came and licked his sores.
031621.phonetic: A-le u-du-li-s-ge a-ge-la-s-do-di-yi u-nv-go-o-sv-hi u-we-hna-i u-we-s-gi-lv-i; a-le na-s-quo gi-li u-ni-lu-tse du-ni-ga-na-de du-tsi-da-lv-i.

031622.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏩᏅᏎ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎦᏁᏥᎢ ᏫᎬᏪᎧᏁᎢ.  ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏲᎱᏎᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᏂᏌᏁᎢ.
031622.english: And it came to pass, that the beggar died, and was carried by the angels into Abraham's bosom: the rich man also died, and was buried;
031622.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i; na-s-gi u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi u-yo-hu-se-i, a-le di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi gv-wa-nv-se E-qua-ha-mi ga-ne-tsi-i wi-gv-we-ka-ne-i.  U-we-hna-i-no na-s-quo u-yo-hu-se-i a-le a-tsi-ni-sa-ne-i.

031623.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏨᏍᎩᏃᎢ ᏚᏌᎳᏓᏁ ᏗᎦᏙᎵ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᏅ ᏭᎪᎮ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ, ᎠᎴ ᎳᏏᎳ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎦᏁᏥᎢ.
031623.english: And in hell he lift up his eyes, being in torments, and seeth Abraham afar off, and Lazarus in his bosom.
031623.phonetic: A-le tsv-s-gi-no-i du-sa-la-da-ne di-ga-do-li a-gi-li-yo-ge-i, a-le na-hna i-nv wu-go-he E-qua-ha-mi, a-le La-si-la E-qua-ha-mi ga-ne-tsi-i.

031624.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᎷᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎡᏙᏓ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ, ᏍᎩᏙᎵᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎯᏅᎵ ᎳᏏᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᎪᎵ ᎦᏰᏌᏛ ᎠᎼᎯ ᏩᎱᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᏩᎩᏙᎣᎸᏍᏓᏏ ᏥᏃᎪᎢ; ᏥᎩᎵᏲᎦᏰᏃ ᎠᏂ ᎠᏓᏪᎵᎩᏍᎬᎢ.
031624.english: And he cried and said, Father Abraham, have mercy on me, and send Lazarus, that he may dip the tip of his finger in water, and cool my tongue; for I am tormented in this flame.
031624.phonetic: A-le u-we-lu-ne hi-a nu-we-se-i; E-do-da E-qua-ha-mi, s-gi-do-li-gi, a-le e-hi-nv-li La-si-la, a-le na-s-gi u-s-go-li ga-ye-sa-dv a-mo-hi wa-hu-da, a-le wa-gi-do-o-lv-s-da-si tsi-no-go-i; tsi-gi-li-yo-ga-ye-no a-ni a-da-we-li-gi-s-gv-i.

031625.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᏇᏥ, ᎭᏅᏓᏓ, ᏂᎯ ᎠᏏ ᏣᎴᏂᏙᎲᎩ ᎯᏩᏘᏍᎬ ᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎣᏍᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎳᏏᎳ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏩᏘᏍᎬᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏲᎢ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏥᏄᏬᎯᏍᏔᏅ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᎢᎯᎩᎵᏲᎦ.
031625.english: But Abraham said, Son, remember that thou in thy lifetime receivedst thy good things, and likewise Lazarus evil things: but now he is comforted, and thou art tormented.
031625.phonetic: A-se-no E-qua-ha-mi hi-a nu-we-se-i; A-que-tsi, ha-nv-da-da, ni-hi a-si tsa-le-ni-do-hv-gi hi-wa-ti-s-gv tsa-tse-li-ga o-s-dv, a-le La-si-la na-s-quo a-wa-ti-s-gv-gi u-tse-li-ga u-yo-i.  A-se-no hna-quo a-tsi-nu-wo-hi-s-ta-nv, ni-hi-no i-hi-gi-li-yo-ga.

031626.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏤᎲ ᏂᎯᏃ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏰᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏉᎯᏳ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏛᎢ ᎪᏢᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏳᎾᏚᎵᎭ ᎠᏂ ᎤᎾᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᏤᎲ ᏭᏂᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏱᏅᎬᎾᏛᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂ ᎣᏤᎲᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎬᏂᎷᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏅᏓᏳᏂᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏳᎾᏚᎵᎭ.
031626.english: And beside all this, between us and you there is a great gulf fixed: so that they which would pass from hence to you cannot; neither can they pass to us, that would come from thence.
031626.phonetic: A-le-no na-s-quo a-yv o-tse-hv ni-hi-no i-tse-hv na-hna a-ye-li ge-sv e-quo-hi-yu u-dla-nv-dv-i go-tlv-ha, na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gi-lo yu-na-du-li-ha a-ni u-na-da-le-s-di-yi di-tse-hv wu-ni-lo-hi-s-di-yi, v-tla ye-li yi-nv-gv-na-dv-ga, a-le na-s-quo a-ni o-tse-hv-i v-tla yv-gv-ni-lu-gi na-hna nv-da-yu-ni-lo-hi-s-di-yi yu-na-du-li-ha.

031627.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᏗᎾ ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎬᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᎯᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏗᎦᏁᎸᎢ;
031627.english: Then he said, I pray thee therefore, father, that thou wouldest send him to my father's house:
031627.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i; a-di-na e-do-da, gv-ta-yo-se-ha, hi-nv-s-di-yi e-do-da di-ga-ne-lv-i;

031628.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᏁᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏱᏫᏕᎧᏃᎲᏏ ᎾᏍᏉᏰᏃ ᎠᏂ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᏯᏂᎷᎩ.
031628.english: For I have five brethren; that he may testify unto them, lest they also come into this place of torment.
031628.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-ye-no na-ni-v o-tsa-li-nv-tli a-ne-ha; na-s-gi-no yi-wi-de-ka-no-hv-si na-s-quo-ye-no a-ni a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-yi ge-sv ya-ni-lu-gi.

031629.cherokee: ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎼᏏ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏚᏁᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏫᏓᎾᏛᏓᏍᏓᏏ.
031629.english: Abraham saith unto him, They have Moses and the prophets; let them hear them.
031629.phonetic: E-qua-ha-mi hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Mo-si a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi du-ne-ha; na-s-gi wi-da-na-dv-da-s-da-si.

031630.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ, ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏱᏭᏂᎷᏤᎸ ᎠᏎ ᏱᏓᏂᏁᏟᏴᎾ ᏓᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
031630.english: And he said, Nay, father Abraham: but if one went unto them from the dead, they will repent.
031630.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, Tle-s-di e-do-da E-qua-ha-mi, i-yu-s-gi-ni gi-lo u-yo-hu-sv-hi yi-wu-ni-lu-tse-lv a-se yi-da-ni-ne-tli-yv-na da-na-da-nv-dv-i.

031631.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᏓᎾᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎼᏏ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏴᎬᏃᎯᏳᎲᎦ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏱᏚᎴᏅ.
031631.english: And he said unto him, If they hear not Moses and the prophets, neither will they be persuaded, though one rose from the dead.
031631.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; i-yu-no ni-da-na-dv-da-s-da-ne-hv-na yi-gi Mo-si a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, v-tla na-s-quo yv-gv-no-hi-yu-hv-ga, na-s-quo gi-lo u-yo-hu-sv-hi yi-du-le-nv.

031701.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎠᏎ ᏗᏓᏙᏕᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ!
031701.english: Then said he unto the disciples, It is impossible but that offences will come: but woe unto him, through whom they come!
031701.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, a-se di-da-do-de-s-di-s-gi u-na-nu-go-i-s-di; a-se-no u-yo-i-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi na u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi!

031702.cherokee: ᎤᏟ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎ ᏅᏯ ᎠᏍᏙᏍᎩ ᏯᏥᏯᏝᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᏱᏩᎦᏓᎢᏅᏎᎢ, ᎠᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏧᎾᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏬᏕᏍᏗᏱ.
031702.english: It were better for him that a millstone were hanged about his neck, and he cast into the sea, than that he should offend one of these little ones.
031702.phonetic: U-tli o-si-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di yi-ge-se nv-ya a-s-do-s-gi ya-tsi-ya-tla-ne-i, a-le a-me-quo-hi yi-wa-ga-da-i-nv-se-i, a-no hi-a a-si-yv-wi tsu-na-s-di ge-sv tsu-wo-de-s-di-yi.

031703.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏣᏓᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᏗᏍᏓᏓᏅᏟ ᎢᏣᏍᎦᏅᏤᎮᏍᏗ, ᎯᎬᏍᎪᎸᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏯᏰᎸᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎯᏯᏙᎵᎨᏍᏗ.
031703.english: Take heed to yourselves: If thy brother trespass against thee, rebuke him; and if he repent, forgive him.
031703.phonetic: I-tsv-sv i-tsa-da-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di.  I-yu-no di-s-da-da-nv-tli i-tsa-s-ga-nv-tse-he-s-di, hi-gv-s-go-lv-v-s-ge-s-di; i-yu-no u-yo i-ya-ye-lv-s-ge-s-di, hi-ya-do-li-ge-s-di.

031704.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᏂᏣᏍᎦᏅᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏏᎦ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᏂᏣᎷᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏏᎦ ᎨᏒ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏣᏪᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᎤᏲ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ, ᎠᏎ ᎯᏯᏙᎵᎨᏍᏗᏉ.
031704.english: And if he trespass against thee seven times in a day, and seven times in a day turn again to thee, saying, I repent; thou shalt forgive him.
031704.phonetic: I-yu a-le ga-li-quo-gi ni-tsa-s-ga-nv-tse-he-s-di si-ga ge-sv, a-le ga-li-quo-gi ni-tsa-lu-tse-he-s-di si-ga ge-sv, hi-a ni-tsa-we-se-he-s-di, u-yo a-gi-ye-lv-ha, a-se hi-ya-do-li-ge-s-di-quo.

031705.cherokee: ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏍᎩᏁᏉᏏ ᎣᎪᎯᏳᏒᎢ.
031705.english: And the apostles said unto the Lord, Increase our faith.
031705.phonetic: Ge-tsi-nv-si-dv-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi, S-gi-ne-quo-si o-go-hi-yu-sv-i.

031706.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎤᎦᏔ ᏥᏂᎬ ᎢᎩᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏥᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᏥᏪᏏ ᎯᎠ ᎫᏩ-ᏧᏁᎬ ᏥᏡᎦ, ᏫᏕᏣᎾᏍᏕᏢᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᏪᏣᎧᎲᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏦᎯᏳᎲᎦ.
031706.english: And the Lord said, If ye had faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye might say unto this sycamine tree, Be thou plucked up by the root, and be thou planted in the sea; and it should obey you.
031706.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, I-yu-no a-tsi-lv--u-ga-ta tsi-ni-gv i-gi-dv go-hi-yu-di ge-sv yi-tsi-ha, hi-a yi-ni-tsi-we-si hi-a gu-wa--tsu-ne-gv tsi-tlu-ga, Wi-de-tsa-na-s-de-tlv-da, a-le a-me-quo-hi we-tsa-ka-hv-ga, a-le yi-tso-hi-yu-hv-ga.

031707.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ, ᎡᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏱᎦᏓᎷᎩᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᎨᎶᎸᎥᏍᎦ, ᏠᎨᏏ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏐᏅᎯ, ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏁᏥᏪᏏ, ᎮᎾ ᏩᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᎦ?
031707.english: But which of you, having a servant plowing or feeding cattle, will say unto him by and by, when he is come from the field, Go and sit down to meat?
031707.phonetic: A-se-no ga-go hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv, e-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di yi-ga-da-lu-gi-ha, a-le yi-ge-lo-lv-v-s-ga, tlo-ge-si nv-da-yu-lo-so-nv-hi, gi-la-quo i-yv-dv hi-a yi-ne-tsi-we-si, He-na wa-li-s-da-yv-hv-ga?

031708.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏱᎬᏩᎬᏫᏳ ᏱᏅᎦᏰᏥᏪᏏ, ᎭᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎭᏓᏠᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏍᎩᏍᏕᎸᎯᏓ ᎦᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏗᏔᏍᎬ ᎢᎬᎯᏛ; ᎣᏂᏃ ᏨᏒ ᎭᎵᏍᏓᏴᏅᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎭᏗᏔᎲᎭ?
031708.english: And will not rather say unto him, Make ready wherewith I may sup, and gird thyself, and serve me, till I have eaten and drunken; and afterward thou shalt eat and drink?
031708.phonetic: Tla-s-go hi-a yi-gv-wa-gv-wi-yu yi-nv-ga-ye-tsi-we-si, Ha-dv-nv-i-s-da a-qua-li-s-da-yv-di-yi, a-le ha-da-tlo-ga, a-le s-gi-s-de-lv-hi-da ga-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv a-le ga-di-ta-s-gv i-gv-hi-dv; o-ni-no tsv-sv ha-li-s-da-yv-nv-ha a-le ha-di-ta-hv-ha?
