031709.cherokee: ᎠᎦᎵᎡᎵᏤᎰᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎾᏥᏪᏎᎸ ᏄᏛᏁᎸᎢ?  ᎥᏝ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ.
031709.english: Doth he thank that servant because he did the things that were commanded him? I trow not.
031709.phonetic: A-ga-li-e-li-tse-ho-s-go na-s-gi a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di na-tsi-we-se-lv nu-dv-ne-lv-i?  V-tla a-gi-ye-lv-ha.

031710.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᏥᏪᏎᎸ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎰᏅᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏒᎭ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎣᎩᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ; ᎢᏲᎦᏛᏁᏗᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏃᎦᏛᏁᎸ.
031710.english: So likewise ye, when ye shall have done all those things which are commanded you, say, We are unprofitable servants: we have done that which was our duty to do.
031710.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-hi, hna-quo ni-ga-dv nu-tsi-we-se-lv ni-tsa-dv-ne-ho-nv-ha, hi-a ni-tsi-we-sv-ha, Go-hu-s-di o-gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na o-gi-nv-si-da-s-di; i-yo-ga-dv-ne-di-quo ge-sv no-ga-dv-ne-lv.

031711.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏩᎦᏖᎢ, ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎤᎶᏎᎢ.
031711.english: And it came to pass, as he went to Jerusalem, that he passed through the midst of Samaria and Galilee.
031711.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne na-s-gi Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wa-ga-te-i, Sa-me-li-yi a-le Ge-li-li a-ye-li u-lo-se-i.

031712.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏢᏃ ᎦᏚᎲ ᏩᏴᎯᎲᎢ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏓᏰᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏢᎩ ᏕᎬᏩᏠᏎᎢ, ᎢᏅ ᏧᎾᎴᏅᏁᎢ;
031712.english: And as he entered into a certain village, there met him ten men that were lepers, which stood afar off:
031712.phonetic: I-lv-hi-tlv-no ga-du-hv wa-yv-hi-hv-i a-s-go-hi i-ya-ni-dv a-ni-s-ga-ya a-da-ye-s-gi tsu-ni-tlv-gi de-gv-wa-tlo-se-i, i-nv tsu-na-le-nv-ne-i;

031713.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏌᎳᏓᏁ ᎠᏂᏁᎬ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏥᏌ ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᏍᎩᏯᏙᎵᎩ.
031713.english: And they lifted up their voices, and said, Jesus, Master, have mercy on us.
031713.phonetic: A-le u-ni-sa-la-da-ne a-ni-ne-gv hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Tsi-sa Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, s-gi-ya-do-li-gi.

031714.cherokee: ᏚᎪᎲᏃ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᏤᎾ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏫᏂᏗᏣᏛᏂᏏ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎾᎢᏒᏉ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᎦᎸᎮᎢ.
031714.english: And when he saw them, he said unto them, Go shew yourselves unto the priests. And it came to pass, that, as they went, they were cleansed.
031714.phonetic: Du-go-hv-no, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, I-tse-na a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi gv-ni-ge-sv wi-ni-di-tsa-dv-ni-si.  Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, a-na-i-sv-quo du-na-da-nv-ga-lv-he-i.

031715.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ, ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎠᏥᏅᏩᏅᎢ, ᏗᎤᏨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎤᎸᏉᏔᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ,
031715.english: And one of them, when he saw that he was healed, turned back, and with a loud voice glorified God,
031715.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no, u-do-le-ho-sv a-tsi-nv-wa-nv-i, di-u-tsv-se-i, a-le a-s-da-ya u-ne-tse u-lv-quo-ta-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi,

031716.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏁ ᎤᎵᏯᏍᏚᏁ ᏚᎳᏍᎬ ᎾᎥᎢ, ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏤᎮᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ.
031716.english: And fell down on his face at his feet, giving him thanks: and he was a Samaritan.
031716.phonetic: A-le u-da-nv-ne u-li-ya-s-du-ne du-la-s-gv na-v-i, a-li-he-li-tse-he-i.  A-le Sa-me-li-yi e-hi ge-se-i.

031717.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᏱᎨᏥᏅᎦᎸᎡᎢ?  ᎠᏎᏃ ᏐᎣᏁᎳ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎭᏢ?
031717.english: And Jesus answering said, Were there not ten cleansed? but where are the nine?
031717.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-i, Tla-s-go a-s-go-hi yi-ge-tsi-nv-ga-lv-e-i?  A-se-no so-o-ne-la i-ya-ni-dv ha-tlv?

031718.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏱᎨᏥᏩᏛ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᏨᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏂᎸᏉᏗᏍᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏩᏒ.
031718.english: There are not found that returned to give glory to God, save this stranger.
031718.phonetic: V-tla yi-ge-tsi-wa-dv nv-da-yu-na-tsv-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ni-lv-quo-di-s-gi, hi-a nv-wa-da-le yv-wi u-wa-sv.

031719.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᏔᎴᎲᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎮᎾ; ᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏣᏗᏫᏍᏓ.
031719.english: And he said unto him, Arise, go thy way: thy faith hath made thee whole.
031719.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le na-s-gi, Ta-le-hv-ga, a-le tsi-he-na; tso-hi-yu-sv tsa-di-wi-s-da.

031720.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏᏃ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏅ ᎢᏳᏉ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ, ᏚᏁᏤᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ.
031720.english: And when he was demanded of the Pharisees, when the kingdom of God should come, he answered them and said, The kingdom of God cometh not with observation:
031720.phonetic: A-ni-qua-li-si-no gv-wa-dv-dv-nv i-yu-quo u-lu-hi-s-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv, du-ne-tse-le-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv v-tla gv-go-wa-dv-di yi-ge-se-s-di ga-lu-tsv-ha.

031721.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᎬᏂᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂ!  ᎠᎴ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ!  ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎭ.
031721.english: Neither shall they say, Lo here! or, lo there! for, behold, the kingdom of God is within you.
031721.phonetic: V-tla a-le hi-a yi-ni-gv-ni-we-s-ge-s-di, Gv-ni-yu-quo a-ni!  a-le, Gv-ni-yu-quo na-hna-ni!  gv-ni-yu-quo-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv i-tse-la-di-do-ha.

031722.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎨᏥᎪᏩᏛ.
031722.english: And he said unto the disciples, The days will come, when ye shall desire to see one of the days of the Son of man, and ye shall not see it.
031722.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, dv-s-qua-lv-hi na-hi-yu ge-sv i-tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di i-tsi-go-wa-dv-di-yi sa-quo i-ga yv-wi U-we-tsi u-tse-li-ga, a-le v-tla yv-ge-tsi-go-wa-dv.

031723.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎨᏥᏪᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂ; ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏤᏅᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏍᏓᏩᏛᏒᎩ.
031723.english: And they shall say to you, See here; or, see there: go not after them, nor follow them.
031723.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-ge-tsi-we-se-he-s-di, Gv-ni-yu-quo a-ni; a-le Gv-ni-yu-quo na-hna-ni; tle-s-di i-tse-nv-sv-gi, a-le tle-s-di di-tsi-s-da-wa-dv-sv-gi.

031724.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏰᏃ ᎠᎾᎦᎵᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏨᏗᎦᎵᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᏣᏘᏂᏃ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏥᏫᏗᎦᎸᏌᏓᏗᏍᎪᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎠᎵᏱᎶᎸᎭ.
031724.english: For as the lightning, that lighteneth out of the one part under heaven, shineth unto the other part under heaven; so shall also the Son of man be in his day.
031724.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-ye-no a-na-ga-li-s-gi sa-quo i-di-tlv ga-lv-lo-i tsv-di-ga-li-s-go-i, u-tsa-ti-ni-no i-di-tlv ga-lv-lo-i tsi-wi-di-ga-lv-sa-da-di-s-go-i; na-s-gi na-s-quo nu-s-de-s-di yv-wi U-we-tsi u-tse-li i-ga a-li-yi-lo-lv-ha.

031725.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎬᏩᏲᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ.
031725.english: But first must he suffer many things, and be rejected of this generation.
031725.phonetic: A-se-no i-gv-yi u-tsa-ti tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-gi-li-yo-i-s-di, a-le di-gv-wa-yo-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di go-hi tsa-ne-ha.

031726.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏄᏍᏕ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏃᏯ ᏤᎮᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎠᎵᏱᎶᎸᎭ.
031726.english: And as it was in the days of Noe, so shall it be also in the days of the Son of man.
031726.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi-ya tsi-nu-s-de na-hi-yu No-ya tse-he-i, na-s-gi na-s-quo nu-s-de-s-di na-hi-yu yv-wi U-we-tsi u-tse-li i-ga a-li-yi-lo-lv-ha.

031727.cherokee: ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᏓᎾᏗᏔᏍᎨᎢ, ᏓᎾᏕᏒᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᏕᎨᏥᏰᎨᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏃᏯ ᎤᏣᏅ ᏥᏳᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᎱᎦᏂᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏚᏂᎬᏦᏅ.
031727.english: They did eat, they drank, they married wives, they were given in marriage, until the day that Noe entered into the ark, and the flood came, and destroyed them all.
031727.phonetic: Da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-i, da-na-di-ta-s-ge-i, da-na-de-sv-hv-s-ge-i, de-ge-tsi-ye-ge-i, gv-ni na-hi-yu i-ga No-ya u-tsa-nv tsi-yu-hi, a-le u-no-hu-ga-ni-lv a-le ni-ga-dv du-ni-gv-tso-nv.

031728.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏄᏍᏕ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎶᏛ ᏤᎮᎢ; ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᎢ ᏓᎾᏗᏔᏍᎨᎢ, ᎤᏂᏩᎡᎥᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᏂᏃᏔᏅᎥᏍᎨᎢ, ᏓᏂᏫᏒᎥᏍᎨᎢ, ᏓᎾᏁᏍᎨᏍᎨᎢ;
031728.english: Likewise also as it was in the days of Lot; they did eat, they drank, they bought, they sold, they planted, they builded;
031728.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo tsi-nu-s-de na-hi-yu Lo-dv tse-he-i; da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-i da-na-di-ta-s-ge-i, u-ni-wa-e-v-s-ge-i, a-ni-no-ta-nv-v-s-ge-i, da-ni-wi-sv-v-s-ge-i, da-na-ne-s-ge-s-ge-i;

031729.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᎯᏳᏉ ᎢᎦ ᎶᏛ ᏐᏓᎻ ᎤᏄᎪᏨ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏧᎦᎿᎭᏁ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏌᎪᏂᎨ ᎠᏓᏪᎳᎩᏍᎩ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏃ ᏚᏂᎰᏁᎢ.
031729.english: But the same day that Lot went out of Sodom it rained fire and brimstone from heaven, and destroyed them all.
031729.phonetic: A-se-no na-hi-yu-quo i-ga Lo-dv So-da-mi u-nu-go-tsv, ga-lv-la-di tsu-ga-hna-ne a-tsi-lv a-le sa-go-ni-ge a-da-we-la-gi-s-gi, ni-ga-di-yu-no du-ni-ho-ne-i.

031730.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏂᎸᎭ.
031730.english: Even thus shall it be in the day when the Son of man is revealed.
031730.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya nu-s-de-s-di na-hi-yu i-ga yv-wi U-we-tsi ga-na-nu-go-ni-lv-ha.

031731.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎩᎶ ᎦᏌᎾᎵ ᎤᎩᎴᏍᏗ, ᎤᎿᎭᎥᏃ ᎦᎵᏦᏕ ᎠᎮᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏠᎠᏒᎩ ᎤᏫᏛᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏫᎡᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏓᏳᏨᏒᎩ.
031731.english: In that day, he which shall be upon the housetop, and his stuff in the house, let him not come down to take it away: and he that is in the field, let him likewise not return back.
031731.phonetic: Na-hi-yu i-ga gi-lo ga-sa-na-li u-gi-le-s-di, u-hna-v-no ga-li-tso-de a-he-s-di, tle-s-di nv-da-yu-tlo-a-sv-gi u-wi-dv-di-yi; a-le gi-lo tlo-ge-si wi-e-do-he-s-di, tle-s-di na-s-quo nv-da-yu-tsv-sv-gi.

031733.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎬᏅ ᎤᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎤᏲᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏲᎱᏎᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎤᏲᎱᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031733.english: Whosoever shall seek to save his life shall lose it; and whosoever shall lose his life shall preserve it.
031733.phonetic: Gi-lo u-wa-sv gv-nv u-s-de-lv-di-yi u-yo-he-s-di u-yo-hu-se-di ge-se-s-di; gi-lo-no u-yo-hu-se-he-s-di, na-s-gi u-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di.

031734.cherokee: ᎢᏤᏲᏎᎭ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏤᏍᏙᎩᎯ ᏓᏂᏅᎨᏍᏗ; ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏥᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎠᏥᎧᎯᏯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031734.english: I tell you, in that night there shall be two men in one bed; the one shall be taken, and the other shall be left.
031734.phonetic: I-tse-yo-se-ha, na-hi-yu sv-no-yi ge-se-s-di a-ni-ta-li sa-quo a-tse-s-do-gi-hi da-ni-nv-ge-s-di; a-si-yv-wi a-tsi-ya-nv-di ge-se-s-di, so-i-no a-tsi-ka-hi-ya-s-di ge-se-s-di.

031735.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᏂᏍᏙᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏥᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎠᏥᎧᎯᏯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031735.english: Two women shall be grinding together; the one shall be taken, and the other left.
031735.phonetic: A-ni-ta-li a-ni-ge-yv i-tsu-la-ha a-ni-s-do-s-ge-s-di; a-si-yv-wi a-tsi-ya-nv-di ge-se-s-di, so-i-no a-tsi-ka-hi-ya-s-di ge-se-s-di.

031736.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏠᎨᏏ ᎠᏁᏙᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏥᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎠᏥᎧᎯᏯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031736.english: Two men shall be in the field; the one shall be taken, and the other left.
031736.phonetic: A-ni-ta-li tlo-ge-si a-ne-do-he-s-di; a-si-yv-wi a-tsi-ya-nv-di ge-se-s-di, so-i-no a-tsi-ka-hi-ya-s-di ge-se-s-di.

031737.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎭᏢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏬᏨᎯ ᏥᎦᏃᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏬᎭᎵ ᎠᎾᏓᏟᏏᏍᎪᎢ.
031737.english: And they answered and said unto him, Where, Lord? And he said unto them, Wheresoever the body is, thither will the eagles be gathered together.
031737.phonetic: U-ni-ne-tsv-no hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, Ha-tlv, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi?  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, I-lv-hi-tlv go-hu-s-di u-li-wo-tsv-hi tsi-ga-no-i, na-hna a-wo-ha-li a-na-da-tli-si-s-go-i.

031801.cherokee: ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏓᏁᎴᏃ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏕ ᎤᎬᏩᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏯᏪᎢᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ;
031801.english: And he spake a parable unto them to this end, that men ought always to pray, and not to faint;
031801.phonetic: Du-tli-lo-s-da-ne-le-no, hi-a nu-s-de u-gv-wa-le-i, na-s-gi yv-wi ni-go-hi-lv u-na-da-do-li-s-do-di-yi, a-le tsu-ni-ya-we-i-s-di ni-ge-sv-na;

031802.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎡᎮ ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎦᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᏂᏚᏁᎶᏛᎾ;
031802.english: Saying, There was in a city a judge, which feared not God, neither regarded man:
031802.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-i, E-he di-gu-go-di-s-gi i-lv-hi-tlv ga-du-hv-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-ga-na-ye-s-gv-na, a-le yv-wi ni-du-ne-lo-dv-na;

031803.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏬᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᏚᎲ ᎡᎮᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎷᏤᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᏍᎩᎾᏛᏂᏏ ᏦᏍᏓᏓᏱᎵᏙᎯ.
031803.english: And there was a widow in that city; and she came unto him, saying, Avenge me of mine adversary.
031803.phonetic: A-le u-wo-su-lo-tsv-hi na-hna ga-du-hv e-he-i; na-s-gi-no u-lu-tse-le-i, hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i, Du-yu-go-dv ni-s-gi-na-dv-ni-si tso-s-da-da-yi-li-do-hi.

031804.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏉᏌᏁ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ; ᎣᏂᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎤᏪᏎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏧᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏱᏥᎾᏰᏍᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏗᏥᏯᏁᎶᏗ ᏴᏫ;
031804.english: And he would not for a while: but afterward he said within himself, Though I fear not God, nor regard man;
031804.phonetic: A-se-no u-quo-sa-ne i-lv-s-gi i-go-hi-dv; o-ni-s-gi-ni hi-a ni-u-we-se u-wa-sv tsu-da-nv-dv-i, Tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv yi-tsi-na-ye-s-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le v-tla yi-di-tsi-ya-ne-lo-di yv-wi;

031805.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏬᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᏣᏆᏕᏯᏙᏗᎭ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏔᏂ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏅᏓᏥᏯᏛᏁᎵ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸᏰᏃ ᎦᎷᎬ ᏱᏓᎩᏯᏪᎢᏍᏓ.
031805.english: Yet because this widow troubleth me, I will avenge her, lest by her continual coming she weary me.
031805.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a u-wo-su-lo-tsv-hi tsa-qua-de-ya-do-di-ha nv-da-ga-li-s-do-ta-ni du-yu-go-dv nv-da-tsi-ya-dv-ne-li, ni-go-hi-lv-ye-no ga-lu-gv yi-da-gi-ya-we-i-s-da.

031806.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏓ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎢ.
031806.english: And the Lord said, Hear what the unjust judge saith.
031806.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, I-tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-da ni-du-yu-go-dv-na i-ya-dv-ne-hi di-gu-go-di-s-gi ni-ga-we-s-gv-i.

031807.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏱᏂᏙᎬᏛᏂᏏ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎨᎦᏑᏴᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᏩᎩᏨᏗ ᏥᎬᏩᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᏱᏓᏙᎯᏕᎭ?
031807.english: And shall not God avenge his own elect, which cry day and night unto him, though he bear long with them?
031807.phonetic: Tla-s-go-no U-ne-la-nv-hi du-yu-go-dv yi-ni-do-gv-dv-ni-si u-wa-sv tsu-tse-li ge-ga-su-yv-dv, na-s-gi di-gv-wa-gi-tsv-di tsi-gv-wa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-ha, na-s-quo go-hi-di-yu yi-da-do-hi-de-ha?

031808.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ ᏞᎩᏳ ᏙᏓᎫᎴᏏ.  ᎠᏎᏃ, ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ, ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎪ ᎨᏒ ᏛᏩᏛᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ?
031808.english: I tell you that he will avenge them speedily. Nevertheless when the Son of man cometh, shall he find faith on the earth?
031808.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-se-ha tle-gi-yu do-da-gu-le-si.  A-se-no, yv-wi U-we-tsi ga-lu-tsv-ha, go-hi-yu-di-s-go ge-sv dv-wa-dv-hi e-lo-hi?

031809.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏓᏁᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎠᎾᏓᎸᏉᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏂᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎤᎾᏤᎸᎯ, ᎤᏩᎾᏓᎴᏃ ᏅᎵᏌᎵ ᏗᏂᏰᎸᏍᎩ.
031809.english: And he spake this parable unto certain which trusted in themselves that they were righteous, and despised others:
031809.phonetic: Hi-a-no du-tli-lo-s-da-ne-le gi-lo i-yu-na-s-di u-nv-sv a-na-da-lv-quo-di-s-gi, na-ni-s-ga-nv-na u-na-tse-lv-hi, u-wa-na-da-le-no nv-li-sa-li di-ni-ye-lv-s-gi.

031810.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏅᏎᎢ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏆᎵᏏ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᎠᎩᏏᏙᎯ.
031810.english: Two men went up into the temple to pray; the one a Pharisee, and the other a publican.
031810.phonetic: A-ni-ta-li a-ni-s-ga-ya u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi u-na-da-do-li-s-ta-nv-se-i, a-si-yv-wi A-qua-li-si ge-se-i, so-i-no a-de-lv--a-gi-si-do-hi.

031811.cherokee: ᎠᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᎴᏁ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏯᎵᎡᎵᏤᎭ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᏴᏫ ᏄᎾᏍᏛᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏆᏍᏛᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎᏉ ᎠᎾᏓᎩᎡᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏲᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᎠᎩᏏᏙᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏆᏍᏛᎾ ᏥᎩ.
031811.english: The Pharisee stood and prayed thus with himself, God, I thank thee, that I am not as other men are, extortioners, unjust, adulterers, or even as this publican.
031811.phonetic: A-qua-li-si u-le-ne u-wa-sv ge-sv-i u-da-do-li-s-ta-ne hi-a nu-we-se-i; Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi gv-ya-li-e-li-tse-ha a-ni-so-i yv-wi nu-na-s-dv-i na-s-gi na-qua-s-dv-na tsi-gi, na-s-gi a-se-quo a-na-da-gi-e-hi tsi-gi, a-le ni-du-yu-go-dv-na i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi, a-le di-na-da-yo-ne-hi, a-le na-s-quo hi-a a-de-lv--a-gi-si-do-hi na-s-gi nu-s-dv na-qua-s-dv-na tsi-gi.

031812.cherokee: ᏑᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵ ᎠᎹᏟ ᏂᎬᏍᎪᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎩᎾᎥ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁ ᎪᏣᎴᏛ ᏥᎥᏍᎪᎢ.
031812.english: I fast twice in the week, I give tithes of all that I possess.
031812.phonetic: Su-na-do-da-qua-s-di ge-sv ta-li a-ma-tli ni-gv-s-go-i; a-le ni-ga-v a-gi-na-v a-s-go-hi-ne go-tsa-le-dv tsi-v-s-go-i.

031813.cherokee: ᎠᏕᎸᏃ-ᎠᎩᏏᏙᎯ ᎢᏅ ᏧᎴᏁᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏫᏗᎬᏩᎧᏃᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎦᏁᏥᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏩᏂᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏍᎩᏙᎵᎩ ᏥᏍᎦᎾᎢ.
031813.english: And the publican, standing afar off, would not lift up so much as his eyes unto heaven, but smote upon his breast, saying, God be merciful to me a sinner.
031813.phonetic: A-de-lv-no--a-gi-si-do-hi i-nv tsu-le-ne-i, v-tla ye-li ga-lv-la-di wi-di-gv-wa-ka-no-di yi-ge-se-i, ga-ne-tsi-quo-s-gi-ni u-wa-ni-le-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi, s-gi-do-li-gi tsi-s-ga-na-i.

031814.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏚᏓᎴᏛ ᏧᏪᏅᏒ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎥᏝ.  ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎢᎠᏓᏌᎳᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎩᎶᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏂᎠᏓᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᏌᎳᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031814.english: I tell you, this man went down to his house justified rather than the other: for every one that exalteth himself shall be abased; and he that humbleth himself shall be exalted.
031814.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-se-ha, hi-a na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya u-du-da-le-dv tsu-we-nv-sv wu-lo-se-i, so-i-no v-tla.  Gi-lo-ye-no u-wa-sv i-a-da-sa-la-di-s-ge-s-di e-la-di i-ya-gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di, gi-lo-no u-wa-sv e-la-di ni-a-da-dv-ne-he-s-di a-tsi-sa-la-do-di ge-se-s-di.

031815.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏕᎬᏩᏘᏃᎮᎴ ᏧᎾᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏏᏔᏗᏍᏗᏱ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᏚᏂᎬᏍᎪᎸᏁᎢ.
031815.english: And they brought unto him also infants, that he would touch them: but when his disciples saw it, they rebuked them.
031815.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo de-gv-wa-ti-no-he-le tsu-na-s-di di-ni-yo-li, na-s-gi tsu-si-ta-di-s-di-yi; a-se-no gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-na-do-le-ho-sv du-ni-gv-s-go-lv-ne-i.

031816.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎲ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᏗᏤᎵᏏ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᎬᎩᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏅᏍᏓᏕᎸᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏄᎾᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031816.english: But Jesus called them unto him, and said, Suffer little children to come unto me, and forbid them not: for of such is the kingdom of God.
031816.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no wi-du-ya-nv-hv hi-a nu-we-se-i, U-na-ne-la-gi di-tse-li-si di-ni-yo-li gv-gi-lu-tse-di-yi, a-le tle-s-di di-tsi-nv-s-da-de-lv-gi; na-s-gi-ye-no nu-na-s-di na-hna u-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

031817.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏓᏓᏂᎸᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏲᎵ ᏥᏓᏓᏂᎸᎪᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏴᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031817.english: Verily I say unto you, Whosoever shall not receive the kingdom of God as a little child shall in no wise enter therein.
031817.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Gi-lo U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv ni-da-da-ni-lv-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di na-s-gi-ya a-yo-li tsi-da-da-ni-lv-go-i, v-tla na-hna u-yv-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

031818.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎤᏛᏛᏁ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎰᏍᏛ ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᏯᏆᏛᏁᎸ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏱᏥᏩᏛ?
031818.english: And a certain ruler asked him, saying, Good Master, what shall I do to inherit eternal life?
031818.phonetic: Gi-lo-no i-yu-s-di nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi u-dv-dv-ne, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ho-s-dv Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ga-do ya-qua-dv-ne-lv wi-na-s-dv-na gv-ni-dv yi-tsi-wa-dv?

031819.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎰᏍᏛ ᎢᏍᏉᏎᎭ?  ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏱᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
031819.english: And Jesus said unto him, Why callest thou me good? none is good, save one, that is, God.
031819.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ga-do-no ho-s-dv i-s-quo-se-ha?  V-tla gi-lo o-s-dv yi-gi sa-quo u-wa-sv-hi-yu, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi.

031820.cherokee: ᏕᎯᎦᏔᎭᏉ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᏲᏁᎸᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏓᎸᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏃᏍᎩᏒᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏣᏃᎮᎸᎩ, ᏕᎩᎸᏉᏕᏍᏗ ᏣᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏥ.
031820.english: Thou knowest the commandments, Do not commit adultery, Do not kill, Do not steal, Do not bear false witness, Honour thy father and thy mother.
031820.phonetic: De-hi-ga-ta-ha-quo di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, Tle-s-di tsa-da-yo-ne-lv-gi, Tle-s-di tsa-da-lv-gi, tle-s-di tsa-no-s-gi-sv-gi, Tle-s-di ga-ye-go-gi tsa-no-he-lv-gi, De-gi-lv-quo-de-s-di tsa-do-da a-le tsa-tsi.

031821.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᎩᎧᎾᏩᏕᏅ ᏥᏧᏣ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴ ᏅᏛ.
031821.english: And he said, All these have I kept from my youth up.
031821.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, Hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-dv da-gi-ka-na-wa-de-nv tsi-tsu-tsa ge-sv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le nv-dv.

031822.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎠᏏ ᏑᏓᎴᎩ ᏣᎷᎳ; ᎯᎾᏚᎦ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏣᎾᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏘᏯᏙᎯᏏ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏃ ᏫᏣᎮᏍᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ; ᏖᏒᏃ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᏒᎭ.
031822.english: Now when Jesus heard these things, he said unto him, Yet lackest thou one thing: sell all that thou hast, and distribute unto the poor, and thou shalt have treasure in heaven: and come, follow me.
031822.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no na-s-gi hi-a u-dv-ga-nv, hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, A-si su-da-le-gi tsa-lu-la; hi-na-du-ga ni-ga-dv tsa-na-v-i, a-le ti-ya-do-hi-si u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi, ga-lv-la-di-no wi-tsa-he-s-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di; te-sv-no s-gi-s-da-wa-de-sv-ha.

031823.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏲ ᎤᏰᎸᏁᎢ; ᎤᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎨᏎᎢ.
031823.english: And when he heard this, he was very sorrowful: for he was very rich.
031823.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a u-dv-ga-nv u-tsa-ti u-yo u-ye-lv-ne-i; u-tsa-ti-ye-no u-we-hna-i-yu ge-se-i.

031824.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎪᎲ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏲ ᎤᏰᎸᏒᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᏧᏁᎿᎭᎢ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏭᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ!
031824.english: And when Jesus saw that he was very sorrowful, he said, How hardly shall they that have riches enter into the kingdom of God!
031824.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-go-hv u-tsa-ti u-yo u-ye-lv-sv-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ni-ga-v a-s-da-yi-yu tsu-ne-hna-i U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi di-ge-sv wu-ni-yv-s-di-yi!

031825.cherokee: ᎤᏟᏰᏃ ᎠᎯᏗᏳ ᎨᎻᎵ ᎤᎦᏛᎴᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏴᎩ ᎦᏌᏁᎾᏛᏗᏱ ᎠᏃ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢ ᏴᏫ ᏭᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ.
031825.english: For it is easier for a camel to go through a needle's eye, than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of God.
031825.phonetic: U-tli-ye-no a-hi-di-yu ge-mi-li u-ga-dv-le-hi-s-di-yi yv-gi ga-sa-ne-na-dv-di-yi a-no u-we-hna-i yv-wi wu-yv-s-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi di-ge-sv-i.

031826.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᎪᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏯᏥᏍᏕᎸ?
031826.english: And they that heard it said, Who then can be saved?
031826.phonetic: U-na-dv-ga-nv-hi-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Ga-go-no ye-li ya-tsi-s-de-lv?

031827.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎬᏩᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᏰᎵᏉ ᎢᎬᏩᏛᏁᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
031827.english: And he said, The things which are impossible with men are possible with God.
031827.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, Na-s-gi yv-wi ye-li i-gv-wa-na-dv-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, ye-li-quo i-gv-wa-dv-ne-di U-ne-la-nv-hi.

031828.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎤᏪᏎᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏙᎩᏲᏐᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏍᏓᏩᏕᏅ.
031828.english: Then Peter said, Lo, we have left all, and followed thee.
031828.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qui-da hi-a ni-u-we-se-i, Gv-ni-yu-quo a-yv ni-ga-di-yu do-gi-yo-so-nv, a-le i-tsv-s-da-wa-de-nv.

031829.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏧᏮᏕᏨᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏪᏥ, ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ,
031829.english: And he said unto them, Verily I say unto you, There is no man that hath left house, or parents, or brethren, or wife, or children, for the kingdom of God's sake,
031829.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, V-tla gi-lo tsu-wv-de-tsv-hi yi-gi ga-ne-lv-i, a-le tsu-ga-yv-li-ge-i, a-le a-na-li-nv-tli, a-le u-da-li-i, a-le tsu-we-tsi, nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i,

031830.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏳᏩᎫᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏐᎢᏱᏃ ᏗᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ.
031830.english: Who shall not receive manifold more in this present time, and in the world to come life everlasting.
031830.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-tsi-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv u-tsa-ti i-yu-wa-gu-di go-hi ge-sv-i, so-i-yi-no di-ge-sv gv-ni-dv wi-na-s-dv-na.

031831.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏫᏚᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏫᏗᎦᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᏃᏪᎸ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031831.english: Then he took unto him the twelve, and said unto them, Behold, we go up to Jerusalem, and all things that are written by the prophets concerning the Son of man shall be accomplished.
031831.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv i-yv-dv wi-du-ti-nv-s-ta-ne-i, a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Gv-ni-yu-quo Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wi-di-ga-ti, a-le ni-ga-v du-no-we-lv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi yv-wi U-we-tsi a-tsi-no-he-s-gv na-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-se-s-di.

031832.cherokee: ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏙᏓᎨᏥᏲᎯᏎᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏰᎦᏕᎰᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎦᏰᏥᏐᏢᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᏰᎦᎵᏥᏍᏈ,
031832.english: For he shall be delivered unto the Gentiles, and shall be mocked, and spitefully entreated, and spitted on:
031832.phonetic: Tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv-ye-no yv-wi do-da-ge-tsi-yo-hi-se-li, a-le da-ye-ga-de-ho-ta-ni, a-le da-ga-ye-tsi-so-tlv-ta-ni, a-le do-da-ye-ga-li-tsi-s-qui,

031833.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏓᎬᏩᎵᎥᏂᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎬᏩᎵ; ᏦᎢᏁᏃ ᎢᎦ ᏙᏛᎠᎴᎯᏌᏂ.
031833.english: And they shall scourge him, and put him to death: and the third day he shall rise again.
031833.phonetic: A-le da-gv-wa-li-v-ni-li, a-le da-gv-wa-li; tso-i-ne-no i-ga do-dv-a-le-hi-sa-ni.

031834.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏃᎵᏤᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒ ᎨᎬᏍᎦᎳᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏯᏂᎦᏔᎮ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎦᏛᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ.
031834.english: And they understood none of these things: and this saying was hid from them, neither knew they the things which were spoken.
031834.phonetic: A-le hi-a na-s-gi v-tla yu-no-li-tse-i; a-le na-s-gi hi-a nu-we-sv ge-gv-s-ga-la-ne-le-i, a-le v-tla ya-ni-ga-ta-he i-yu-s-di ga-dv-gv na-s-gi u-ne-tsv-i.

031835.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᎵᎪ ᎾᎥ ᎤᎷᏨ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᎨᏫ ᏅᏃᎱᎶᏗ ᎤᏬᎴ ᎠᏚᎳᏗᏍᎨᎢ;
031835.english: And it came to pass, that as he was come nigh unto Jericho, a certain blind man sat by the way side begging:
031835.phonetic: A-le hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi Tse-li-go na-v u-lu-tsv, gi-lo i-yu-s-di di-ge-wi nv-no-hu-lo-di u-wo-le a-du-la-di-s-ge-i;

031836.cherokee: ᎤᏛᎦᏅᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᏂᎶᏍᎬ ᎤᏛᏛᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ.
031836.english: And hearing the multitude pass by, he asked what it meant.
031836.phonetic: U-dv-ga-nv-no u-ni-tsa-ti a-ni-lo-s-gv u-dv-dv-ne na-s-gi u-ye-lv-dv-i.

031837.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏃᏁᎴᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎦᎶᏍᎬᎢ.
031837.english: And they told him, that Jesus of Nazareth passeth by.
031837.phonetic: Gv-wa-no-ne-le-no na-s-gi Tsi-sa Na-se-li-di e-hi ga-lo-s-gv-i.

031838.cherokee: ᎤᏪᎷᏁᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏥᏌ, ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᏍᎩᏙᎵᎩ.
031838.english: And he cried, saying, Jesus, thou Son of David, have mercy on me.
031838.phonetic: U-we-lu-ne-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Tsi-sa, De-wi u-we-tsi, s-gi-do-li-gi.

031839.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏃ ᎠᏁᎩ ᎬᏩᎬᏍᎪᎸᏁᎢ, ᎡᎳᏪ ᎲᎾ ᎬᏬᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏟᏉ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏪᎷᏁᎢ; ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏍᎩᏙᎵᎩ, ᎠᏗᏍᎨᎢ.
031839.english: And they which went before rebuked him, that he should hold his peace: but he cried so much the more, Thou Son of David, have mercy on me.
031839.phonetic: I-gv-yi-no a-ne-gi gv-wa-gv-s-go-lv-ne-i, e-la-we hv-na gv-wo-se-le-i; a-se-no u-tli-quo i-ga-i u-we-lu-ne-i; De-wi U-we-tsi s-gi-do-li-gi, a-di-s-ge-i.

031840.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎴᏫᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎠᎦᏘᏃᎮᏗᏱ; ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᎥ ᎤᎷᏨ ᎤᏛᏛᏁᎢ,
031840.english: And Jesus stood, and commanded him to be brought unto him: and when he was come near, he asked him,
031840.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-le-wi-s-ta-nv u-ne-tse a-ga-ti-no-he-di-yi; hna-quo-no na-v u-lu-tsv u-dv-dv-ne-i,

031841.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏣᏚᎵ ᎬᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎥᎠᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᎭ.
031841.english: Saying, What wilt thou that I shall do unto thee? And he said, Lord, that I may receive my sight.
031841.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ga-do tsa-du-li gv-ya-dv-ne-di-yi?  Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, v-a-gi-go-wa-dv-di-yi a-qua-du-li-ha.

031842.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎨᏣᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ; ᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏣᏍᏕᎸ.
031842.english: And Jesus said unto him, Receive thy sight: thy faith hath saved thee.
031842.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ge-tsa-go-wa-dv-di wi-ni-ga-li-s-da; tso-hi-yu-sv tsa-s-de-lv.

031843.cherokee: ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ; ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᎪᎲ ᎤᏂᎸᏉᏔᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
031843.english: And immediately he received his sight, and followed him, glorifying God: and all the people, when they saw it, gave praise unto God.
031843.phonetic: Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv gv-wa-go-wa-dv-di nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, a-le u-s-da-wa-dv-se ga-lv-quo-di-s-ge U-ne-la-nv-hi; ni-ga-dv-no yv-wi u-ni-go-hv u-ni-lv-quo-ta-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi.

031901.english: And Jesus entered and passed through Jericho.

031902.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎡᎮ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏌᎩᏯ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎨᏎ ᎠᏕᎸᎠᎩᏏᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎨᏎᎢ.
031902.english: And, behold, there was a man named Zacchaeus, which was the chief among the publicans, and he was rich.
031902.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo e-he a-s-ga-ya Sa-gi-ya tsu-do-i-dv, na-s-gi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv ge-se a-de-lv-a-gi-si-do-hi, a-le u-we-hna-i-yu ge-se-i.

031903.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏄᎸᏁ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏍᏗᎩᏳᏰᏃ ᎨᏎᎢ.
031903.english: And he sought to see Jesus who he was; and could not for the press, because he was little of stature.
031903.phonetic: A-le u-yo-le Tsi-sa u-go-wa-dv-di-yi, na-s-gi nu-s-dv-i; a-se-no u-nu-lv-ne nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge u-ni-tsa-ti ge-sv-i, u-s-di-gi-yu-ye-no ge-se-i.

031904.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏃ ᏭᏗᏢᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᎸᏎ ᎫᏩᏧᏁᎬ ᏡᎬ ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᎢ; ᎾᎿᎭᏰᏃ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏭᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᎢ.
031904.english: And he ran before, and climbed up into a sycomore tree to see him: for he was to pass that way.
031904.phonetic: I-gv-yi-no wu-di-tlv-s-ta-nv u-lv-se gu-wa-tsu-ne-gv tlu-gv u-go-wa-dv-di-yi u-du-li-s-ge-i; na-hna-ye-no i-di-tlv wu-lo-hi-s-di ge-se-i.

031905.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎷᏨ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏫᏚᎧᎿᎭᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎪᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏌᎩᏯ, ᏞᎩᏳ ᎡᎭᏠᎠᎯ; ᎪᎯᏰᏃ ᎢᎦ ᏥᎩ ᏘᏁᎸ ᏫᎨᏙᎮᏍᏗ.
031905.english: And when Jesus came to the place, he looked up, and saw him, and said unto him, Zacchaeus, make haste, and come down; for to day I must abide at thy house.
031905.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no na-hna u-lu-tsv, ga-lv-la-di wi-du-ka-hna-ne-i, a-le u-go-he-i, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Sa-gi-ya, tle-gi-yu e-ha-tlo-a-hi; go-hi-ye-no i-ga tsi-gi ti-ne-lv wi-ge-do-he-s-di.

031906.english: And he made haste, and came down, and received him joyfully.

031907.cherokee: ᎤᏂᎪᎲᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏂᏐᏅᏤᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏩᏴᏢ ᏮᏛᏒᏎᎵ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏍᎦᎾᎢ.
031907.english: And when they saw it, they all murmured, saying, That he was gone to be guest with a man that is a sinner.
031907.phonetic: U-ni-go-hv-no na-s-gi ni-ga-dv u-ni-so-nv-tse-le-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Wa-yv-tlv wv-dv-sv-se-li a-s-ga-ya a-s-ga-na-i.

031908.cherokee: ᏌᎩᏯᏃ ᎤᎴᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᏰᎵ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᎩᎲ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏕᏥᎥᏏ; ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎠᏋᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᎩᎡᎸ, ᏅᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᎫᏗ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏥᎥᏏ.
031908.english: And Zacchaeus stood, and said unto the Lord; Behold, Lord, the half of my goods I give to the poor; and if I have taken any thing from any man by false accusation, I restore him fourfold.
031908.phonetic: Sa-gi-ya-no u-le-ne hi-a nu-we-se-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi, Gv-ni-yu-quo, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-ye-li i-ga-i tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-gi-hv u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi de-tsi-v-si; i-yu a-le ga-ye-go-gi a-quv-ta-nv-hi yi-gi gi-lo go-hu-s-di yi-tsi-gi-e-lv, nv-gi i-yu-wa-gu-di i-ga-i tsi-v-si.

031909.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎷᎩ ᎠᏂ ᎠᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031909.english: And Jesus said unto him, This day is salvation come to this house, forsomuch as he also is a son of Abraham.
031909.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Go-hi i-ga a-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv ga-lu-gi a-ni a-da-ne-lv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di na-s-gi na-s-quo E-qua-ha-mi u-we-tsi ge-sv-i.

031910.cherokee: ᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏚᏲᎵᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏍᏕᎸᎯᎸ ᎤᎾᎴᎾᎸᎯ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ.
031910.english: For the Son of man is come to seek and to save that which was lost.
031910.phonetic: Yv-wi-ye-no U-we-tsi du-yo-li-lv a-le du-s-de-lv-hi-lv u-na-le-na-lv-hi tsi-ge-sv-gi.

031911.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏁᏉᎡ ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎾᎥ ᎤᎷᏥᏗᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏪᏅᏛ ᏓᎦᎾᏄᎪᏥ ᎠᏁᎵᏍᎬᎢ.
031911.english: And as they heard these things, he added and spake a parable, because he was nigh to Jerusalem, and because they thought that the kingdom of God should immediately appear.
031911.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a u-na-dv-ga-nv u-ne-quo-e du-tli-lo-s-da-ne-le-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge Tsi-lu-si-li-mi na-v u-lu-tsi-di-sv-i, a-le nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv i-gv-we-nv-dv da-ga-na-nu-go-tsi a-ne-li-s-gv-i.

031912.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏰᎬᏍᏓ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎢᏅ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ, ᎤᎸᏒᏎ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎥᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
031912.english: He said therefore, A certain nobleman went into a far country to receive for himself a kingdom, and to return.
031912.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a nu-we-se-i, Gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ye-gv-s-da i-lv-hi-tlv i-nv wu-lo-se-i, u-lv-sv-se u-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ya-gv-ne-di-yi a-le v-u-lu-hi-s-di-yi.

031913.cherokee: ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎮᏃ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎤᏲᎯᏎᎴ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎨᏛ [ᎠᏕᎸ,] ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏕᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎬᏂ ᎢᏥᎷᏨᎭ.
031913.english: And he called his ten servants, and delivered them ten pounds, and said unto them, Occupy till I come.
031913.phonetic: Wi-du-ya-nv-he-no a-s-go-hi i-ya-ni-dv tsu-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le de-u-yo-hi-se-le a-s-go-hi i-yu-da-ge-dv [a-de-lv,] hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Go-hu-s-di de-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di gv-ni i-tsi-lu-tsv-ha.

031914.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎢᎬᏩᏂᏆᏘᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᏅᏎ ᎬᏩᎨᎮᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏫᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏲᎦᏚᎵ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎣᎦᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
031914.english: But his citizens hated him, and sent a message after him, saying, We will not have this man to reign over us.
031914.phonetic: A-se-no tsu-tse-li yv-wi i-gv-wa-ni-qua-ti-le-i, a-le du-ni-nv-se gv-wa-ge-he-gi, hi-a wi-na-ni-we-s-ge-i, V-tla yo-ga-du-li hi-a a-s-ga-ya u-gv-wi-yu-hi o-ga-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

031915.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎢᎤᎷᏥᎸ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏁᏤ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏫᎨᏥᏯᏅᏗᏱ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏧᎨᏅᏛᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏁᏉᏤᎸ ᎠᏂᏃᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
031915.english: And it came to pass, that when he was returned, having received the kingdom, then he commanded these servants to be called unto him, to whom he had given the money, that he might know how much every man had gained by trading.
031915.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, i-u-lu-tsi-lv, u-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ya-gv-ne-lv-hi ge-se-i, u-ne-tse na-s-gi ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di wi-ge-tsi-ya-nv-di-yi gv-wa-lu-tse-di-yi, na-s-gi na a-de-lv tsu-ge-nv-dv-hi, na-s-gi u-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi i-ga-i a-ni-si-yv-wi u-ni-ne-quo-tse-lv a-ni-no-di-s-gv-i.

031916.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏃ ᎤᎷᏨᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ, ᏣᏤᎵ ᏑᏓᎨᏛ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎨᏛ ᎤᏁᏉᏨ.
031916.english: Then came the first, saying, Lord, thy pound hath gained ten pounds.
031916.phonetic: I-gv-yi-no u-lu-tsv-hi, hi-a nu-we-se-i, S-gi-na-tla-i, tsa-tse-li su-da-ge-dv a-s-go-hi i-yu-da-ge-dv u-ne-quo-tsv.

031917.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎣᏏᏳ, ᎰᏍᏛ ᎡᏣᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ; ᎤᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᏕᎦᏚᎲᎢ.
031917.english: And he said unto him, Well, thou good servant: because thou hast been faithful in a very little, have thou authority over ten cities.
031917.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, O-si-yu, ho-s-dv e-tsa-nv-si-da-s-di; u-s-di ge-sv o-si-yu ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv; tsa-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi ge-se-s-di a-s-go-hi de-ga-du-hv-i.

031918.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎤᎷᏨᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ, ᏣᏤᎵ ᏑᏓᎨᏛ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏓᎨᏛ ᎤᏁᏉᏨ.
031918.english: And the second came, saying, Lord, thy pound hath gained five pounds.
031918.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no u-lu-tsv-hi, hi-a nu-we-se-i, S-gi-na-tla-i, tsa-tse-li su-da-ge-dv hi-s-gi i-yu-da-ge-dv u-ne-quo-tsv.

031919.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᏚᎩ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031919.english: And he said likewise to him, Be thou also over five cities.
031919.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na-s-quo hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, ni-hi na-s-quo hi-s-gi i-ga-du-gi tsa-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi ge-se-s-di.

031920.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎤᎷᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂ ᏣᏤᎵ ᏑᏓᎨᏛ, ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏛᎩ ᎠᎩᏣᏄᎸᎩ ᎠᏯᏠᎩᎯ;
031920.english: And another came, saying, Lord, behold, here is thy pound, which I have kept laid up in a napkin:
031920.phonetic: Nv-wa-da-le-no u-lu-tse-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i, S-gi-na-tla-i, gv-ni-yu-quo a-ni tsa-tse-li su-da-ge-dv, a-gi-s-qua-ni-go-dv-gi a-gi-tsa-nu-lv-gi a-ya-tlo-gi-hi;

031921.cherokee: ᎬᎾᏰᏍᎬᏰᏃ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎯᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎯᏍᎦᏯ; ᎯᎩᏍᎪᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏅᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᏍᎫᏕᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏫᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031921.english: For I feared thee, because thou art an austere man: thou takest up that thou layedst not down, and reapest that thou didst not sow.
031921.phonetic: Gv-na-ye-s-gv-ye-no, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi hi-s-da-yi-yu ge-sv hi-s-ga-ya; hi-gi-s-go-ye-no na-s-gi ni-tsa-nv-na ge-sv-i, a-le hi-s-gu-de-s-go na-s-gi ni-tsa-wi-sv-na ge-sv-i.

031922.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏨᏒ ᏂᏣᏪᏒ ᏓᎬᏔᏂ ᏙᏓᎬᏳᎪᏓᏁᎵ ᏣᏲ ᎡᏣᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ.  ᎯᎦᏔᎲᎩ ᏥᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏥᎩᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏍᎫᏕᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᏫᏒᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ;
031922.english: And he saith unto him, Out of thine own mouth will I judge thee, thou wicked servant. Thou knewest that I was an austere man, taking up that I laid not down, and reaping that I did not sow:
031922.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le-i, Tsv-sv ni-tsa-we-sv da-gv-ta-ni do-da-gv-yu-go-da-ne-li tsa-yo e-tsa-nv-si-da-s-di.  Hi-ga-ta-hv-gi tsi-s-da-yi-yu ge-sv-i, tsi-gi-s-gv na-s-gi a-gi-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-le tsi-s-gu-de-s-gv na-s-gi a-gi-wi-sv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i;

031923.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ Ꮭ ᏗᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᏱᏫᏙᏣᏁ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᎠᏕᏄ, ᎠᎩᎷᏥᎸᏃ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁᏉᏨᎯ ᏱᏓᎩᎩᏎᎢ.
031923.english: Wherefore then gavest not thou my money into the bank, that at my coming I might have required mine own with usury?
031923.phonetic: Ga-do-no tla di-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi yi-wi-do-tsa-ne di-qua-tse-li a-de-nu, a-gi-lu-tsi-lv-no di-qua-tse-li a-le u-ni-ne-quo-tsv-hi yi-da-gi-gi-se-i.

031924.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎾᎥ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎢ, ᎡᏥᎩᏏ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏑᏓᎨᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎨᏛ ᏧᎯ ᎡᏥᎥᏏ^
031924.english: And he said unto them that stood by, Take from him the pound, and give it to him that hath ten pounds.
031924.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le na-v a-ni-do-na-i, E-tsi-gi-si na-s-gi na su-da-ge-dv, a-le a-s-go-hi i-yu-da-ge-dv tsu-hi e-tsi-v-si^

031925.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏗᏍᎩᎾᏝᎢ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎨᏛ ᏕᎤᎭ^
031925.english: (And they said unto him, Lord, he hath ten pounds.)
031925.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, Di-s-gi-na-tla-i, a-s-go-hi i-yu-da-ge-dv de-u-ha^

031926.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᏂᎯ ᎨᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᏄᏂᎲᎾᏃ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏂᎲ ᎨᏥᎩᎡᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
031926.english: For I say unto you, That unto every one which hath shall be given; and from him that hath not, even that he hath shall be taken away from him.
031926.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Na-s-gi na-ni-v u-ni-hi ge-tsi-ne-di ge-se-s-di; nu-ni-hv-na-no tsi-gi, na-s-gi na-s-quo u-ni-hv ge-tsi-gi-e-di ge-se-s-di.

031927.cherokee: ᎾᏃ ᎬᎩᏍᎦᎩ, ᏄᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏯᏆᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᎡᏗᏣᏘᏄᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᎷᎦ ᏥᎦᏔᎲᎢ
031927.english: But those mine enemies, which would not that I should reign over them, bring hither, and slay them before me.
031927.phonetic: Na-no gv-gi-s-ga-gi, nu-na-du-li-s-gv-na tsi-ge-sv a-gi-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ya-qua-li-s-do-di-yi a-ne-hv-i, e-di-tsa-ti-nu-ga, a-le di-tsi-lu-ga tsi-ga-ta-hv-i

031928.cherokee: [ᏥᏌᏃ] ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏪᏒ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᏪᏅᎭ ᎤᎿᎭᎷᏎ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏩᎦᏖᎢ.
031928.english: And when he had thus spoken, he went before, ascending up to Jerusalem.
031928.phonetic: [Tsi-sa-no] na-s-gi nu-we-sv, i-gv-yi u-we-nv-ha u-hna-lu-se Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wa-ga-te-i.

031929.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎸᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎾᎥ ᎤᎷᏨ ᏒᎦᏙᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏇᏗᏂᏱ, ᎾᎿᎭᎣᎵᏩᏲᎯ ᎤᏌᎯᎸ ᏥᏚᏙᎠ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏚᏅᏎᎢ,
031929.english: And it came to pass, when he was come nigh to Bethphage and Bethany, at the mount called the mount of Olives, he sent two of his disciples,
031929.phonetic: Hi-a-no lv-li-s-ta-ne na-v u-lu-tsv Sv-ga-do-hi a-le Que-di-ni-yi, na-hna O-li-wa-yo-hi u-sa-hi-lv tsi-du-do-a, na-s-gi a-ni-ta-li gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi du-nv-se-i,

031930.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏍᏕᎾ ᎢᏢ Ꮎ ᏨᏗᎦᏚᎭ, ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᏫᏍᏗᎷᏨᎭ ᏓᏰᏍᏗᏩᏛᎯ ᎠᎩᎾ ᎨᎵᏌᏕᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏ ᎩᎶ ᎤᎩᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᎡᏍᏕᎵᏌᏕᏒᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏤᏍᏓᏘᏁᏒᎭ.
031930.english: Saying, Go ye into the village over against you; in the which at your entering ye shall find a colt tied, whereon yet never man sat: loose him, and bring him hither.
031930.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-i, I-s-de-na i-tlv na tsv-di-ga-du-ha, na-hna-no wi-s-di-lu-tsv-ha da-ye-s-di-wa-dv-hi a-gi-na ge-li-sa-de-s-di, na-s-gi v-tla a-si gi-lo u-gi-lv-ta-nv-hi yi-gi; e-s-de-li-sa-de-sv-ha a-le tse-s-da-ti-ne-sv-ha.

031931.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏍᏓᏛᏛᏅ ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎡᏍᏕᎵᏌᏕᎭ?  ᎢᏍᏙᏎᎸᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᏁᏍᏗᏪᏎᎸᎭ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᎾ ᎤᏚᎵᎭ.
031931.english: And if any man ask you, Why do ye loose him? thus shall ye say unto him, Because the Lord hath need of him.
031931.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo i-s-da-dv-dv-nv Ga-do-no i-e-s-de-li-sa-de-ha?  I-s-do-se-lv-ha, hi-a ne-s-di-we-se-lv-ha; U-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-na u-du-li-ha.

031932.cherokee: ᎨᏥᏅᏒᎯᏃ ᎤᏁᏅᏎ ᎠᎴ ᏭᏂᏩᏛᎮ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎢ.
031932.english: And they that were sent went their way, and found even as he had said unto them.
031932.phonetic: Ge-tsi-nv-sv-hi-no u-ne-nv-se a-le wu-ni-wa-dv-he na-s-gi-ya ni-du-we-se-lv-i.

031933.cherokee: ᎠᏁᎵᏌᏕᏍᎨᏃ ᎠᎩᎾ, ᎤᏂᎾᏝᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏂᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎡᏍᏕᎵᏌᏕ ᎠᎩᎾ?
031933.english: And as they were loosing the colt, the owners thereof said unto them, Why loose ye the colt?
031933.phonetic: A-ne-li-sa-de-s-ge-no a-gi-na, u-ni-na-tla-i hi-a ni-gv-wa-ni-we-se-le-i, Ga-do-no i-e-s-de-li-sa-de a-gi-na?

031934.english: And they said, The Lord hath need of him.

031935.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎾᏘᏃᎮᎴᎢ; ᏧᎾᏄᏬᏃ ᎠᎩᎾ ᎦᏐᎯ ᏚᏂᏢᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎾᎩᎸᏔᏁ ᏥᏌ.
031935.english: And they brought him to Jesus: and they cast their garments upon the colt, and they set Jesus thereon.
031935.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-na-ti-no-he-le-i; tsu-na-nu-wo-no a-gi-na ga-so-hi du-ni-tlv-ne-i, a-le na-hna u-na-gi-lv-ta-ne Tsi-sa.

031936.english: And as he went, they spread their clothes in the way.

031937.cherokee: ᎾᎥᏃ ᏭᎷᏨ, ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎦᏐᎠᏍᎬ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎣᎵᏩᏲ ᎤᏌᎯᎸᎢ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎾᏓᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎮ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎨ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎠᏂᏁᎨᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏕᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏂᎪᎲᎢ;
031937.english: And when he was come nigh, even now at the descent of the mount of Olives, the whole multitude of the disciples began to rejoice and praise God with a loud voice for all the mighty works that they had seen;
031937.phonetic: Na-v-no wu-lu-tsv, na-hna a-ga-so-a-s-gv i-yv-dv O-li-wa-yo u-sa-hi-lv-i, ni-ga-dv u-ni-tsa-ti ge-sv a-na-da-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-na-le-nv-he a-na-li-he-li-ge a-le a-ni-lv-quo-di-s-ge U-ne-la-nv-hi a-s-da-ya a-ni-ne-ge-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge ni-ga-dv u-s-qua-ni-go-di de-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv u-ni-go-hv-i;

031938.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ. ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏚᏙᏍᏛ ᏥᎦᎷᎯᏍᏗᎭ; ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ!
031938.english: Saying, Blessed be the King that cometh in the name of the Lord: peace in heaven, and glory in the highest.
031938.phonetic: Hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i. Ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di na-s-gi na U-gv-wi-yu-hi Yi-ho-wa du-do-s-dv tsi-ga-lu-hi-s-di-ha; Ga-lv-la-di nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ge-se-s-di, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di wa-s-dv ga-lv-la-di-yu ge-sv-i!

031939.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏄᎾᏛᏅ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏗᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᏘᏅᏍᏓᏗᏏ ᎨᏣᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ.
031939.english: And some of the Pharisees from among the multitude said unto him, Master, rebuke thy disciples.
031939.phonetic: I-ga-dv-no A-ni-qua-li-si na-hna u-ni-tsa-ti nu-na-dv-nv hi-a nv-di-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ti-nv-s-da-di-si ge-tsa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi.

031940.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎡᎳᏪᏱ ᏳᏅᏅ, ᏅᏯ ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏯᏁᎷᎲᎦ.
031940.english: And he answered and said unto them, I tell you that, if these should hold their peace, the stones would immediately cry out.
031940.phonetic: U-ne-tsv-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, I-yu-no hi-a e-la-we-yi yu-nv-nv, nv-ya gi-la-quo i-yv-dv ya-ne-lu-hv-ga.

031941.english: And when he was come near, he beheld the city, and wept over it,

031942.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏱᎯᎦᏔᎮᎢ, ᎥᎥ, ᏂᎯ, ᎪᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏣᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏣᏁᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ!  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎡᏨᏍᎦᎳᏁᎸ.
031942.english: Saying, If thou hadst known, even thou, at least in this thy day, the things which belong unto thy peace! but now they are hid from thine eyes.
031942.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-i, i-yu-no ni-hi yi-hi-ga-ta-he-i, v-v, ni-hi, go-hi na-s-quo na-s-gi hi-a tsa-tse-li i-ga ge-sv-i, na-s-gi nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv tsa-ne-hi ge-sv-i!  a-se-no hna-quo e-tsv-s-ga-la-ne-lv.

031943.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏣᎵᏰᎢᎶᎮᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏣᏍᎦᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏙᏛᏁᎵᏍᎦᎸᎯ ᎬᏩᏚᏫᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᎨᏣᏚᏫᏍᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᎦᏘᏓᏂ ᎨᏣᎵᏍᏚᏕᏍᏗ.
031943.english: For the days shall come upon thee, that thine enemies shall cast a trench about thee, and compass thee round, and keep thee in on every side,
031943.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-ye-no ge-sv da-tsa-li-ye-i-lo-he-li, na-s-gi ge-tsa-s-ga-gi ge-sv do-dv-ne-li-s-ga-lv-hi gv-wa-du-wi-dv, a-le do-da-ge-tsa-du-wi-s-ta-ni, a-le nv-ga-ti-da-ni ge-tsa-li-s-du-de-s-di.

031944.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᎯ ᏓᎨᏣᏡᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏤᏥ ᎬᏂᏯᎢ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎨᏣᎯᏰᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏌᏉ ᏅᏯ ᏱᏚᏓᏌᏝᎮᏍᏗ; ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎢᏳ ᎡᏣᏩᏛᎯᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
031944.english: And shall lay thee even with the ground, and thy children within thee; and they shall not leave in thee one stone upon another; because thou knewest not the time of thy visitation.
031944.phonetic: A-le ga-do-hi da-ge-tsa-tlu-ni, a-le di-tse-tsi gv-ni-ya-i ge-se-s-di; a-le v-tla ge-tsa-hi-ye-di yi-ge-se-s-di sa-quo nv-ya yi-du-da-sa-tla-he-s-di; nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ni-ga-ta-hv-na tsi-ge-sv i-yu e-tsa-wa-dv-hi-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

031945.cherokee: ᏭᏴᎸᏃ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᏚᏄᎪᏫᏎ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎠᏂᏃᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏩᏒᎥᏍᎩ;
031945.english: And he went into the temple, and began to cast out them that sold therein, and them that bought;
031945.phonetic: Wu-yv-lv-no u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, u-le-nv-he du-nu-go-wi-se na-hna a-ni-no-di-s-gi, a-le u-ni-wa-sv-v-s-gi;

031946.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ, ᏥᏁᎸ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏚᏙᎠ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎠᏂᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏍᏓᎦᎸ ᏂᏨᏁᎸ.
031946.english: Saying unto them, It is written, My house is the house of prayer: but ye have made it a den of thieves.
031946.phonetic: Hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-la, Tsi-ne-lv a-da-do-li-s-do-di-yi a-da-ne-lv du-do-a, a-se-no ni-hi a-ni-no-s-gi-s-gi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi u-s-da-ga-lv ni-tsv-ne-lv.

031947.cherokee: ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒᏃ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎨ ᎤᏛᎾᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏫ ᎤᎾᏁᎶᏔᏁ ᎬᏩᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
031947.english: And he taught daily in the temple. But the chief priests and the scribes and the chief of the people sought to destroy him,
031947.phonetic: Ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv-no da-de-yo-hv-s-ge u-dv-na-di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi.  A-se-no nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-wi u-na-ne-lo-ta-ne gv-wa-hi-s-di-yi.

031948.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏠᏤ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ; ᏂᎦᏛᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎬᏩᏝᏫᏍᏗᏕᎨ ᎬᏩᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
031948.english: And could not find what they might do: for all the people were very attentive to hear him.
031948.phonetic: A-le u-na-tlo-tse i-yu-na-dv-ne-di-yi; ni-ga-dv-ye-no yv-wi gv-wa-tla-wi-s-di-de-ge gv-wa-dv-da-s-da-ne-di-yi.

032001.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ, ᏕᎨᏲᎲᏍᎨ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏛᎾᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏃᎴᎢ, ᎤᎾᎵᎪᏎ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ,
032001.english: And it came to pass, that on one of those days, as he taught the people in the temple, and preached the gospel, the chief priests and the scribes came upon him with the elders,
032001.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi sa-quo i-ga na-hi-yu ge-sv, de-ge-yo-hv-s-ge yv-wi u-dv-na-di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv a-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge-i, na-s-gi nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-a-ne-lo-hi, a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi gv-wa-no-le-i, u-na-li-go-se di-ni-la-wi-gi,

032002.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᎵᏃᎮᏔᏁ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ, ᎦᏙ ᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᏥᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏣᏁᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ?
032002.english: And spake unto him, saying, Tell us, by what authority doest thou these things? or who is he that gave thee this authority?
032002.phonetic: A-le gv-wa-li-no-he-ta-ne, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, S-gi-no-hv-si, ga-do tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-di hi-a na-s-gi tsi-nu-s-di tsi-de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha?  A-le ga-go na-s-gi na tsa-ne-lv-hi na-s-gi i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi?

032003.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏑᏓᎴᎩ ᏓᏨᏯᏛᏛᏂ; ᎠᎴ ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ;
032003.english: And he answered and said unto them, I will also ask you one thing; and answer me:
032003.phonetic: U-ne-tsv-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, A-yv na-s-quo su-da-le-gi da-tsv-ya-dv-dv-ni; a-le s-gi-no-hv-si;

032004.cherokee: ᏣᏂ ᏧᏓᏬᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏍᎪ ᏧᏓᎴᏁᎢ, ᏴᏫᏉᎨ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ.
032004.english: The baptism of John, was it from heaven, or of men?
032004.phonetic: Tsa-ni tsu-da-wo-s-di ge-sv-i, ga-lv-la-di-s-go tsu-da-le-ne-i, yv-wi-quo-ge a-ne-hv-i.

032005.cherokee: ᏙᏧᎾᏓᏅᏛᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ, ᏲᎦᏛᏅ, ᎯᎠ ᏱᏃᎩᏪᏏ, ᎦᏙᏃ Ꮭ ᏱᎡᏦᎢᏳᏁᎢ?
032005.english: And they reasoned with themselves, saying, If we shall say, From heaven; he will say, Why then believed ye him not?
032005.phonetic: Do-tsu-na-da-nv-dv-no u-na-da-nv-te-le hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i, I-yu-no ga-lv-la-di, yo-ga-dv-nv, hi-a yi-no-gi-we-si, Ga-do-no tla yi-e-tso-i-yu-ne-i?

032006.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᏲᎦᏛᏅ, ᏂᎦᏛᏉ ᏴᏫ ᏅᏯ ᏱᏕᎪᎬᏂᏍᏓ; ᏣᏂᏰᏃ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᏁᎵᎭ.
032006.english: But and if we say, Of men; all the people will stone us: for they be persuaded that John was a prophet.
032006.phonetic: I-yu-no Yv-wi-quo a-ne-hv-i, yo-ga-dv-nv, ni-ga-dv-quo yv-wi nv-ya yi-de-go-gv-ni-s-da; Tsa-ni-ye-no a-do-le-ho-s-gi ge-sv-gi, a-ne-li-ha.

032007.english: And they answered, that they could not tell whence it was.

032008.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏴᎨᏨᏃᎲᏏ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ.
032008.english: And Jesus said unto them, Neither tell I you by what authority I do these things.
032008.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, V-tla na-s-quo a-yv yv-ge-tsv-no-hv-si i-yu-s-di ge-sv a-qua-li-s-ga-s-do-dv hi-a na-s-gi tsi-da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha.

032009.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏓᏁᎴ ᏴᏫ; ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏚᏫᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏙᎳᏍᏔᏁ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏭᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏅ ᏭᎶᏎ ᎪᎯᏛ ᏭᏪᏙᎴᎢ.
032009.english: Then began he to speak to the people this parable; A certain man planted a vineyard, and let it forth to husbandmen, and went into a far country for a long time.
032009.phonetic: A-le hna-quo u-le-nv-he na-s-gi hi-a du-tli-lo-s-da-ne-le yv-wi; Gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya te-lv-la-di du-wi-se-i, a-le du-do-la-s-ta-ne tlo-ge-si wu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-le i-nv wu-lo-se go-hi-dv wu-we-do-le-i.

032010.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎤᏅᏂᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏎ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏗᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏙᏓᎬᏩᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏛᏅᎯ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎤᏂᎵᎥᏂᎸ ᎠᏒᎭ ᎤᏂᎨᎯᏙᎴᎢ.
032010.english: And at the season he sent a servant to the husbandmen, that they should give him of the fruit of the vineyard: but the husbandmen beat him, and sent him away empty.
032010.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no u-nv-ni-s-di-yi ge-sv u-nv-si-da-s-di u-nv-se tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi di-ne-hv-i, na-s-gi ni-do-da-gv-wa-nv-ne-di-yi u-na-da-dv-nv-hi te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv-i; a-se-no tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi u-ni-li-v-ni-lv a-sv-ha u-ni-ge-hi-do-le-i.

032011.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᏅᏎ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎦᎬᏩᏂᏐᏢᏔᏅ, ᎠᏒᎭ ᎤᏂᎨᎯᏙᎴᎢ.
032011.english: And again he sent another servant: and they beat him also, and entreated him shamefully, and sent him away empty.
032011.phonetic: A-le ta-li-ne nv-wa-da-le u-nv-se u-nv-si-da-s-di ga-gv-wa-ni-so-tlv-ta-nv, a-sv-ha u-ni-ge-hi-do-le-i.

032012.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎤᏅᏎᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏂᏐᏅᏅ ᎤᏂᏄᎪᏫᏎᎢ.
032012.english: And again he sent a third: and they wounded him also, and cast him out.
032012.phonetic: A-le-wo tso-i-ne u-nv-se-i; na-s-gi-no na-s-quo u-ni-so-nv-nv u-ni-nu-go-wi-se-i.

032013.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏓᎦᏛᏁᎵ?  ᎠᏇᏥ ᏥᎨᏳᎢ ᏓᏥᏅᏏ; ᏯᏂᎸᏉᏓ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᎪᎲᎭ.
032013.english: Then said the lord of the vineyard, What shall I do? I will send my beloved son: it may be they will reverence him when they see him.
032013.phonetic: Hna-quo-no te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv u-tse-li-ga, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ga-do da-ga-dv-ne-li?  A-que-tsi tsi-ge-yu-i da-tsi-nv-si; ya-ni-lv-quo-da yi-gi na-s-gi a-ni-go-hv-ha.

032014.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎤᏂᎪᎲ, ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᎵᏃᎮᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏘᏰᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ, Ꭷ, ᎡᏗᎷᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏘᏯᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ.
032014.english: But when the husbandmen saw him, they reasoned among themselves, saying, This is the heir: come, let us kill him, that the inheritance may be ours.
032014.phonetic: A-se-no tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi u-ni-go-hv, u-nv-sv ge-sv u-na-li-no-he-le hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-le-i, Hi-a na-s-gi u-ti-ye-di tsi-gi tsu-gv-wa-lo-di, Ka, e-di-lu-ga, na-s-gi-no tsu-gv-wa-lo-di u-ti-ya-s-da-ne-di ge-sv i-ga-tse-li yi-ni-ga-li-s-da.

032015.cherokee: ᎰᏩᏃ ᎤᏂᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒᎢ, ᎤᏂᎴᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎦᏙ ᏙᏓᎬᏁᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ?
032015.english: So they cast him out of the vineyard, and killed him. What therefore shall the lord of the vineyard do unto them?
032015.phonetic: Ho-wa-no u-ni-nu-go-wi-sv te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv-i, u-ni-le-i.  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-gi na te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv u-tse-li-ga ga-do do-da-gv-ne-li na-s-gi?

032016.cherokee: ᏓᎦᎷᏥ ᎠᎴ ᏙᏛᏛᏔᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏙᏛᏁᎵ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏁᎸ, ᎥᏞᏍᏗ, ᎤᎾᏛᏁᎢ.
032016.english: He shall come and destroy these husbandmen, and shall give the vineyard to others. And when they heard it, they said, God forbid.
032016.phonetic: Da-ga-lu-tsi a-le do-dv-dv-ta-ni na-s-gi na tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-le nv-wa-na-da-le do-dv-ne-li te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv-i.  Na-s-gi-no u-na-dv-ga-ne-lv, V-tle-s-di, u-na-dv-ne-i.

032017.cherokee: ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏅᏃ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᏗᎾᏁᏍᎨᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏲᎢᏎᎸᎯ ᏅᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎤᏅᏏᏴ ᎠᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ?
032017.english: And he beheld them, and said, What is this then that is written, The stone which the builders rejected, the same is become the head of the corner?
032017.phonetic: Du-ka-hna-nv-no, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ga-do-no na-s-gi hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, Di-na-ne-s-ge-s-gi u-ni-yo-i-se-lv-hi nv-ya na-s-gi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv u-nv-si-yv a-di nu-li-s-ta-nv?

032018.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏅᏲᎯ ᎠᏢᏨᎭ ᏓᏳᏐᏅᏂ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏐᏅᎭ ᏓᏳᏪᏓᏬᏔᏂ.
032018.english: Whosoever shall fall upon that stone shall be broken; but on whomsoever it shall fall, it will grind him to powder.
032018.phonetic: Gi-lo na-s-gi na-hna nv-yo-hi a-tlv-tsv-ha da-yu-so-nv-ni; gi-lo-no na-s-gi u-so-nv-ha da-yu-we-da-wo-ta-ni.

032019.cherokee: ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎾᎯᏳᏉ ᎤᎾᏁᎶᏔᏁ ᎤᏂᏂᏴᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏚᏂᏍᎦᎴ ᏴᏫ; ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏎᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏥᏛᎬᎢ.
032019.english: And the chief priests and the scribes the same hour sought to lay hands on him; and they feared the people: for they perceived that he had spoken this parable against them.
032019.phonetic: Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi na-hi-yu-quo u-na-ne-lo-ta-ne u-ni-ni-yv-di-yi, a-se-no du-ni-s-ga-le yv-wi; u-na-do-le-ho-se-ye-no na-s-gi hi-a du-tli-lo-s-ta-nv u-nv-sv ge-tsi-dv-gv-i.

032020.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏌᏯᏍᏕᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏧᏂᏅᏎ ᎠᎾᏓᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎤᎾᏣᎸᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎪᏁᎶᎯᏎᏗᏱ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏫᏚᏂᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ ᎤᏰᎢᎵᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
032020.english: And they watched him, and sent forth spies, which should feign themselves just men, that they might take hold of his words, that so they might deliver him unto the power and authority of the governor.
032020.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-sa-ya-s-de-no, a-le do-tsu-ni-nv-se a-na-da-ga-sa-ya-s-di-s-gi, na-s-gi u-na-da-nv-ti u-na-tsa-lv-di-yi na-s-gi gv-wa-go-ne-lo-hi-se-di-yi ga-wo-ni-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-no wi-du-ni-yo-hi-se-di-yi u-ye-i-li-da-s-di-yi u-gv-wi-yu-hi.

032021.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏁᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎯᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᏕᎭᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏘᎸᏉᏙᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᏅᏅ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏕᎭᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ;
032021.english: And they asked him, saying, Master, we know that thou sayest and teachest rightly, neither acceptest thou the person of any, but teachest the way of God truly:
032021.phonetic: Gv-wa-dv-dv-ne-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, o-tsi-ga-ta-ha hi-wo-ni-s-gv a-le de-ha-de-yo-hv-s-gv du-yu-go-dv ge-se-i, a-le ni-ti-lv-quo-do-dv-na ge-sv nu-na-s-dv yv-wi, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni u-tse-li ga-nv-nv u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya de-ha-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i;

032022.cherokee: ᏚᏳᎪᏗᏍᎪ ᏏᏌ ᎡᏓᎫᏴᎡᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᎫᏴᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏝᎨ?
032022.english: Is it lawful for us to give tribute unto Caesar, or no?
032022.phonetic: Du-yu-go-di-s-go Si-sa e-da-gu-yv-e-di-yi a-ye-li a-gu-yv-di ge-sv-i, tla-ge?

032023.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏎ ᎠᏂᏏᎾᏌᏅᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏍᎩᏌᏛᎥᏍᎦ?
032023.english: But he perceived their craftiness, and said unto them, Why tempt ye me?
032023.phonetic: A-se-no u-do-le-ho-se a-ni-si-na-sa-nv-gv-i, a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ga-do-no i-s-gi-sa-dv-v-s-ga?

032024.cherokee: ᏥᎪᏩᏛ ᎠᎩᏏ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ.  ᎦᎪ ᏓᎦᏟᎶᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᎭ ᎯᎠ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ?  ᎤᏂᏁᏤᏃ, ᏏᏌ, ᎤᎾᏛᏁᎢ.
032024.english: Shew me a penny. Whose image and superscription hath it? They answered and said, Caesar's.
032024.phonetic: Tsi-go-wa-dv a-gi-si tsu-gv-wa-lo-di.  Ga-go da-ga-tli-lo-s-di, a-le ga-go a-tsi-no-he-ha hi-a tsi-go-we-la?  U-ni-ne-tse-no, Si-sa, u-na-dv-ne-i.

032025.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎵᎢ, ᏏᏌ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᏏ ᏏᏌ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
032025.english: And he said unto them, Render therefore unto Caesar the things which be Caesar's, and unto God the things which be God's.
032025.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-li-i, Si-sa a-di-na e-tsa-gu-yv-si Si-sa u-tse-li-ga, U-ne-la-nv-hi-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.

032026.cherokee: ᎧᏁᎬᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎦᎬᏩᏂᎪᏁᎶᎯᏎᏗ ᏱᎨᏎ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ; ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᏃ ᏄᏪᏒ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎳᏪᏱ ᎤᏅᏁᎢ.
032026.english: And they could not take hold of his words before the people: and they marvelled at his answer, and held their peace.
032026.phonetic: Ka-ne-gv-no v-tla ye-li ga-gv-wa-ni-go-ne-lo-hi-se-di yi-ge-se yv-wi a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i; u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-se-no nu-we-sv u-ne-tsv-i, a-le e-la-we-yi u-nv-ne-i.

032027.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏌᏚᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᎾᏓᏱᎭ ᎠᏲᎱᏒ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏁᎢ,
032027.english: Then came to him certain of the Sadducees, which deny that there is any resurrection; and they asked him,
032027.phonetic: Hna-quo-no gi-lo i-yu-na-s-di A-ni-sa-du-si, na-s-gi tsa-na-da-yi-ha a-yo-hu-sv di-le-hi-so-di ge-sv-i, gv-wa-lu-tse-lv gv-wa-dv-dv-ne-i,

032028.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ,  ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎼᏏ ᎣᎪᏪᏁᎸᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏃᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎩᎶ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎤᏪᎧᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎾᏁᎲᎾ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎠᏓᏰᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏴᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏛᎯᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ.
032028.english: Saying, Master, Moses wrote unto us, If any man's brother die, having a wife, and he die without children, that his brother should take his wife, and raise up seed unto his brother.
032028.phonetic: Hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i,  Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, Mo-si o-go-we-ne-lv-gi hi-a no-gi-we-se-lv-gi, Gi-lo di-na-da-nv-tli a-yo-hu-s-ge-s-di u-da-li-i u-we-ka-he-s-di, a-le tsu-we-tsi na-ne-hv-na a-yo-hu-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi di-na-da-nv-tli a-da-ye-ge-s-di u-da-yv-dv, a-le da-dv-hi-s-da-ne-he-s-di tsu-we-tsi di-na-da-nv-tli.

032029.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏁᎲᎩ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ; ᎤᏓᏂᎵᎨᏃ ᎤᏕᏒᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎾᏁᎲᎾ.
032029.english: There were therefore seven brethren: and the first took a wife, and died without children.
032029.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-ne-hv-gi ga-li-quo-gi i-ya-ni-dv a-na-li-nv-tli; u-da-ni-li-ge-no u-de-sv-nv-gi, a-le u-yo-hu-sv tsu-we-tsi na-ne-hv-na.

032030.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏪᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏴᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎾᏁᎲᎾ.
032030.english: And the second took her to wife, and he died childless.
032030.phonetic: A-le ta-li-ne we-hi na-s-gi u-da-yv-sv-gi, a-le u-yo-hu-sv tsu-we-tsi na-ne-hv-na.

032031.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢᏁ ᏪᎯ ᎤᏓᏴᏒᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ; ᎠᎴ ᏧᏁᏥ ᎾᏁᎲᎾ ᏚᏂᏲᎱᏒᎩ.
032031.english: And the third took her; and in like manner the seven also: and they left no children, and died.
032031.phonetic: A-le tso-i-ne we-hi u-da-yv-sv-gi; a-le na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ga-li-quo-gi i-ya-ni-dv; a-le tsu-ne-tsi na-ne-hv-na du-ni-yo-hu-sv-gi.

032032.english: Last of all the woman died also.

032033.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᎸᎭ, ᎦᎪ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎦᎵᏉᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎤᎾᏓᏴᏛ ᎢᎩ.
032033.english: Therefore in the resurrection whose wife of them is she? for seven had her to wife.
032033.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hna-quo di-le-hi-so-di ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-lv-ha, ga-go u-da-li-i ge-se-s-di na-s-gi, ga-li-quo-gi-ye-no i-ya-ni-dv u-na-da-yv-dv i-gi.

032034.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏓᎾᏕᏒᎲᏍᎪᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏕᎨᏥᏰᎪᎢ;
032034.english: And Jesus answering said unto them, The children of this world marry, and are given in marriage:
032034.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, A-ni e-lo-hi a-ne-hi da-na-de-sv-hv-s-go-i a-le de-ge-tsi-ye-go-i;

032035.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᏐᎢᏱ ᏗᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏲᎱᏒ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎬᏩᎾᏖᎳᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏥᏰᎸᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏓᎾᏕᏒᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏱᏗᎨᏥᏰᎪᎢ.
032035.english: But they which shall be accounted worthy to obtain that world, and the resurrection from the dead, neither marry, nor are given in marriage:
032035.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni so-i-yi di-ge-sv a-le a-yo-hu-sv di-le-hi-so-di ge-sv ye-li-quo gv-wa-na-te-la-di-s-di ge-tsi-ye-lv-hi, v-tla yi-da-na-de-sv-hv-s-go-i, v-tla a-le yi-di-ge-tsi-ye-go-i.

032036.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎾᏍᏕᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎠᏲᎱᏒ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
032036.english: Neither can they die any more: for they are equal unto the angels; and are the children of God, being the children of the resurrection.
032036.phonetic: V-tla a-le hna-quo di-gv-wa-ni-yo-hu-hi-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di; di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-s-gi-ni ga-lv-la-di a-ne-hi nu-na-s-dv na-s-gi-ya nu-na-s-de-s-di; a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi na-s-gi, a-yo-hu-sv di-le-hi-so-di ge-sv tsu-we-tsi ge-sv i-yu-s-di.

032037.cherokee: ᎾᏃ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏧᎾᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᏱᏏ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏩᏁᎴ ᎤᏪᏲᏓᏛᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏏᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᏧᏬᏎᎴᎢ.
032037.english: Now that the dead are raised, even Moses shewed at the bush, when he calleth the Lord the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob.
032037.phonetic: Na-no tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi tsu-na-le-hi-so-di ge-sv, Yi-si gv-ni-ge-sv nu-wa-ne-le u-we-yo-da-dv-i, na-hi-yu Yi-ho-wa U-ne-la-nv-hi E-qua-ha-mi u-tse-li-ga, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi E-si-gi u-tse-li-ga, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi Tse-ga-qui u-tse-li-ga, tsu-wo-se-le-i.

032038.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᏱᎩ, ᏗᏅᏃᏛᏍᎩᏂ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏗᏅᏃᏛ.
032038.english: For he is not a God of the dead, but of the living: for all live unto him.
032038.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no v-tla tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi u-na-tse-li-ga yi-gi, di-nv-no-dv-s-gi-ni; na-s-gi-ye-no a-da-nv-te-s-gv ni-ga-di-yu di-nv-no-dv.

032039.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏁᏤ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᏰᎵᎦᏯ ᏂᏫ.
032039.english: Then certain of the scribes answering said, Master, thou hast well said.
032039.phonetic: Hna-quo-no gi-lo i-yu-na-s-di di-no-we-li-s-gi u-ni-ne-tse hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ye-li-ga-ya ni-wi.

032040.english: And after that they durst not ask him any question at all.

032041.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏣᎾᏗᎭ?
032041.english: And he said unto them, How say they that Christ is David's son?
032041.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, ga-do di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha Ga-lo-ne-dv De-wi u-we-tsi tsa-na-di-ha?

032042.cherokee: ᏕᏫᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᎪᏪᎵ, ᏱᎰᏩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ, ᏥᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏦᎴᏍᏗ,
032042.english: And David himself saith in the book of Psalms, The LORD said unto my Lord, Sit thou on my right hand,
032042.phonetic: De-wi-no u-wa-sv hi-a ni-ga-we-ha Di-ka-no-gi-s-di-yi go-we-li, Yi-ho-wa hi-a nu-we-se-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-qua-tse-li-ga, Tsi-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv tso-le-s-di,

032043.english: Till I make thine enemies thy footstool.

032044.cherokee: ᏕᏫᏰᏃ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎪᏎᎭ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎢᎩ?
032044.english: David therefore calleth him Lord, how is he then his son?
032044.phonetic: De-wi-ye-no Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi go-se-ha; ga-do-no di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-we-tsi i-gi?

032045.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏛᏓᏍᏛ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ,
032045.english: Then in the audience of all the people he said unto his disciples,
032045.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ni-ga-dv yv-wi u-na-dv-da-s-dv, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi,

032046.cherokee: ᏕᏤᏯᏙᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏚᎵᏍᎪ ᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᏧᎾᏄᏩᎢ ᎤᏁᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏧᏂᏰᎸᎭ ᎨᏥᏲᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᎦᏃᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏕᎦᏍᎩᎸ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏗᎾᏢᏗᏱ ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ;
032046.english: Beware of the scribes, which desire to walk in long robes, and love greetings in the markets, and the highest seats in the synagogues, and the chief rooms at feasts;
032046.phonetic: De-tse-ya-do-tse-he-s-di di-no-we-li-s-gi, na-s-gi tsu-na-du-li-s-go di-ga-nv-hi-dv tsu-na-nu-wa-i u-ne-da-s-di-yi, a-le o-si-yu tsu-ni-ye-lv-ha ge-tsi-yo-li-s-di-yi di-ga-no-do-di-yi, a-le nu-gv-wi-yu-sv de-ga-s-gi-lv di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le nu-gv-wi-yu-sv di-na-tlv-di-yi da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i;

032047.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᏂᏒᏁᎰ ᏧᏃᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᏓᏂᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏛ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᏣᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏂᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
032047.english: Which devour widows' houses, and for a shew make long prayers: the same shall receive greater damnation.
032047.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-da-ni-sv-ne-ho tsu-no-su-lo-tsv-hi da-ni-ne-lv-i, a-le u-na-tlo-na-s-dv go-hi-di-yu tsa-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-go-i; na-s-gi u-tli-hi-yu i-ga-i u-ni-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-se-s-di.

032101.cherokee: ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏅᏃ ᏚᎪᎮ ᏧᏁᎿᎭᎢ ᎠᏂᎲᏍᎨ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏗᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ.
032101.english: And he looked up, and saw the rich men casting their gifts into the treasury.
032101.phonetic: Du-ka-hna-nv-no du-go-he tsu-ne-hna-i a-ni-hv-s-ge a-de-lv--di-di-yi u-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi.

032102.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎪᎮ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎤᏬᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎲᏍᎨ ᏔᎵ ᎠᎩᏄᏛᏗ ᎢᏯᏓᏅᏖᏗ.
032102.english: And he saw also a certain poor widow casting in thither two mites.
032102.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo u-go-he gi-lo i-yu-s-di u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi u-wo-su-lo-tsv-hi na-hna a-hv-s-ge ta-li a-gi-nu-dv-di i-ya-da-nv-te-di.

032103.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎤᏬᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎠᎲᎦ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ.
032103.english: And he said, Of a truth I say unto you, that this poor widow hath cast in more than they all:
032103.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsv-yo-se-ha, hi-a na-s-gi u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi u-wo-su-lo-tsv-hi u-tli i-ga-i a-hv-ga e-s-ga-quo ni-ga-dv a-ni-so-i.

032104.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏂᎲ ᎤᏃᏣᎴᏛ ᎠᏂᎲᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎤᎲᎠᎲᎦ.
032104.english: For all these have of their abundance cast in unto the offerings of God: but she of her penury hath cast in all the living that she had.
032104.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-ga-dv u-tsa-ti u-ni-hv u-no-tsa-le-dv a-ni-hv-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi a-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-di ge-sv-i; hi-a-s-gi-ni u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi ge-sv ni-ga-di-yu u-li-s-de-lv-do-di u-hv-a-hv-ga.

032105.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᎤᏂᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᎬᏔᏅ ᏅᏯ ᏧᏬᏚᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ;
032105.english: And as some spake of the temple, how it was adorned with goodly stones and gifts, he said,
032105.phonetic: I-ga-dv-no u-ni-ne-i-s-ta-nv u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, ni-ga-v go-du-i-s-dv gv-ta-nv-nv-ya tsu-wo-du-hi a-le di-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi, hi-a nu-we-se-i;

032106.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏕᏥᎪᏩᏗᎭ, ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉᎤᏅ ᏅᏯ ᏱᏚᏓᏌᏝᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎪᎲᏔᏅᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
032106.english: As for these things which ye behold, the days will come, in the which there shall not be left one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
032106.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi tsi-de-tsi-go-wa-di-ha, dv-s-qua-lv-hi, na-s-gi v-tla sa-quo-u-nv nv-ya yi-du-da-sa-tla-he-s-di na-s-gi ni-go-hv-ta-nv-na yi-ge-se-s-di.

032107.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏁᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎢᎳᎪᏃ ᎢᏳ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᎵᏰᎢᎶᎸᎭ?
032107.english: And they asked him, saying, Master, but when shall these things be? and what sign will there be when these things shall come to pass?
032107.phonetic: Gv-wa-dv-dv-ne-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, i-la-go-no i-yu hi-a na-s-gi nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni?  A-le ga-do u-s-di u-ye-lv-dv ge-se-s-di na-hi-yu hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-li-ye-i-lo-lv-ha?

032108.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏥᎡᏥᎶᎾᏍᏔᏂ; ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᎠᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴ [ᎦᎶᏁᏛ] ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏍᏓᏩᏛᏒᎩ.
032108.english: And he said, Take heed that ye be not deceived: for many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and the time draweth near: go ye not therefore after them.
032108.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i, I-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di tle-s-di tsi-e-tsi-lo-na-s-ta-ni; u-ni-tsa-te-s-di-ye-no a-yv da-qua-do-v a-ni-lu-hi-s-di-s-ge-s-di, A-yv [Ga-lo-ne-dv] a-na-di-s-ge-s-di, a-le hna-quo u-s-qua-lv-hi-di; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di di-tsi-s-da-wa-dv-sv-gi.

032109.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏣᏛᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏓᏅᏩ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎲᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏍᎦ-ᎢᎮᏍᏗ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ, ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎬᏪᏅᏛᏉ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
032109.english: But when ye shall hear of wars and commotions, be not terrified: for these things must first come to pass; but the end is not by and by.
032109.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsa-dv-gi-s-ge-s-di da-nv-wa a-le tsu-da-le-nv-dv ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-do-hv-i, tle-s-di yi-tsi-s-ga--i-he-s-di; hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi a-se i-gv-yi i-yu-li-s-do-di, v-tla-s-gi-ni i-gv-we-nv-dv-quo u-li-s-qua-di-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

032110.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏙᏛᎾᎴᏂ ᏙᏛᎾᏓᏡᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏚᏙᏢᏩᏗᏒ ᏙᏛᎾᏓᏡᏔᏂ;
032110.english: Then said he unto them, Nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom:
032110.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi do-dv-na-le-ni do-dv-na-da-tlu-ta-ni, a-le a-ye-li du-do-tlv-wa-di-sv do-dv-na-da-tlu-ta-ni;

032111.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏓᎵᏖᎸᏂᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎪᏄᎶᏏᏙᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏳᎩᎯᏳ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ.
032111.english: And great earthquakes shall be in divers places, and famines, and pestilences; and fearful sights and great signs shall there be from heaven.
032111.phonetic: A-le ga-do-hi u-tsa-ti da-li-te-lv-ni-do-he-s-di, a-le da-go-nu-lo-si-do-he-s-di; a-le v-yu-gi-hi-yu ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-do-he-s-di; a-le u-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di u-ye-lv-dv ga-na-nu-go-ge-s-di ga-lv-lo-i.

032112.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏏ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏙᏓᎨᏥᏂᏴᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏅᏓᎨᏨᏁᎵ, ᏕᎨᏥᏲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᏂᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᏗᏃᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏚᏃᎸ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
032112.english: But before all these, they shall lay their hands on you, and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues, and into prisons, being brought before kings and rulers for my name's sake.
032112.phonetic: A-se-no a-si na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv nu-li-s-ta-nv-na ge-se-s-di do-da-ge-tsi-ni-yv-hi a-le u-yo nv-da-ge-tsv-ne-li, de-ge-tsi-yo-s-ge-s-di tsu-ni-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le di-da-s-du-di-yi, a-le de-tsa-di-no-hi-he-s-di u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi du-no-lv i-gv-yi-di-tlv a-yv da-qua-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di.

032113.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕ ᎸᏙᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
032113.english: And it shall turn to you for a testimony.
032113.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi ka-no-he-s-gi i-tsa-li-s-de lv-do-di ni-ga-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di.

032114.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᏗᏧᎪᏕᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎤᏓᎷᎴᏍᏗ, ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᎯᏐᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏥᏪᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ.
032114.english: Settle it therefore in your hearts, not to meditate before what ye shall answer:
032114.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-di-tsu-go-de-s-di de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i a-si-quo u-da-lu-le-s-di, i-tsa-da-nv-te-hi-so-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-tsi-we-s-di-yi i-tsa-li-s-de-li-s-gv-i.

032115.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᏓᏨᏁᎵ ᎢᏥᏪᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎨᏣᏈᏗᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᎦᏘᎸᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏂᏎᎷᎩᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
032115.english: For I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which all your adversaries shall not be able to gainsay nor resist.
032115.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no da-tsv-ne-li i-tsi-we-s-di-yi a-le a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi ni-ga-dv ge-tsa-qui-di-s-gi ye-li di-gv-wa-ni-ga-ti-lv-s-di a-le gv-wa-ni-se-lu-gi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-s-di.

032116.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏕᎨᏥᏲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏓᏛᎿᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏣᎵᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏛᏅᏂᏌᏂ ᎩᎶ ᏂᎯ ᏤᏥᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
032116.english: And ye shall be betrayed both by parents, and brethren, and kinsfolks, and friends; and some of you shall they cause to be put to death.
032116.phonetic: A-le de-ge-tsi-yo-s-ge-s-di di-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge-i, a-le i-tsa-li-nv-tli, a-le go-hu-s-di di-tsa-da-dv-hna, a-le di-tsa-li-i; a-le na-s-gi nv-dv-nv-ni-sa-ni gi-lo ni-hi tse-tsi-i-s-di ge-se-s-di.

032117.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏥᏍᎦᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
032117.english: And ye shall be hated of all men for my name's sake.
032117.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-di-yu yv-wi ge-tsi-s-ga-gi ge-se-s-di yv-wi da-qua-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di.

032118.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉᎤᏅ ᎢᏥᏍᏗᏰᎬ ᎢᏥᏍᎪᎵ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
032118.english: But there shall not an hair of your head perish.
032118.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla sa-quo-u-nv i-tsi-s-di-ye-gv i-tsi-s-go-li u-yo-hu-hi-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

032119.english: In your patience possess ye your souls.

032120.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏃ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏚᎾᏚᏫᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏗᏒᎢ.
032120.english: And when ye shall see Jerusalem compassed with armies, then know that the desolation thereof is nigh.
032120.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-no i-tsi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi hna-quo du-na-du-wi-s-de-s-di, i-tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di na-s-gi u-yo-i-s-di ge-sv u-s-qua-lv-hi-di-sv-i.

032121.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏗᏱ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎠᎾᎵᏒᎭ ᎣᏓᎵ ᏩᏂᎶᏒᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏁᏙᎯ ᎠᏂᏄᎪᏨᎭ; ᎢᏴᏛᏃ ᏭᏩᎫᏛ ᏗᏁᎯ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᏳᏂᏴᎴᏍᏗ.
032121.english: Then let them which are in Judaea flee to the mountains; and let them which are in the midst of it depart out; and let not them that are in the countries enter thereinto.
032121.phonetic: Hna-quo na-s-gi Tsu-di-yi a-ne-hi a-na-li-sv-ha o-da-li wa-ni-lo-sv-ha; a-le na-s-gi a-ye-li ge-sv a-ne-do-hi a-ni-nu-go-tsv-ha; i-yv-dv-no wu-wa-gu-dv di-ne-hi tle-s-di na-hna yu-ni-yv-le-s-di.

032122.cherokee: ᎤᏞᎩᏰᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏱᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎪᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
032122.english: For these be the days of vengeance, that all things which are written may be fulfilled.
032122.phonetic: U-tle-gi-ye-no na-hi-yu ge-sv u-li-yi-lo-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi ni-ga-di-yu go-we-la-nv-hi ge-sv na-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

032123.cherokee: ᏗᏂᏁᎵᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏍᏓᎢ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ!  ᎤᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᎡᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏂ ᎦᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏴᏫ.
032123.english: But woe unto them that are with child, and to them that give suck, in those days! for there shall be great distress in the land, and wrath upon this people.
032123.phonetic: Di-ni-ne-li-dv-s-gi-ni a-le tsu-ni-s-da-i u-yo-i-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di na-hi-yu ge-sv-i!  u-tsa-ti-ye-no a-gi-li-ya e-he-s-di a-ni ga-do-hi, a-le u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv u-ni-lu-tse-di ge-se-s-di hi-a yv-wi.

032124.cherokee: ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗᏃ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᏧᏂᏅᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᏥᏴᎩᏅᎯ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒ ᏫᏗᎨᎦᏘᏅᏍᏛᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏃ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᎳᏍᏓᎡᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎬᏂ ᎠᏍᏆᏛᎭ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎨᎦᏓᏁᎳᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032124.english: And they shall fall by the edge of the sword, and shall be led away captive into all nations: and Jerusalem shall be trodden down of the Gentiles, until the times of the Gentiles be fulfilled.
032124.phonetic: A-ye-la-s-di-no--ga-nv-hi-dv tsu-ni-nv-i-s-do-di ge-se-s-di, a-le di-ge-tsi-yv-gi-nv-hi Tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv wi-di-ge-ga-ti-nv-s-dv-di ge-se-s-di; Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-no Tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-na-la-s-da-e-di ge-se-s-di, gv-ni a-s-qua-dv-ha tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi ge-ga-da-ne-la-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

032125.cherokee: ᎤᏰᎸᏛᏃ ᎠᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏅᏙ ᎢᎦ ᎡᎯ ᎧᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏙ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎧᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏃᏈᏏ ᎠᏂᎧᎸᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵ; ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎹ ᏓᎵᏍᏗᎳᏁᎬ ᎤᏍᏆᏃᏴᎨᏍᏗ;
032125.english: And there shall be signs in the sun, and in the moon, and in the stars; and upon the earth distress of nations, with perplexity; the sea and the waves roaring;
032125.phonetic: U-ye-lv-dv-no a-go-wa-dv-di ge-se-s-di nv-do i-ga e-hi ka-lv-i, a-le nv-do sv-no-yi e-hi ka-lv-i, a-le no-qui-si a-ni-ka-lv-i; a-le e-lo-hi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv u-we-li-hi-s-di, a-le u-de-ya-do-di nv-da-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-li; a-me-quo-hi a-le a-ma da-li-s-di-la-ne-gv u-s-qua-no-yv-ge-s-di;

032126.cherokee: ᏴᏫ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᏚᎸᏕᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎾᏰᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎦᏖᏃᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎡᎳᏂᎬ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᎶ ᏣᏂᎧᎳ ᏛᎾᎵᏖᎸᏂ.
032126.english: Men's hearts failing them for fear, and for looking after those things which are coming on the earth: for the powers of heaven shall be shaken.
032126.phonetic: Yv-wi du-na-da-nv-dv du-lv-de-hi-he-s-di nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di a-ni-na-ye-s-gv a-le a-ni-ga-te-no-hv na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv e-la-ni-gv u-na-nu-go-i-s-di ge-sv-i; u-ni-tsa-ti-ye-no ga-lv-lo tsa-ni-ka-la dv-na-li-te-lv-ni.

032127.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏛᏂᎪᎯ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏣᎢᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎶᎩᎸᎢ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏅᏧᏛᎿᎭᏗᏎᏍᏗ.
032127.english: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
032127.phonetic: Hna-quo-no dv-ni-go-hi yv-wi U-we-tsi tsa-i-se-s-di u-lo-gi-lv-i u-li-ni-gi-dv a-le u-tsa-ti ga-lv-quo-di nv-tsu-dv-hna-di-se-s-di.

032128.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᎴᏅᎲᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏫᏗᏣᎧᎾᏅᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᏌᎳᏓᏅᎭ ᏗᏥᏍᎪᎵ; ᎡᏧᏓᎴᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᏣᎢᏎᏍᏗ.
032128.english: And when these things begin to come to pass, then look up, and lift up your heads; for your redemption draweth nigh.
032128.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-le-nv-hv-ha na-s-gi ni-ga-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di, hna-quo ga-lv-la-di wi-di-tsa-ka-na-nv-ha, a-le de-tsi-sa-la-da-nv-ha di-tsi-s-go-li; e-tsu-da-le-s-di-ye-no ge-sv na-v-ni-yu tsa-i-se-s-di.

032129.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏤᏃ ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ; ᏗᏣᎧᏅᎦ ᎡᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏕᏡᎬᎢ;
032129.english: And he spake to them a parable; Behold the fig tree, and all the trees;
032129.phonetic: U-ne-tse-no du-tli-lo-s-da-ne-le-i; Di-tsa-ka-nv-ga e-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di tlu-gv-i, a-le ni-ga-v de-tlu-gv-i;

032130.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᎩᎳ ᏥᎦᎳᏍᏚᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏛ ᎢᏨᏒᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎰᎪᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032130.english: When they now shoot forth, ye see and know of your own selves that summer is now nigh at hand.
032130.phonetic: Hna-quo gi-la tsi-ga-la-s-du-hv-s-go-i, na-s-gi i-tsi-go-wa-dv i-tsv-sv-quo ge-sv i-tsi-ga-ta-ho-go-gi hna-quo na-v-ni-yu ge-sv-i.

032131.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032131.english: So likewise ye, when ye see these things come to pass, know ye that the kingdom of God is nigh at hand.
032131.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-hi hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv ni-ga-li-s-di-s-gv i-tsi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di, i-tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv na-v-ni-yu ge-sv-i.

032132.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏛᏂᎶᏐᏂ ᎬᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏅᎭ.
032132.english: Verily I say unto you, This generation shall not pass away, till all be fulfilled.
032132.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Go-hi tsa-ne-ha v-tla yv-dv-ni-lo-so-ni gv-ni na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-di-yu ni-ga-li-s-ta-nv-ha.

032133.cherokee: ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏛᏂᎶᏐᏂ; ᎠᎩᏁᏨᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏓᎦᎶᏐᏂ.
032133.english: Heaven and earth shall pass away: but my words shall not pass away.
032133.phonetic: Ga-lv-lo-i a-le e-lo-hi dv-ni-lo-so-ni; a-gi-ne-tsv-s-gi-ni v-tla yv-da-ga-lo-so-ni.

032134.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᎦᏌᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎦᎨᏛ ᏱᏂᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎶᏒᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᏴᏍᏕᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏂᏤᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᏗᏱ.
032134.english: And take heed to yourselves, lest at any time your hearts be overcharged with surfeiting, and drunkenness, and cares of this life, and so that day come upon you unawares.
032134.phonetic: A-le i-tsa-da-ga-sa-ya-s-de-s-di i-tsv-sv ge-sv-i, tle-s-di i-lv-hi-yu de-tsa-da-nv-dv ga-ge-dv yi-ni-tsa-li-s-da-ne-he-s-di yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di i-tsi-lo-sv-s-di-s-gv i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i, a-le de-tsi-yv-s-de-s-gv-i, a-le e-lo-hi a-da-nv-te-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-no na-hi-yu i-ga ni-tse-li-s-gv-na i-tsi-lu-tse-di-yi.

032135.english: For as a snare shall it come on all them that dwell on the face of the whole earth.

032136.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ, ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏩᎾᏗᏫᏎᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏤ ᎤᏬᎸ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᎬᏩᎾᎴᏗ ᎦᏰᏤᎵᏎᏗ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ.
032136.english: Watch ye therefore, and pray always, that ye may be accounted worthy to escape all these things that shall come to pass, and to stand before the Son of man.
032136.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di ni-go-hi-lv-i, i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi-no ye-li-quo hi-a ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di tsi-gi gv-wa-na-di-wi-se-di, a-le yv-wi U-we-tse u-wo-lv i-gv-yi-di-tlv gv-wa-na-le-di ga-ye-tse-li-se-di yi-ni-ga-li-s-da.

032137.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎨ ᎤᏛᎾᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ; ᎤᏒᏃ ᎦᏄᎪᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᎵᏩᏲᎯ ᏣᏃᏎᎰ ᎣᏓᎸ ᎤᏒᎯᎮᎢ.
032137.english: And in the day time he was teaching in the temple; and at night he went out, and abode in the mount that is called the mount of Olives.
032137.phonetic: I-ga-no ge-sv da-de-yo-hv-s-ge u-dv-na-di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi; u-sv-no ga-nu-go-ge-i, a-le O-li-wa-yo-hi tsa-no-se-ho o-da-lv u-sv-hi-he-i.

032138.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏑᎾᎴᎢᏳ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎮ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᏩᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
032138.english: And all the people came early in the morning to him in the temple, for to hear him.
032138.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no yv-wi su-na-le-i-yu gv-wa-lu-tse-he u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi gv-wa-dv-da-s-da-ne-di-yi.

032201.cherokee: ᎾᎪᏔᏅᎾᏃ ᎦᏚ ᎠᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏗᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᏃ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᏥᏚᏙᎠ.
032201.english: Now the feast of unleavened bread drew nigh, which is called the Passover.
032201.phonetic: Na-go-ta-nv-na-no ga-du a-gi-s-di-yi u-s-qua-lv-hi-di-se-i, na-s-gi Ka-no-hi-ye-no di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi tsi-du-do-a.

032202.cherokee: ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏲᎴ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᏓᏂᏍᎦᎢᎮᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ.
032202.english: And the chief priests and scribes sought how they might kill him; for they feared the people.
032202.phonetic: Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi u-ni-yo-le i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi u-ni-hi-s-di-yi; da-ni-s-ga-i-he-ye-no yv-wi.

032203.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏎᏓᏂ ᎤᏴᏎᎴ ᏧᏓᏏ ᎢᏍᎦᎳᏗ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᎳ ᎨᏎ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032203.english: Then entered Satan into Judas surnamed Iscariot, being of the number of the twelve.
032203.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Se-da-ni u-yv-se-le Tsu-da-si I-s-ga-la-di tsu-do-i-dv, na-s-gi ge-la ge-se ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv-i.

032204.cherokee: ᎤᏪᏅᏎᏃ ᏫᏚᎵᏃᎮᏔᏁ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ, ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ [ᏥᏌ] ᏧᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ.
032204.english: And he went his way, and communed with the chief priests and captains, how he might betray him unto them.
032204.phonetic: U-we-nv-se-no wi-du-li-no-he-ta-ne nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi, i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi [Tsi-sa] tsu-yo-hi-se-di-yi.

032205.english: And they were glad, and covenanted to give him money.

032206.cherokee: ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏁᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎴ ᏧᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᏂᎪᏁᎸ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ.
032206.english: And he promised, and sought opportunity to betray him unto them in the absence of the multitude.
032206.phonetic: U-du-i-s-ta-ne-no, a-le u-yo-le tsu-yo-hi-se-di-yi, na-hi-yu u-ni-go-ne-lv u-ni-tsa-ti.

032207.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎮ ᎾᎪᏔᏅᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏚ ᎠᎩᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032207.english: Then came the day of unleavened bread, when the passover must be killed.
032207.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-s-qua-lv-he na-go-ta-nv-na ge-sv ga-du a-gi-s-di-yi, na-s-gi ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi a-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

032208.cherokee: [ᏥᏌᏃ] ᏚᏅᏎ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏍᏕᎾ ᏫᏍᏓᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ.
032208.english: And he sent Peter and John, saying, Go and prepare us the passover, that we may eat.
032208.phonetic: [Tsi-sa-no] du-nv-se Qui-da a-le Tsa-ni, hi-a nu-we-se-i, I-s-de-na wi-s-da-dv-nv-i-s-da ka-no-hi-ye-gi, na-s-gi i-ga-li-s-da-yv-di-yi.

032209.english: And they said unto him, Where wilt thou that we prepare?

032210.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎦᏚᎲ ᎢᏍᏗᏴᎸᎭ, ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏙᏓᏣᏠᏏ, ᎠᏰᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ ᎠᎹ ᎠᏟᏍᏕᏍᏗ; ᎡᏍᏗᏍᏓᏩᏕᏒᎭ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏭᏴᎸᎢ ᏫᏍᏗᎷᏨᎭ.
