032210.english: And he said unto them, Behold, when ye are entered into the city, there shall a man meet you, bearing a pitcher of water; follow him into the house where he entereth in.
032210.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Gv-ni-yu-quo, ga-du-hv i-s-di-yv-lv-ha, a-s-ga-ya do-da-tsa-tlo-si, a-ye-he-s-di a-te-li-do a-ma a-tli-s-de-s-di; e-s-di-s-da-wa-de-sv-ha a-da-ne-lv wu-yv-lv-i wi-s-di-lu-tsv-ha.

032211.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏁᏍᏗᏪᏎᎸᎭ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᏁᎳ, ᏗᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏗᏣᏪᏎᎭ, ᎭᏢ ᎠᏁᏙᎯ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎣᎦᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎬᎩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ?
032211.english: And ye shall say unto the goodman of the house, The Master saith unto thee, Where is the guestchamber, where I shall eat the passover with my disciples?
032211.phonetic: Hi-a-no ne-s-di-we-se-lv-ha a-s-ga-ya ga-ne-la, Di-de-yo-hv-s-gi hi-a nv-di-tsa-we-se-ha, Ha-tlv a-ne-do-hi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi na-hna ka-no-hi-ye-gi i-tsu-la-ha o-ga-li-s-da-yv-di-yi gv-gi-s-da-wa-di-do-hi?

032212.cherokee: ᏓᏍᏓᏎᎮᎵᏃ ᎤᏛᎾ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎧᏅᏑᎸ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ; ᎾᎿᎭᎢᏍᏓᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎭ.
032212.english: And he shall shew you a large upper room furnished: there make ready.
032212.phonetic: Da-s-da-se-he-li-no u-dv-na ga-lv-la-di ka-nv-su-lv o-s-dv i-gv-ne-lv-hi; na-hna i-s-da-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-ha.

032213.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏅᏎᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏭᏂᏩᏛᎮ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎢ; ᎤᎾᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏁᏃ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ.
032213.english: And they went, and found as he had said unto them: and they made ready the passover.
032213.phonetic: U-ne-nv-se-no a-le wu-ni-wa-dv-he na-s-gi-ya ni-du-we-se-lv-i; u-na-dv-nv-i-s-ta-ne-no ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi.

032214.cherokee: ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏂᏏᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ.
032214.english: And when the hour was come, he sat down, and the twelve apostles with him.
032214.phonetic: U-s-qua-lv-hv-no na-hi-yu ge-sv-i, u-ni-si-ne-i, a-le na-s-quo ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv ge-tsi-nv-si-dv.

032215.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎾᎩᎩᎵᏲᏨᎾ.
032215.english: And he said unto them, With desire I have desired to eat this passover with you before I suffer:
032215.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, U-tsa-ti a-qua-du-li-s-gv-gi hi-a ka-no-hi-ye-gi i-tsu-la-ha i-ga-li-s-da-yv-di-yi a-si-quo na-gi-gi-li-yo-tsv-na.

032216.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏎᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᎦᎦᎵᏍᏓᏴᏓ ᎬᏂ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏛᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032216.english: For I say unto you, I will not any more eat thereof, until it be fulfilled in the kingdom of God.
032216.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-se-ye-no v-tla hna-quo hi-a na-s-gi yv-ga-ga-li-s-da-yv-da gv-ni u-li-s-qua-dv-hi ge-se-s-di u-ne-la-nv-hi na-hna u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

032217.cherokee: ᎤᎩᏒᏃ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᎢᏥᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏯᏙᎦ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032217.english: And he took the cup, and gave thanks, and said, Take this, and divide it among yourselves:
032217.phonetic: U-gi-sv-no u-li-s-qui-di, a-le u-li-he-li-tsv, hi-a nu-we-se-i; Hi-a i-tsi-gi a-le i-tsi-ya-do-ga i-tsv-sv ge-sv-i.

032218.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᎦᎦᏗᏔ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᏁᏅᎯ ᎬᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎵᏰᎢᎶᎸᎭ.
032218.english: For I say unto you, I will not drink of the fruit of the vine, until the kingdom of God shall come.
032218.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-tsv-we-se-ha, V-tla yv-ga-ga-di-ta te-lv-la-di u-ne-nv-hi gv-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv a-li-ye-i-lo-lv-ha.

032219.cherokee: ᎦᏚᏃ ᎤᎩᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨ, ᎤᎬᎭᎷᏰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏁᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏰᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
032219.english: And he took bread, and gave thanks, and brake it, and gave unto them, saying, This is my body which is given for you: this do in remembrance of me.
032219.phonetic: Ga-du-no u-gi-se-i, a-le u-li-he-li-tsv, u-gv-ha-lu-ye-i, a-le du-ne-le-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Hi-a na-s-gi a-yv tsi-ye-lv-i, na-s-gi ni-hi e-tsa-gu-yv-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi, hi-a na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di a-yv s-gi-ya-nv-da-di-s-ge-s-di.

032220.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ [ᏅᎩᏎ] ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏃᏅ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎢᏤ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᎩᎬᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᏤᏬᏤᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ.
032220.english: Likewise also the cup after supper, saying, This cup is the new testament in my blood, which is shed for you.
032220.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo u-li-s-qui-di [nv-gi-se] u-na-li-s-da-yv-no-nv, hi-a nu-we-se-i, hi-a na-s-gi u-li-s-qui-di i-tse ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i a-yv a-gi-gi-gv-hi, na-s-gi ni-hi i-tsa-tse-wo-tse-lv-hi tsi-gi.

032221.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏬᏰᏂ ᎠᏆᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᎣᎩᎾᏖᏆᎶᎭ ᎠᏂ ᎦᏍᎩᎸᎢ.
032221.english: But, behold, the hand of him that betrayeth me is with me on the table.
032221.phonetic: A-se-no gv-ni-yu-quo na-s-gi u-wo-ye-ni a-qua-tlu-di-s-gi o-gi-na-te-qua-lo-ha a-ni ga-s-gi-lv-i.

032222.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎠᏴ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏓᏰᏏ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏚᏚᎪᏔᏅᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏡᏗᏍᎩ
032222.english: And truly the Son of man goeth, as it was determined: but woe unto that man by whom he is betrayed!
032222.phonetic: A-le u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya a-yv U-we-tsi da-ye-si na-s-gi-ya du-du-go-ta-nv-i, a-se-no u-yo-i-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi na a-s-ga-ya u-tlu-di-s-gi

032223.cherokee: ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎮᏃ ᏚᎾᏓᏛᏛᏁ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᏛᏁᎵᏒ ᎯᎠ.
032223.english: And they began to inquire among themselves, which of them it was that should do this thing.
032223.phonetic: U-na-le-nv-he-no du-na-da-dv-dv-ne u-nv-sv ge-sv, na-s-gi nv-di-dv-ne-li-sv hi-a.

032224.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎾᏗᏒᎯᎮ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏟ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ
032224.english: And there was also a strife among them, which of them should be accounted the greatest.
032224.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo a-na-di-sv-hi-he na-s-gi na u-nv-sv ge-sv u-tli a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv-i

032225.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏧᎾᏤᎵᎦ, ᏗᎬᏩᎾᏁᎶᏛᏗᏱ ᎾᏅᏁᎰ ᏴᏫ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᏩᎾᏁᎶᏙᏗ ᎢᏯᏅᏁᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏗᎾᏛᏁᎯ ᎨᎪᏎᎰᎢ.
032225.english: And he said unto them, The kings of the Gentiles exercise lordship over them; and they that exercise authority upon them are called benefactors.
032225.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi tsu-na-tse-li-ga, di-gv-wa-na-ne-lo-dv-di-yi na-nv-ne-ho yv-wi; a-le na-s-gi di-gv-wa-na-ne-lo-do-di i-ya-nv-ne-hi o-s-dv i-di-na-dv-ne-hi ge-go-se-ho-i.

032226.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᏨᏁᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏥᎸᏉᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏫᎾᎨ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ Ꮎ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏗᏍᏕᎸᎯᏙᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
032226.english: But ye shall not be so: but he that is greatest among you, let him be as the younger; and he that is chief, as he that doth serve.
032226.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni v-tle-s-di na-s-gi yi-ni-tsv-ne-s-di; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na ni-hi ni-tsa-dv-nv u-tli i-ya-tsi-lv-quo-di; na-s-gi a-wi-na-ge na-s-gi-ya ge-se-s-di; na-s-gi-ya na nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi di-s-de-lv-hi-do-hi na-s-gi-ya ge-se-s-di.

032227.cherokee: ᎦᎪᏰᏃ ᎤᏟ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ, ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎩ ᎠᏃ ᎠᏓᏍᏕᎸᎯᏙᎯ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎩ?  ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎭ ᎠᏓᏍᏕᎸᎯᏙᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
032227.english: For whether is greater, he that sitteth at meat, or he that serveth? is not he that sitteth at meat? but I am among you as he that serveth.
032227.phonetic: Ga-go-ye-no u-tli a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu, a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gi a-no a-da-s-de-lv-hi-do-hi?  Tla-s-go na-s-gi na a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gi?  A-yv-s-gi-ni i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-ha a-da-s-de-lv-hi-do-hi na-s-gi-ya-i.

032228.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏥᏑᎵᎪᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏙᎸᎯ ᎤᏲ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵᏙᎲᎢ;
032228.english: Ye are they which have continued with me in my temptations.
032228.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni na-s-gi ni-tsi-su-li-go-gv-na i-ge-do-lv-hi u-yo na-qua-li-s-da-ne-li-do-hv-i;

032229.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎭ ᎢᏥᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎠᏴ ᏣᏆᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸ;
032229.english: And I appoint unto you a kingdom, as my Father hath appointed unto me;
032229.phonetic: A-le i-tsv-ya-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-ha i-tsi-gv-wi-yu-hi i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya E-do-da a-yv tsa-qua-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv;

032230.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏗᏔᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎩᏍᎩᎸ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎩᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏅᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᏂᏗᏱ ᏕᎦᏍᎩᎸᎢ, ᏗᏧᎪᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎾᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᎢᏏᎵ.
032230.english: That ye may eat and drink at my table in my kingdom, and sit on thrones judging the twelve tribes of Israel.
032230.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-yi a-le i-tsa-di-ta-s-di-yi a-gi-s-gi-lv na-hna a-gi-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i, a-le i-tsa-nv-di-yi u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-ni-di-yi de-ga-s-gi-lv-i, di-tsu-go-da-ne-di-yi ta-la-du na-ni-la-s-da-lv I-si-li.

032231.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏌᏩᏂ, ᏌᏩᏂ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᏎᏓᏂ ᎤᏔᏲᎸ ᎠᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎢᏨᎫᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏣᎴᏍᏗ ᏣᏅᎫᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
032231.english: And the Lord said, Simon, Simon, behold, Satan hath desired to have you, that he may sift you as wheat:
032231.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Sa-wa-ni, Sa-wa-ni, gv-ni-yu-quo, Se-da-ni u-ta-yo-lv a-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-di-yi i-tsv-gu-s-do-di-yi u-tsa-le-s-di tsa-nv-gu-s-di-s-go na-s-gi-ya-i.

032232.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏆᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎡᏣᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎤᏓᎵᏛᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ; ᏣᎦᏔᎲᏛᏃ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᎭᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏔᏅᎭ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ.
032232.english: But I have prayed for thee, that thy faith fail not: and when thou art converted, strengthen thy brethren.
032232.phonetic: A-se-no a-qua-da-do-li-s-ta-nv e-tsa-s-de-lv-di-yi, na-s-gi tso-hi-yu-sv u-da-li-dv-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na; tsa-ga-ta-hv-dv-no ge-se-s-di de-ha-li-ni-go-hi-s-ta-nv-ha i-tsa-li-nv-tli.

032233.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᏆᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎬᏍᏓᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032233.english: And he said unto him, Lord, I am ready to go with thee, both into prison, and to death.
032233.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le-i; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-qua-dv-nv-i-s-di gv-s-da-wa-dv-s-di-yi na-s-quo di-da-s-du-di-yi a-le a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

032234.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ ᎬᏲᏎᎭ ᏈᏓ, ᏣᏔᎦ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏛᏴᎳᏏ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎬᏂ ᏦᎢ ᎢᏣᏓᏱᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
032234.english: And he said, I tell thee, Peter, the cock shall not crow this day, before that thou shalt thrice deny that thou knowest me.
032234.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-i gv-yo-se-ha Qui-da, tsa-ta-ga v-tla yv-dv-yv-la-si go-hi i-ga gv-ni tso-i i-tsa-da-yi-lv-hi ge-se-s-di a-yv s-gi-ga-ta-hv-i.

032235.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏥᏨᏅᏒᎩ ᏂᏗᏥᏁᎲᎾ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏗᎦᎶᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎦᎶᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎳᏑᎶ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎢᏥᏂᎬᏎᎮᎢ?  ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ, ᎤᎾᏛᏁᎢ.
032235.english: And he said unto them, When I sent you without purse, and scrip, and shoes, lacked ye any thing? And they said, Nothing.
032235.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Tsi-tsv-nv-sv-gi ni-di-tsi-ne-hv-na a-de-lv--di-ga-lo-di, a-le de-ga-lo-di, a-le di-la-su-lo, go-hu-s-di-s-go i-tsi-ni-gv-se-he-i?  V-tla go-hu-s-di, u-na-dv-ne-i.

032236.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᎩ, ᎩᎶ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏗᎦᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᎡᏍᏗ, ᎦᏁᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏕᎦᎶᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᏄᏩᏴᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏫᎦᎾᏚᎦ ᎤᏄᏬ ᎠᎴ ᏭᏩᎯ.
032236.english: Then said he unto them, But now, he that hath a purse, let him take it, and likewise his scrip: and he that hath no sword, let him sell his garment, and buy one.
032236.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Go-hi-s-gi-ni tsi-gi, gi-lo a-de-lv--di-ga-lo-di u-na-e-s-di, ga-ne-ge-s-di, a-le na-s-quo de-ga-lo-di; gi-lo-no a-ye-la-s-di ga-nv-hi-dv nu-wa-yv-na ge-se-s-di, wi-ga-na-du-ga u-nu-wo a-le wu-wa-hi.

032237.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭᏰᏃ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ ᎠᏎ ᎠᏏ ᏛᏙᎯᏳᏂ ᎠᏴ ᏅᏓᎬᏂᏌᏂ; "ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᎨᎦᏎᎸᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏠᏯᏍᏔᏅᎩ;" ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ.
032237.english: For I say unto you, that this that is written must yet be accomplished in me, And he was reckoned among the transgressors: for the things concerning me have an end.
032237.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-se-ha-ye-no, hi-a na-s-gi tsi-go-we-la a-se a-si dv-do-hi-yu-ni a-yv nv-da-gv-ni-sa-ni; "A-le a-ni-s-ga-na ge-ga-se-lv-i na-s-gi a-ga-tlo-ya-s-ta-nv-gi;" a-yv-ye-no a-gi-no-he-s-gv a-se na-s-gi nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni.

032238.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎠᏂ ᏔᎵ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ; ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏑᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏰᎵᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ.
032238.english: And they said, Lord, behold, here are two swords. And he said unto them, It is enough.
032238.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-ni-we-se-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, gv-ni-yu-quo, a-ni ta-li a-ye-la-s-di--di-ga-nv-hi-dv; hi-a-no ni-su-we-se-le-i, Ye-li-quo na-s-gi.

032239.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏧᏄᎪᏨ, ᎤᏪᏅᏎ ᎣᎵᏩᏲ ᎤᏌᎯᎸᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎᎢ.
032239.english: And he came out, and went, as he was wont, to the mount of Olives; and his disciples also followed him.
032239.phonetic: A-le tsu-nu-go-tsv, u-we-nv-se O-li-wa-yo u-sa-hi-lv-i na-s-gi i-yu-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i; a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi na-s-quo gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-se-i.

032240.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᏭᎷᏧ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓ ᎤᏓᎴᎾᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᏫᏥᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032240.english: And when he was at the place, he said unto them, Pray that ye enter not into temptation.
032240.phonetic: Na-hna-no wu-lu-tsu, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, I-tsa-da-do-li-s-da u-da-le-na-s-di-yi ge-sv wi-tsi-yv-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

032241.cherokee: ᏚᏓᏅᎡᎴᏃ ᏅᏯ ᏫᎬᏗᏅᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏚᎵᏂᏆᏁ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ,
032241.english: And he was withdrawn from them about a stone's cast, and kneeled down, and prayed,
032241.phonetic: Du-da-nv-e-le-no nv-ya wi-gv-di-nv-di i-yv-dv a-le du-li-ni-qua-ne u-da-do-li-s-ta-ne-i,

032242.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏱᏣᏰᎸᏅ ᏍᎩᎲᏏᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎭᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ.
032242.english: Saying, Father, if thou be willing, remove this cup from me: nevertheless not my will, but thine, be done.
032242.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-i, E-do-da, i-yu-no o-si-yu yi-tsa-ye-lv-nv s-gi-hv-si-quo hi-a u-li-s-qui-di; a-se-no v-tle-s-di a-yv ga-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, ni-hi-s-gi-ni ha-da-nv-te-s-gv wi-ni-ga-li-s-da.

032243.cherokee: ᎬᏂᎨᏒᏃ ᏄᏛᏁᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ, ᎤᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨᎢ.
032243.english: And there appeared an angel unto him from heaven, strengthening him.
032243.phonetic: Gv-ni-ge-sv-no nu-dv-ne-le di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi, u-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-s-ge-i.

032244.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘᏃ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏖ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏳᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵ ᎤᎯᎲ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏎ ᎩᎬ ᎡᏉᎯᏳ ᎦᏙᎯ ᏥᏫᏗᎦᏬᎪᎢ.
032244.english: And being in an agony he prayed more earnestly: and his sweat was as it were great drops of blood falling down to the ground.
032244.phonetic: U-tsa-ti-no e-hi-s-di u-da-nv-te u-tli i-yu-li-ni-gi-dv u-da-do-li-s-ta-ne-i; a-le a-li u-hi-hv na-s-gi-ya ge-se gi-gv e-quo-hi-yu ga-do-hi tsi-wi-di-ga-wo-go-i.

032245.cherokee: ᏚᎴᏅᏃ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᏫᏙᎤᎷᏤᎸ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᏚᏩᏛᎮ ᏓᏂᎵᎮ ᎤᏲ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
032245.english: And when he rose up from prayer, and was come to his disciples, he found them sleeping for sorrow,
032245.phonetic: Du-le-nv-no a-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv a-le wi-do-u-lu-tse-lv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, du-wa-dv-he da-ni-li-he u-yo u-ni-ye-lv-sv i-yu-s-di.

032246.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏥᎵᎾᎠ?  ᏗᏣᎴᎲᎦ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᎴᎾᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᏫᏥᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
032246.english: And said unto them, Why sleep ye? rise and pray, lest ye enter into temptation.
032246.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ga-do-no i-tsi-li-na-a?  Di-tsa-le-hv-ga i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di, na-s-gi u-da-le-na-s-di-yi ge-sv wi-tsi-yv-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

032247.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᎧᏁᎨᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ, ᎾᏃ ᏧᏓᏏ ᏣᎪᏎᎮᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎨᎳ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᎠᎢᏎ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎥ ᎤᎷᏤᎴ ᏥᏌ ᏧᏔᏪᏙᏂᏎᎢ,
032247.english: And while he yet spake, behold a multitude, and he that was called Judas, one of the twelve, went before them, and drew near unto Jesus to kiss him.
032247.phonetic: A-si-quo-no ka-ne-ge-i, gv-ni-yu-quo u-ni-tsa-ti, na-no Tsu-da-si tsa-go-se-he-i, na-s-gi ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv ge-la, i-gv-yi a-i-se, a-le na-v u-lu-tse-le Tsi-sa tsu-ta-we-do-ni-se-i,

032248.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏧᏓᏏ, ᎯᏯᏔᏬᏙᎲᏍᎬᏍᎪ ᎯᎶᏄᎡᏗᎭ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ?
032248.english: But Jesus said unto him, Judas, betrayest thou the Son of man with a kiss?
032248.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsu-da-si, hi-ya-ta-wo-do-hv-s-gv-s-go hi-lo-nu-e-di-ha yv-wi U-we-tsi?

032249.cherokee: ᎾᎥᏃ ᎠᏁᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏫᎬᏩᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗᏍᎪ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᏙᏓᏲᏥᎷᏯᏍᏔᏂ?
032249.english: When they which were about him saw what would follow, they said unto him, Lord, shall we smite with the sword?
032249.phonetic: Na-v-no a-ne-do-hi u-na-do-le-ho-sv nu-s-dv wi-gv-wa-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di ge-sv, hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-ye-la-s-di-s-go--ga-nv-hi-dv do-da-yo-tsi-lu-ya-s-ta-ni?

032250.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎤᎷᏰ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᏍᏔᏁ ᎠᎦᏘᏏ ᎦᎴᏂ.
032250.english: And one of them smote the servant of the high priest, and cut off his right ear.
032250.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no u-lu-ye nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi u-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le u-li-s-de-s-ta-ne a-ga-ti-si ga-le-ni.

032251.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎢᎦᎢ  ᎤᏒᏁᎴᏃ ᎦᎴᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏩᏁᎢ
032251.english: And Jesus answered and said, Suffer ye thus far. And he touched his ear, and healed him.
032251.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-i, U-na-ne-la-gi, na-s-gi-quo i-ga-i  U-sv-ne-le-no ga-le-ni a-le u-nv-wa-ne-i

032252.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᏅᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏂᏴᎯᎸᎯ, ᎢᏥᎷᎩᏍᎪ ᎠᏓᎾᏌᎲᏍᎩ ᏤᏥᏲᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓ ᏥᏕᏥᏁᎭ?
032252.english: Then Jesus said unto the chief priests, and captains of the temple, and the elders, which were come to him, Be ye come out, as against a thief, with swords and staves?
032252.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi, a-le o-s-dv i-yu-nv-hna-de-gi u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi, na-s-gi gv-wa-ni-yv-hi-lv-hi, I-tsi-lu-gi-s-go a-da-na-sa-hv-s-gi tse-tsi-yo-ho na-s-gi-ya-i, a-ye-la-s-di--di-ga-nv-hi-dv a-le a-da tsi-de-tsi-ne-ha?

032253.cherokee: ᏂᏑᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏣᏁᎶᏔᏁ ᏍᎩᏂᏴᏗᏱ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎪᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ ᎤᎵᏂᎬᎬᎢ.
032253.english: When I was daily with you in the temple, ye stretched forth no hands against me: but this is your hour, and the power of darkness.
032253.phonetic: Ni-su-gi-tsv-ni-sv i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, v-tla yi-tsa-ne-lo-ta-ne s-gi-ni-yv-di-yi; a-se-no i-tsa-tse-li-ga go-hi tsi-gi, a-le u-li-si-gi u-li-ni-gv-gv-i.

032254.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎬᏩᏂᏴᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏘᏅᏎ ᎠᎴ ᏫᎬᏩᏴᏔᏁ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ ᏗᎦᏁᎸᎢ.  ᏈᏓᏃ ᎢᏅ ᎣᏂ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏩᏗᏎᎢ.
032254.english: Then took they him, and led him, and brought him into the high priest's house. And Peter followed afar off.
032254.phonetic: Hna-quo-no gv-wa-ni-yv-he-i, a-le gv-wa-ti-nv-se a-le wi-gv-wa-yv-ta-ne nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi di-ga-ne-lv-i.  Qui-da-no i-nv o-ni di-li-s-da-wa-di-se-i.

032255.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏛ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎤᏃᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎤᎾᏅᏅ, ᏈᏓ ᎤᏪᏁ ᎠᏂᏅᎢ.
032255.english: And when they had kindled a fire in the midst of the hall, and were set down together, Peter sat down among them.
032255.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-dla-nv-dv a-ye-li u-no-ta-nv, a-le i-tsu-la-ha u-na-nv-nv, Qui-da u-we-ne a-ni-nv-i.

032256.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏛ ᎤᎪᎲ ᎠᏥᎸᏳᎶᏗ ᎤᏬᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏯᏅᏒᎯ ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏅ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏓᏁᏙᎲᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ.
032256.english: But a certain maid beheld him as he sat by the fire, and earnestly looked upon him, and said, This man was also with him.
032256.phonetic: Gi-lo-no i-yu-s-di a-dv u-go-hv a-tsi-lv-yu-lo-di u-wo-lv-i, a-le u-ya-nv-sv-hi du-ka-hna-nv, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Hi-a a-s-ga-ya na-s-quo da-ne-do-hv-gi na-s-gi.

032257.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏓᏱᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎨᏴ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ.
032257.english: And he denied him, saying, Woman, I know him not.
032257.phonetic: A-se-no u-da-yi-le hi-a nu-we-se-i, Hi-ge-yv, v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi.

032258.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏱᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᎪᎲ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᎿᎭᎮᎸ ᎢᎩ.  ᏈᏓᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᏍᎦᏯ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᎾᎿᎭᎨᎸ ᏱᎩ.
032258.english: And after a little while another saw him, and said, Thou art also of them. And Peter said, Man, I am not.
032258.phonetic: Go-hi-yi-no i-yv-dv nv-wa-da-le u-go-hv, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ni-hi na-s-quo na-hna he-lv i-gi.  Qui-da-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, Hi-s-ga-ya, v-tla a-yv na-hna ge-lv yi-gi.

032259.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏃ ᏑᏟᎶᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᏓᏱᏕᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏓᏁᏙᎲᎩ; ᎨᎵᎵᏰᏃ ᏕᎯ ᎢᎩ.
032259.english: And about the space of one hour after another confidently affirmed, saying, Of a truth this fellow also was with him: for he is a Galilaean.
032259.phonetic: O-ni-no su-tli-lo-dv i-yv-dv i-go-hi-dv, nv-wa-da-le na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv u-s-da-yi-de-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; U-do-hi-yu-hi hi-a na-s-quo da-ne-do-hv-gi; Ge-li-li-ye-no de-hi i-gi.

032260.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎯᏍᎦᏯ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᎪᎵᎦ ᏂᏪᏍᎬᎢ.  ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎧᏁᎨᎢ, ᏣᏔᎦ ᎤᏴᎳᏎᎢ.
032260.english: And Peter said, Man, I know not what thou sayest. And immediately, while he yet spake, the cock crew.
032260.phonetic: Qui-da-no hi-a nu-we-se-i; Hi-s-ga-ya, v-tla yi-go-li-ga ni-we-s-gv-i.  Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv, a-si-quo ka-ne-ge-i, tsa-ta-ga u-yv-la-se-i.

032261.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎤᎦᏔᎲᏒ ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏁ ᏈᏓ.  ᏈᏓᏃ ᎤᏅᏓᏕ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏏᏉ ᏄᏴᎳᏒᎾ ᏣᏔᎦ ᏦᎢ ᏅᏓᏍᏆᏓᏱᎵ.
032261.english: And the Lord turned, and looked upon Peter. And Peter remembered the word of the Lord, how he had said unto him, Before the cock crow, thou shalt deny me thrice.
032261.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no u-ga-ta-hv-sv du-ka-hna-ne Qui-da.  Qui-da-no u-nv-da-de u-ne-tsv U-gv-wi-yu-hi, hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-le-i; A-si-quo nu-yv-la-sv-na tsa-ta-ga tso-i nv-da-s-qua-da-yi-li.

032262.english: And Peter went out, and wept bitterly.

032263.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯᏃ ᏥᏌ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏴᎯ ᎦᎬᏩᏐᏢᏕ ᎠᎴ ᏕᎬᏩᏂᎮᎢ.
032263.english: And the men that held Jesus mocked him, and smote him.
032263.phonetic: A-ni-s-ga-ya-no Tsi-sa di-gv-wa-ni-yv-hi ga-gv-wa-so-tlv-de a-le de-gv-wa-ni-he-i.

032264.cherokee: ᏕᎬᏩᎦᏚᏢᏅᏃ ᎤᎧᏛ ᏕᎬᏩᏂᎮᎢ, ᎬᏩᏛᏛᎲᏍᎨ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎭᏙᎴᎰᎯ, ᎦᎪ ᏥᏨᏂᎦ?
032264.english: And when they had blindfolded him, they struck him on the face, and asked him, saying, Prophesy, who is it that smote thee?
032264.phonetic: De-gv-wa-ga-du-tlv-nv-no u-ka-dv de-gv-wa-ni-he-i, gv-wa-dv-dv-hv-s-ge hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i, Ha-do-le-ho-hi, ga-go tsi-tsv-ni-ga?

032265.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏏ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏬᏎᎮ ᎬᏩᏐᏢᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
032265.english: And many other things blasphemously spake they against him.
032265.phonetic: A-le u-tsa-ti a-si i-yu-da-le-gi go-hu-s-di gv-wo-se-he gv-wa-so-tlv-i-s-di-s-gv-i.

032266.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏉᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᏚᏂᎳᏫᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᎳᏫᎥ ᎬᏩᏘᏃᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ;
032266.english: And as soon as it was day, the elders of the people and the chief priests and the scribes came together, and led him into their council, saying,
032266.phonetic: I-ga-quo-no nu-li-s-ta-nv di-ni-la-wi-gi yv-wi a-ne-hv a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi du-ni-la-wi-tse-i, a-le da-ni-la-wi-v gv-wa-ti-no-le hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i;

032267.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎪ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ?  ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏨᏃᏁᎸ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎨᏦᎯᏳᎲᎦ;
032267.english: Art thou the Christ? tell us. And he said unto them, If I tell you, ye will not believe:
032267.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-go ga-lo-ne-dv?  S-gi-no-hv-si.  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, I-yu-no yi-tsv-no-ne-lv v-tla yv-ge-tso-hi-yu-hv-ga;

032268.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏱᏨᏯᏛᏛᏅ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎨᏍᎩᏁᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏙᎨᏍᎩᏲᎯ.
032268.english: And if I also ask you, ye will not answer me, nor let me go.
032268.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo yi-tsv-ya-dv-dv-nv v-tla yv-ge-s-gi-ne-tsi, a-le v-tla yi-do-ge-s-gi-yo-hi.

032269.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏓᎦᏂ ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏬᎸᎢ.
032269.english: Hereafter shall the Son of man sit on the right hand of the power of God.
032269.phonetic: I-lv-hi-yu dv-s-qua-lv-hi yv-wi U-we-tsi da-ga-ni a-ga-ti-si-di-tlv u-li-ni-gi-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-wo-lv-i.

032270.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎ ᏂᎦᏛ, ᏂᎯᏍᎪ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏰᎵ ᏂᏥᏫ, ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ.
032270.english: Then said they all, Art thou then the Son of God? And he said unto them, Ye say that I am.
032270.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se ni-ga-dv, Ni-hi-s-go U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi?  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ye-li ni-tsi-wi, a-yv-ye-no na-s-gi.

032271.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎬᏙᏗ ᎠᏏ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩ?  ᎢᎬᏒᏰᏃ ᎡᏓᏛᎦᏏ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ.
032271.english: And they said, What need we any further witness? for we ourselves have heard of his own mouth.
032271.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-ni-we-se-i, Ga-do-no i-gv-do-di a-si go-hi-yu-di-s-gi?  I-gv-sv-ye-no e-da-dv-ga-si u-wa-sv ka-ne-gv-i.

032301.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎨᏒ ᏚᎾᎴᏅ ᏆᎴᏗ ᏫᎬᏩᏘᏃᎮᎴᎢ.
032301.english: And the whole multitude of them arose, and led him unto Pilate.
032301.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no na-s-gi u-ni-tsa-ti ge-sv du-na-le-nv Qua-le-di wi-gv-wa-ti-no-he-le-i.

032302.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎮ ᎬᏭᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᏥᏩᏛᎲᎩ ᏕᏓᎴᎾᏍᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎧᏅᏍᏓᏕᎲᎩ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏏᏌ ᎠᎫᏴᎡᏗᏱ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎧᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
032302.english: And they began to accuse him, saying, We found this fellow perverting the nation, and forbidding to give tribute to Caesar, saying that he himself is Christ a King.
032302.phonetic: A-le u-na-le-nv-he gv-wu-hi-s-di-s-ge hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i, Hi-a na-s-gi do-tsi-wa-dv-hv-gi de-da-le-na-s-di-s-gv-gi yv-wi, a-le de-ka-nv-s-da-de-hv-gi a-ye-li a-de-lv Si-sa a-gu-yv-e-di-yi, hi-a ni-ka-we-s-gv-gi, a-yv a-gi-gv-wi-yu-hi, Ga-lo-ne-dv.

032303.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᎤᏛᏛᏁ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏂᎯᏍᎪ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ?  ᎤᏁᏤᎴᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏫ.
032303.english: And Pilate asked him, saying, Art thou the King of the Jews? And he answered him and said, Thou sayest it.
032303.phonetic: Qua-le-di-no u-dv-dv-ne, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ni-hi-s-go Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga?  U-ne-tse-le-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, na-s-gi ni-wi.

032304.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏎᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏩᏘ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ.
032304.english: Then said Pilate to the chief priests and to the people, I find no fault in this man.
032304.phonetic: Qua-le-di-no hi-a ni-ga-we-se-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le yv-wi, V-tla yi-tsi-wa-ti u-s-ga-nv-tsv hi-a a-s-ga-ya.

032305.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏓᏱᏕ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᏓᏖᎸᎲᏍᎦ ᎯᎠ ᏴᏫ, ᏓᏕᏲᏂᏙᎭ ᏧᏗᏱ ᏂᎬᎾᏛᎢ, ᎨᎵᎵ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏂ ᎢᏯᏍᏘ.
032305.english: And they were the more fierce, saying, He stirreth up the people, teaching throughout all Jewry, beginning from Galilee to this place.
032305.phonetic: A-se-no u-ni-s-da-yi-de hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i, Da-te-lv-hv-s-ga hi-a yv-wi, da-de-yo-ni-do-ha Tsu-di-yi ni-gv-na-dv-i, Ge-li-li nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv a-ni i-ya-s-ti.

032306.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎠᏂᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏛᏛᏁ, ᎨᎵᎵᏍᎪ ᎡᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎤᏛᏁᎢ.
032306.english: When Pilate heard of Galilee, he asked whether the man were a Galilaean.
032306.phonetic: Qua-le-di-no u-dv-ga-nv Ge-li-li a-ni-ne-i-s-di-s-gv u-dv-dv-ne, Ge-li-li-s-go e-hi hi-a a-s-ga-ya, u-dv-ne-i.

032307.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒᏉᏃ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎡᎶᏛ ᏭᏪᎧᏁᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎡᏙᎮ ᎾᎯᏳᎢ.
032307.english: And as soon as he knew that he belonged unto Herod's jurisdiction, he sent him to Herod, who himself also was at Jerusalem at that time.
032307.phonetic: U-do-le-ho-sv-quo-no E-lo-dv u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv na-hna e-di ge-sv-i, E-lo-dv wu-we-ka-ne-le-i, na-s-gi E-lo-dv u-wa-sv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi e-do-he na-hi-yu-i.

032308.cherokee: ᎡᎶᏛᏃ ᎤᎪᎲ ᏥᏌ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎣᏎ ᎤᏰᎸᏁᎢ; ᎪᎯᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᏅᏩᏚᎵᏍᎨ ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏗᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎤᏛᎦᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎤᏩᏎ ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
032308.english: And when Herod saw Jesus, he was exceeding glad: for he was desirous to see him of a long season, because he had heard many things of him; and he hoped to have seen some miracle done by him.
032308.phonetic: E-lo-dv-no u-go-hv Tsi-sa, u-tsa-ti o-se u-ye-lv-ne-i; go-hi-di-yu-ye-no nv-wa-du-li-s-ge u-go-wa-dv-di-yi, nv-di-ga-li-s-di-do-di-s-ge u-tsa-ti tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-tsi-no-he-s-gv u-dv-ga-nv-i, a-le u-du-gi u-wa-se u-go-wa-dv-di-yi go-hu-s-di u-s-qua-ni-go-di du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

032309.cherokee: ᎤᏛᏛᎮᎸᏁᏃ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏁᏤᎴᎢ.
032309.english: Then he questioned with him in many words; but he answered him nothing.
032309.phonetic: U-dv-dv-he-lv-ne-no u-tsa-ti tsu-da-le-nv-dv, a-se-no v-tla yu-ne-tse-le-i.

032310.cherokee: ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᏓᏂᏙᎨ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎬᏭᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨᎢ.
032310.english: And the chief priests and scribes stood and vehemently accused him.
032310.phonetic: Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi da-ni-do-ge u-li-ni-gi-dv gv-wu-hi-s-di-s-ge-i.

032311.cherokee: ᎡᎶᏛᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ ᎦᎬᏩᏐᏢᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏕᎰᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏛ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎤᏂᏄᏬᎥ ᏆᎴᏗ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏭᏂᎧᏁᎴᎢ.
032311.english: And Herod with his men of war set him at nought, and mocked him, and arrayed him in a gorgeous robe, and sent him again to Pilate.
032311.phonetic: E-lo-dv-no a-le tsu-tse-li a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi ga-gv-wa-so-tlv-ta-ne-i, a-le gv-wa-de-ho-ta-ne-i, a-le di-gv-wa-lv-sa-dv a-nu-wo u-ni-nu-wo-v Qua-le-di ta-li-ne wu-ni-ka-ne-le-i.

032312.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎢᎦ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎤᎾᎵᎢᏕᎢ; ᏗᎾᏓᏍᎦᎩᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᏯᏍᏘ.
032312.english: And the same day Pilate and Herod were made friends together: for before they were at enmity between themselves.
032312.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no i-ga Qua-le-di a-le E-lo-dv u-na-li-i-de-i; di-na-da-s-ga-gi-yu-ye-no i-yu-li-s-ta-nv-hi ge-se na-hi-yu i-ya-s-ti.

032313.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᏚᎳᏫᏛ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏫ,
032313.english: And Pilate, when he had called together the chief priests and the rulers and the people,
032313.phonetic: Qua-le-di-no du-la-wi-dv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi, a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi, a-le u-ni-tsa-ti ge-sv yv-wi,

032314.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏍᎩᏯᏘᏃᎮᎸ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏴᏫ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᏗᎴᎾᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᏥᎪᎵᏰᎥᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏩᏘ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎡᏧᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
032314.english: Said unto them, Ye have brought this man unto me, as one that perverteth the people: and, behold, I, having examined him before you, have found no fault in this man touching those things whereof ye accuse him:
032314.phonetic: Hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, S-gi-ya-ti-no-he-lv hi-a a-s-ga-ya yv-wi du-na-da-nv-dv di-le-na-s-di-s-gi na-s-gi-ya-i; gv-ni-yu-quo-no tsi-go-li-ye-v-hi tsi-gi i-tsi-ga-ta-hv-i, v-tla go-hu-s-di yi-tsi-wa-ti u-s-ga-nv-tsv hi-a a-s-ga-ya na-s-gi nu-s-dv e-tsu-i-s-di-s-gv-i;

032315.cherokee: ᎡᎶᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎥᏝ; ᎾᎿᎭᏰᏃ ᎢᏤᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎸᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏩᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏄᏛᏁᎸ.
032315.english: No, nor yet Herod: for I sent you to him; and, lo, nothing worthy of death is done unto him.
032315.phonetic: E-lo-dv a-le na-s-quo v-tla; na-hna-ye-no i-tse-nv-s-di-yi i-tsv-ne-tse-lv-gi; gv-ni-yu-quo-no v-tla go-hu-s-di ye-li gv-wa-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv yi-nu-dv-ne-lv.

032316.english: I will therefore chastise him, and release him.

032317.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏰᏃ ᏌᏉ ᏧᏲᎯᏎᏗ ᎨᏐ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎢ.
032317.english: (For of necessity he must release one unto them at the feast.)
032317.phonetic: A-se-ye-no sa-quo tsu-yo-hi-se-di ge-so di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ge-sv i-yu-i.

032318.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎷᏁᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᎷᎦ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᏆᎳᏆᏃ ᏗᏍᎩᏲᎯᏏ.
032318.english: And they cried out all at once, saying, Away with this man, and release unto us Barabbas:
032318.phonetic: U-ne-lu-ne-no sa-quo i-ga-ga-dv, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Hi-lu-ga hi-a a-s-ga-ya, Qua-la-qua-no di-s-gi-yo-hi-si.

032319.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏆᎳᏆ ᎤᏓᏑᏰᏛ ᎤᎾᎵᏖᎸᏅ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᏚᎲ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎸᎢ ᎠᏥᏍᏛᏗᏍᏔᏁ ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎠᏥᏴᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ.
032319.english: (Who for a certain sedition made in the city, and for murder, was cast into prison.)
032319.phonetic: Na-s-gi Qua-la-qua u-da-su-ye-dv u-na-li-te-lv-nv na-hna ga-du-hv a-le u-da-lv-i a-tsi-s-dv-di-s-ta-ne di-da-s-du-di-yi a-tsi-yv-ta-nv-hi ge-se-i.

032320.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏪᎪᏗᏱ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏁ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏚᏁᏤᎴᎢ.
032320.english: Pilate therefore, willing to release Jesus, spake again to them.
032320.phonetic: Qua-le-di-no u-du-li-s-gv Tsi-sa u-we-go-di-yi nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-ne ta-li-ne du-ne-tse-le-i.

032321.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎷᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎯᏍᏛᎥᎦ, ᎯᏯᏛᎥᎦ.
032321.english: But they cried, saying, Crucify him, crucify him.
032321.phonetic: A-se-no u-ne-lu-ne hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Hi-s-dv-v-ga, hi-ya-dv-v-ga.

032322.cherokee: ᏦᎢᏁᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ?  ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏩᏛᎡᎭ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏩᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏓᏥᎵᎥᏂᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᏥᏲᏏ.
032322.english: And he said unto them the third time, Why, what evil hath he done? I have found no cause of death in him: I will therefore chastise him, and let him go.
032322.phonetic: Tso-i-ne-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ga-do-no, ga-do u-s-di u-yo du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv?  V-tla yi-tsi-wa-dv-e-ha go-hu-s-di ye-li gv-wa-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i;  na-s-gi i-yu-s-di da-tsi-li-v-ni-li a-le do-da-tsi-yo-si.

032323.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᎾᏟᏂᎬᏁᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎠᏂᏁᎬᎢ, ᎠᏂᏔᏲᎯᎮ ᎠᎦᏛᏗᏱ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᏂᏁᎬ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏤᎢ.
032323.english: And they were instant with loud voices, requiring that he might be crucified. And the voices of them and of the chief priests prevailed.
032323.phonetic: A-se-no u-na-tli-ni-gv-ne-le a-s-da-ya a-ni-ne-gv-i, a-ni-ta-yo-hi-he a-ga-dv-di-yi.  Na-s-gi-no na a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-ni-ne-gv u-gv-wi-yu-tse-i.

032324.english: And Pilate gave sentence that it should be as they required.

032325.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏚᏪᎧᏁᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏔᏲᎴᎢ, ᏗᏓᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎠᏥᏴᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ ᏧᏍᏛᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏓᏑᏰᏛ ᎤᎾᎵᏖᎸᏅ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎸᎢ; ᏥᏌᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᏲᎯᏎᎴ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ.
032325.english: And he released unto them him that for sedition and murder was cast into prison, whom they had desired; but he delivered Jesus to their will.
032325.phonetic: A-le du-we-ka-ne-le na-s-gi tsu-ni-ta-yo-le-i, di-da-s-du-di-yi a-tsi-yv-ta-nv-hi tsi-ge-se-i tsu-s-dv-di-s-ge u-da-su-ye-dv u-na-li-te-lv-nv a-le u-da-lv-i; Tsi-sa-s-gi-ni du-yo-hi-se-le u-na-du-li-s-gv i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi.

032326.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏘᏂᏎᏃ ᎤᏂᏂᏴᎮ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏌᏩᏂ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᏌᎵᏂ ᎡᎯ, ᏙᏗᎦᎶᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎾᏃᏝᏗᏍᏔᏁ ᏧᏓᎿᎭᏩᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎢᏒ ᎣᏂᏗᏢ ᎤᏪᏅᏍᏗᏱ.
032326.english: And as they led him away, they laid hold upon one Simon, a Cyrenian, coming out of the country, and on him they laid the cross, that he might bear it after Jesus.
032326.phonetic: Gv-wa-ti-ni-se-no u-ni-ni-yv-he gi-lo i-yu-s-di Sa-wa-ni tsu-do-i-dv, Sa-li-ni e-hi, do-di-ga-lo-ge-sv nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi, na-s-gi-no u-na-no-tla-di-s-ta-ne tsu-da-hna-wa-dv, na-s-gi Tsi-sa a-i-sv o-ni-di-tlv u-we-nv-s-di-yi.

032327.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏎᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏓᏂᏴᎨ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᎪᏂᎮᎢ.
032327.english: And there followed him a great company of people, and of women, which also bewailed and lamented him.
032327.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-se-no u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi, a-le a-ni-ge-yv, na-s-gi na-s-quo da-ni-yv-ge a-le gv-wa-s-go-ni-he-i.

032328.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏚᎦᏔᎲᎡᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏥᎨᏴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏧᏪᏥ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏍᎪᏂᎸᎩ, ᎢᏨᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏣᏓᏍᎪᏂᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏤᏥ ᏗᏥᏍᎪᏂᎦ.
032328.english: But Jesus turning unto them said, Daughters of Jerusalem, weep not for me, but weep for yourselves, and for your children.
032328.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no du-ga-ta-hv-e-lv hi-a nu-we-se-i, I-tsi-ge-yv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi tsu-we-tsi, tle-s-di a-yv s-gi-s-go-ni-lv-gi, i-tsv-sv-s-gi-ni di-tsa-da-s-go-ni-ga, a-le di-tse-tsi di-tsi-s-go-ni-ga.

032329.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏰᏃ ᏛᎵᏰᎢᎶᎵ ᎢᎦ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏛᏂᏪᏏ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᎾᎷᎸᎥᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏓᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏓᏍᏛᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
032329.english: For, behold, the days are coming, in the which they shall say, Blessed are the barren, and the wombs that never bare, and the paps which never gave suck.
032329.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-ye-no dv-li-ye-i-lo-li i-ga, na-hi-yu hi-a nv-dv-ni-we-si, O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di di-na-lu-lv-v-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le tsu-na-da-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le tsu-na-da-s-dv-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na.

032330.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏛᎾᎴᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏙᏛᏂᏪᏎᎵ ᏙᏓᎸᎢ, ᏍᎩᏯᏐᎥᎦ; ᎠᎴ ᏚᏌᎯᎸᎢ, ᏍᎩᏳᏢᎥᎦ.
032330.english: Then shall they begin to say to the mountains, Fall on us; and to the hills, Cover us.
032330.phonetic: Hna-quo-no dv-na-le-nv-hi hi-a ni-do-dv-ni-we-se-li do-da-lv-i, S-gi-ya-so-v-ga; a-le du-sa-hi-lv-i, S-gi-yu-tlv-v-ga.

032331.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᏤ ᏡᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏅᏛᏅᏁᎵ, ᎦᏙ ᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎧᏲᏛ ᏡᎬᎢ?
032331.english: For if they do these things in a green tree, what shall be done in the dry?
032331.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no i-tse tlu-gv na-s-gi yi-nv-dv-nv-ne-li, ga-do gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di u-ka-yo-dv tlu-gv-i?

032332.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏕᎨᎦᏘᏅᏎ ᏗᎨᏥᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
032332.english: And there were also two other, malefactors, led with him to be put to death.
032332.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo a-ni-ta-li nv-wa-na-da-le u-yo tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi i-tsu-la-ha de-ge-ga-ti-nv-se di-ge-tsi-i-s-di-yi.

032333.cherokee: ᏭᏂᎷᏨᏃ ᎧᏫᎵ ᏚᏙᎥᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎬᏩᏛᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎾᏛᏁ ᎤᏲ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎠᎦᏍᎦᏂ ᎢᏗᏢ.
032333.english: And when they were come to the place, which is called Calvary, there they crucified him, and the malefactors, one on the right hand, and the other on the left.
032333.phonetic: Wu-ni-lu-tsv-no Ka-wi-li du-do-v-i, na-hna da-da-hna-wa-s-dv gv-wa-dv-ne-i, a-le du-na-dv-ne u-yo-tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-si-yv-wi a-ga-ti-si-di-tlv, so-i-no a-ga-s-ga-ni i-di-tlv.

032334.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎡᏙᏓ, ᏘᏙᎵᎩ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏯᏂᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ.  ᎤᏂᏯᏙᎴᏃ ᎤᏄᏬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏎᏍᏗᏍᎨᎢ.
032334.english: Then said Jesus, Father, forgive them; for they know not what they do. And they parted his raiment, and cast lots.
032334.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-i, E-do-da, ti-do-li-gi; v-tla-ye-no ya-ni-ga-ta-ha na-na-dv-ne-hv-i.  U-ni-ya-do-le-no u-nu-wo a-le a-na-se-s-di-s-ge-i.

032335.cherokee: ᏴᏫᏃ ᎤᎾᎴᎾᏫᏍᏕ ᏚᎾᎦᏙᏍᏕᎢ.  ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏚᎾᎵᎪᏁᎴ ᎢᎬᏩᏕᎰᏔᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᏓᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎩ; ᎤᏩᏒ ᏩᎵᏍᏕᎸ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏑᏰᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
032335.english: And the people stood beholding. And the rulers also with them derided him, saying, He saved others; let him save himself, if he be Christ, the chosen of God.
032335.phonetic: Yv-wi-no u-na-le-na-wi-s-de du-na-ga-do-s-de-i.  Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi-no na-s-quo du-na-li-go-ne-le i-gv-wa-de-ho-ta-ne-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i, A-ni-so-i da-s-de-li-s-gv-gi; u-wa-sv wa-li-s-de-lv i-yu-no Ga-lo-ne-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-su-ye-dv ge-se-s-di.

032336.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏍᏉ ᎦᎬᏩᏐᏢᏕᎢ, ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎮ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏁᏁᎮ ᏧᏂᏦᏯᏍᏗ,
032336.english: And the soldiers also mocked him, coming to him, and offering him vinegar,
032336.phonetic: A-le a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi hna-s-quo ga-gv-wa-so-tlv-de-i, gv-wa-lu-tse-he a-le gv-wa-ne-ne-he tsu-ni-tso-ya-s-di,

032337.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏨᏒ ᎭᎵᏍᏕᎸ.
032337.english: And saying, If thou be the king of the Jews, save thyself.
032337.phonetic: A-le hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i, I-yu-no ni-hi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-se-s-di, tsv-sv ha-li-s-de-lv.

032338.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᏪᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏓᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏢ ᎠᏂᎪᎢ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎶᎻ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏈᎷ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎪᏪᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏁᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
032338.english: And a superscription also was written over him in letters of Greek, and Latin, and Hebrew, THIS IS THE KING OF THE JEWS.
032338.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo go-we-le u-li-s-da-dv ga-lv-la-di-tlv A-ni-go-i u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di, a-le A-ni-lo-mi u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di, a-le A-ni-qui-lu u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di go-we-le hi-a ni-gv-ne-i; Hi-A U-Gv-Wi-Yu-Hi A-Ni-Tsu-Si U-Na-Tse-Li-Ga.

032339.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᎦᏛᏅᎯ ᎦᎬᏩᏐᏢᏕᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎭᎵᏍᏕᎸ ᏨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏂᏍᏕᎸ.
032339.english: And one of the malefactors which were hanged railed on him, saying, If thou be Christ, save thyself and us.
032339.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no na-s-gi u-yo tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi na-s-gi di-ge-ga-dv-nv-hi ga-gv-wa-so-tlv-de-i, hi-a ni-ga-we-s-ge-i, I-yu-no ni-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-se-s-di, ha-li-s-de-lv tsv-sv a-le a-yv s-gi-ni-s-de-lv.

032340.cherokee: ᏐᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏁᏨ ᎤᎬᏍᎪᎸᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏱᎾᏰᏍᎦ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᏕᏣᏚᎪᏓᏁᎸ ᏥᎩ?
032340.english: But the other answering rebuked him, saying, Dost not thou fear God, seeing thou art in the same condemnation?
032340.phonetic: So-i-s-gi-ni tsu-ne-tsv u-gv-s-go-lv-ne-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Tla-s-go U-ne-la-nv-hi yi-na-ye-s-ga u-tlo-yi-quo de-tsa-du-go-da-ne-lv tsi-gi?

032341.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ; ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᏕᎩᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎩᏂᏍᏛᏗᎭ, ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ.
032341.english: And we indeed justly; for we receive the due reward of our deeds: but this man hath done nothing amiss.
032341.phonetic: A-yv-s-gi-ni u-do-hi-yu-hi du-yu-go-dv-i; a-yv-ye-no de-gi-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv du-yu-go-dv gi-ni-s-dv-di-ha, hi-a-s-gi-ni v-tla go-hu-s-di u-tsa-ti-ni i-yu-dv-ne-lv-hi yi-gi.

032342.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᏥᏌ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏍᏆᏅᏓᏛᎭ ᏫᎷᏨᎭ ᏣᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
032342.english: And he said unto Jesus, Lord, remember me when thou comest into thy kingdom.
032342.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-we-se-le Tsi-sa, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, s-qua-nv-da-dv-ha wi-lu-tsv-ha tsa-tse-li-go-hi.

032343.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎬᏲᏎᎭ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏥᎩ ᏫᏁᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ.
032343.english: And Jesus said unto him, Verily I say unto thee, To day shalt thou be with me in paradise.
032343.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya gv-yo-se-ha, Go-hi i-ga tsi-gi wi-ne-do-he-s-di nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv di-ge-sv-i.

032344.cherokee: ᏔᎳᏚᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎠᏂ ᎦᏙᎯ ᎤᎵᏏᎲᏎ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎢᏯᏍᏘ.
032344.english: And it was about the sixth hour, and there was a darkness over all the earth until the ninth hour.
032344.phonetic: Ta-la-du-no i-yv-dv i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv ge-se-i, a-le ni-gv-na-dv a-ni ga-do-hi u-li-si-hv-se tso-i-ne i-yu-tli-lo-dv i-ya-s-ti.

032345.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏏᎲᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎠᏰᏙᎳᏛ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏚᎵᏍᏡᏰᎢ.
032345.english: And the sun was darkened, and the veil of the temple was rent in the midst.
032345.phonetic: A-le nv-do u-li-si-hv-se-i, a-le a-nu-wo a-ye-do-la-dv u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-ye-li du-li-s-tlu-ye-i.

032346.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎡᏙᏓ, ᏂᎯ ᏕᎬᏲᎯᏏ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᏪᏒ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏕᎴᎢ.
032346.english: And when Jesus had cried with a loud voice, he said, Father, into thy hands I commend my spirit: and having said thus, he gave up the ghost.
032346.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no a-s-da-ya u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-i, E-do-da, ni-hi de-gv-yo-hi-si a-qua-da-nv-do-gi; na-s-gi-no nu-we-sv u-li-s-qua-de-le-i.

032347.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈᏃ ᏗᏓᏖᏁᎯ ᎤᎪᎲ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸᎢ ᎤᎸᏉᏔᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏓᏅᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎨᏎ ᎯᎠ.
032347.english: Now when the centurion saw what was done, he glorified God, saying, Certainly this was a righteous man.
032347.phonetic: A-s-go-hi-tsu-qui-no di-da-te-ne-hi u-go-hv nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv-i u-lv-quo-ta-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi hi-a nu-we-se-i, U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-da-nv-di a-s-ga-ya ge-se hi-a.

032348.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᎦᏙᏍᏔᏂᎸᎯ, ᎤᏂᎪᎲ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᏚᏅᏂᎴ ᏗᏂᏁᏥᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏨᏎᎢ.
032348.english: And all the people that came together to that sight, beholding the things which were done, smote their breasts, and returned.
032348.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no yv-wi na-hna a-go-wa-dv-di ge-sv u-na-ga-do-s-ta-ni-lv-hi, u-ni-go-hv nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv du-nv-ni-le di-ni-ne-tsi-yi, a-le u-na-tsv-se-i.

032349.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎬᏩᎦᏔᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏛ ᎢᏅ ᏧᎾᎴᏅᏁᎢ ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ.
032349.english: And all his acquaintance, and the women that followed him from Galilee, stood afar off, beholding these things.
032349.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no gv-wa-ga-ta-hi ge-sv a-le a-ni-ge-yv Ge-li-li nv-da-gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-dv i-nv tsu-na-le-nv-ne-i a-ni-go-wa-ti-s-ge na-s-gi hi-a.

032350.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏦᏩ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎩ, ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ,
032350.english: And, behold, there was a man named Joseph, a counseller; and he was a good man, and a just:
032350.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-no a-s-ga-ya Tso-wa tsu-do-i-dv, di-ga-la-wi-gi, u-da-nv-ti a-s-ga-ya, a-le du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi,

032351.cherokee: (ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏳᏰᎸᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏄᎪᏔᏅ ᎠᎴ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎢ,) ᎠᎵᎹᏗᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᏂᏚᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎦᏘᏰ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ,^
032351.english: (The same had not consented to the counsel and deed of them;) he was of Arimathaea, a city of the Jews: who also himself waited for the kingdom of God.
032351.phonetic: (Na-s-gi v-tla o-si-yu yu-ye-lv-ne na-s-gi nu-s-dv du-nu-go-ta-nv a-le nu-na-dv-ne-lv-i,) A-li-ma-di-yi e-hi ge-se-i, na-s-gi A-ni-tsu-si u-ni-du-hv-i, na-s-gi na-s-quo a-ga-ti-ye U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i,^

032352.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏆᎴᏗ ᏭᎷᏤᎴ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏔᏲᏎᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ.
032352.english: This man went unto Pilate, and begged the body of Jesus.
032352.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya Qua-le-di wu-lu-tse-le a-le u-ta-yo-se-le Tsi-sa a-ye-lv-i.

032353.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᏒ ᏙᎴᏛ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎤᏪᏣᏄᎶᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏤᎵᏍᏛ ᎤᏅᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏲᎯ ᎠᏔᎴᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏥᏅᏅᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
032353.english: And he took it down, and wrapped it in linen, and laid it in a sepulchre that was hewn in stone, wherein never man before was laid.
032353.phonetic: A-le u-de-sv do-le-dv a-nu-wo u-we-tsa-nu-lo-ta-ne-i, a-le a-tse-li-s-dv u-nv-ne na-s-gi nv-yo-hi a-ta-le-dv, na-s-gi na-hna i-lv-hi-yu gi-lo na-tsi-nv-nv-na ge-sv-i.

032354.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᎩᏥᏍᎨᎢ.
032354.english: And that day was the preparation, and the sabbath drew on.
032354.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no i-ga a-dv-nv-i-s-do-di-yi ge-se-i, u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv-no hna-quo u-gi-tsi-s-ge-i.

032355.cherokee: ᎠᏂᎨᏴᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏛ, ᎣᏂ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏩᏗᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎪᎮ ᎠᏤᎵᏍᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎤᏂᏅᏅ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ.
032355.english: And the women also, which came with him from Galilee, followed after, and beheld the sepulchre, and how his body was laid.
032355.phonetic: A-ni-ge-yv-no na-s-quo Ge-li-li nv-da-gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-dv, o-ni a-na-li-s-da-wa-di-se-i, a-le u-ni-go-he a-tse-li-s-dv-i, a-le ni-gv-nv u-ni-nv-nv a-ye-lv-i.

032356.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏨᏎᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏁᎳᏁ ᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏠᏁᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏯᏪᏐᎴ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
032356.english: And they returned, and prepared spices and ointments; and rested the sabbath day according to the commandment.
032356.phonetic: U-na-tsv-se-no a-le u-na-da-ne-la-ne ga-wa-sv-gi a-le a-tlo-ne-di; a-le u-ni-ya-we-so-le u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

032401.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏃ ᎢᎦ ᏑᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎩᎳ ᎢᎦ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᏂᎷᏤ ᎠᏤᎵᏍᏛᎢ, ᏚᏂᏲᎴ ᏗᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᏁᎮᎢ.
032401.english: Now upon the first day of the week, very early in the morning, they came unto the sepulchre, bringing the spices which they had prepared, and certain others with them.
032401.phonetic: I-gv-yi-yi-no i-ga su-na-do-da-qua-s-di ge-sv gi-la i-ga tsi-ni-ga-li-s-di-s-go-i, u-ni-lu-tse a-tse-li-s-dv-i, du-ni-yo-le di-ga-wa-sv-gi na-s-gi tsu-na-da-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le gi-lo i-yu-na-s-di a-ne-he-i.

032402.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏩᏛᎮᏃ ᏅᏯ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏫᎦᏌᏆᎴᎸᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎠᏤᎵᏍᏛᎢ.
032402.english: And they found the stone rolled away from the sepulchre.
032402.phonetic: U-ni-wa-dv-he-no nv-ya i-yv-dv wi-ga-sa-qua-le-lv-s-ta-nv-hi ge-se a-tse-li-s-dv-i.

032403.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏴᎸᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏂᎾᏩᏛᎮ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ.
032403.english: And they entered in, and found not the body of the Lord Jesus.
032403.phonetic: U-ni-yv-lv-no v-tla yu-ni-na-wa-dv-he a-ye-lv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa.

032404.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎾᏕᏯᏔᏁᎮ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎡᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎾᎥ ᏚᎾᎴᏂᎴ ᏗᎬᏩᏔᎷᎩᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏄᏩᎢ;
032404.english: And it came to pass, as they were much perplexed thereabout, behold, two men stood by them in shining garments:
032404.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-na-de-ya-ta-ne-he na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-i, e-ni-yu-quo a-ni-ta-li a-ni-s-ga-ya na-v du-na-le-ni-le di-gv-wa-ta-lu-gi-s-gi tsu-na-nu-wa-i;

032405.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎢᎮᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏂᏚᏅᏁ ᏚᎾᎧᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏂᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎢᎡᏥᏲᎭ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏄᎾᏛᏅᎢ?
032405.english: And as they were afraid, and bowed down their faces to the earth, they said unto them, Why seek ye the living among the dead?
032405.phonetic: A-ni-s-ga-i-he-no a-le e-la-di ni-du-nv-ne du-na-ka-dv-i, na-s-gi hi-a ni-gv-wa-ni-we-se-le-i, Ga-do-no gv-no-dv i-e-tsi-yo-ha tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi nu-na-dv-nv-i?

032406.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᏂ ᏱᎦᎾ, ᏚᎴᏅᏰᏃ; ᎢᏣᏅᏓᏓ ᏂᏥᏪᏎᎸᎢ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏤᏙᎲᎩ,
032406.english: He is not here, but is risen: remember how he spake unto you when he was yet in Galilee,
032406.phonetic: V-tla a-ni yi-ga-na, du-le-nv-ye-no; I-tsa-nv-da-da ni-tsi-we-se-lv-i a-si-quo Ge-li-li tse-do-hv-gi,

032407.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏎ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᏗᎨᏥᏲᎯᏎᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏛᏗ ᏓᏓᎾᏩᏍᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎢᎦ ᏧᎴᎯᏐᏗ.
032407.english: Saying, The Son of man must be delivered into the hands of sinful men, and be crucified, and the third day rise again.
032407.phonetic: Hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-s-gv-gi, yv-wi U-we-tsi a-se yv-wi a-ni-s-ga-na di-ge-tsi-yo-hi-se-di ge-se-s-di, a-le a-ga-dv-di da-da-na-wa-s-dv-i, a-le tso-i-ne i-ga tsu-le-hi-so-di.

032409.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏤᎵᏍᏛ ᏗᎤᎾᏨᏎᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᏚᏂᏃᏁᎴ ᏌᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ.
032409.english: And returned from the sepulchre, and told all these things unto the eleven, and to all the rest.
032409.phonetic: A-le a-tse-li-s-dv di-u-na-tsv-se-i na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv du-ni-no-ne-le sa-du i-ya-ni-dv, a-le ni-ga-dv a-ni-so-i.

032410.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎺᎵ ᎹᎩᏕᎵ ᎡᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏦᎠᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎺᎵ ᏥᎻ ᎤᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏫᎬᏩᏂᏃᏁᎴ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ.
032410.english: It was Mary Magdalene, and Joanna, and Mary the mother of James, and other women that were with them, which told these things unto the apostles.
032410.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a Me-li Ma-gi-de-li e-hi, a-le Tso-a-na, a-le Me-li Tsi-mi u-tsi, a-le nv-wa-na-da-le a-ni-ge-yv a-ne-hi, na-s-gi tsi-wi-gv-wa-ni-no-ne-le ge-tsi-nv-si-dv.

032411.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎸᎯᏃ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏅᏩᏍᏕᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎨᎪᎢᏳᏁᎢ.
032411.english: And their words seemed to them as idle tales, and they believed them not.
032411.phonetic: U-ni-no-he-lv-hi-no a-se-quo-quo nv-wa-s-de-i, a-le v-tla yi-ge-go-i-yu-ne-i.

032412.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᏚᎴᏅ, ᏚᏍᏆᎸᏔᏁ ᎠᏤᎵᏍᏛ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ; ᎤᏗᏍᏚᏅᏃ ᏚᎪᎮ ᏙᎴᏛ ᏗᏄᏬ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏙᎦᏁᎢ, ᎤᏓᏅᏎᏃ ᎠᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸᎢ.
032412.english: Then arose Peter, and ran unto the sepulchre; and stooping down, he beheld the linen clothes laid by themselves, and departed, wondering in himself at that which was come to pass.
032412.phonetic: Qui-da-no du-le-nv, du-s-qua-lv-ta-ne a-tse-li-s-dv wu-lo-se-i; u-di-s-du-nv-no du-go-he do-le-dv di-nu-wo u-ne-la-gi i-yv-dv do-ga-ne-i, u-da-nv-se-no a-s-qua-ni-go-s-ge na-s-gi nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv-i.

032413.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎾᎯᏳᏉ ᎢᎦ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎤᎾᏓᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎸᎯ ᏗᎦᏚᎲ ᎡᎺᏯᏏ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᏩᏂᎦᏖᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᎳ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᏂᏚᏓᎴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ.
032413.english: And, behold, two of them went that same day to a village called Emmaus, which was from Jerusalem about threescore furlongs.
032413.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo, na-hi-yu-quo i-ga a-ni-ta-li u-na-da-s-da-wa-di-do-lv-hi di-ga-du-hv E-me-ya-si tsu-do-i-dv wa-ni-ga-te-i, na-s-gi tsu-ne-la i-yv-dv i-yu-tli-lo-dv ni-du-da-le Tsi-lu-si-li-mi.

032414.english: And they talked together of all these things which had happened.

032415.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎠᎾᎵᏃᎮᏍᎨ ᎠᎴ ᏓᎾᏓᏛᏛᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᏥᏌ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎾᎥ ᎤᎷᏨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏅᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
032415.english: And it came to pass, that, while they communed together and reasoned, Jesus himself drew near, and went with them.
032415.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne na-s-gi a-si-quo a-na-li-no-he-s-ge a-le da-na-da-dv-dv-hv-s-ge-i, Tsi-sa u-wa-sv na-v u-lu-tsv na-s-gi u-ne-nv-s-ta-ne-i.

032416.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏗᏂᎦᏙᎵ ᏕᎨᏥᏂᏴᎡᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏬᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
032416.english: But their eyes were holden that they should not know him.
032416.phonetic: A-se-no di-ni-ga-do-li de-ge-tsi-ni-yv-e-le na-s-gi gv-wo-li-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

032417.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏑᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᎢᏍᏗᏃᎮᎭ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏍᏓᎵᏃᎮᎭ ᎢᏍᏓᎢᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᏉ ᏥᏅᏩᏍᏗ ᏥᏍᏓᏓᏅᏔ?
032417.english: And he said unto them, What manner of communications are these that ye have one to another, as ye walk, and are sad?
032417.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-su-we-se-le-i, Ga-do i-s-di-no-he-ha hi-a na-s-gi tsi-s-da-li-no-he-ha i-s-da-i-sv-i a-le u-yo-quo tsi-nv-wa-s-di tsi-s-da-da-nv-ta?

032418.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏟᎣᏆ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏥᎪ ᎮᏙᎯᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᎪᎯ ᏥᎩ?
032418.english: And the one of them, whose name was Cleopas, answering said unto him, Art thou only a stranger in Jerusalem, and hast not known the things which are come to pass therein these days?
032418.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no na-s-gi Tli-o-qua tsu-do-i-dv u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsi-go he-do-hi-quo ni-hi Tsi-lu-si-li-mi, a-le ni-ga-ta-hv-na-quo na-s-gi na-hna nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv go-hi tsi-gi?

032419.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᏤᎲᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
032419.english: And he said unto them, What things? And they said unto him, Concerning Jesus of Nazareth, which was a prophet mighty in deed and word before God and all the people:
032419.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ga-do u-s-di?  Hi-a-no ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, Tsi-sa Na-se-li-di tse-hv-gi nu-li-s-da-ne-lv-i, na-s-gi a-do-le-ho-s-gi tsi-ge-sv-gi, u-li-ni-gi-dv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv a-le da-de-yo-hv-s-gv tsi-ge-se U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv a-le ni-ga-dv yv-wi a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i.

032420.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏦᎦᏤᎵ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏥᏕᎬᏩᏲᏎ ᏣᎫᎪᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎬᏩᏛᏅᎩ.
032420.english: And how the chief priests and our rulers delivered him to be condemned to death, and have crucified him.
032420.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-a-ne-lo-hi a-le tso-ga-tse-li nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi tsi-de-gv-wa-yo-se tsa-gu-go-da-ne-di-yi u-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi, a-le tsi-gv-wa-dv-nv-gi.

032421.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎣᎬᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏗᏓᏱᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏥᎩ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎤᎩᏥᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ;
032421.english: But we trusted that it had been he which should have redeemed Israel: and beside all this, to day is the third day since these things were done.
032421.phonetic: A-se-no u-du-gi o-gv-sv-gi na-s-gi I-si-li di-da-yi-s-gi ge-sv-i.  A-le na-s-quo go-hi i-ga tsi-gi tso-i-ne u-gi-tsi-ha na-s-gi hi-a i-gv-wa-li-s-ta-nv-hi;

032422.cherokee: ᎥᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎣᎦᏓᏡᎬ ᎠᏁᎳ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎪᎦᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎳ ᏧᎩᏥᏍᎪ ᎠᏤᎵᏍᏛ ᏭᏁᏙᎸᎯ;
032422.english: Yea, and certain women also of our company made us astonished, which were early at the sepulchre;
032422.phonetic: V-v, a-le na-s-quo gi-lo i-yu-na-s-di a-ni-ge-yv o-ga-da-tlu-gv a-ne-la u-s-qua-ni-go-di go-ga-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-nv-gi, na-s-gi gi-la tsu-gi-tsi-s-go a-tse-li-s-dv wu-ne-do-lv-hi;

032423.cherokee: ᏭᎾᏠᏨᏃ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ, ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏙᏥᎪᏩᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏅ ᎪᎪᏏ, ᎤᎾᏛᏁᎢ.
032423.english: And when they found not his body, they came, saying, that they had also seen a vision of angels, which said that he was alive.
032423.phonetic: Wu-na-tlo-tsv-no a-ye-lv-i, u-ni-lu-tse-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi na-s-quo do-tsi-go-wa-dv na-s-gi gv-nv go-go-si, u-na-dv-ne-i.

032424.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏤᎯ ᎤᏁᏅᏒᎩ ᎠᏤᎵᏍᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᏂᏩᏛᎮ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏕ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏂᎪᎮᎢ.
032424.english: And certain of them which were with us went to the sepulchre, and found it even so as the women had said: but him they saw not.
032424.phonetic: A-le gi-lo i-yu-s-di na-s-gi o-tse-hi u-ne-nv-sv-gi a-tse-li-s-dv-i, a-le wu-ni-wa-dv-he na-s-gi-ya nu-s-de a-ni-ge-yv nu-ni-we-sv-i; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na v-tla yu-ni-go-he-i.

032425.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᏥᏁᎫᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏃᎵᏳ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏄᏂᏪᏒ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ!
032425.english: Then he said unto them, O fools, and slow of heart to believe all that the prophets have spoken:
032425.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, I-tsi-ne-gu-tsi, a-le i-tsa-da-nv-dv i-tsi-s-ga-no-li-yu i-tso-hi-yu-di-yi ni-ga-v nu-ni-we-sv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi!

032426.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏎ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᏴᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ.
032426.english: Ought not Christ to have suffered these things, and to enter into his glory?
032426.phonetic: Tla-s-go hi-a na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-se u-gi-li-yo-i-s-di yi-ge-se Ga-lo-ne-dv, a-le wu-yv-s-di yi-ge-se ga-lv-quo-di-yu u-tse-li di-ge-sv-i.

032427.cherokee: ᎤᎴᏅᏔᏅᏃ ᎼᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᏚᏬᏏᏌᏁᎴ ᎾᎦᎥ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ.
032427.english: And beginning at Moses and all the prophets, he expounded unto them in all the scriptures the things concerning himself.
032427.phonetic: U-le-nv-ta-nv-no Mo-si, a-le ni-ga-dv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, du-wo-si-sa-ne-le na-ga-v go-we-lv na-s-gi u-wa-sv u-no-he-s-gv-i.

032428.cherokee: ᎾᎥᏃ ᎤᏂᎷᏤ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎾᎿᎭᏩᏂᎦᏛᎢ; ᎤᏟᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏥᏮᏗᎦᎶᏏᏐ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏄᏛᏁᎴᎢ.
032428.english: And they drew nigh unto the village, whither they went: and he made as though he would have gone further.
032428.phonetic: Na-v-no u-ni-lu-tse ga-du-hv na-hna wa-ni-ga-dv-i; u-tli-no i-yv-dv tsi-wv-di-ga-lo-si-so i-yu-s-di nu-dv-ne-le-i.

032429.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᎬᏩᏍᏗᏰᏔᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏂᏒᏏ, ᎿᎭᏉᏰᏃ ᎤᏒᎯᏰᎯᏳ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎳᏗᏳ ᏫᎧᎳ.  ᎤᏴᎴᏃ ᏙᏗᏒᏎᎵᏎᎢ.
032429.english: But they constrained him, saying, Abide with us: for it is toward evening, and the day is far spent. And he went in to tarry with them.
032429.phonetic: A-se-no i-gv-wa-s-di-ye-ta-ne-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, A-yv s-gi-ni-sv-si, hna-quo-ye-no u-sv-hi-ye-hi-yu, a-le e-la-di-yu wi-ka-la.  U-yv-le-no do-di-sv-se-li-se-i.

032430.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏅᎨᎢ ᏗᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏂᏎᎢ, ᎦᏚ ᎤᎩᏒ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᎭᎷᏴ ᏚᏁᎴᎢ.
032430.english: And it came to pass, as he sat at meat with them, he took bread, and blessed it, and brake, and gave to them.
032430.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne na-s-gi ga-nv-ge-i di-na-li-s-da-yv-ni-se-i, ga-du u-gi-sv u-li-he-li-tse-i, a-le u-gv-ha-lu-yv du-ne-le-i.

032431.cherokee: ᏗᏂᎦᏙᎵᏃ ᏚᎵᏍᏚᎢᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏬᎵᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏛᏔᏁ ᏓᏂᎧᏅᎢ.
032431.english: And their eyes were opened, and they knew him; and he vanished out of their sight.
032431.phonetic: Di-ni-ga-do-li-no du-li-s-du-i-se-i, a-le i-gv-wo-li-tse-i, a-le u-li-dv-ta-ne da-ni-ka-nv-i.

032432.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏗᎩᏂᎾᏫ ᏧᏗᎴᎩᏳ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎭᏫᏂ ᏥᎩᎾᎵᏃᎮᏗᏍᎬ ᏗᏓᎢᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏕᎩᏃᏏᏌᏁᎲ ᎪᏪᎵ?
032432.english: And they said one to another, Did not our heart burn within us, while he talked with us by the way, and while he opened to us the scriptures?
032432.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-na-da-we-se-le-i, Tla-s-go di-gi-ni-na-wi tsu-di-le-gi-yu yi-ge-se ha-wi-ni tsi-gi-na-li-no-he-di-s-gv di-da-i-sv-i, a-le tsi-de-gi-no-si-sa-ne-hv go-we-li?

032433.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏉᏃ ᎠᎵᏰᎢᎵᏒ ᏚᎾᎴᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏫᎤᏂᎶᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᏩᏛᎮ ᏓᏂᎳᏫᎡ ᏌᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎾᏓᏡᏩᏍᏗᏕᎩ,
032433.english: And they rose up the same hour, and returned to Jerusalem, and found the eleven gathered together, and them that were with them,
032433.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-quo-no a-li-ye-i-li-sv du-na-le-ne-i, a-le Tsi-lu-si-li-mi ta-li-ne wi-u-ni-lo-se-i, a-le du-ni-wa-dv-he da-ni-la-wi-e sa-du i-ya-ni-dv, a-le na-s-gi gv-wa-na-da-tlu-wa-s-di-de-gi,

032434.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏚᎴᏅ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏌᏩᏂ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏛᏁᎸ.
032434.english: Saying, The Lord is risen indeed, and hath appeared to Simon.
032434.phonetic: Hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i, U-gv-wi-yu-hi du-le-nv u-do-hi-yu-hi, a-le Sa-wa-ni gv-ni-ge-sv nu-dv-ne-lv.

032435.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎴ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᎠᎾᎢᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏃᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎦᏚ ᎠᎬᎭᎷᏯᏍᎬᎢ.
032435.english: And they told what things were done in the way, and how he was known of them in breaking of bread.
032435.phonetic: A-le u-ni-no-he-le nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv a-na-i-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi u-no-li-s-ta-nv ga-du a-gv-ha-lu-ya-s-gv-i.

032436.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᏥᏌ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᎴᏂᎴ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᏂᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
032436.english: And as they thus spake, Jesus himself stood in the midst of them, and saith unto them, Peace be unto you.
032436.phonetic: A-si-quo-no na-s-gi na-ni-we-s-ge-i, Tsi-sa u-wa-sv u-le-ni-le a-ye-li a-ni-nv-i, a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tsa-tse-li-ga ge-se-s-di.

032437.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏂᎾᏰᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᎴᎢ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎣᏥᎪᏩᏛ ᎠᏁᎵᏍᎨᎢ.
032437.english: But they were terrified and affrighted, and supposed that they had seen a spirit.
032437.phonetic: A-se-no u-ni-na-ye-se-i, a-le u-ni-s-ga-le-i, a-da-nv-do o-tsi-go-wa-dv a-ne-li-s-ge-i.

032438.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏣᏕᏯᏔᏁᎭ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᏃ ᏧᏢᏫᏛ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁ ᏙᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ?
032438.english: And he said unto them, Why are ye troubled? and why do thoughts arise in your hearts?
032438.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, ga-do-no i-tsa-de-ya-ta-ne-ha?  A-le ga-do-no tsu-tlv-wi-dv ni-tsa-li-s-da-ne do-di-tsa-da-nv-dv-i?

032439.cherokee: ᏗᏣᎧᏅᎦ ᏗᏉᏰᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏆᎳᏏᏕᏂ, ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏥᎾᏆᏛᏅ; ᏍᎩᏯᏒᏂᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏙᎴᎰᎯ; ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏇᏓᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏧᎪᎳ ᏱᏚᎸ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏥᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᎠᏴ ᏂᏓᏋᏅᎢ.
032439.english: Behold my hands and my feet, that it is I myself: handle me, and see; for a spirit hath not flesh and bones, as ye see me have.
032439.phonetic: Di-tsa-ka-nv-ga di-quo-ye-ni a-le di-qua-la-si-de-ni, a-quv-sv-quo hi-a tsi-na-qua-dv-nv; s-gi-ya-sv-ni-ga a-le i-tsa-do-le-ho-hi; a-da-nv-do-ye-no v-tla yu-que-da-la, a-le v-tla tsu-go-la yi-du-lv na-s-gi-ya tsi-tsi-go-wa-ti-ha a-yv ni-da-quv-nv-i.

032440.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᏪᏒ ᏚᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎴ ᏧᏬᏰᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎳᏏᏕᏂ.
032440.english: And when he had thus spoken, he shewed them his hands and his feet.
032440.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-we-sv du-na-nu-go-wi-se-le tsu-wo-ye-ni a-le tsu-la-si-de-ni.

032441.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᎾᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏎ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏂ ᎢᏥᎭ?
032441.english: And while they yet believed not for joy, and wondered, he said unto them, Have ye here any meat?
032441.phonetic: A-si-quo-no na-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na ge-se nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge a-na-li-he-li-gv-i, a-le u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-s-ge-i, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, A-li-s-da-yv-di-s-go a-ni i-tsi-ha?

032442.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏅᏁᎴᏃ ᎠᎬᎭᎸᏛ ᎠᏣᏗ ᎠᏒᎾᏘᎶᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎬᎭᎸᏛ ᏩᏚᎵᏏ.
032442.english: And they gave him a piece of a broiled fish, and of an honeycomb.
032442.phonetic: Gv-wa-nv-ne-le-no a-gv-ha-lv-dv a-tsa-di a-sv-na-ti-lo-dv, a-le a-gv-ha-lv-dv wa-du-li-si.

032443.english: And he took it, and did eat before them.

032444.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᏨᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᏥᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎪᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎼᏏ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏚᏃᏪᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᏴ ᎬᎩᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ.
032444.english: And he said unto them, These are the words which I spake unto you, while I was yet with you, that all things must be fulfilled, which were written in the law of Moses, and in the prophets, and in the psalms, concerning me.
032444.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ni-tsv-we-se-lv-gi, a-si-quo tsi-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv-gi, na-s-gi ni-ga-v na-s-gi a-se i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv-i go-we-la-nv-hi ge-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi Mo-si u-tse-li-ga, a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi du-no-we-lv-i, a-le di-ka-no-gi-s-di-yi, a-yv gv-gi-no-he-s-gv-i.

032445.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏚᏍᏚᎢᎡᎴ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏃᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᎪᏪᎵ;
032445.english: Then opened he their understanding, that they might understand the scriptures,
032445.phonetic: Hna-quo-no du-s-du-i-e-le du-na-da-nv-dv-i, na-s-gi tsu-no-li-s-di-yi go-we-li;

032446.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎢᎦ;
032446.english: And said unto them, Thus it is written, and thus it behoved Christ to suffer, and to rise from the dead the third day:
032446.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, na-s-gi hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-la, a-le na-s-gi a-se u-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv, a-le tsu-le-hi-so-di ge-sv u-yo-hu-sv tso-i-ne i-ga;

032447.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎤᏅᏙᏗᏱ ᎦᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏓᏅᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎥᏓᏗᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎨᎦᎵᏥᏙᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎤᎾᎴᏅᏗᏱ.
032447.english: And that repentance and remission of sins should be preached in his name among all nations, beginning at Jerusalem.
032447.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no du-do-v u-nv-do-di-yi ga-ne-tli-yv-s-di ge-sv o-da-nv-dv a-le a-s-ga-nv-tsv v-da-di-do-li-s-di ge-sv ge-ga-li-tsi-do-ne-di-yi ni-ga-dv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv da-ne-wa-di-sv-i, Tsi-lu-si-li-mi u-na-le-nv-di-yi.

032448.english: And ye are witnesses of these things.

032449.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎦᏓᏅᎵ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎢᏥᏁᏍᏗ ᎬᏂ ᎢᏣᏄᏬᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ.
032449.english: And, behold, I send the promise of my Father upon you: but tarry ye in the city of Jerusalem, until ye be endued with power from on high.
032449.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo, ga-da-nv-li i-tsi-lu-tse-di-yi E-do-da u-du-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i; a-se-no Tsi-lu-si-li-mi ga-du-hv i-tsi-ne-s-di gv-ni i-tsa-nu-wo-s-de-s-di u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi.

032450.cherokee: ᏚᏘᏅᏎᏃ ᏇᏗᏂᏱ ᎢᏴᏛ; ᏧᏬᏰᏂᏃ ᏚᏌᎳᏓᏅ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏚᏁᏤᎴᎢ.
032450.english: And he led them out as far as to Bethany, and he lifted up his hands, and blessed them.
032450.phonetic: Du-ti-nv-se-no Que-di-ni-yi i-yv-dv; tsu-wo-ye-ni-no du-sa-la-da-nv o-s-dv du-ne-tse-le-i.

032451.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᎧᏁᏤᎮᎢ ᎠᎦᏓᏓᎴᏔᏁ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎥᎢ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏃ ᏩᎦᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
032451.english: And it came to pass, while he blessed them, he was parted from them, and carried up into heaven.
032451.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-li-s-ta-ne-i a-si-quo o-s-dv de-ka-ne-tse-he-i a-ga-da-da-le-ta-ne a-ni-do-na-v-i, ga-lv-la-di-no wa-ga-ti-nv-s-ta-ne-i.

032452.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᏃ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏫᎤᏂᎶᏎ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎨᎢ;
032452.english: And they worshipped him, and returned to Jerusalem with great joy:
032452.phonetic: U-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-lv-no Tsi-lu-si-li-mi ta-li-ne wi-u-ni-lo-se u-tsa-ti a-na-li-he-li-ge-i;

032453.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᏉ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏯᎡᎢ, ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᏤᎮ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎸᏉᏗᏍᎨ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
032453.english: And were continually in the temple, praising and blessing God. Amen.
032453.phonetic: A-le ni-go-hi-lv-quo u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-ni-ya-e-i, a-na-li-he-li-tse-he a-le a-ni-lv-quo-di-s-ge U-ne-la-nv-hi.  E-me-nv.
